name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: We need to flip this seat in Western Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
Chad Magendanz is the best candidate for the job, we can’t sit this one out.

| | | | | |
---
| Following last week’s victory for the American people with the historic tax cuts, energy independence, and benefits to our farmers, business owners, police officers, manufacturers and seniors, I can’t help but feel optimistic for our country.
We have a real opportunity this November to effect change in our State Government, and end the Democrat Supermajority that led to the largest tax INCREASE in Washington State history this past legislative session.
This November, voters in Western Washington’s 5th Legislative District can change the direction in our state by supporting my friend Chad Magendanz, who is running for Washington State Senate in one of the most competitive districts in the state.
**The outcome of this race could decide the direction Washington takes for years to come.**
---
| | | | |
---
| We can either break the Democrats’ stranglehold on Olympia or allow their supermajority to continue taking us down the same path that has led to declining public schools, higher taxes, and an ineffective government.
Chad is a Navy veteran, a former software developer at Microsoft, current public school teacher, and one of the most effective legislators I’ve had the privilege to serve alongside. He’s thoughtful, principled, and focused on results, not headlines. We need more leaders like him if we want to see balance and results return to Olympia.
**Winning this race won’t be easy.** The Democrats are worried - and pouring money into this district. Chad is counting on grassroots supporters like you to make up the difference. You may not be able to actually vote for Chad, but that doesn’t mean you can’t help turn our state around by supporting his campaign with a generous donation!
[Can I count on you to donate $50, $100, or even $250 today to help Chad flip this seat?](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=506b8b69fd&e=5a45b9550e)
[[Donate to Chad ➝]](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=9e9fc4b7bf&e=5a45b9550e)
I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t critical. Chad has what it takes to win, but we need to step up with our support if we want to get it done.
Let’s take back our state!
---
|
---
| Congressman Michael Baumgartner
P.S. [Chad is a man of exceptional integrity. He deserves your support.](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=ff85e152c6&e=5a45b9550e)

And let me tell you, when it comes to Epstein, something smells ROTTEN : > Bureaucrats covering for bureaucrats > Black budgets and secret operations > Global Actors suppressing the truth It's all being withheld from Congress on purpose. Peter,
Every single Democratic member of Congress from Washington State signed a letter demanding Donald Trump release $137 million in education funding that he froze **_except my opponent, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez_**. This funding supports after-school programs, English-language learners, teacher training, and family support. Programs that working families like mine depend on. And unless it's released by **August 1** , schools will be forced to finalize budgets without it, cutting programs, laying off staff, and leaving kids behind. So where was Perez? And why does she always refuse to call out the Trump administration?
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUAuv4ZTn6eisVKrdmo3afQ-jAae_ttRvNmhoQPfDKBrD7310uvKamn48OWZLd5OR2y4nBSfC5H3jqNEkeRyX2kt9zG5JzQ5v8S4vB7XQq-BMX2mQd-1fNlb0DhF4ngj9Z32_mp8RWlrQzENp4kldsejBfCKdYcWfM4GyHBxlgoSSZ-q3dQmCauBI_uUHFD4oId-QrDjd6yoUr5Dla1zKppvHBVlgDzvx0f9CdWJeGlf6RGOjCqoA7AoTtBcHo0XRaLY_kzxQa7fxBUJvLoQ74joJcCOO6sHtBg75WkC0lx_Cw/4i7/O7_XYBEjSDKi5-XTLRp3ug/h1/h001.tUpudxUT7r8M1mLGcVjHoZFHLSJwMD__MZNfU28_K_4)
---
She wants you to believe she's some kind of reasonable moderate Democrat, but look closer--Perez keeps voting with Trump, and when it counts, she protects him instead of standing up for us. She voted for the Laken Riley Act, giving Trump legal cover to launch his cruel mass deportation machine. She voted for the SAVE Act, a MAGA-backed voter suppression bill that could disenfranchise millions of American women. She promotes MAGA lies about undocumented immigrants and the fentanyl crisis to justify cruel, racist policies. And just recently, she co-wrote an op-ed SUPPORTING House Speaker MAGA Mike Johnson while he pushed through a budget bill kicking millions off their healthcare and facilitating the biggest tax giveaway to the ultra-wealthy in generations. Now she's gone quiet while Trump's Education Secretary Linda McMahon holds $137 million hostage from Washington schools. As Rep. Marilyn Strickland said, "President Trump and Secretary McMahon are stealing $137 million from WA schools. That is unacceptable and absurd." She's right, and Perez's silence speaks volumes.
---
[ **HELP ME UNSEAT MARIE** ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUAuv4ZTn6eisVKrdmo3afQ-jAae_ttRvNmhoQPfDKBrD7310uvKamn48OWZLd5OR2x55_29rywuiKnWl0U1ihiHXhWPfEQZhXk6Z2eoiayG2yiR-gRMMsn1w0MTOfkCh7d86HUujXvBGBTymlaHC8Dk_v8lmcTeT8_fnNJqgsnGaN0NkmF9Wao3MMNAVveAw2nKujEt1Vj5SmXkECjJ3vd4XPg8bl1l4Z6cHLAu_Kz1B__1VoUklTsEQEl_8rPkZpGTIUW4pgW_0fTiLpOy12A3hGrlskhgbHMWJ8cGcRotTw/4i7/O7_XYBEjSDKi5-XTLRp3ug/h2/h001.2qgBv6QVaUhiS1jVULgdD2HoDU1KoHHRDqcaQV2S_RU)
---
I'm not here to play political games. I'm a working-class dad from a working-class district. I've packed the school lunches, I've done the math at the kitchen table, juggling childcare and medical bills. I know what this funding means to the working families that will suffer without it. If I were in Congress right now, you can bet I wouldn't be hiding behind donor retreats funded by the same billionaires backing ICE raids and school budget cuts. I'd be fighting like hell for our schools, our families, and our future. [**If you believe that 's the kind of leadership we deserve, chip in today. name: Save the Redwoods League
subject: Cast your vote for the Among the Giants 2026 calendar!
body:
YOU pick our 2026 Calendar Cover!

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111476667/557394697/-1299648888?contactdata=2WgQvcBAbzzrJFFTED+QO8eiYMt8fvQ1LoenPFMy77Xh1x6OYbnm16Xi0tOQKfFErALgQfLqOJ237fiaUU7NpnqEp54nk7oWuVIigSAGOxMFBUYnHPxxZTUBUrgZA/+jHUY2qSuSOPe7h+XzE+1yW2664vlBRU+8DSjPdAZBWTQ=&sourceid=1166591&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjMDAxNjcyLTEwNjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mmNWOXqL2Rl-VhgBkPjOnoz_b97EoTLDjC3BFCmYWrc=&emci=e367d19a-1c58-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2c001672-1061-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1504551)
Peter,
There is no shortage of photos that capture the vibrant life of the redwood forests. And on the days when you can’t be out on the trail, these images sweep us away to the forest, keeping us inspired and grounded.
With so many breathtaking photos, it’s not easy choosing which one will grace the cover of our annual Save the Redwoods League calendar... **that’s why we need YOUR help!**

clean_body: YOU pick our 2026 Calendar Cover! Peter, There is no shortage of photos that capture the vibrant life of the redwood forests. And on the days when you can’t be out on the trail, these images sweep us away to the forest, keeping us inspired and grounded. With so many breathtaking photos, it’s not easy choosing which one will grace the cover of our annual Save the Redwoods League calendar... that’s why we need YOUR help! This year, we’re featuring the unique creatures who make their home in the redwood forests. We’re highlighting redwood forest animals that are exclusive to or dependent on the redwood ecosystem, such as dusky-footed woodrats, marbled murrelets, and northern spotted owls. | | Coho Salmon by Thomas Kline / Alamy | | American Marten by RT Images / Shutterstock | | Northern Spotted Owl by Nick Bossenbroek / iStock | | Banana Slug by Max Whittaker Which is your favorite? There are no wrong answers, promise! Curating these photos each year for our calendar is something we always look forward to — it lets us bring a little of the forest’s wonder into your everyday life. Thank you for voting! With ❤️, Save the Redwoods League | ---|--- Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- |

name: Your Response Requested (via VPP)
subject: Trump is going AFTER PBS!!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We wouldn’t reach out if it wasn’t urgent:
| | **THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE FOR TOP DEMOCRATS:**

We’re reaching to Democrats who have not added their signature to our exclusive petition to stand with PBS in the face of MAGA attacks, sent on _July 11th, 2025._

**Trump will do ANYTHING to stop Americans from knowing the truth about his ILLEGAL overhaul of our government — _so we’re fighting back:_**

[**Please confirm your signature is submitted before tonight’s midnight deadline:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250714_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=6&akid=20600%2E878179%2EV7EUhH) | [25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: STAND WITH PBS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250714_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=7&akid=20600%2E878179%2EV7EUhH)
---
**\- - - - - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - - - - -**

Trump is threatening _any_ news organization that is willing to speak truth to his MAGA lies — [**_so now we need emergency assistance to save PBS »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250714_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=8&akid=20600%2E878179%2EV7EUhH)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250714_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=9&akid=20600%2E878179%2EV7EUhH)
**Folks, we know Trump will do ANYTHING to stop Americans from knowing the truth about his ILLEGAL overhaul of our government.**

_That’s why he’s wasting HIS time and OUR taxpayer dollars to go after PBS!_

[**Team, we still need 100 signatures from your state to reach conclusive data: Will you add your name to STAND WITH PBS? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250714_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=10&akid=20600%2E878179%2EV7EUhH)
[25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: STAND WITH PBS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250714_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=11&akid=20600%2E878179%2EV7EUhH)
---
Folks, it’s absolutely CRITICAL that Democrats are willing to stand with PBS in the face of ESCALATING MAGA attacks. **This fight is only going to get worse.**

_That’s why we’re calling on you to sign our urgent petition standing with PBS:_

[**Without 100 signatures, we can’t keep up in this fight: Please, friend, will you add your name to our time-sensitive petition to stand with PBS? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250714_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=12&akid=20600%2E878179%2EV7EUhH)
[ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH PBS IN THE FACE OF ESCALATING MAGA ATTACKS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250714_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=13&akid=20600%2E878179%2EV7EUhH)
---
***** 100 TOP DEMOCRATS URGENTLY NEEDED *****

Thank you for doing your part!
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20600%2E878179%2EV7EUhH). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20600%2E878179%2EV7EUhH).**

# 🇺🇸 Tell me what matters most to you 🇺🇸
---
|
Thank you again for stepping up to be part of this campaign.As a Marine Corps veteran, husband, father, and lifelong Central Floridian, I know the stakes we’re facing — and I believe in servant leadership rooted in listening.That’s why I want to hear from **YOU** directly.
🗳️ What issues matter most to your family?
💡 Where do you think Washington is out of touch?
💬 What do you want to see from your next Congressman?
**Click below to take a short, 3-second survey.**

This campaign is about more than politics. It’s about **faith, freedom, family, and the future of Florida** — and your input shapes the mission.
In Service to You,

**Justin Story**

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: We can’t fall short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=oCO0pWDVImiWd4gCl8fTLaYdJM%2FLGj1nJU2FSoH%2BEU%2FvNmwksGU%2BReE2DHxehZ7bLp2t8CWir3120thZm4vyFzdTQOYacHfkm7WGHzeqLqiFWsQpBPpJS%2BUviVNqa7R52Er6Q8TW%2BEAxmpmbhcmRAfHuoOBaWFHTdevxcScBMB%2FkdYpYlbBQyrSE6P1%2BJomhOUO0uSnmOge4DypvrMuLsRW5WTgKj7s2%2FBSU6a0mA%2F%2BARHUFuo5U1waxWOLjujPN66eliuaRiu7xp%2FW2mIHUaf%2BzY3e84LF6Ot6zvoC4neyI9%2BciLvHsXzsM3ABT22Fv1rwJGN%2FHflkSzHqicciynPaO8YHSS05LTXCG%2FhgOjT46ZUPcJ6A92Rgs%2FFWaOJH0AcdnKfmkmoKQaJObxar4Mu0DNPCvwCY%2BHgiEEAgaTRM%3D)
---
| |
---
It’s Gabe. I’m reaching out because our $6,000 mid-month fundraising goal has to be met by midnight tonight to keep our July fundraising on track, and I need to be straight with you: this is a critical goal for us. Earlier this month, Republicans passed a bill that slashes Medicaid and food assistance — programs families here in southern New Mexico rely on every day. Meanwhile, Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are pocketing tax breaks and throwing dark money into races like ours to keep their hold on power. They know this seat could flip the House in 2026, and they’re throwing everything they’ve got to stop us. If we don’t hit this goal by midnight, we risk falling behind — and they’ll see it as a green light to double down. We need to show Trump and his Republican enablers that we’re not just upset — we’re angry. Meeting this goal sends a message loud and clear: **we won’t let them get away with this.** [Will you chip in $10 right now to help us hit this deadline and show Trump and his MAGA allies we’re not backing down? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111477547/557427827/1449064918?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_071425_MM4_D4_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjE4YjM0NS0xYjYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pmU1a1iWIKMjlUezdm-I6Q1VzWt90fR3PR4dxdk1PBg=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

I’m reaching out because our $6,000 mid-month fundraising goal has to be met by midnight tonight to keep our July fundraising on track, and I need to be straight with you: this is a critical goal for us. Earlier this month, Republicans passed a bill that slashes Medicaid and food assistance — programs families here in southern New Mexico rely on every day. Meanwhile, Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are pocketing tax breaks and throwing dark money into races like ours to keep their hold on power. They know this seat could flip the House in 2026, and they’re throwing everything they’ve got to stop us. If we don’t hit this goal by midnight, we risk falling behind — and they’ll see it as a green light to double down. We need to show Trump and his Republican enablers that we’re not just upset — we’re angry. Now is the time to finally unseat Trump puppet David Schweikert and fight to flip the House blue. = | = It’s up to all of us to defend our democracy and protect our pockets from the incompetence of this current administration. From supporting national abortion bans to voting to gut healthcare and food assistance programs for thousands of Arizonans, Schweikert is too extreme for Arizona. Instead of showing loyalty to the constituents he represents, Schweikert has prioritized dismantling our democracy and destroying our economy. To see change in Arizona’s 1st Congressional District, we have to work together to unseat Schweikert and get rid of the Republican majority in the House. Supporting my race is one step you can take to help do just that. = If you’ve saved your payment info with ActBlue, your contribution will be processed immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = We can win together, — Marlene | To learn more about Marlene, visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Special Episode! Ava & Ella Join Mark
body:
Big News on CYFD, Trump, Housing &... Buc-ee’s?! 🎙️🐾 | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d820f392e0&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | We’ve got a special and super fun episode of the **No Doubt About It Podcast** this week — because while Krysty is out of town, Ava and Ella Ronchetti are stepping in to co-host with Mark!

🎧 [WATCH NOW ON YOUTUBE](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3505137e7c&e=567664f14c) →
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b952a090be&e=567664f14c)
| **✅ Praise Across Party Lines**
Mark crosses the political aisle to applaud Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham for requiring drug-addicted mothers to get treatment before they can bring newborn babies home. Mark doesn’t hold back on her CYFD failures but says: this decision is the right one — and we should say so.
**✅ Trump, Epstein & MAGA Frustrations **
Ava and Mark dive into why the Trump administration wants to move on from the Epstein case, even though many supporters are angry. Ava reads Trump’s own post, and they debate: Should this be a deal-breaker for MAGA voters? Mark shares why it isn’t for him.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3053af14cc&e=567664f14c)
---
| ✅ The Cracks in the Economy Housing prices are out of control — Mark explains why this is where the economy is showing real weakness.

**→** Why are interest rates still so high?

**→** Could Jerome Powell’s reluctance to cut rates cost him his job?

Ava puts Mark in the hot seat.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2a669fb005&e=567664f14c)
---
| **✅ Americans & Climate Change: The New Polling **
New data shows most Americans aren’t nearly as scared of climate change as the media wants you to believe. Mark explains why the left’s extreme climate rhetoric is backfiring.
**✅ CNN’s Absurd Question to Tom Homan**
CNN asked Border Czar Tom Homan one of the most ridiculous questions ever — and Mark and Ava react to how Homan handled it better than they would have!
**✅ Ella Joins for Lifestyle Talk

→ **Buc-ee’s in Colorado?! Ella leads the debate: Is the massive gas-station-meets-theme-park chain too big for tiny Palmer Lake, Colorado?

**→** Plus, trail cam highlights from Angel Fire, and... Mr. Met takes a tumble (you have to see this).
---
|
---
| **❤️ Help Us Keep Growing!**

✅ **LIKE** the episode on [YouTube](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5b29f31c48&e=567664f14c)

✅ **SUBSCRIBE** to [our channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=531d6f24a8&e=567664f14c) and hit the 🔔 for updates

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=1ad6ca9a16&e=567664f14c)

✅ **DONATE** to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=07358190e0&e=567664f14c)
Thank you for being part of the No Doubt About It family!
We’re so grateful to bring you news, laughs, and real conversation each week. Watch the episode, share it, and tell us what you think — we love hearing from you!

With gratitude,

**Mark, Ava & Ella Ronchetti **
_No Doubt About It Podcast 🎙️🐾🎉_

I’m proud to be one of the leading lawyers in the ongoing fight to defend democracy and protect voting rights in the face of Republican extremism. Right now, we’re seeing Donald Trump and his cronies launch an assault on our government and the rule of law. They’re spreading dangerous lies, attacking our institutions, and working to undermine our democracy for _their_ own gain. **But here’s the truth: We’re not going to let them get away with it.** My friends at the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State are standing up to these ongoing threats, but they can’t do this alone. They need Democrats like you in this fight, friend. That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation to the DASS Legal Fund today. Your support – right now – will help Democrats defend democracy in the courtroom and stop attacks on our elections. name: Justin Kwasa, LCV
subject: RE: Good Trouble Lives On National Day of Action is Thursday -- RSVP today (Typo Fix!)
body:
Sorry about that typo! RSVP Today

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI3MDA4NDIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI2MDE2MzI1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | | Sorry about that typo Peter, Obviously, we'd love for you to [_**_join_**_** _us for a national day of nonviolent action as we rally, march, host teach-ins, press conferences, and vigils to demand that Congress fight back and protect our freedom to vote._**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Pwb7C76b8gfr/eG1UeWg5VnlCMHB4R1R6M3hEb1lSaUhjUmZWenVvRjRPYkJBQW5Nb3FkZDI2M09SODlIcURoSWt3WVZwRW5lb05aOUVTMTlFQm5ncE1RVmRNRGNjem53UWtCakQ1YUxTM0lFNXFvK2hhejQ9S0/) Good Trouble Lives On, -TeamLCV
---
| |
---
|
* * *
---
| | | | Peter,
---
| | Good Trouble Lives On is a national day of action on **Thursday, July 17th** to respond to the attacks on our civil and human rights by the Trump administration. LCV is proud to partner with hundreds of organizations across the country to build on the resistance movement that the Hands Off and No Kings protests started earlier this year. Together, we'll mobilize millions of people to show Trump that in the United States, the power lies with the people. Coined by the late civil rights leader Congressman John Lewis, "Good Trouble" is the action of coming together to take peaceful, nonviolent action to challenge injustice and create meaningful change.
---
| | [**_RSVP today and click here to find the Good Trouble Lives On event closest to you. _**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/NvbyBGRbm4fV/eG1UeWg5VnlCMHB4R1R6M3hEb1lSaUhjUmZWenVvRjRPYkJBQW5Nb3FkZDI2M09SODlIcURoSWt3WVZwRW5lb05aOUVTMTlFQm5ncE1RVmRNRGNjem53UWtCakQ1YUxTM0lFNXFvK2hhejQ9S0/)
---
| | The civil rights leaders of the past have shown us the power of collective action. That’s why on **July 17th** , five years after the passing of Congressman John Lewis, communities across the country will take to the streets, courthouses, and community spaces to carry forward his fight for justice, voting rights, and dignity for all. With over 1200 events taking place across the country, it is easy for you to join the movement. From voter suppression bills like the SAVE Act to the criminalization of protest, the Trump administration is carrying out a full-scale attack on our civil and human rights. But we know the truth: in this country, the power lies with the people, and we’re rising to prove it.
---
| | [**_Join us for a national day of nonviolent action as we rally, march, host teach-ins, press conferences, and vigils to demand that Congress fight back and protect our freedom to vote. This is a moment for moral clarity and collective power._**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/RZbkcR8yLqFE/eG1UeWg5VnlCMHB4R1R6M3hEb1lSaUhjUmZWenVvRjRPYkJBQW5Nb3FkZDI2M09SODlIcURoSWt3WVZwRW5lb05aOUVTMTlFQm5ncE1RVmRNRGNjem53UWtCakQ1YUxTM0lFNXFvK2hhejQ9S0/)
---
| | Thank you for being with us Peter. We march in peace. We act in power. Good Trouble Lives On,
---
| | Justin Kwasa
Democracy Program Director
League of Conservation Voters
---
| | |
* * *
---
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,[ _update your contact information_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12700842&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI2MDE2MzI1MwS2&spReportId=MjI2MDE2MzI1MwS2) _._ [_Click here to unsubscribe_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12700842&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI2MDE2MzI1MwS2&spReportId=MjI2MDE2MzI1MwS2) from our supporter list. [_Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here_](mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=) , or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.
**740 15th St NW, Suite 700**
**Washington, DC 20005**
**202-785-8683**
---

---

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Fire Kristi Noem
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Fire Kristi Noem for her massive failures during the Texas floods](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9eed7e03-1f82-4d86-b998-4209fd7f5217/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teeb50958-4861-432a-87c2-f9a3d1ca4d33/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Kristi Noem was a terrible choice for Homeland Security Secretary, having neither the experience, the skills nor even the common sense to do the job. And now it appears the people of Texas are paying for her failures: _" The New York Times reported that on July 5, as the floodwaters in Texas began to recede, Noem failed to renew contracts with the four companies staffing FEMA call centers, leading to hundreds of contractors being fired. Documents showed that on July 6, FEMA received 2,363 calls and answered 846, about 35.8 percent. The next day, on July 7, the agency received 16,419 calls and answered only 2,613, roughly 15.9 percent._ _By July 8, Noem still hadn't renewed the contracts. "We still do not have a decision, waiver or signature from the DHS Secretary," one FEMA official wrote in a July 8 email to colleagues, according to the Times._ _This isn't the first report that Noem botched the response to the flooding in Texas. Noem reportedly delayed FEMA's initial response by instituting a policy that required her to personally sign off on all DHS expenditures exceeding $100,000. FEMA officials, who were unaware of the new rule, didn't receive Noem's go-ahead until Monday, at which point floodwaters had been raging for more than 72 hours. Meanwhile, she posted on Instagram asking her followers to vote for their favorite portrait of her to be used as her official governor's portrait. " ([Source](https://default.salsalabs.org/T778fe8f9-ed71-49a2-aff3-0f029b4a8308/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_ This job is too important to be held by someone who has no idea what they're doing, and actually makes things worse through their actions. [**Add your name, and demand that Noem be fired. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b64983f-06ac-4a5f-baea-6c19b8639d17/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

---
|

* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1acb365b-db9b-40cd-b9af-14808d08fd3d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

And now it appears the people of Texas are paying for her failures: " The New York Times reported that on July 5, as the floodwaters in Texas began to recede, Noem failed to renew contracts with the four companies staffing FEMA call centers, leading to hundreds of contractors being fired. Documents showed that on July 6, FEMA received 2,363 calls and answered 846, about 35.8 percent. The next day, on July 7, the agency received 16,419 calls and answered only 2,613, roughly 15.9 percent. By July 8, Noem still hadn't renewed the contracts. "We still do not have a decision, waiver or signature from the DHS Secretary," one FEMA official wrote in a July 8 email to colleagues, according to the Times. This isn't the first report that Noem botched the response to the flooding in Texas. Noem reportedly delayed FEMA's initial response by instituting a policy that required her to personally sign off on all DHS expenditures exceeding $100,000. FEMA officials, who were unaware of the new rule, didn't receive Noem's go-ahead until Monday, at which point floodwaters had been raging for more than 72 hours. Meanwhile, she posted on Instagram asking her followers to vote for their favorite portrait of her to be used as her official governor's portrait. " () This job is too important to be held by someone who has no idea what they're doing, and actually makes things worse through their actions. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on * Follow Us | | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5po1vg6tsdmnk60c1t0np64497899fdldqk33ig_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljmcor2cjh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7qr1eocfndnu6n84kg7dtn14ebf5ek9oi22mifo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljmcor2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqj0pl2lp80p4lrm144bsvuk76bhqjbhuem7qnng_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljmcor2cjh2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbmptsmaoa1m86o5s54fnm0f1kdaq1b1i2cn4gug_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljmcor2cjh2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

---

body:
I’ve prepared a brief note that I need you to read

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zekvuhlqs76sihe3ohcqai3e1uecp4qbn7426jh0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljmcor2c3h2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlu92j5pgurhobttko0a8k37bn73ifk3msvgvhu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljmcor2c3h2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8uibgjgm270ndomiurvba9f2gi6quh8oq1betb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljmcor2c3h2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,
---

---
Dinesh D’Souza

name: American Action News
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn0mk0cmsciqoonpsg83i6l0eqhu2qppt1f1c7f0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljm2pb4c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people—and you may be among them—I’m thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrtemd2mkkasveqvoo7fq2l8thg2eqvk0gbqoid0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljm2pb4c5h2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zppahpka42g3ooq8s36raomuvl2gnslloamsil5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljm2pb4c5h2bs)
---
| | “Tax cuts for the rich” is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze59dbdvpvh65voisoo6li7c8lnfbtfv40vhqcuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljm2pb4c5h2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ “Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich” _****now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfe1jjp0q4vvhpan7m73egru3cp1te12vpcmkod8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljm2pb4c5h2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

clean_body: I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. | | | | | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people—and you may be among them—I’m thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: | | | “Tax cuts for the rich” is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach in his commentary, Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge. Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. body:
I’ve prepared a brief note that I need you to read

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za4ch46la2s6el3q6e9rthtdbu2pn42i6jvu9d98_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljm1p34c9h2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zght38q0u0eud2i4l6ghoqlj66tnb83gapgoo9a8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljm1p34c9h2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z41kgclm1dj7g7sfaos77q2khhmk401j4qsusnmg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cljm1p34c9h2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,

Dinesh D’Souza

# Tuesday, July 15, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1997, iconic fashion designer [Gianni Versace was shot](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQxvGnwZujA4OJB4Yu3tK1o3WBI7kKQ4SpLb99lb5C50_6Sd__67bckBPnxyeu5FosS6ZjS9Qa1YV2qmfAc-WUuGTkSttB-CqLAmV6sL00S0BO56K74CKRoqEjJ61Rxg5Xa7unG6PxKk6jtOBj8CQDGMKo5d2Y8ap0x-6tgZVGAujBXDTeNVzh7qcIw0QgNFDgVurlu3BuT4rpLDvViy9rl9yztdcmhg-hZqHmxiu9B6FmA5MyVgs1Pxhz5n6nuqGnHnOodPT-J2PGLNTcVRdex_vlNlqh4bEipz--_avJ7tRvAAAA__91f3UP) and killed outside his Miami Beach mansion by serial killer Andrew Cunanan, shocking the fashion world and igniting a nationwide manhunt. Yesterday, we asked where you'd buy your dream vacation home--most chose mountain retreats or private beaches, ideally with no neighbors, no traffic, and spotty cell service. A few even wrote to us from theirs, proving the escape plan could actually work! Today, we're continuing with a somewhat personal question in the poll below: How do you perceive your financial picture? We sincerely hope you count yourself among the [52 million American EMILLIs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFurDAQRb_GdEbjsb2GwsVr6Pa1KdGwDLuODEbGAfH3EYkipU87c3V1zn2793cKMSzP_zSzL1PqFz62yKVw7nnnfI50ziHGkBYKmbeDaU09AloJTirbjxTi2Ztq9BMzsq7YK2fROt04V7088gCj1ZNtVKO1GlqyxrTUahxagttQBX-1gVNWARhta0ODgQaGRzuBbhmEAR5DSbl-T2EpL57imXbO9SPNVfSvUtZN6H8CO4HdcRw1hWXnrVx_gd0lJLD7kZG_beT2kZ8sDYBEAJCPtJScolTgZMnfQXnBCeyq7Mf1uG7bzQkDz5lC_GIofxpu9_gZAAD__w4vgYI). Details below. Later today, we'll email you on behalf of our partner [Timeplast](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u3CAQRp8Gd7vC_BhTUCS62u6mTYmwGdYTgUHAeuW3j3wjRUqd-hzNfDo_P-2nw4j784dLYHrIdod3i9A7VAsH1NO7M2GMmHeHFdobXMmWUSZvVN1Gab3DeFoxeBMAGPABzKgkk4rPSg2bWVmQsNLgZyWdDt4vFHjgbJzmRU9CD2iua1SNcqRUcHkXbhF0psuqA-UaKBEUPPZc778y7n2DEM98QL2vOQ3RbL2XRvg3wh6EPXA_oPV7xwQlutYv6SL88erJtvyqKxD-AclhJGxyqRD-_UIJPL4S4R_Fob8VV_sOtW1Y_rFWl4rD5_7l_VXGmd64nu2fIoyOWikltJ6Hanx5X_napIigz-vt1-7-X7EPw34HAAD__xQ1k5M) with the chance to invest in a breakthrough innovation: plastic that dissolves in water. Keep an eye out--this is your opportunity to get in early. We're sponsored today by [GoldCo](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFOxDAQRL8m6S5ar20cFy4ouO6QqBBVtGdvLgYnPjnWReHrUWj4AKYd6WnmvV-GC8UUl9srzezqmIeFtzVxrVwGfnDZA-1zTCnmhWLhdWO65wEB9QnMSeghUEz7oNrgRmZk2bITRqM2sjemnRxZyVai9JbIKo8CNQSFioSxnvprG91BAyO0AFBSd4quCnq4ejuCtAyNAg6x5tJ95rjUice05weXzue5TW6q9b428rnBc4PnFJev7pZT8PnoGzwbEG8THPnov1_w9Le9LS7ct-Pc-mQaBbeZYvql1n-peDj8CQAA__81Cm81), offering a free beginners guide to buying gold IRAs.

## Trump Threatens 100% Tariffs on Russia's Partners
President Trump said Monday he will impose [100% secondary tariffs on countries that continue trading with Russia](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MHunCAQx_GnwRsbRFx2DxxsGpOm_ffSQ49mlOHvtAgGcIlv37iv0PM3mczv8_tj-gDyFD5_woamuDgFrNljKZgmfGE6LZwbeU8xACXMFWGPkxSy50Lztp8skD8n1VjjECV2DZpW97LX3UPrZjUgle1nfZf98lT6ibNahHg8oJN3N4PDhsx1Tei2b4VQXX9TMCvxEPPydKJ7omBKoKUS0-1PpFBWdP6ML0y3JW6NN2spe2bdwOTI5FhrvW05XI3JEQM_MpPjNeqKMXnL5FjSse28rAmhYMg8HTkT8Epl5QUSOZd5XckjP8IL3z48YOXH3wQUkL8RQua7h8DkCIkPQ_tt-D78YN0YF7Ks-_rlQsWaf2Ham2TsXi_FfNdMic8NyL_fL_9l_jLyXwAAAP__TxyZCA) if a ceasefire in Ukraine is not reached within 50 days. Speaking at the White House with NATO Secretary-General Mark Rutte, Trump also announced a new plan to send U.S.-made Patriot missile systems to Ukraine, financed by European allies. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said [he had a "very good" phone conversation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAQQOHTQGc0GA-GwkUauk2bEhkY1s76BxnvWuT00eYKucB70vd1m2_aOhvun9qTynucA5XTUc6UZnpRujZ9eeucjUHbRGchfcSZA0cGkrU4b9q6axb1pnYiTl1NqpXIUXaDlLVROOoeFsRx2HtcBMHaC76jxAEl9bjWVr1rIFtsAUSHjdCLgAGWddyhGwkqAbTZHFPzHW3IhnZ3xRelZo2-dsrkfJxV91HxqeJTKaV5PpINe0y-CZQrPqXnkuzKdI4VnwS0CG3PfshROB8XM9FtJztMDMRW7RwrNhuW09Mfjcne1UltR3kTnL2sBNy9tu7vnf8F9lL8NwAA__-CCIBb) with Trump and thanked him for supporting Ukraine's defense and peace efforts.
## 9 Dead in Fire at Massachusetts Assisted Living
At least [nine residents were killed and 30 others hospitalized](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAQRb8Gd6wGDMtuQZGG7qVNaY3NsDsRNhYQr5yvj5xfePWVju45v76mL-TM2-snruR7KtNGn5apd6oTHVTPiOfKOXPZkCu1D-FeJg3aSnBS2Ski53MyQ_SJSNM4kFfOauvGh3PD28_qPoOKzpKBNFp62vtijcGHus8Glnlgf9HAKasAzGhvBmcDD5iXZ4LxSSAMUORe6u134a2_KeWzHFRvS1mH7N-9702MP4QOQoft3Evr1yR0uMBCB3BCB2WEDn-avPyEDk8ZCaMcQb5L27lj5r8UJaZOVSauJLHLhDnLygdVia1x6xRl5oO3l0y4cOZ-Ch2G6uP-uRq1uxMGXity_n-uf6vo4fW_AAAA__8ty4nf) after a five-alarm fire tore through the Gabriel House Assisted Living Residence in Fall River, Massachusetts, late Sunday night. Firefighters arrived to find flames pouring from the main entrance and residents screaming for help from windows. Rescue efforts were hampered by air conditioning units and mobility issues among the elderly residents. The cause of the blaze is still under investigation, though officials noted the presence of oxygen tanks inside. ## Everyday Millionaires Now Hold $107 Trillion
The number of [EMILLIs—"Everyday Millionaires"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFurDAQRb_GdEbjsb2GwsVr6Pa1KdGwDLuODEbGAfH3EYkipU87c3V1zn2793cKMSzP_zSzL1PqFz62yKVw7nnnfI50ziHGkBYKmbeDaU09AloJTirbjxTi2Ztq9BMzsq7YK2fROt04V7088gCj1ZNtVKO1GlqyxrTUahxagttQBX-1gVNWARhta0ODgQaGRzuBbhmEAR5DSbl-T2EpL57imXbO9SPNVfSvUtZN6H8CO4HdcRw1hWXnrVx_gd0lJLD7kZG_beT2kZ8sDYBEAJCPtJScolTgZMnfQXnBCeyq7Mf1uG7bzQkDz5lC_GIofxpu9_gZAAD__w4vgYI) with $1 million to $5 million in assets—has jumped from 13 million in 2000 to nearly 52 million by the end of 2024, according to UBS’s 2025 Global Wealth Report. Together, they now hold $107 trillion in assets, nearly matching the wealth of those with more than $5 million. UBS attributes the surge to rising home values, broader access to financial markets, entrepreneurship, and an $83 trillion generational wealth transfer already in motion. Meanwhile, a separate study found Americans now believe [it takes $2.3 million to be considered wealthy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGq3CAYhZ_G7P5BTbyZWbiYUgKF3m666DL80T-jrdFBnUjevmRe4a4OnA8Oh-_P5_yJPvj4-IUb6bqmOVIrgWqlPNNO-bB4bD4EnyL6TKURPtMsuVTARxBqtujDMQ-d1SuRpL4jLUYl1dhfx7FzmuN6NQqVJHGz4ibsx7KQFCuSWay4Yuf1ucZHoQTnQ68uAy4Dv_LF3Fbe34izgZP1NeXL3-RjdbSGI-2ULyZtXdCu1mdh_Z3JicmptXbZSjwZkxNFeBUmpy1FOs7E_I_q2bjUYHsZB28ENsGRXhCJLNQEC0EjDNUdYBzmQAWKcQ0XcFigOgKMpVFmcsIM97v48XjsP1k_JeMt679_O41SK78pP7us7bOdCsvHyAb-2NCH9_f6JeG7lv8DAAD__8htl9k)—a 21% increase since 2021.

A few even wrote to us from theirs, proving the escape plan could actually work! Today, we're continuing with a somewhat personal question in the poll below: How do you perceive your financial picture? We sincerely hope you count yourself among the . Details below. Later today, we'll email you on behalf of our partner with the chance to invest in a breakthrough innovation: plastic that dissolves in water. We're sponsored today by , offering a free beginners guide to buying gold IRAs. | Trump Threatens 100% Tariffs on Russia's Partners President Trump said Monday he will impose if a ceasefire in Ukraine is not reached within 50 days. Speaking at the White House with NATO Secretary-General Mark Rutte, Trump also announced a new plan to send U.S.-made Patriot missile systems to Ukraine, financed by European allies. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said with Trump and thanked him for supporting Ukraine's defense and peace efforts. 9 Dead in Fire at Massachusetts Assisted Living At least after a five-alarm fire tore through the Gabriel House Assisted Living Residence in Fall River, Massachusetts, late Sunday night. Firefighters arrived to find flames pouring from the main entrance and residents screaming for help from windows. Rescue efforts were hampered by air conditioning units and mobility issues among the elderly residents. The cause of the blaze is still under investigation, though officials noted the presence of oxygen tanks inside. One resident . Everyday Millionaires Now Hold $107 Trillion The number of with $1 million to $5 million in assets—has jumped from 13 million in 2000 to nearly 52 million by the end of 2024, according to UBS’s 2025 Global Wealth Report. Together, they now hold $107 trillion in assets, nearly matching the wealth of those with more than $5 million. UBS attributes the surge to rising home values, broader access to financial markets, entrepreneurship, and an $83 trillion generational wealth transfer already in motion. Meanwhile, a separate study found Americans now believe —a 21% increase since 2021. name: Conservative Broadcast
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Lu7Q1kRnqG3_A_E_4VttsA~~/AARclBA~/D1ZMlKpS9IN70DxocAYjbylOWs5GdAuu4tvqvDs0yxEMHNUB-7vKOD5JVkP2tu4b_78-CHFgUNQayepjTi4eFrZIIQM7dvu89FgVR6Jd1CTwgrwBJnAkorE7AO_pNh_zRX_Mu4YH7HNofweuyPekdH4QefJE9YBQOgOspVm9NfHupIiTTQdwTdATat8I1M1ZbxzVeaWKhJkqqoren7Pg7La1OVQsWOyPLvkUn1W-ohGgho6yS7aRu9bb5P5ifb1u_RS7uFaAQqcs5xYGc0hvNg~~)

| | Dear Friend, I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Lu7Q1kRnqG3_A_E_4VttsA~~/AARclBA~/D1ZMlKpS9IN70DxocAYjbylOWs5GdAuu4tvqvDs0yxEMHNUB-7vKOD5JVkP2tu4b_78-CHFgUNQayepjTi4eFrZIIQM7dvu89FgVR6Jd1CTwgrwBJnAkorE7AO_pNh_zRX_Mu4YH7HNofweuyPekdH4QefJE9YBQOgOspVm9NfHupIiTTQdwTdATat8I1M1ZbxzVeaWKhJkqqoren7Pg7La1OVQsWOyPLvkUn1W-ohGgho6yS7aRu9bb5P5ifb1u_RS7uFaAQqcs5xYGc0hvNg~~)_
---
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Lu7Q1kRnqG3_A_E_4VttsA~~/AARclBA~/D1ZMlKpS9IN70DxocAYjbylOWs5GdAuu4tvqvDs0yxEMHNUB-7vKOD5JVkP2tu4b_78-CHFgUNQayepjTi4eFrZIIQM7dvu89FgVR6Jd1CTwgrwBJnAkorE7AO_pNh_zRX_Mu4YH7HNofweuyPekdH4QefJE9YBQOgOspVm9NfHupIiTTQdwTdATat8I1M1ZbxzVeaWKhJkqqoren7Pg7La1OVQsWOyPLvkUn1W-ohGgho6yS7aRu9bb5P5ifb1u_RS7uFaAQqcs5xYGc0hvNg~~)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Lu7Q1kRnqG3_A_E_4VttsA~~/AARclBA~/D1ZMlKpS9IN70DxocAYjbylOWs5GdAuu4tvqvDs0yxEMHNUB-7vKOD5JVkP2tu4b_78-CHFgUNQayepjTi4eFrZIIQM7dvu89FgVR6Jd1CTwgrwBJnAkorE7AO_pNh_zRX_Mu4YH7HNofweuyPekdH4QefJE9YBQOgOspVm9NfHupIiTTQdwTdATat8I1M1ZbxzVeaWKhJkqqoren7Pg7La1OVQsWOyPLvkUn1W-ohGgho6yS7aRu9bb5P5ifb1u_RS7uFaAQqcs5xYGc0hvNg~~) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge. [**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Lu7Q1kRnqG3_A_E_4VttsA~~/AARclBA~/D1ZMlKpS9IN70DxocAYjbylOWs5GdAuu4tvqvDs0yxEMHNUB-7vKOD5JVkP2tu4b_78-CHFgUNQayepjTi4eFrZIIQM7dvu89FgVR6Jd1CTwgrwBJnAkorE7AO_pNh_zRX_Mu4YH7HNofweuyPekdH4QefJE9YBQOgOspVm9NfHupIiTTQdwTdATat8I1M1ZbxzVeaWKhJkqqoren7Pg7La1OVQsWOyPLvkUn1W-ohGgho6yS7aRu9bb5P5ifb1u_RS7uFaAQqcs5xYGc0hvNg~~) Thanks, Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University

## More Flooding Hits Central Texas
Several Central Texas counties experienced [another round of flash floods](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuqzAMhp8mbKDEYAJDhrtk613viFJsSqRAKnBLefsrKp0nOJMXf7_9_f9uwy3EFNfH37Cwk8-Uh5WPPbEIb8OSN55SzhTXh8hrnMM6ckp5G0ADltqWBgcKMZ1DU5C7a-pNwc5YBLQWOlvMDomQ664hXXdtQ8g03glxhIah6_u-iO4K09agMdoYqKaG2tCSrbuJe4NGNZopSt4qmVn4E_YpnfnNWzXmpUhuFnnuqv6jwCvwx3FUrz1IpnBeCwr8Lnk7FfjL7BpBYl4V-OuuAq-tAm9qBf4bXv4Ylxe37GWKby5fTwrCF96hrnWPqL9csTl6HjGluLdWNfqxhJi-j8nv6nw7-B8AAP__PwmHuQ) on Sunday, prompting local officials to [issue mandatory evacuation orders](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb8GOiPb4BgKF9vQZdst0YQZB0vGjuwhhL9f5f3C66_u0Tn_7ssdQgzp-Rd2cvzxeUl01kjMVJY9F_IxZwzpyXysG6SVYsxl0VIbIa1QZkEI8VqGFt1D4qRacsoabazVo203N9GoBjlOBuVoBvQDei3HHh4eJCjZt8F9z6RVRimplO78gDe4oe1HT5MyqhkkYeBcOt6I6QPVxyu_qXRr3tvoNuZXbfo_jZ4bPZ_n2fn8sXBUDuk7afT8dWr0vENC4FwuQW9YD-CQk8gFqRCKFxSuokISFR4g1nwkvtri8HWGGEO92WaQzx1C_OHy72q9nf4fAAD__23pgVQ) and close dozens of low-water crossings. More than nine inches of rain caused the Lampasas, Llano, and San Saba rivers to rise [as much as 23 feet.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ypCAQhZ8GM6ZoBoQJDDYxu5tuaLXSONS2cgsYvfP2W84rbHzqfOfnz9f0hYnTvv7GjYb2E_O001mZWqMybblQ5JxD2tfWXssT94WYc5m00lYqJ8FOARO_J9OFYVbhAR0N4Ky2zmnvuucQIFiwflb9w5s4O4DoA0aPc8DobOjScMGUAwugAPQtmtBjH9zdR3qABWEUhdRyubUnNfrBGvmdDyq3JW8dD8_Wvqu4_xJ6FHo8z_P2d6G9HZcs9IilpYVJ6PFaJvTIeUEWeqSNykr78pZ04PLClvJe5WUtyPITJEs6qFRZX2UlGXBfqeRXlUwH8cWySkmDWs_KW2kDzdIED9Ib7-W9N970QNgb6MoQvs_EnGrvhFHrhok__dv_vX4M-l8AAAD__yQXlwA) Residents living in parts of five counties were ordered to evacuate. Sunday evening, Gov. Greg Abbott said that [dozens of people](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu6yAMhp8m2YiAhNIMDHfp1rueMXJjE5BIqMBt2rc_SvsIZ7Rlf7--_-c6XSGmuC3_YSXHL5-njfaaiJnKtOZCPuWMcVuYH3OAbaaUcpm01EZIK5SZEGJ6T0OL7iZxVC05ZY021uqzbYNDwv7ck1ZgRovm5q1ErQY0nuyIKNvoDpi0yiglldKdH_AEJ7T92dOojGoGSRg5l44DMb2g-vTOTyrdnNc2ucB8r03_r9GXRl_2fe98fu0EHL4nx_I7icOt0ZcPRHzMBIdCwKISlDmINdYat0Xg8VDF447A1BaH9z2mFOvJNoNcVojpE85_q-zp9G8AAAD__7Ugg9k) had been rescued. Local officials have urged those with reservations at the popular vacation area to stay put until the situation improves.
## Local Officials Hold Meetings on Deadly Floods
Kerr County and the city of Kerrville held meetings Monday morning to address ongoing recovery efforts following the July 4 flash floods, which claimed at least 106 lives in the area and [more than 130](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAQhU8DnZHHYAyFizR0mzYlMvYAlgaM8GTZvX3EXiHdSPN-9L2fx_hwkeK-fLsNLb_mNO54ZUJmPMctnThTSiHuC_OvX93ukSido5JKC2kE6DG4SO-xKYOdZOihRAtGK22M6ky5WoegQgsBwM_Ym9b34HTT4SR13dSdL6O9w6QBDSABVDU3oXVtMHU3Yw8aikZiiJzOildkfLk80zs98ax82kqyK_ORi_qrUEOhhuu6Kj_lm-L-F2q4z0INH6f44GSxxZzjvogD00EoAjpeBSci4Slu060vTxuOKxLF3JqikcvmIn0q-X9DPa36CwAA___SYn7g) across the state. The Kerr County Commissioners Court [discussed](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpCAYhJ8GMyz4FdGA4BKyvfRCi4FfpRZkCv5Zd97-yn2FTburuvvrfx_rh4spnvtfl9HQ91bWE6-WkAjrmkvFLZUS4rkTvfzhTo8plbqCAMWF5lKtwcX0XscumIcIi-zQSK1AaQ2z7g4zKx8mEIOfRjENs15gEWLygxoeCPCQXTR3mNBSSSmkhH4bw-SmoId5w0UqyUaBIVKpPR1I-O3alt7lC2vvS-6SOYiejQ1_GFgG9rqu_rM5uk0G9qZhYFPxLjGwdxUDKzQDK0cGdiuvyn8YecXkCAOPhLlxKk--1ZL5J9bKfXmd9Oa-5Bxbi-XE2m6xEs-IFM-dge2qCc8rphTbpNko9uxi-hlJv7v2y8D_AAAA__9uD43d) overtime pay for first responders, using county property to shelter displaced families, and whether the county should adopt a [voter-approval tax rate of 8%](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkTHP2yAQQH8N3mLBASYZGKKvyvZ17Whhc7aRMCB8SZylv72yu3Tv9h7innS6X9_9twsxpPmnW9HSPuU-4XuLSIS1X3PFKebsQ5qJnuPi0ogx5toDB33h5iJ0712In1413g7c30SDVhgN2hi4mmax2g-qmwbtb9LBAJ1THFBdjRfd0Ek1NMEeMW6EFoILAe2kfOc6b-R1wpvQgimOPlCuLS1IuLttip_8wtqOeW2iXYjKxuSdwYPBY8xroZpjxNqen9s5vxg8yO24MXiUmgtW-lzI7cdzfdJyCelQRyGnI-Hi-IynbW1ZCgPJ5P03k3fCnZj8cWeggZPbQ5pPfKZAB3ydlmnByuDrn87fgbDiCQVryP5ETH5rqvXlHWIMW2eY4vPqQjyXo_87ycvCnwAAAP__ox2gIg)—rather than the standard 3.5%—due to the disaster. City of Kerrville officials extended a local disaster declaration indefinitely and moved to [request additional security](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSgyAURb8GOx0gKlhQbGOXbbd0CDwis09w4CXGv99JfmH7O2fuOT_X5WojxnT_thsYeoW8JDgqAhGUZcsFAubsY7oTPdxqkwPEXBbJ5dBy1Yph8TbiufSNNzfuJ9GAEWqQg1JSq2Y1alL85nrHA_dC83ATerLC9-NFu2Dt1ETzhnElBiG4ELILvR_t6NVFB5jEIFjPwUfKpaMVCF62BjzzE0rn8tagWYn2yi5fTM5MzsdxdNtZbbKJcor5PWJyflsxOa8RsXX5kaicTM62UHQITM4fbvuRre0vlPKMiNDSWsBSbSVXo9Z67PZ1b4rx-xERYx0V6_l9sxE_X-h_BZ9G_gUAAP__rg2HgQ) from the state due to death threats received by some staff members. They also extended a suspension on all open records requests by seven days. Later, search teams were urged to [move to higher ground](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2uozAQx09jOkfMBGIoKLZx97bdEjn2GKxM8JM9wMvtV-wVthvNT_p__fmav1zitC2_3Zsm-Yl53uisTCJU5ncuFDnnkLZFZPer2zwx5zJji71ujYZ-Di7xZ-6aMD3bMEJDE5gee2NwMM06eUcQ7hDGh-vgOUQf_AhDH33AYXxC36TpEmsN9AAtAN5iFx7uEcx9iDRCD6prKSTJ5SYrCf24GvmTDyo3n98NT6vId1X3XwqtQnue5-1VnVxQob3aKLScvWOF9rJSaFuj0EKn0L6olCMxk74u7fO-yUfnGJNPjqt29ZW2RR-Z902IStWSdSV66TUtKxW9lLxvQYedLnKSk-srayEnCm1TpvB9JuZUH0Z17fJ2if8Fl_-b-5jwbwAAAP__DmSW8Q) as weather reports for the region called for more rain.
## Rangers, Astros Draft Power-Hitting High Schoolers
The Major League Baseball Draft wrapped up last night in Atlanta, with the All-Star Game being played tonight. The Rangers and Astros added exciting high school prospects in the first round. Seven players from Texas were picked through the [first three rounds](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb8Gd0RADIwLim3oZtstLWIeCZpnYz1e4vHfrya_MPWVrs45_z7nz1Sxbve_aYXA36XNGxwdgRloXhtBwdZy3e7Mz-WRtgUQG81GGSuVl9rOOVU853HI4abypAcI2ltjvTcffngElxXY5JJX5easKlc_TXpaQCmdrg5gqOHnTHlttVZam0sZs0su--tHgUlbLUYFuXKjCz-A4Tv1gmd7AV2Wtg4YHsx7F9c_wkRh4nEcF-j79jMKE1e8CRM7NzqFibMwsWZh4mjdNI7KCRPfKiveZKZUWDKl5QtIYn2BfO45MXTZKANJgv5E7jJtCc9eu4QX0ClLpc6S2nPLcq_L10Ah70dFrN15Mar7miq-Wfl3hV_B_A8AAP__N46RDQ). With the No. 12 pick, the Rangers drafted 6-foot-3 power-hitting shortstop [Gavin Fien](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL_GZD3CBuMhcDAJ0gV76YbI4DZYamxk9w67f39if-Gykkr19FSfH_OHixTT9tcdaPk75DnhVQmZscxHLhgoZx_Txvy17i6tSJTLrFqloTUg9exdpJ-5b7xdWj_KBq00Wmlj1NM0u9X62flRDtoPBpfVd73rR9MtC2ofxrFvor1hrZFaylZK9Qi9H9zgTfcMOEotRd-ij5zLg3dk_HY10E9-Y3ms-WjI7sxnFd1LqEmo6bqux1HT3Qk1YYKvKtRUz1z4DgctQk2_FCgubVgqVCRcGVZHMeSSooOz4Al1vzecT9jcOyYIERM4hpRBKrgFHBHEBAct4IsLLNTkCrxe8s_1WVRTrD-vSBTrYETfboeL9OvM__f026p_AQAA__-HDpVQ) from Great Oak High School in Temecula, California. Fien will forego his commitment to play for the Texas Longhorns and is estimated to make more than $5 million. With the No. 21 pick, the Astros selected third baseman and shortstop [Xavier Neyens](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAURL8Gd1hwYwe7oHiNu7x2SwvMJUa6QARsHP_9KtlP2HpGMzrn67beTKCQ7v9NRN1ePq8Jj0rYGpY15oKecnYh3Vv73naTNiTKZQUBIxeKy3F1JtC5Dp3TVrhZdqilGmFUCibV7dpeNpAWAUGabbPTbKz1fnazQj8P09QF_R4TSo5SCimh94O7mqtTl8njLEfJBoEutFz6tmPDl6mezvzE0m85dqT31h6VXf4xWBgsx3H0kew7Y7DEQJbB8mZisLzMM2DhCU9MlbtifEPHU-YguT25qa3kykPiH7xI9rfTFe0eRyAK9arYIO7RBPqct78pe2r4CQAA___6d4G0) from Mount Vernon High School in Mount Vernon, Washington. The 6-foot-4 left-handed slugger has committed to Oregon State University but is expected to sign with the Astros. Early Monday, the Frio River in Uvalde County . Local officials have urged those with reservations at the popular vacation area to stay put until the situation improves. Local Officials Hold Meetings on Deadly Floods Kerr County and the city of Kerrville held meetings Monday morning to address ongoing recovery efforts following the July 4 flash floods, which claimed at least 106 lives in the area and across the state. The Kerr County Commissioners Court overtime pay for first responders, using county property to shelter displaced families, and whether the county should adopt a —rather than the standard 3.5%—due to the disaster. City of Kerrville officials extended a local disaster declaration indefinitely and moved to from the state due to death threats received by some staff members. They also extended a suspension on all open records requests by seven days. Later, search teams were urged to as weather reports for the region called for more rain. Rangers, Astros Draft Power-Hitting High Schoolers The Major League Baseball Draft wrapped up last night in Atlanta, with the All-Star Game being played tonight. The Rangers and Astros added exciting high school prospects in the first round. Seven players from Texas were picked through the . With the No. 12 pick, the Rangers drafted 6-foot-3 power-hitting shortstop from Great Oak High School in Temecula, California. Fien will forego his commitment to play for the Texas Longhorns and is estimated to make more than $5 million. With the No. 21 pick, the Astros selected third baseman and shortstop from Mount Vernon High School in Mount Vernon, Washington. The 6-foot-4 left-handed slugger has committed to Oregon State University but is expected to sign with the Astros. Also going in the first round were shortstop of Johnson High School in San Antonio and Texas A&M Aggies outfielder . The Stinger is not just similar to what SEAL Team 6 used to take out Bin Laden. It’s identical. name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: This is not normal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
No matter how bad things get, we will continue fighting — and we need you with us.
|
---

On the fourth of this month, Independence Day, we celebrated 249 years of American resolve and commitment to principle — a time to reflect on the values and ideals that generations of activists and leaders have fought to live up to: freedom, self-governance, and the pursuit of justice. Why are some moving us away from those core pillars of democracy?
**At times like this, we must ask ourselves: What kind of America will we choose to be?**
Right now, core pillars of our democracy are under attack – including a free press and educational institutions that teach independent and critical thinking. This isn’t isolated or random — this is an intentional effort by the far right to weaken the very systems we have in place to ensure the health of our democracy. They are dragging us toward authoritarianism. _What’s happening now is NOT normal. _
No matter how bad things get, there are always people fighting back for justice — right now, that’s what we’re doing at All On The Line. [**I’m proud of the work we’re doing to end gerrymandering, because it contributes to the polarization and dysfunction in our political system.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111480516/557437668/-1219977196?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_Post4th_email_20250715-AOTL-Tier1-Post4th-EHH_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250715-AOTL-Tier1-Post4th-EHH_&utm_campaign=Post4th&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzYTI0MjQ4LTczNjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F_BWpoocLwWK1tjyoVRBlAkZ2y0oYBG9GGVGcNmc4bo=)
When there are relentless attacks on our democratic process and institutions, we have to keep fighting. For our fight to be strong, we need people by our side who care and are ready to take action — people like you.
[**I need you with us in this fight. If you believe in the work we are doing and want to join us, make a gift now to end map manipulation and finally have fair districts. We deserve accountable, responsive elected leaders.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111480520/557437681/-1219977196?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_Post4th_email_20250715-AOTL-Tier1-Post4th-EHH_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250715-AOTL-Tier1-Post4th-EHH_&utm_campaign=Post4th&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzYTI0MjQ4LTczNjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F_BWpoocLwWK1tjyoVRBlAkZ2y0oYBG9GGVGcNmc4bo=)
In service,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

name: Royce White
subject: No border? No country.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=18f56e0ad3c245cc9470effe52e28180&_e=pvU4t3KlWklfTNKniKndl3-HkPEs4zoo7G_xraPoQuXHt7yjnupnhlBheEr9pnOPnZ-qbdbZpFmgdsBk4VP_wSVhv3NuMfkhDK0pKhjNfh57aQl3usY5MRHO_PCrxKk0OG82y71vZ_IdHZpqBYgz-WNWf1E8AFn471J7uSjs7uRLr3ks1RrieAjES9NUFk2fBre9yxcQc0654OIwhn5dIZ4m60Rd_ll5x-UL64pYQT0dzztKSmRcvdGG9YQJ-lSfdog9Ql7bFgY-2-MyhfzWTLbrb1WUp6lrrs6ap7qpxy8VqEn4E7_UGTHS9GpbbtqLhhengbgnM6NcrD8Qw5H6f64EHXyNobBnhvjJcBtN7urucpesQHa-j_j-GFhN6bXjvib5uZq6v6iVWWMVM04Qbj5MDHi2v2WPiw6s80j8JhpigT3qdZCKBM1qhxhY736QYaOoqc8liV2yy9w8H2vMuCrvil-h3Mbh23CS7xVhbTK3HsBeazN7VWva65pGFuyfhM4BW5-H2cxCVDOwqk2z9z01oJ8r9GZX_Yxg777UhfuJef_pRbvgMrEKUOl4QJlz)

Peter,

The number one issue facing our country isn’t the economy, the schools, or even cleaning up the remnants of Biden’s corruption—**it’s national security.** Our border was wide open for YEARS under the Biden Administration, but it’s too late. **_Sleeper cells had already infiltrated our communities._**

We don’t have time to play nice or talk in circles. **We must expedite mass deportations.**

**If we don’t have a border, we don’t have a country.** That’s not an opinion—that’s a fact. And without a country, you're not a citizen. You're a subject. You have no rights. No future.

_This isn’t politics. This is principle. This is survival._

The uniparty won’t lift a finger. Meet Royce White:
Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and received a scholarship to play at the University of Minnesota and later transferred to Iowa State. He made the Dean's List and earned All Big-12 first-team honors and many other awards.

After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White voiced concerns about the league’s collective bargaining agreement—specifically regarding its lack of a mental health policy. His public dispute with the NBA led him to become a national figure advocating for mental health rights.

Royce went on to win two championships in Canada before moving to Big 3 Basketball. During one game, he wore a t-shirt reading “Free The Uyghurs” and gave a CBS interview calling for the release of 2 million Uyghurs from Chinese concentration camps. Throughout the season, he spoke out on taboo topics like Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Muammar Gaddafi, and the Great Reset.

Today, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans haven’t won statewide here in years, but Royce’s grassroots campaign is different: bold, unafraid, and fueled by voters who are tired of the Far Left agenda pushed by Ilhan Omar, Tina Smith, and the corporate elites.

[**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=18f56e0ad3c245cc9470effe52e28180&_e=pvU4t3KlWklfTNKniKndl3-HkPEs4zoo7G_xraPoQuXHt7yjnupnhlBheEr9pnOPnZ-qbdbZpFmgdsBk4VP_wSVhv3NuMfkhDK0pKhjNfh57aQl3usY5MRHO_PCrxKk0OG82y71vZ_IdHZpqBYgz-WNWf1E8AFn471J7uSjs7uRLr3ks1RrieAjES9NUFk2fjPg_kSbUXST8r4T1EsRmHkLR4LooyEPp1u-Uoi1tI1OLKKCIOUNEPtnpu_BJuCFvI8J9XhoVTs1Fr22eo7Z6qBBjwj3opnpW4NfU3KE86UhKeDXuIEyBD6wSrXm4SyC9erWI-57nqlogT-52Aqp-OuR1178dEXLFzQ62nX4ynp4mliNZK3_T-w_0FsuGSb-lqNuYKfq0ByDMmi8LHQ78OfhKpQvM3bZi0PvDFTYjqBFAUaczUVRMRHV7yGboXyQeRMH6aViwJELqEJAfPB0poWQX4cXy-UXPIcl5lU5ePz95yS-547nEthd62rQUGrgvN2UGg1i9qsQFScjsrXsG1DUCP3XZNllCEBepHP8iPfWlLCPWH-Q9cxMRic-6WtP1)

name: Troy Downing
subject: We're over the red line.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
The liberal mob is after me, and I’ve got nowhere else to turn.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTIwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcxNV9SOS1aSi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2Njk3ODMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MTVfUjktWkouMTEwMTE3X3QxNjY5NzgzLTI4OTkifQ/DktAcLmLltOvLO-gZyLhaA)**I’m bailing out – we’re over the red line.**
It’s Troy Downing. I’m a veteran, a self-made businessman, and a family man. I’ve been fighting against the Democrat mafia in Washington, and I’m not sure I can do it any longer.
**_The liberal money machine is out in full force against us, and I just missed my Quarter 2 fundraising goal. I don’t want to crash and burn out, but that’s the direction I’m headed._**[ RUSH REINFORCEMENTS
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTIwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcxNV9SOS1aSi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2Njk3ODMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MTVfUjktWkouMTEwMTE3X3QxNjY5NzgzLTI4OTkifQ/plQW91Dmn1Oh46vmWVSIYQ)I’m sure you’ve had many politicians ask you for money, but I’ll be upfront: **I’m not a career politician. I’m not a DC elite. I’m not some media sellout.**
I flew rescue helicopters for the Air Force in Afghanistan. I’m used to doing impossible things under fire. I’m used to doing impossible things under fire. But I would’ve been lost without my brothers in arms.
[If we’re going to keep winning in Washington, then I need someone to have my six. I’m hoping you’ll be the patriot I need to answer the call:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTIwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcxNV9SOS1aSi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2Njk3ODMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MTVfUjktWkouMTEwMTE3X3QxNjY5NzgzLTI4OTkifQ/n6xLl_e0V1wTbclFEklt0g)[SEND HELP NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTIwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcxNV9SOS1aSi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2Njk3ODMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MTVfUjktWkouMTEwMTE3X3QxNjY5NzgzLTI4OTkifQ/AEsalcRbDzQYXGyrOjfXIA)We can finish the mission, but only if we work together.
So I'm humbly asking you today if you'll stand with a combat veteran like me?
I can’t thank you enough, Peter.
**- Troy Downing**| |

body:

| **🚨 BREAKING: DEMOCRATS FIGHT BACK! 🚨** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92074?t=6&akid=20599%2E878179%2EpXPTJn) Bernie Sanders is LEADING the charge to take on Trump and save our Democracy. We’re _THRILLED!_

**Trump and MAGA Republicans are already going after him relentlessly, so we’re sending Sen. Bernie Sanders a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92074?t=7&akid=20599%2E878179%2EpXPTJn) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92074?t=8&akid=20599%2E878179%2EpXPTJn)

TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92074?t=9&akid=20599%2E878179%2EpXPTJn) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92074?t=10&akid=20599%2E878179%2EpXPTJn)

\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20599%2E878179%2EpXPTJn). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20599%2E878179%2EpXPTJn).**

# The Federal Government Continues to Deliver
---
| |
---
| We have all heard about the sweeping changes being implemented by HHS Secretary Robert F Kennedy, Jr., many of which are aimed at decoupling the federal regulatory system from Big Pharma. TFVC has already covered the shake-up at ACIP, but other incremental wins are worth noting. For instance, the CDC is [rolling back](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU5OTkzNTE5ODI5NjgxODcwLFwiclwiOjE1OTk5MzU2MDIxOTc4MDczNH0iLCJzIjoiMjAyMGI1YmRkOTdmMzQ0OCJ9) COVID-era financial grants that were distributed to states, signaling a recognition that taxpayer dollars should no longer be earmarked for COVID programs. Meanwhile, the FDA is now requiring that certain COVID vaccines be slapped with an [expanded warning label](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU5OTkzNTE5ODM0OTI0NzUzLFwiclwiOjE1OTk5MzU2MDIxOTc4MDczNH0iLCJzIjoiMmVjMmViMDhhNGFmMjNlMyJ9) about the risk of myocarditis, particularly for young males. But, the reforms taking place in DC are not exclusive to the agencies under Secretary Kennedy’s purview. We are witnessing a wholesale overhaul of the public health bureaucracy within multiple agencies and at all levels. The House Judiciary Committee recently served a former Big Pharma executive with a [subpoena to appear](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU5OTkzNTE5ODQxMjE2MjEyLFwiclwiOjE1OTk5MzU2MDIxOTc4MDczNH0iLCJzIjoiMTM2ZmJjY2NmNjJmMTAzNiJ9), the newest development in an ongoing investigation into corruption surrounding the COVID vaccine rollout. Just last week, the US Department of Labor finally [withdrew](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU5OTkzNTE5ODQ2NDU5MDkzLFwiclwiOjE1OTk5MzU2MDIxOTc4MDczNH0iLCJzIjoiMmFlODY2YjdlYmY0MWY4NSJ9) its Draconian requirement that employers report when their staff members test positive for COVID. And, after issuing an Executive Order on his first day in office for his second term, Trump has rolled out a re-enlistment and back pay [policy](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU5OTkzNTE5ODUxNzAxOTc2LFwiclwiOjE1OTk5MzU2MDIxOTc4MDczNH0iLCJzIjoiZjIyNGUyZDU5MWIzNTQ5MiJ9) for service members who were discharged for declining the COVID vaccine. Plus, he recently granted a groundbreaking “full and unconditional” [pardon](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU5OTkzNTE5ODU2OTQ0ODU5LFwiclwiOjE1OTk5MzU2MDIxOTc4MDczNH0iLCJzIjoiM2M4MTE3MjVhMzM4YTFlYyJ9) to Army 1st Lt Mark Bashaw, who was court-martialed in 2022 for refusing to follow COVID “safety measures” such as remote work, testing, and masking. **A reckoning is upon us, and TFVC is here for it!**
