body:
I wanted to reach out personally before I finish my coffee and get the day started.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=Krd5hDI39EPM%2F1hKXkOMwxqxLQ8n0t844BlkhIr9R1Sto693JRNgRa%2BKt0rYcNMDWM2iqADLg%2BfQzB4GUTcu%2FFwOWU7zZ%2BzjI8nDuRSySlpSm25qdINjQbrzQnD3Qr9k2sOCpYtlVxzdMoerazTRzLiC6ZUJU0WKT3HK3jP6Or2vCxvqq3w38yX6dpResjhIKxJJNHr5eBV0rsxNKTDVOBV5Hvf6DJk0jDz0577ysWRQvv7%2FmTjvJibNxZ9H9RFu0fTAYjzypIZGiCA23%2F14vL1sJqzWRGZrrctRQiFOBHikhoPrRLaAzryxnsDwN%2B6VH6mrZsIXWMpxn34Hh8Xyyth0GYUWEBpOgM%2FN0jGM7a6liGzIlL3mEyUAl4t2ZVyXCJu0Y6ThSsV8Ti6uewUE5ce%2BXvwl0JRYN7mFOJappe7staNFl2cgmX4hSarv%2BH1%2B)

clean_body: | | | Team, I wanted to flag something that should have everyone on high alert: In June, Democrats gained 82,401 new registered voters in New Jersey, while Republicans gained 40,839. This erases months of Republican gains and increases the Democrats' voter registration advantage from 827,000 to 869,000. | | | | That’s a major warning sign—and it couldn’t come at a worse time. We are staring down:🔴 A razor-thin House majority 💰 Millions in Democrat spending targeting NJ-07📈 And now a registration surge putting us on defense This isn’t just about numbers—it’s about momentum. And we CANNOT afford to fall behind. We’ve got to fight harder than ever to keep this seat red and protect our majority. Let’s show them New Jersey conservatives don’t back down. THANK YOU! Caroline C.Team Kean | | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2025 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints, or feedback, please send your ideas to mailto:info@TomKean.com.

Hey it’s Scott Presler, I haven't reached out in a while because I’ve been working on something big.
**_[See it here](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11969086/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9lYXJseS12b3RlL2V2YV9kb25fb21fZXJfc3AtbmpfcnNfMjAyNTA3MTQv/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTU/LbmNsM0VYSVFhVw/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjA5NzRfd3Ix/gaHZWIg/s2se076ddee)_.**
After our resounding victory in Pennsylvania in the 2024 election, Early Vote Action is doubling down on our proven voter registration strategy. We have hired more staffers in PA, and we are registering new Republican voters in New Jersey every day ahead of their November 2025 election.
We have a chance to shock the political landscape, and all signs are pointing towards a huge Republican turnout in November.
New Jersey is our next chance to win a major election and now is the time to kick into overdrive. The enthusiasm and opportunity is here, we just need to execute on the mission at hand.
That’s why I reached out to you.

[BECOME A SPONSOR](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11969086/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9lYXJseS12b3RlL2V2YV9kb25fb21fZXJfc3AtbmpfcnNfMjAyNTA3MTQv/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTU/LbmNsM0VYSVFhVw/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjA5NzRfd3Ix/gaHZWIg/s2se076ddee)
**_[Patriot, we’re in need of sponsors for our voter registration staffers, and I am asking you to help](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11969086/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9lYXJseS12b3RlL2V2YV9kb25fb21fZXJfc3AtbmpfcnNfMjAyNTA3MTQv/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTU/LbmNsM0VYSVFhVw/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjA5NzRfd3Ix/gaHZWIg/s2se076ddee)_.**

Thank you for your consideration,

**Scott Presler** Founder, Early Vote Action

---

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Millions of noncitizens voting??
body:
Read on if you want to make sure noncitizens aren’t voting in our elections.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** **** Election integrity is a critical issue for American voters, and one of the biggest vulnerabilities in our elections is the fact that there is **_currently no requirement to prove you are an American citizen when registering to vote._****_
_**We need action and we need it now --before the 2026 mid-term elections. We need the Senate to pass the SAVE Act, a bill that already passed the House, and would close the loopholes allowing noncitizens to register to vote. This is why we have decided **August is Only Citizens Vote Month.** [We need your help](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aca299a5/1edb9794ac9a2af1) to sauccessfully pressure the Senate to pass the SAVE Act as soon as possible.
**The future of our country depends on patriots like you building a groundswell of support and activity through the entire month of August that the Senate cannot ignore.** If the Senate doesn't act, then we will need to pressure the House and the Senate to add the SAVE Act to must-pass legislation, but it's faster, easier fight to get the Senate to just pass it now.
The activities you can sign up for include making phone calls to the Senate, reaching out to family and friends and asking them to do the same, organizing a sign-waving event, having friends over for a summer ice cream social to tell them about the SAVE Act, getting people you know to sign a petition, and more. Pick the activities you like best, or if you can, do them all! Just make sure you are doing something to get the SAVE Act passed and signed into law before 2026!
**WE WILL HELP YOU!** We have everything you'll need to be successful, including a how-to-guide, training, and other materials that you can use to inform and recruit others to join our movement.
[**Sign up today**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aca299a5/1edb9794ac9a2af3) and take action with us as we put pressure on the Senate to listen to the American people and do what's right for generations to come! ****

__ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ SIGN ME UP ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aca299a5/1edb9794ac9a2af5)
---
| **** ******************** ******** In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin __ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aca299a5/1edb9794ac9a2af7)
---
|
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aca299a5/1edb9794ac9a2af9)
---

All rights reserved._ **[View in browser.](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.campaign-view.com/ua/viewinbrowser?od=3z78b821f279e8235b374a03e8688062636c48fef6889d6f0093de3b9f21e3f920&rd=1edb9794aca299a5&sd=1edb9794ac9c3e3c&n=11699e4c2aef16a&mrd=1edb9794ac9c3e2a&m=1 "https://qcgp-cmpzourl.campaign-view.com/ua/viewinbrowser?od=3z78b821f279e8235b374a03e8688062636c48fef6889d6f0093de3b9f21e3f920&rd=1edb9794aca299a5&sd=1edb9794ac9c3e3c&n=11699e4c2aef16a&mrd=1edb9794ac9c3e2a&m=1")**__

To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:**[Tea Party Patriots Action](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aca299a5/1edb9794ac9a2afb)** 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314Woodstock, GA 30189
Want to change how you receive these emails?You can **[unsubscribe](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/ua/optout?od=3z78b821f279e8235b374a03e8688062636c48fef6889d6f0093de3b9f21e3f920&rd=1edb9794aca299a5&sd=1edb9794ac9c3e3c&n=11699e4c2aef16a "https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/ua/optout?od=3z78b821f279e8235b374a03e8688062636c48fef6889d6f0093de3b9f21e3f920&rd=1edb9794aca299a5&sd=1edb9794ac9c3e3c&n=11699e4c2aef16a")** or **[update your preferences](http://$\[li:updateprofile\]$/)**.****

name: Trump TAKEOVER via Fight for Reform
subject: (re: Jamie Raskin) please sign >>
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23212%2E4449941%2EgjREbF) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23212%2E4449941%2EgjREbF) **BREAKING via _NBC_ :** "Trump just realigned the entire political map. Democrats have 'no easy path' to fix it." [**Jamie Raskin is calling for an END to the Electoral College now. Without 125,OOO signatures, ****we won 't be able to show Democrats in Congress there's a critical mass. Please sign the petition now:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64244?t=3&akid=23212%2E4449941%2EgjREbF) | [SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64244?t=4&akid=23212%2E4449941%2EgjREbF)
---
This petition is registered to you only.

Donald Trump only became President because of the outdated Electoral College.

_Hillary Clinton won the popular vote by nearly 2.9 million. But the Electoral College overruled her popular vote victory._

**Now, Rep. Jamie Raskin is urgently pleading with Democrats:**
We couldn't agree more. But now that Trump is in office, he and his Republican cronies will do everything in their power to uphold the Electoral College.

**So we need to act now -- because we must prevent unpopular, unqualified candidates from EVER becoming President again.**

[**_If every Democrat reading this signs our petition, we will reach our 125,OOO signature goal within minutes and gain traction for this urgent legislation in Congress. Please add your name immediately:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64244?t=5&akid=23212%2E4449941%2EgjREbF)
[SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64244?t=6&akid=23212%2E4449941%2EgjREbF)
---
Thank you,

_Fight for Reform_

FEC_ decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections.

Your support is critical to helping us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.
With your support we can harness the power of our grassroots supporters to influence decision makers and put control back in the hands of the people.

subject: What Does Our Flag Represent?

body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Good morning Friend, we’re up early because the fight for Florida’s future doesn’t hit snooze.
This is Josh Weil, an our campaign for U.S. Senate starts with a simple goal: show up for the people this system has left behind. Whether that means knocking doors, supporting key protests, or talking to folks who’ve never felt heard, we’re putting in the work. As we speak, I am travelling across the state to meet with more voters, because this should be a symbol of respect for our Natural Parks, admiration for our education, and appreciation for good policy :
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6D65323345457037595937754B393177616C434F784C586C493778463662744178387341756C4763424B52324752343374344C55786B54334775733048796675/editor_images/state%20flag%20florida%20GIF.gif]
I am fighting to bring back Dem infrastructure across the state to win this U.S. Senate race. But this won’t be decided by headlines or hot takes. It’ll be decided by moments like this, when people like you choose to act.
So before your day gets moving, I have one quick ask:
Can you chip in this morning and help us start the week strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]

Let’s get to it.

name: DNC Community Engagement
subject: DNC Initial Seven-Figure Investment into Virginia Coordinated Campaign
body:
| | | | | |
---
|
---
|
# DNC Announces Initial Seven-Figure Investment into Virginia Coordinated Campaign to Help Virginia Democrats Win Up and Down the Ballot in November
---
| | | _The DNC’s initial $1.5 million investment comes during Democrats’ “Organizing Summer” campaign to turbocharge voter engagement ahead of November 2025 elections_
---
| | | Ahead of Virginia’s high-stakes general election in the fall, the Democratic National Committee announced a new, seven-figure investment into the Virginia Democratic Coordinated Campaign to win up and down the ballot this November and next. Following Donald Trump and Virginia Republicans’ budget betrayal, where Virginia Republicans voted to kick nearly 323,000 Virginians off their health care after Elon Musk’s DOGE efforts fired thousands of Virginians from their jobs for no reason, Democrats are organizing and putting in the work to build strong Democratic infrastructure on the ground and reach voters everywhere in the commonwealth to fight back against federal Republican overreach.

This initial $1.5 million investment into the Virginia Democratic Coordinated Campaign is one of the largest and earliest initial investments the DNC has ever made to the Virginia Democratic Coordinated Campaign in an off-year election cycle.

Specifically, this investment will:
* Help the Virginia coordinated campaign to continue to hire organizers and other key staff in order to talk to voters early and often.
* Fund early persuasion programs to ensure that voters know the stakes of these elections and the differences between the candidates.
* Test new tactics and tools to ensure our message is resonating with voters across the commonwealth.
* Expand our reach to key constituencies that we lost ground with in the November 2024 elections — such as Black, Latino and AANHPI voters.

The DNC is laying the groundwork that will carry Democrats to victory in November and move Abigail Spanberger into the governor’s mansion, make Ghazala Hashmi the next lieutenant governor, ensure Jay Jones becomes the next attorney general, and maintain the Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates.

_**DNC Chair Ken Martin released the following statement:**_

“Donald Trump and Virginia Republicans have betrayed the commonwealth. From Elon Musk destroying the livelihoods of thousands of Virginians through DOGE, to Donald Trump and Virginia Republicans kicking 323,000 Virginians off their health insurance, to Glenn Youngkin and state Republicans leading Virginia to fall in the rankings of the top states for business, Republicans have utterly failed the commonwealth. Now, Democrats are giving Virginians an alternative to extreme Republican candidates with real Democratic leadership to make the state more affordable for working families. This investment will aid strong Democratic leaders like Abigail Spanberger, Ghazala Hashmi, and Jay Jones and turbocharge organizing efforts while building Democratic infrastructure that will help support Democratic victories all across the ballot.”

_**DPVA Chair Lamont Bagby issued the following statement:**_

“Our elections this year are the most critical in the country, and Chair Martin understands that to win, we must organize everywhere and leave no voter behind. The DNC’s investment will help us reach every corner of the Commonwealth with a clear message: Democrats are fighting back against Donald Trump’s reckless and extreme agenda. As he attacks our jobs, tanks our economy, and attempts to dismantle our public schools, the only leaders who are standing up for Virginians are Abigail Spanberger, Ghazala Hashmi, Jay Jones, and our 100 House of Delegates nominees. They are the firewall Virginia needs, and with the continued support of our partners, we’re ready to win.”
---
| ###
---
|
---
| | | | |

---

name: Team NPP
subject: This court case in WI has significant implications for PA.

Fellow activist,
Recently, there was a major court case win in Wisconsin that we wanted to share with you for a very important reason...

But first, here’s some background: Earlier this year, voters turned out in Wisconsin in what was one of the most expensive and competitive state Supreme Court races in our nation's history. Despite billionaire Elon Musk dumping more than 20 million dollars into the race in support of Republican Waukesha County judge and former Wisconsin Attorney General Brad Schimel, Dane County Judge Susan Crawford won the election, solidifying a liberal majority on the court.

Following this election, the WI Supreme Court heard a case on the state's archaic abortion ban from 1849 that sat dormant for five decades before _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned. Because of the current liberal majority on the state Supreme Court, on July 2, 2025, they ruled (along ideological lines) to invalidate the near-total abortion ban and restore access in the state.

According to the _New York Times_ , if this law remained, anyone who had an abortion could have faced six years in prison and a $10,000 fine. The overturning of this draconian ban is a major win for families in the Midwest.

_**As we always say, elections matter. **_

**Here’s why this matters to us:** All eyes are now on Pennsylvania as Republicans have set their sights on running a massive anti-retention campaign against three PA Supreme Court justices (originally elected as Democrats). Our state Supreme Court is critical in not only protecting our fundamental freedoms, like reproductive rights, but also holding the Trump regime accountable, ensuring that PA has fair congressional maps, protecting voting rights, climate and environmental justice, and addressing other issues that impact our daily lives.

It’s critical that Pennsylvanians and eligible voters understand how important state courts are and how they’re protecting our rights and freedoms, and we need your help to make that happen.

[**We need your help now to be able to provide civic education to Pennsylvanians and turn them out to vote ahead of the general election this year. Please help fund our voter education and mobilization campaigns by donating $25 or more today.**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7cnf2nT45L4TDLL79xclFmlYUKVz-2FZIWg-2FtTcyX6kz-2FvyfIGldLQnnShYZ5O5yBNjkYIAyfHAy3YbS5xfSjqvvpACn-2Bnali-2FFnciLg94ihmDQa7Lt4J0youW17j-2B5Wso4-3DWmQV_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYjwKFuB-2F9iLDuxZrP4PjGF00oLLhhEMXH3fdAZ5t1bviKqQ8zod-2FkX84JwCSgo5j-2BSdJ92KDMbzTcyxi14cnAEOrjp9jZ4m-2Fj8UbcK43jpAubAXAxOeMODlkRyuTiz-2FfGXF8xgGq-2Bmlb4IHk3LfmwbNrqEtQW0JbY-2BW3jJgPr3sPxTUyE37jEdRYJxcZhz-2Fjz)

| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, Recently, there was a major court case win in Wisconsin that we wanted to share with you for a very important reason... But first, here’s some background: Earlier this year, voters turned out in Wisconsin in what was one of the most expensive and competitive state Supreme Court races in our nation's history. Despite billionaire Elon Musk dumping more than 20 million dollars into the race in support of Republican Waukesha County judge and former Wisconsin Attorney General Brad Schimel, Dane County Judge Susan Crawford won the election, solidifying a liberal majority on the court. Following this election, the WI Supreme Court heard a case on the state's archaic abortion ban from 1849 that sat dormant for five decades before Roe v. Wade was overturned. Because of the current liberal majority on the state Supreme Court, on July 2, 2025, they ruled (along ideological lines) to invalidate the near-total abortion ban and restore access in the state. According to the New York Times , if this law remained, anyone who had an abortion could have faced six years in prison and a $10,000 fine. The overturning of this draconian ban is a major win for families in the Midwest. As we always say, elections matter. Here’s why this matters to us: All eyes are now on Pennsylvania as Republicans have set their sights on running a massive anti-retention campaign against three PA Supreme Court justices (originally elected as Democrats). Our state Supreme Court is critical in not only protecting our fundamental freedoms, like reproductive rights, but also holding the Trump regime accountable, ensuring that PA has fair congressional maps, protecting voting rights, climate and environmental justice, and addressing other issues that impact our daily lives. It’s critical that Pennsylvanians and eligible voters understand how important state courts are and how they’re protecting our rights and freedoms, and we need your help to make that happen. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Now more than ever before, we must ensure that our state and federal courts remain fair and independent. In solidarity, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381412-699-6771 | | | |

name: A warning
subject: The looming Pearl Harbor moment for Democrats
body:
The consequence of a Democratic loss in the November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election means the permanent loss of Pennsylvania as a swing state for Democrats bringing us one step closer to pe
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001geg_8Zo1n12j0_D3Ef359xf8e2P5axEnCtozhS1vIPC0KSoCVOcYP4rW5jvvouY_tbFHADhwX1E01kjY44zNOy0NaxAcwYg1r9YHwYbtrslhs6D8dOKbq30HFPq_estco8hoXHbtH5zJt9-e_LGPY5KYSm7Ciex-8Jn74JLISiP0zRXUkFBunRkhfIH-iajJphYDq7KHNc6BGNUaXTfgpiHg_SJ4yU-t9dofCL6MskHQR95h_5wUHft32a_ydMmo&c=OZxwPOmZSrYC7lHtWwpdryAexR2SkpZ-jQC5kzyekEpsTNDpLNhXrw==&ch=hxGaiMwaZMCbsRITQ-7San05UDI7518boFwWKvxY4nV2g2EelC3bOA==)

| Peter,
In Spring 2025, Democrats narrowly avoided a catastrophic defeat in the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
A loss here would've meant an extreme MAGA majority on Wisconsin's Supreme Court that would've taken this key swing state out of the cards for Dems in 2026 and in 2028--where Trump is suggesting he'll seek reelection. We won here because we mobilized the might of the entire Democratic party around this singular race.
In November 2025, Dems in Pennsylvania face a court election with identical stakes but this time we are heading into it woefully unprepared:

---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001geg_8Zo1n12j0_D3Ef359xf8e2P5axEnCtozhS1vIPC0KSoCVOcYP4rW5jvvouY_tbFHADhwX1E01kjY44zNOy0NaxAcwYg1r9YHwYbtrslhs6D8dOKbq30HFPq_estco8hoXHbtH5zJt9-e_LGPY5KYSm7Ciex-8Jn74JLISiP0zRXUkFBunRkhfIH-iajJphYDq7KHNc6BGNUaXTfgpiHg_SJ4yU-t9dofCL6MskGCzsXEerCOf6RXtxQED6X0&c=OZxwPOmZSrYC7lHtWwpdryAexR2SkpZ-jQC5kzyekEpsTNDpLNhXrw==&ch=hxGaiMwaZMCbsRITQ-7San05UDI7518boFwWKvxY4nV2g2EelC3bOA==)
---
|
We are on track for a Pearl Harbor moment for Democrats.
The consequence of a Democratic loss in the November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election means the permanent loss of Pennsylvania as a swing state for Democrats, bringing us one step closer to permanent MAGA electoral control.
In Wisconsin, we were able to compete with the tens of millions that MAGA pumped into the race because that race was the only show in town--barely any Democrats had announced their 2026 campaigns meaning Democrats could focus almost solely on Wisconsin.
We do not have this luxury for the Pennsylvania 2025 Supreme Court fight. And although equally important, we are competing with hundreds of Democratic candidates and organizations for critically needed resources.
Defend our Courts is at the forefront of the fight to defend the Democratic majority on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court and we've only raised $300k since we launched in May, but fundraising has drastically slowed this month. To compete with MAGA we will need tens of millions before November...

In just _7 days_ , Democrats spent over _$1,000,000_ on ads attacking President Trump’s landmark Big Beautiful Bill!

**Outspending Republicans by almost 2:1** ❗❗

Democrats are livid that Republicans prevented the largest tax hike in U.S. History while turbo-charging the U.S. economy to compete head-on with China. _**Now they’re spending millions every week to spread lies and disinformation.**_

clean_body: In just 7 days, Democrats spent over $1,000,000 on ads attacking President Trump’s landmark Big Beautiful Bill! | Fellow American, In just 7 days , Democrats spent over $1,000,000 on ads attacking President Trump’s landmark Big Beautiful Bill! Outspending Republicans by almost 2:1 ❗❗ Democrats are livid that Republicans prevented the largest tax hike in U.S. History while turbo-charging the U.S. economy to compete head-on with China. Now they’re spending millions every week to spread lies and disinformation. I’m proud of everything we were able to accomplish in passing President Trump’s legislative agenda, and the voters need to hear the truth. For America, Steve Daines P.S. Support from grassroots Conservatives like you is the main reason we have a Senate Majority capable of passing President Trump’s America First agenda. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

---

GOP rising star Rep. Kevin Kiley **[utterly humiliated a frustrated Jamie Raskin](https://substack.com/redirect/a8d1b682-8925-4443-bca7-2c70719914eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as he tried to argue that ICE agents have no right to wear masks to conceal their identity during immigration raids, after he and the Democrats supported COVID mask hysteria just a few short years ago.
**This was brutal:**
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a8d1b682-8925-4443-bca7-2c70719914eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a8d1b682-8925-4443-bca7-2c70719914eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"What authorizes the government to send people out who are not identified with any law enforcement insignia, masked in unmarked cars to arrest people?!" Raskin asked. "Doesn't that set the people up for danger in America?!!"
"If it's true that law enforcement is somehow never allowed to be in something other than their uniform, I think you have a lot of people who got tickets for running a stop sign when there was an unmarked car there who would be happy to hear that, because they have a new basis to challenge that!" Kiley retorted.
"To the extent that some agents have chosen to not have their faces revealed, we've seen the **[threats against ICE absolutely skyrocket](https://substack.com/redirect/a8d1b682-8925-4443-bca7-2c70719914eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over the last several months!"
Watch the heated clash here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a8d1b682-8925-4443-bca7-2c70719914eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Together with Bonner Private Wines**
### **[The Hidden Gems the Founding Fathers Would Love](https://substack.com/redirect/56963e2e-d816-44f3-97ef-c36060ec8247?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/56963e2e-d816-44f3-97ef-c36060ec8247?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Thomas Jefferson didn't buy his wine at a grocery store.
He sourced it directly from small European vineyards--handwritten letters, wax-sealed crates, the whole deal.
And you know what? He was _right_ to do it.
Today, most wines in the U.S. are mass-produced, stuffed with additives, and sold to the highest bidder.
But a handful of families in places like France, Spain, and Italy are still doing it the old way:
* No chemicals
* No fake oak flavoring
* Just honest, small-batch wine

**[That's what the Bonner Private Wine Partnership is all about.](https://substack.com/redirect/56963e2e-d816-44f3-97ef-c36060ec8247?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Every quarter, we ship 6 rare wines direct from small winemakers across Europe and Argentina--bottles you won't find in any store.
You get the kind of wine Jefferson would've fought for.
🍷 Only a few spots open for the next shipment--join now before it fills up:
[Join the Bonner Private Wine Partnership](https://substack.com/redirect/56963e2e-d816-44f3-97ef-c36060ec8247?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Left-wing orgs who received cash from Biden now reportedly helping illegals evade ICE
Chinese for Affirmative Action (CAA) and Stop AAPI Hate received a $2 million DOJ grant from the Biden administration but are**[now using the funding to advise illegal immigrants on avoiding deportation,](https://substack.com/redirect/ecf9ad5a-40a0-4ad5-ac46-38dd3ebe2ec3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** including instructions to refuse opening doors to ICE agents and avoid identifying themselves.
* **The Trump administration terminated the remaining funding in April** , cutting off $1.5 million after CAA received $500,000, arguing the organizations' activities were "inconsistent with the interests of the United States" as they "fight" and "resist" Trump's immigration policies.
* **Both organizations have characterized Trump's deportation efforts as racist "terrorism,"** comparing immigration enforcement to Japanese American internment during WWII and blaming the Trump administration for $32 million in damages from anti-ICE riots in Los Angeles.
* **The organizations have connections to illegal immigrants and downplay Chinese Communist Party threats** , with Stop AAPI Hate featuring a speaker who admitted to being in the country illegally with a criminal record, while consistently opposing legislation targeting CCP espionage and calling such concerns "fearmongering."

* * *
# Melania Trump helps the president see through Putin's lies
President Donald Trump says that First Lady Melania Trump **[has helped point out Vladimir Putin's pattern of false promises,](https://substack.com/redirect/948a088d-d4f7-4676-a59d-05b70b634068?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with Trump recalling how she would tell him about Russian attacks immediately after he had "wonderful conversations" with Putin about potential peace deals.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/298a3488-ffcc-4070-80d9-d4c20d611fbb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Trump described specific instances where Putin appeared duplicitous** , saying he would come home thinking progress was made only for Melania to inform him that Russia had just "bombed a nursing home" or "hit another city" right after their calls.
* **Trump gave Putin a 50-day ultimatum** to secure a peace deal with Ukraine or face "100%" tariffs, while also confirming he has agreed to sell arms to NATO to support Ukraine's resistance against Russian attacks.
* **NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte announced broad European support** for the arms deal, with Germany, Finland, Denmark, Sweden, Norway, the Netherlands, and Canada all wanting to participate in what he called "only the first wave" of support through NATO systems.

* * *

If my name and face are familiar, it's not just because I ran for Congress in 2024.
For more than 30 years, I was a TV news anchor, uplifting the stories of Central Pennsylvanians. I flew over New York City with the Pennsylvania National Guard after 9/11, delivered the heartbreaking news that Roe v. Wade had been overturned on live television, and shared the stories of businesses closing, job losses, and families struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.
**I am a dedicated truth teller with decades of experience standing up for our neighbors.**
Now I am working to replace former Freedom Caucus Chair and **_MAGA insurrectionist Scott Perry._**
❌ He has praised the GOP budget bill that just passed. You know — the one that will kick millions of hard-working Americans off Medicaid, shutter rural hospitals, and give tax cuts to the wealthy 1%.
❌ He has supported a national abortion ban with no exceptions.
❌ He helped plan the January 6th insurrection, where Americans lost their lives.
Scott Perry is too extreme for PA-10, and we deserve better.

subject: Stop Congress's "Crypto Week" Corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Trump's crypto corruption knows no bounds – and THIS WEEK Congress is
racing to further line his pockets by passing two new crypto bills that
could legitimize predatory platforms, enrich Trump and his cronies, and
set the stage for our next financial crisis.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32919?source=email-20250715&t=1011&akid=9020%2E5885482%2EY1Ydfr ]Headline: Trump's Crypto Firm Raised $52 Million — Likely Sending
Millions to His Family, New Disclosure Reveals

We can't let this happen. Our Revolution is meeting with key members of
Congress to push them to vote no on Trump's crypto con job – but we need
ALL our voices behind us to show our representatives that the public is
watching.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32919?source=email-20250715&t=1012&akid=9020%2E5885482%2EY1Ydfr ]Add your name right now and send an urgent message to your
representatives in Congress to vote NO on Trump's crypto con job!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32919?source=email-20250715&t=1013&akid=9020%2E5885482%2EY1Ydfr ]ADD YOUR NAME

Republicans in Congress declared this week 'crypto week' and are now
furiously pushing to hand Trump yet another win for billionaires off the
backs of the working class by passing two bills – the GENIUS Act and the
CLARITY Act.

Make no mistake: Trump is deeply entangled with the crypto industry and
will profit enormously if these bills pass. His family and companies have
made a shocking $1.2 BILLION in crypto just in the past few months. And
these new bills will give him and his billionaire allies the greenlight to
manipulate financial markets even more.

That's not even all of it. JD Vance was ALSO just exposed for his
financial ties to crypto-backed investment groups that stand to reap huge
profits by legitimizing risky crypto schemes under federal law – schemes
that expose millions of Americans, including those with no current stake
in crypto, to potentially devastating financial losses.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32919?source=email-20250715&t=1014&akid=9020%2E5885482%2EY1Ydfr ]Headline: 'Self-enrichment': JD Vance stands to profit from Trump
military contracts, crypto reserve

This week's crypto bills being rushed to a vote don't just legitimize
harmful financial practices – they pave the way for more of this blatant
corruption. But Democratic support for these reckless measures is
currently shaky, leaving a window open for us to stop this dangerous
giveaway.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32919?source=email-20250715&t=1015&akid=9020%2E5885482%2EY1Ydfr ]Our Revolution organizers are meeting right now with key members of
Congress, pressing them to reject these crypto con-job bills – but now we
need grassroots pressure to turn these meetings into victories. Urge your
lawmakers to vote NO on Trump and Vance's corrupt crypto bills by adding
your signature now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32919?source=email-20250715&t=1016&akid=9020%2E5885482%2EY1Ydfr ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

The Our Revolution Team

[ ]Add your name right now and send an urgent message to your representatives in Congress to vote NO on Trump's crypto con job! [ ]ADD YOUR NAME Republicans in Congress declared this week 'crypto week' and are now furiously pushing to hand Trump yet another win for billionaires off the backs of the working class by passing two bills – the GENIUS Act and the CLARITY Act. Make no mistake: Trump is deeply entangled with the crypto industry and will profit enormously if these bills pass. His family and companies have made a shocking $1.2 BILLION in crypto just in the past few months. And these new bills will give him and his billionaire allies the greenlight to manipulate financial markets even more. That's not even all of it. JD Vance was ALSO just exposed for his financial ties to crypto-backed investment groups that stand to reap huge profits by legitimizing risky crypto schemes under federal law – schemes that expose millions of Americans, including those with no current stake in crypto, to potentially devastating financial losses. [ ]Headline: 'Self-enrichment': JD Vance stands to profit from Trump military contracts, crypto reserve This week's crypto bills being rushed to a vote don't just legitimize harmful financial practices – they pave the way for more of this blatant corruption. But Democratic support for these reckless measures is currently shaky, leaving a window open for us to stop this dangerous giveaway. [ ]Our Revolution organizers are meeting right now with key members of Congress, pressing them to reject these crypto con-job bills – but now we need grassroots pressure to turn these meetings into victories. Urge your lawmakers to vote NO on Trump and Vance's corrupt crypto bills by adding your signature now. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME When we organize, we win. subject: I’m still fighting. But the cavalry hasn’t shown up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

I bet this wasn’t on your radar when you woke up this morning | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=21f43235c74c430d87ba15615ce162f6&_e=_P73gWcIs3wKlVJZ3DxAxxSFTBFqVdp3jQn3tc7T0ISFXh92y73Y5P0oIIHN56qnEg9xxDps6GpHIMeyNJEnHB2Ay2Rz-FB_jfympnnO0nw27ysINBh0S6kq0rNyl_eYae_UqwntdcXB6wQUG-xxYW0GWMkai2x0RnWRwJaBz-XUBemwH35ziMoKiB8z2V2D_wh1ut7VJrdcAMbYDljCuQlsUs8Zsfrnw5qp7X44Y-bkwLhRYkSenD39eCHKdcb46nzKIzj8L7sznDIMTo8TlFgR4uEKAxNBP-Llm-8ABZ-m8gQHcy8VUZUWfoyic3wMtDQG3xUf27i6pMP19MgPIWPV-YyF2A32tfVc_sfOiw1BuBoBbaVw9k0H_NoUA-j919g1kcIsM_n4tlpUilXNuSDndubmgWXdiwKiGJyiqSjageqMvcy6b7Vl4o8z1_cWP096BYj8-Pzv78U7k2D4SPkkrZjSuyxsrxox3sZJG6u5I4QDTh01VgOScBKixxPLYaSYliGod-VmfWv_LYnneio5pHfgcsKTzW796oen3pxZBlbl_MGHEn3yLv52e4cf84P6WaBq7-LhFOwK617ARFsUgh3KYfozLSCvPgUEcWff9mY7x_RduxB-dFnwtht6oyANMAPpuVA6VaeMtxNB8hBgZXpxx0_pFNuBj6A4TeSzYZ0G3iSCPri_zO_LTWV49XxHEV6fbL-bKFYo7F2lH-vU4mdv9tXwzzE1z2ZyM3JvoQEXE0JJGIWMbBRm9kiL)

Fellow Conservative,

When I launched this campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota, I didn’t expect an easy path. I’m not a career politician. _**I don’t have a famous last name or deep-pocketed lobbyists behind me.**_ But I believe this country is worth fighting for — and thanks to people like you, we’ve already proven what a grassroots campaign can do.

Thousands of proud American Patriots stepped up to power this mission in just a few short weeks. Together, we laid the foundation — with ads running, volunteers signing up, and a clear message breaking through the noise: We’re not backing down—not now, not ever.

Republicans have been pining over Minnesota for years, and for a long time, winning a Senate seat or even its electoral votes at the presidential level has been out of reach.

_**Not anymore.**_****

Now, we’re entering a critical phase. If we want to expand our reach and show voters across Minnesota that this campaign is real, we need to keep our momentum going. That means bringing in more grassroots fuel — and **[I’m asking for your help again today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=21f43235c74c430d87ba15615ce162f6&_e=_P73gWcIs3wKlVJZ3DxAxxSFTBFqVdp3jQn3tc7T0ISFXh92y73Y5P0oIIHN56qnEg9xxDps6GpHIMeyNJEnHB2Ay2Rz-FB_jfympnnO0nw27ysINBh0S6kq0rNyl_eYae_UqwntdcXB6wQUG-xxYW0GWMkai2x0RnWRwJaBz-XUBemwH35ziMoKiB8z2V2D_wh1ut7VJrdcAMbYDljCuQlsUs8Zsfrnw5qp7X44Y-bkwLhRYkSenD39eCHKdcb46nzKIzj8L7sznDIMTo8TlMgXDl2hXwt1kCp42H-xk88VEoiyCGs7BcPGsnh1S2kQZDlmmFU5ACEgs_EqsJ6D5KRe41qCdDgO7_V_d0TFI-ObhlAd5kwz9Ff7lHMEfotV8Czx_KfUgCPg3lRFf7SPJ7OdWjMOATCIXypdgCh0R3UEPJ5z7nHaxx_Bcl67y_TI9i25Q_S2f8WMxyfG8Jp64PiIhA0pFrHuctonbfG7wy_MlL37q5klj-fV1I04o4yVUb24ZOk8_k9uzZjyEFWxx7BS7pQNipfHgH4fw1R3sqOdkWi10VbCrUjk2754V-OtXLjRZVwqohrGSUtneQAfwVooYkJwlhEl77MVVpK1fMDTMvPAlOWkQuWSdvuG1A8alFKVM9greCLbJzNoP-ysam5yWEuIQZFkboQoA53PlWPu015jC2GBlBP23tfx-esZiRdN_EsRbeM7RIWlRuwj7Qs-iD53NMJyEDeuu2wRDPfVNqap7t-ZWTNvHcmFWxXS) **

Let me be clear: I’m not in this race to make a point._**I’m in it to win.**_ And I know we can — because the American people are ready.

* They’re tired of weak leaders who won’t stand up for truth.

* They’re tired of the chaos, the double standards, the attacks on common sense.

* They’re tired of being told that loving this country is somehow wrong.

I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11 and became a Navy SEAL. I deployed 13 times to 70 countries, serving in war zones and leading teams in some of the most dangerous places on Earth. I didn’t do that for titles or applause. I did it because I believed in this nation, and I still do.

But now, I’m watching the country I fought for slip away — not because the enemy is stronger, but because too many of our leaders are weak.

**I refuse to sit on the sidelines and watch it happen.**

That’s why I’m running for the United States Senate. And that’s why I need you with me.

This isn’t about politics. It's about protecting the values that make America worth defending. **With your help, we will send a message from Minnesota to Washington: Patriots are rising.**

**If you’ve been watching from the sidelines, now’s the time to get in the fight.**

**Whether $10, $25, or more, your support means everything.**

We’ve already shown we have a movement. Now let’s grow it — and show the political class that the American people are ready to lead again.

clean_body: I bet this wasn’t on your radar when you woke up this morning | Fellow Conservative, When I launched this campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota, I didn’t expect an easy path. I’m not a career politician. I don’t have a famous last name or deep-pocketed lobbyists behind me. But I believe this country is worth fighting for — and thanks to people like you, we’ve already proven what a grassroots campaign can do. Thousands of proud American Patriots stepped up to power this mission in just a few short weeks. Together, we laid the foundation — with ads running, volunteers signing up, and a clear message breaking through the noise: We’re not backing down—not now, not ever. Republicans have been pining over Minnesota for years, and for a long time, winning a Senate seat or even its electoral votes at the presidential level has been out of reach. Not anymore.** Now, we’re entering a critical phase. If we want to expand our reach and show voters across Minnesota that this campaign is real, we need to keep our momentum going. That means bringing in more grassroots fuel — and If you’ve previously donated to our campaign, If you’ve yet to make a gift, Let me be clear: I’m not in this race to make a point.I’m in it to win. And I know we can — because the American people are ready. They’re tired of weak leaders who won’t stand up for truth. They’re tired of the chaos, the double standards, the attacks on common sense. They’re tired of being told that loving this country is somehow wrong. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11 and became a Navy SEAL. I deployed 13 times to 70 countries, serving in war zones and leading teams in some of the most dangerous places on Earth. I didn’t do that for titles or applause. name: Steve Daines
subject: Fight to defend the Senate Majority is tied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

Every poll released for our fight to defend the Republican Senate Majority tells the same story--_**[this race is virtually tied!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmjrgc8mma9jb25agdqudcs2qvkp6b2g2pi9n1no_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdg6cpj2c3h2bs)**_

The minute we retook the Senate Majority from Chuck Schumer, Democrats across the country didn't waste any time organizing and tapping into their networks of elite megadonors in California and New York.

I already have an opponent here in Montana, and they're not waiting around to rally their radical base against me.

I'll be blunt Friend: We can't win this race without your help. **[PLEASE, pitch in today to help us win this toss-up fight for the Majority and secure victory in Montana. Donate $10, $25, or more!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zutd8pqbkj1961lqvuc71ndha1n2t6llko94tjh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdg6cpj2c3h2bs)** Thank you, [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmetk7um89o278thgj8flkk3b33lfnbnogdgo3eo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdg6cpj2c3h2bs) Steve Daines

name: Skyhawk 4K Drone
subject: Where should we send your Skyhawk 4K Drone
body:
This foldable, lightweight drone lets you record ALL your epic adventures!...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21639/6374453/a3382a77fdf52880e21f5f99f752c89077f71559/3532969d68b3a7600194791e6dfe2f36ba4600e7)
---
| | |
---
_July 15th, 2025 at 06:24 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | **Fellow Patriot,**
**This foldable, lightweight drone lets you record ALL your epic adventures!** [**Get yours now!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21639/6374453/20ee4855552a9b188fb489b4b1aab4e16aae5832/3532969d68b3a7600194791e6dfe2f36ba4600e7)
The**Skyhawk 4K** is a precision engineered drone specifically designed for easy flying, making it perfect to fly inside, or to record while on the move.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21639/6374453/a3382a77fdf52880e21f5f99f752c89077f71559/3532969d68b3a7600194791e6dfe2f36ba4600e7)
---
**It’s foldable** ... The propellers fold in to make it easier to hide or carry!
**Records video** in HD at 60 frames per second and takes high res photos.
**Gravity Sensors** ... Detects ground and other obstacles and changes course automatically to avoid collisions. And more! [**Yes, Please Rush My Skyhawk 4K Drone to My Doorstep Today!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21639/6374453/20ee4855552a9b188fb489b4b1aab4e16aae5832/3532969d68b3a7600194791e6dfe2f36ba4600e7)
These drones are flying off the shelves for good reason ...
It’s the most advanced drone you’ll get at this price.
No doubt you’ll find 100 uses for this drone!
---
|
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21639/6374453/a3382a77fdf52880e21f5f99f752c89077f71559/3532969d68b3a7600194791e6dfe2f36ba4600e7)

body:
Today is the halfway point of the month, so we called a finance team meeting today to go over our fundraising numbers
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1712%2E791427%2E5HtgLz)

Team — Today is the halfway point of the month, so we called a finance team meeting today to go over our fundraising numbers. The upshot is: **We’re way behind.**
Fundraising is down right now, and we’re tracking well behind where we need to be if we want to hit our goal for July.
Look, we get it. We just got out of a big FEC deadline push last month. And Trump’s slashing of crucial programs is causing lots of economic uncertainty for regular folks.
We get that it may not be the best time for some to chip in. But if you have just $15 to spare, you could really help us get back on track today.
And if we can get back on track, we’ll have the resources we need to continue to take on Trump and reelect Ilhan in Minnesota’s 5th. So what do you say?
**[Chip in $15 or more today and help us catch up to our July fundraising goal. It adds up fast when lots of people do their part.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&refcode=em250715-1-180&t=2&akid=1712%2E791427%2E5HtgLz)

Peter,

[**Before I ask you to pitch in just $5,**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d377cbbf4d0c42e298a597eb20f68bd1&_e=CaHsgw9owBlneLcLIm9W19tv9Cb1ZU6Y_pXdjdsgImQvcy6stPhwUWS5FrfjIaJeyxyL4if10E2flzKZPWmUsrw2TohPvqNLT3heqAhE5vI_Wa_hOceYK0TNqYDQ-7L5A_Y90kJx9lc2JFEAnSzVSKVchkQ2dSztLqi-HhMoSxyiNl_Li2BTQVkrAtpwYK7cZLnhsfMziyBAOa8shu1EV_egGm_2FJfenNB9uMk37ldQSCkWu0ycxoi0JTyn0M2xBOf93pgt8v0R3LIyqj3-7lcmXm9mXO9AsDwuqV8m9JDnW6Lbq6HO7jhigCs4jeCBkN6twCrlmYmmE0zcvZoJ6LIWhTsPhpEQ0VsLYkT6KE8S4jwZlzSyPl4hvmI1ppiLfhiKoqVV8NWeB0mIv80GsmM3rkInd7jWthUkB4FHWAIfQElV4pQpfTOHQkHZa_MnFrgwCyL69nBsIgYpGqutUKQGXywwYQWs6xMteId85fFF00EHz43-Oep2PnvdL6pDSdVmWUm9BnEixTFvCByTRJdtn2FfOo5T4nJIE-uwIUcq-Hd33MOdB3WeRsCoWmkI_66aN2xQl9eDIgpY_Kb9M5DaG-fOx0a8GgHZUkfMs3v-tdPv8wkadLCCB5Kg42rbsHNa0GPfqGVF3tiaRIFhLmrhbW8qBM-Z9LIUMXp1yw8XRbcFSr9MTDCLeBmwJ1-rhBzqeAB2XVsMsqATliChH12xJzM7O_7sZW_k0t1Z6sww-FOJq9AOGLhiYxcqS8zWCA9vk7J5XFHIsvwNSioGHbGexy5rN8CgsMZrtSNGftI%3D) here are three reasons why Georgia’s Senate race matters and we your support is crucial:

1. **If we win in Georgia,** we end any chance Democrats have of taking the Senate Majority.

2. **This is the #1 Senate race in the country.** It’s a true tossup and polling shows that I’m the Republican who can defeat Jon Ossoff.

How can you help your Gen Z kids move from surviving to thriving? With so much technology available, many young people have not
learned how to connect in person. They can text but struggle to connect.

Mother-son team Tracy and Caden Vittorini have advice for parents on helping Gen Z have real conversations and find their life's
purpose. Tracy is the founder of Teen Edge and Built to Win – coaching programs for teens and college age students. Her son Caden
is a top voice in youth motivation and leadership. A TedX speaker, Caden is the founder of Vitt Factor. You do not want to miss
their insights and advice! Like, subscribe and share.

How to Talk to Your Kids About Tragic or Scary News

Much as we may hope to shelter our kids from the most disturbing and tragic news stories, we now live in a digital age and are
bombarded with 24/7 coverage. These events can cause children to feel that it may happen to them, or to their school, or to their
family. That's why they need your loving guidance to protect and guide them through fearful times. This week, we're sharing some
tips to consider when discussing tragedy in the news with your kids.

clean_body: How do we help our kids in a time of technology, social media, and scary headlines? We are sharing advice and tips for talking to your kids and teaching them how to connect. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] July 15, 2025 • Newsletter Helping Gen Z: From Texting to Connecting Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] How can you help your Gen Z kids move from surviving to thriving? With so much technology available, many young people have not learned how to connect in person. They can text but struggle to connect. Mother-son team Tracy and Caden Vittorini have advice for parents on helping Gen Z have real conversations and find their life's purpose. Tracy is the founder of Teen Edge and Built to Win – coaching programs for teens and college age students. Her son Caden is a top voice in youth motivation and leadership. A TedX speaker, Caden is the founder of Vitt Factor. You do not want to miss their insights and advice! Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] How to Talk to Your Kids About Tragic or Scary News Much as we may hope to shelter our kids from the most disturbing and tragic news stories, we now live in a digital age and are bombarded with 24/7 coverage. These events can cause children to feel that it may happen to them, or to their school, or to their family. That's why they need your loving guidance to protect and guide them through fearful times. This week, we're sharing some tips to consider when discussing tragedy in the news with your kids. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. Season 2 Episodes on Mondays at 10am ET View on YouTube [] View on Rumble [] [] [] [-] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

Peter, We’re doing everything in our power to hold the line as Donald Trump and his MAGA allies ramp up their attacks on our freedoms, democracy, and way of life. But we can’t do it alone. To fuel our fight against Trump’s extreme agenda, we’ve set a goal to raise $20,000 by Friday night—and we’re counting on people like you to help us get there. Our records indicate that you’re eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, so you can donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our party and get a full refund from the state. **Donald Trump and his fellow Republicans will only do more damage if we don’t put them in check. That’s why it’s so crucial that we organize early and have our strongest campaign infrastructure ever. **

subject: re: a longer email –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I need your support.
| | | It's Senator Schumer. This is a long email -- but because of how much is at stake, _you need to know it all._

**If you can't read the whole thing, I'll cut to the chase:**

**[The GOP wants to use their majority to implement ALL of Trump's most extreme policy goals. I wish I was exaggerating, but I'm not. So please, will you chip in $5 _(becomes $15!)_ before tonight's mid-month deadline to take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21902?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250715-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250715-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=20746%2E9716520%2ENjnVMo)**

_Here are the three most important things you need to know:_

**SENATE REPUBLICANS ARE WORKING HAND-IN-HAND WITH TRUMP TO PASS HIS PLANS INTO LAW.**

Now that they have the majority, they're doing whatever it takes to cater to Trump's desires -- even if it means cutting key programs like Medicaid and Social Security!

_It gets worse:_

**EXPERTS ARE SAYING TAKING THE SENATE BACK WILL BE TOUGH.**

If we want to stop Trump's agenda, we'll NEED to take back the Senate -- but the analysts are saying it'll be an uphill battle. Factor in the Republican megadonors willing to spend hundreds of millions to keep the Senate red, and it's clear we won't have much margin for error.

_As a result:_

**WE'LL NEED ALL HANDS ON DECK TO DEFY THE ODDS AND TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY!**

It'll be a tough fight, but I know it can be done. We can only beat the odds if grassroots Democrats like you step up. **So please:**

**[We _NEED_ to fight back and act with urgency, so before today's mid-month deadline, will you give $5 _(becomes $15!)_ to win back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21902?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250715-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250715-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=20746%2E9716520%2ENjnVMo)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Democracy in MASSIVE danger >>>
body:
Trump has signed an Executive Order targeting ActBlue - the tool millions of us use to fund the fight for abortion rights, LGBTQ+ equality, climate action, and more.
Chip in $7 right now to show we won’t be defunded or dismantled. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=070325_3]
FIRST: Trump launched a war on the free press - smearing journalists, silencing dissent, and undermining public trust in truth itself.
NEXT: He tried to overturn the election, fueled an insurrection, and installed loyalists across government to shield himself from accountability.
NOW: He’s targeting ActBlue with an Executive Order that instructs the DOJ to target and investigate it.
ActBlue is the infrastructure that powers everyything from school board races to the fight to flip the House. It’s the tool MILLIONS of grassroots donors use to fight for reproductive freedom, LGBTQ+ rights, climate action, and more.
And Trump has declared war on it.
We launched an emergency $25,000 response fund to push back. If we don’t act now, the right will see our silence as weakness. Chip in $7 or more before midnight to show we will not be silenced, defunded, or dismantled. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=070325_3]

name: Carol Obando-Derstine
subject: Why today is so special to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carol for PA
body:
When my family immigrated here when I was just three years old, we faced financial hardship, language barriers, and made countless sacrifices.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111494141/557485962/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-07-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjllNWJhZTYtOGI2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bHwYYCb0ThQxopsIvGDKsHJ6VzGVyjZeTDzvsyjLJ2I=)
---
| Peter,

Today marks my 29th anniversary of becoming a naturalized citizen, and I couldn’t be prouder to be an American.

When my family immigrated here when I was just three years old, we faced financial hardship, language barriers, and made countless sacrifices. But in just one generation, I’m proud to have achieved my American Dream – and now, I’m running for Congress to make sure others have the same opportunity.

Right now, our immigration system is broken. But terrorizing communities and deporting American citizens – including sick children – **is not right.** We need bipartisan reform that creates strong borders, supports businesses, and a legal, safe, efficient, and humane path to citizenship.

That’s why I’m running for Congress: to fix the problems we all face, **not to play political games with people’s lives.** I believe loving your country means creating solutions to make it a better place, not tearing it apart with extremist rhetoric. I’m proud to be an American, and I’m proud of the movement that we’re building towards a better country – for everyone.

Thank you for standing with me,

Carol Obando-Derstine

clean_body: The fight is far from over, and there is a lot of work that needs to be done. But your $7 can help fight back against Trump. | | If you’d like to unsubscribe, . | | Peter, Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are doing everything they can to seize power and roll back our rights. In Congress, I’m fighting back — every single day — to protect our democracy and build a more equitable future. But right now, I’m up against a critical 24-hour deadline — and falling short isn’t an option. We need to raise $25,000 before midnight tomorrow to stay competitive and power our movement forward. The truth is: The fight is far from over, and there is a lot of work that needs to be done. If we don’t meet our mid-month goal, we won’t be able to keep up the momentum to fight back against Trump, MAGA extremists, and GOP mega-donors. That’s why I’m working to put an end to the lawless authoritarianism of Trump and the undemocratic extremism of his MAGA allies before it’s too late. But I can’t do this without you, Peter We must meet our $25,000 mid-month goal to continue to stand in this fight against Donald Trump. | | ---|--- | | Thank you for standing by me in this fight. name: Local Democracy Project
subject: The Revolution will be LOCAL.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
clean_body: | | | The Revolution will be local! In a world where the voices of the many often drown beneath the clamor of the greedy few, we must remember that true change begins at home. As we just witnessed in New York City, where a young Muslim Democratic Socialist became the Democratic nominee for mayor, people are organizing and mobilizing at the local level to flip the bird to disaster capitalism and start planting, building, coding and powering a revolution for everyone. The Local Democracy Project stands as a beacon of hope, empowering communities to unite, advocate, and take action. We aim to build not a temporary resistance but a long term opposition to Trump and his dangerous MAGA agenda. By donating to this vital organization, you help strengthen the backbone of local movements that are essential for a peaceful revolution. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Donald Trump wants us to think that he is all powerful and we are powerless to resist him and his dreadful agenda. Don’t fall for it. Now is the time to stand up and be heard! Whether you choose to volunteer, spread the word, or donate, know that you are part of a powerful movement striving for positive change. Join us in this journey! Together, we are many—a force that can disrupt the destructive few.** Thanks for your support. -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . Hi Peter, it’s Ritchie.

**I’m personally reaching out to you today because if we get just 4 more donations in Cresco by midnight, we’ll stay on track to hit tonight's mid-month goal** — _and then I can stop spamming your inbox with emails like this one!_

Peter, our fundraising deadlines aren't a made-up number or gimmicky ploy to get people to chip in for no reason. **Hitting this goal allows us to combat extremism, to stop Trump, to save our Democracy, and to keep me fighting for you in Washington.**

You know I don’t do a second of call time – i.e. spending hours on the phone begging donors for big checks — so I’m _really_ counting on grassroots supporters like you, Peter.

**All I need is 4 more donations from Cresco, so I have to ask:**

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: This isn’t a gimmick | = Hi Peter, it’s Ritchie. I’m personally reaching out to you today because if we get just 4 more donations in Cresco by midnight, we’ll stay on track to hit tonight's mid-month goal — and then I can stop spamming your inbox with emails like this one! Peter, our fundraising deadlines aren't a made-up number or gimmicky ploy to get people to chip in for no reason. Hitting this goal allows us to combat extremism, to stop Trump, to save our Democracy, and to keep me fighting for you in Washington. You know I don’t do a second of call time – i.e. spending hours on the phone begging donors for big checks — so I’m really counting on grassroots supporters like you, Peter. All I need is 4 more donations from Cresco, so I have to ask: = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you for stepping up, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. I am proud to share some humbling news with each of you today.
**Less than 15 months since we launched in April of 2024,**_**Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid**_**has published more than 500 (!) articles, podcasts, and interviews and surpassed 142,000 followers! All thanks to you.**
**Now, consider this:**
* As legacy media continues to capitulate to billionaires
* As the White House continues to enact fascist policies
* As the Supreme Court continues to let Trump dismantle our Republic
* And as economic, social, and climate injustices continue to increase nationwide

You have made Let's Address This that newsletter that more than 142,000 people rely on for timely, critical, and accurate information on human rights. You have made Let's Address This one of the top 70 Substacks in the global politics universe. And you have made Let's Address this reach more than 2.5 million readers every month.
I am truly honored!
**Here 's a snapshot of why you subscribed:**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2ebae8fa-3b58-464f-b3d9-7651cd2229d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## Where Do We Go Next?
We continue to build--with you leading the way. I ask you to choose at least 1 of my 3 calls to action and elevate _Let 's Address This_ to the next level (especially as the fascist President continues his injustices).
1. **Jump in.** Become a paid subscriber at a cup of coffee ($6) a month or $50 a year. We are not funded by billionaires. We are supported by We the People.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..64aRXPH4wkR02I0Ij9vk2JZzllDgZdYVjly1PpWWfyQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168383476)
2. **Grow our community.** Gift a subscription to a friend. The best way to build our movement is _each one reach one_. Let's grow to 200K before the year is out!
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..64aRXPH4wkR02I0Ij9vk2JZzllDgZdYVjly1PpWWfyQ?&gift=true)
3. **Maximize our reach.** Share this post on your social media, in your family group chat, or simply like and comment. Engage and help boost its visibility.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=168383476&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4MzgzNDc2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTI1OTE4NzIsImV4cCI6MTc1NTE4Mzg3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.r7wV9yT0b6TKvlKTPzCJ5IeSoMMFcnBbSgkk8jazbQA)

## **A Final Word**
Donald Trump has already signed more than 200 Executive Orders. These include ICE raids of schools, mass deportations, a Muslim ban 2.0, anti-LGBTQ orders, to dismantle the Department of Education, to gut the State Department, and to let evangelical churches openly engage in political activity. As the separation between church and state collapses, corporate media continues to capitulate to him. And just as mortifying, billionaires continue to line up behind him knowing full well his corruption and exploitation of the American people.
My mission remains clear--**uphold absolute justice and human rights in all I do** , and do so without billionaire support. Instead, do so with the people, by the people, and for the people. **This is why I seek your support.** Your support of Let's Address This is an investment to demand justice and universal human rights.
Subscribe, share, and let's remain relentless in our mission for a more perfect Union.
**Thank you for your trust. ❤️**
Sincerely,
Qasim

name: Dan Carr
subject: Who Will Be The Next Governor
body:
Mississippi Political Landscape

| |
---|---|---
|
# Who Will Be The Next Governor
### Mississippi Political Landscape
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Jul 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
Mississippi stands at a critical crossroads. In a time when our values are under assault and our freedoms are too often taken for granted, we must elect leaders who understand that government is not the answer to every problem -- God is. We need a governor whose vision is not shaped by political convenience, but by enduring Christian principles and the practical realities of business leadership.
[Click Here to Finish Reading and Watch Video "Values over Politics:"](https://substack.com/redirect/d24aaf02-2d10-414d-9fc2-7d1d13797fed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Mark Kelly
subject: I didn’t intend for this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
All I wanted to do was keep serving my country, the same way I have since I was sworn in to the U.S. Navy.
#

Team, when Gabby and I first agreed that I would run for Senate back in 2019, we knew things would change. We know more than most how public service can change your life.
But I’ve got to tell you, I never intended for things to end up like this. All I wanted to do was keep serving my country, the same way I have since I was sworn in to the U.S. Navy.
I know that service comes with risk, sure. But I didn’t set out to be called a traitor by the richest guy in the world, or to have one of Trump’s advisors calling for my execution.
Now, I don’t want you to worry about me. And after everything I’ve been through, things like this don’t intimidate me all that much.
I do worry that they will intimidate others, though — people just beginning to get involved. People thinking about joining a peaceful demonstration, or speaking out at a local town hall. I worry that Trump and his cronies are trying to scare people out of resisting him, and that it might be working.
But then I look back at this team. You’ve been with me a long time, and you haven’t backed down. Your support means the world to me, but it also gives me a lot of hope that enough people will stand up, push back, and make sure these guys don’t stay in power.
I’m ready to fight like hell to save our democracy. If you’re with me, please:
[**Make a donation before our mid-month deadline so we can have the resources we need to defeat MAGA Republicans up and down the ballot next year.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july25.pQQVdM&refcode=em250715-1-f&t=1&akid=6122%2E6688874%2E6XaNr-)

name: Team DLCC
subject: This GOP candidate is a right-wing maniac
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Iowa Democrats are facing a toss-up special election that would break the GOP’s supermajority – and even slow the very worst of Trump’s Project 2025 agenda. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Iowa Democrats are facing a toss-up special election that would break the GOP’s supermajority – and even slow the very worst of Republicans’ extreme Project 2025 agenda. Last year, the DLCC helped break Republicans’ veto-proof majority in North Carolina and secure power for the incoming Democratic governor. Online donations of $7 supported our work to make it happen. Right now, Republicans hold veto-proof majorities in both chambers of the Iowa legislature, giving them unchecked power to pass extreme legislation no matter who wins the governorship.
To make matters worse, the GOP’s candidate in next month’s special election is a right-wing maniac. He’s vehemently anti-abortion, an election denier, and claims that climate change is “a lie.” We cannot let far-right extremists like this gain more power.
**Flipping a single seat in places like Iowa** can strengthen Democrats’ ability to halt extreme bills and nominees and block more MAGA Republicans from serving in our state legislatures.
**The DLCC has helped break GOP supermajorities in places like North Carolina despite some of the most gerrymandered maps in the country. With your support, we can do it again all over the country.**
[Can you join our team with a $7 donation as we fight to gain ground in red states like Iowa and build Democratic power everywhere?
