Mesoscale News is one of Substack's bestselling newsletters, with exclusive investigations, commentary, and breaking news.
The average cost for a Substack subscription is currently $8 and rising, with too many amazing authors to subscribe to everyone. That's why I'm dropping the price of my monthly and annual subscriptions for new subscribers.
I incur some costs in the work I do, but I have always believed in making information accessible when it's critical for the public to know.
**[I'm dropping mine to $1.75 per month, or $17.50 for one year.](https://substack.com/redirect/6b651d6c-4ee9-4671-b2a2-6a5958dd41bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Subscribe before June 21, 2025 to redeem this offer!**

When I'm invited to do interviews on the news or give commentary on a podcast, it's almost always because something has gone terribly wrong.
That's the job of a disaster expert -- to be ignored when issuing warnings, only to be asked afterward to speak about how it all went wrong.
Today I thought I'd inject some less-tragic stories into your timeline, or at least hopeful updates on tragic stories, and give a shout out to authors on Substack I think you should follow.

name: Monica
subject: You've been in my prayers recently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
So I thought I'd share this Bible verse with you:

Hey there, Friend
You've been in my prayers recently, so I thought I'd share this Bible verse with you:
"Blessed are those whose ways are blameless, who walk according to the law of the Lord. Blessed are they who observe His decrees, who seek with Him all their heart"\- Psalm 119:1-2
You see, to walk in the law of the Lord means facing constant persecution - and it's heartbreaking to say that happens even in America.
But the Word reminds us that those who observe His decrees will be blessed.
So, as a God-fearing Christian and Hispanic America First conservative, I will always fight to protect your faith and your God-given rights in Congress, no matter the cost.
If you agree with me that our faith in God and our nation must be protected at all costs, will you stand with me today?[ADD YOUR NAME ->
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr748och4dp6j31hjlenliijijf22ufj2ban3cao_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdg6eo72cph2bs)Your sister in Christ,Monica
* * *
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrl97bpb7fnn864lmofqtpa4qpg6slort4jl72qg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdg6eo72cph2bs)National Democrats already pledged up to FIFTY MILLION dollars to wipe me out for being a MAGA Latina in a purple district... And that was all BEFORE I was added to this new target list!
There's still time to right the ship as long as we move right now.
[So I'm pleading with you to help me save Texas-15 today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7ebn7os90hhp1o9qaii9e64f580or3k73l39vi0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdg6eo72cph2bs)

Hey friends,
Trying something new today.
I'm excited to launch the first in what I hope will be a long-running series of in-depth video conversations called _**Take the Mic**_**.**
I guess this is what young people call a "podcast." Is anything _not_ a podcast at this point?
This first one was recorded in what looks like a prison interrogation room but was, in fact, a private room in the Laurel, Maryland, public library.
My guest today is the one and only **Salena Zito. **
Salena and I go way back--roughly two decades, to my first congressional run in 2006. She's spent her career reporting from the forgotten zip codes of American politics: Western Pennsylvania diners, factory town Elks lodges, and front porches where the national press rarely treads. A columnist and contributor for outlets like the _Pittsburgh Tribune-Review_ , _New York Post_ , _Washington Examiner_ , _Washington Post_ , and _The Free Press_ , she's best known for understanding conservative populism not as a trend but as a lived reality.
Her latest book, _[Butler: The Untold Story of the Near Assassination of Donald Trump and the Fight for America's Heartland](https://substack.com/redirect/b03f4450-55bb-4d96-8aab-f9b42d374824?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , isn't just a chronicle of the day she stood four feet from Donald Trump's near assassination. It's about the rural people whose lives and voices shape our democracy but are often left out of America's national story.
We talk about all of it: Trump, the chaos of that day, what ties Josh Shapiro and Donald Trump together, and the connective tissue of an America fraying at the seams but still fighting to hold together.
And as Trump says, she's got "the best hair in journalism." (You'll have to judge for yourself.)
Enjoy the episode, and thanks, as always, for supporting this Substack.
Going forward, we will experiment with some paywalled content, partial previews, and other bells and whistles. But the heart of this project will stay the same: conversations that matter, with people who matter. And Salena is certainly one of them!
\-- Patrick
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3983c054-37d0-43d1-9706-05afe956f605?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

---
\- _**Honorable Patrick J. Murphy**_

**The fact that he could win in arguably America 's greatest city proves that, while we won Congress and the White House, the fight for the heart, soul, and future of America still rages on.**

**Peter, the future of Trump 's agenda will be decided on the streets of Los Angeles, Chicago, and New York.**

While I frequently run into those who think that conservatives should just throw up their hands and leave New York to its fate, it's a mistake.

New York symbolizes America to the world.

It's the nerve center for the entire global economy. It has America's most famous sports teams, museums, buildings, and more. It is the global capital of finance, media, and the arts.

America simply giving up on New York is like the British Empire giving up on London or the Roman Empire giving up on Rome.

**And of course, that 's exactly why Marxists like Mamdani want to conquer it.**

If we won't fight for one of our nation's crown jewels, then we deserve to lose it.

Turning Point PAC is taking back critical swing states like Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire from radical socialists like Mamdani.

But we can't do it without you, Peter.

It took this guy approximately ZERO days to confirm our worst suspicions. Mamdani, a self-declared socialist, wants to "globalize the intifada" and import values into the West that will destabilize our civilization. Everything about him runs counter to America First. The fact that he could win in arguably America 's greatest city proves that, while we won Congress and the White House, the fight for the heart, soul, and future of America still rages on. Turning Point PAC is working harder than ever to . We must ensure that radical socialists like Mamdani do NOT gain power in cities, counties, and states across the country. Help us and by donating today. Peter, the future of Trump 's agenda will be decided on the streets of Los Angeles, Chicago, and New York. America simply giving up on New York is like the British Empire giving up on London or the Roman Empire giving up on Rome. And of course, that 's exactly why Marxists like Mamdani want to conquer it. If we won't fight for one of our nation's crown jewels, then we deserve to lose it. clean_body: Friends, If you support the NYPD, I have troubling news to report. Police officers are leaving the NYPD in record numbers. So far this year, 1,555 NYPD officers have filed for retirement. | Friends, If you support the NYPD, I have troubling news to report. Police officers are leaving the NYPD in record numbers. So far this year, 1,555 NYPD officers have filed for retirement. That’s a 48% increase from the first half of last year and a 65% increase from a decade ago. | Now that Communist Zohran Mamdani is the Democrat candidate for mayor, the NY Post is reporting that this crisis could get even worse. The reason is clear: Zohran Mamdani hates the police. He called the NYPD “wicked and corrupt” and for the NYPD to be defunded and dismantled. Friends, to Save New York, we must stop Commie Mamdani from becoming mayor. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks, Nicole | Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306

David Sanko | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |

| | |

| **David Sanko: Local roads and bridges left out of Shapiro’s massive mass transit funding bill**

| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=91c7d855f3&e=b7b3eddce2)

| ''In Pennsylvania, nearly every journey begins and ends on a local road, yet you wouldn’t know it from Gov. Josh Shapiro’s transportation bill, which passed the House. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: CNN claims...
body:
CNN claims, “There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis.”

_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/lGRIqTwL5mGIlgdNqthT2I6hxVJzWTfOTWPgrOwsUB_qqYPVGoAk6Gfr8IoiCls_CIy-vLR-j60RWjSXYSekpBpQC8WASMT7dlNIbeRXflo6TOl2JfLWWpwiwrn2lpPDhvvzn7F__YMJYpPsX2dx_OQI0mIzaU30p7afjB0r9e8ZPelfYDSGZdwu/okkKNn35eXzuM-0_bQIkRN6Ay956_M_0/10)_
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/Sdkj58xDieFgNbATEBlz5jNr9GkUNu2BGS3hktUXGBwQRU5agv7HZCBabIt6WezmokhC0xRkhcnYRDDfCcTys1i-ZBEQ8tej8L7KC56XmPxZIAN0_Hxb8nI4oCeO_UTASnmg0iOj-UlHr7f7HItY28oC1Qe3nT6EvTaD8kxQ0Rwqu5BAUuBiz0A2ZyqCCPSdeeNfaua3eqKnz6Vh9s_m5DeIQ1HsLxd1SiJfQi4KtlD_sPiamZChRR0qmuRsKmYjVkI28LM10YVnV8i2qthcONfMDZZt0HWrKtAd_RRUbkMDu0Oa-SUSc_iPIjKVudirln6uATJ2SK6pnH77P5-i_MuVjHmkSxeLIVMPUzY_Fw2Vq_3IfueQIXWLYSxdv9Jt7fkzl8Z2Q8wkOmyLv14GdsF6QOPfiENEa-53aZPbYwnVwdRMjOaQySvjH_4tMftnxkudCCTWtkhT6zmYCNSQvO506CpqRRRdaHfpsAlcD2y2I9Zm9qZSateF0AWQGolfl0ly1TM0DqilEv9t904tnkOJefbwarGrRD4aPyoOv0dUuDNLzQmEmDmAN_6hsleRSqnSgROzIl47vZ0ELxKwLrpLZDRHqA-_jI4pCytpdytcMwTd3qmnrLG5H-E2LTl2vcPQlqXko1T7IuZnq2USNH5U-byhe0qPBGABpRbWjF8KX__6wn39baXF0syi4yh8Woy_DfMf8aJcTRnYVYuz3hyu75HbZd2hV1cVHssoRODUkC2mxmlp26vFRh3TK5KEV6jeAOYSFwVLzGdfHIsy/WSbuS0QcqotHG9oLEyuSR0h8uLnKdcFb/10) Dear Friend, CNN claims, "There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis."

There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is.

**The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people.**

But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional?

Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions.

That's why your participation in Hillsdale College's [**National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/au4hvuYHw1OoGpjkkyOE88u8RTszzuu89TTQSizgOl-n-UAi-WEgEEKsutqEhCedDHU4q4-KYw4xoNU1JKICPGFUyKk7WZRqNc5n4mqIf2qpas3t0N2ylBrnIrqoLq_QHP7MW6AnBgHboJgch0gPkm7_A9Taa-0CqBe5wSS7WhzbFCcrTwKGmKMfum8lu3DdTX7ierlPruqibR1WYGOsuI_UfmyNXU3hjPlp16fE_ih48A_HybTyL_EBTX97F7qV32IVUAa-Fs3dObj4H46DNkmybTwCXkyCty8tkWSWhQ3OBcVPi7axK-wUxJ4EWA1TSjbxAgYlcwCPRyt0csDinm1vwSl3QdErpcJIWlC0b47Aw785TUrKG7paXydOayToiqCx28XnS3C52KnhzxahwNcMtNFqtI5C-XfuqAIVNr__DO_VkKMf0F1bbh4XjtLSSiomPZYHF-eRBjTABshQrmCzQp_b0LVvglH3pFGJzBLOgW7h0Bjvz3Chie40Swe4GxlY53wTeM4vGQDyKWAx6P5ot-O6HJA5ZKOk1tdzjj3nChLS3m7ZQgU3Y0oMvLGoRCgk0dhfOM-F6JQxQPxXArlDDkNz6841X3E8UG_P2uCTYwvQ0i1K-16LEik47NmJ8cuybDQPjOw7K1axWI8Tl5c-QE4GSlwDUxwECJbJFLnwtAJ1XGLB62KiaOHtZlmsohv_RfecIkpLOveCEqldWyDXDt-PIoNOlPA3iEI0ysKb-DYTvE6QKOEYfbGMH0voLHHgX6zD5JGKDIjSejqX/frUlC9O1_oA-_Abt0Jk1bFOrCY-QT07f/10) is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

You will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** using this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-the-us-judicial-branch**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/N3mMz--QBRhcm-uSI6lERsPx5S2Qw-bLJEul1djmYWpn3En7VbmI6iltJGyG6yum9TMPnO0UQhA33XxHUdgVmuWV1mFF6U19aWHX1lirIiv8y0GYNsTFtb4gACKTsbEEW1V9HiBhUhGOBzJVWar4ciGZFiNnENtn2qr2MvsZhoIX9eemE9aB9IjXpTxpHejjT_YXLRcHLD7PsYE-2mHFBprfVvmEOuaIAe2aiaqgb3cIJUqN7fzIXx1nfZDmUXzUE2HxX2mgvbu78D-MM2FqcjreJ6x9fINHyNvxXQjci64CeF8mM9uhaBlp1m6S0w3MJL-BSIHjwPVfxAF3fGdve_LFSxCkh-jkz4tqhaijJBuw4MBtHv1YHanmtbKSJfLQGfgmaDbuwc23VZf8PeQK2w9grcViVlEhiUjslX5M41DQ5bkzJiPOytMGaVCUgsU7B6yCkGdJtLxCnx1QvCY1dKQyJuBGZOvtffnLk5c0iHCWiEG0_r8a7hi79GNzJiMIffH-zLsbF9Smo40avMmXZQG7aYKE7udOArsg6qGvjt4qA9nGjA5ljnJqI4KIe3_XilgU3Xa_Sn1NRUPSLTlsJtV9m1A50B9bF_MhxoUD0lNq0mf2hcE_1O8KiTh2wui8EkqoWZAO6J0dGKx-CKSubH1QIarjhXkoT_4C3B3PAI5JCcM1RvtKNMri-CJlgTSVXvnTmWJf-Tv4NG3GnMj3RYRUjkG9Zq7Ok5waAqRFzCrEClCV41TTdcR44vg1Ux2Gh2OiRLP3ZmWdtLeKz2Ju/G4STZ4Pa9uxvCSl9r8TG7kWoD8z1u3gD/10)

Thank you for your time and attention--and for joining us in the defense of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | [Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/OSGdfaIAS7uyxPXvVjNMYlhAf1or2BW-T5HfOLJ4jDmsO9ARa5PfBIfTcWGTMaAZTWxfbCImc4dQMe_PPyHB2SD6u1a8F_QGb5FDLzy9FJ4ixH2Sx7WcvwAlsX589yRBIwJ21-TrqSisTLvghWVc8SDI5wdzZRHAoTDMMz5v0WON_kvmX6baHcz4BXXtK5slCtdv5iHmjlF1kry3OGYCRBrkSA9yjz8p4A/IagAmcI-RfxQPkivYBTYMfgetekDOjWI/10)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/lGRIqTwL5mGIlgdNqthT2I6hxVJzWTfOTWPgrOwsUB_qqYPVGoAk6Gfr8IoiCls_CIy-vLR-j60RWjSXYSekpBpQC8WASMT7dlNIbeRXflo6TOl2JfLWWpwiwrn2lpPDhvvzn7F__YMJYpPsX2dx_OQI0mIzaU30p7afjB0r9e8ZPelfYDSGZdwu/okkKNn35eXzuM-0_bQIkRN6Ay956_M_0/10).

subject: Florida demands "weather modification" investigation of Texas Floods
body:
Like many phantasmagorias once relegated to the dim-lit corners of the internet, the notion that humans are deliberately engineering the weather has tiptoed its way into the halls of officialdom.

# [Florida demands "weather modification" investigation of Texas Floods](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=168395483&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4Mzk1NDgzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTI1OTU2OTIsImV4cCI6MTc1NTE4NzY5MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Xv-E7W0t8d0pdYrYVTKC7PL09Mr7fBFS7ZlX-JQQl-E)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/florida-demands-weather-modification?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..1mrhRrqRM2_KKDfJsD1fNuaR2s0ACVxabpiFCmRRbks?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168395483)
Like many phantasmagorias once relegated to the dim-lit corners of the internet, the notion that humans are deliberately engineering the weather has tiptoed its way into the halls of officialdom.
Once the purview of the chronically suspicious and the epistemologically unmoored, "weather modification" now finds itself the subject of formal inquiry--not by rogue bloggers or forum dwellers, but by state officials wielding the apparatus of governance.
Florida's Attorney General James Uthmeier publicly entertained the idea that the devastating floods in Texas were not solely the wrathful result of a warming climate but potentially the product of human orchestration.
Uthhmeier wrote in a public letter issues yesterday that he "can't help but notice the possibility that weather modification could have played a role" in the Texas floods.
It is a statement as stunning as it is scientifically incoherent.
Why Florida should presume jurisdiction over a meteorological disaster in Texas defies both logic and geography.
I suspect that the real objective has less to do with rainfall patterns and more to do with political positioning.
Florida Governor Ron DeSantis, who has shown an unwavering knack for inserting his state into the center of national dramas, appears eager to conscript even the weather as a stage prop in his ongoing "narrative war."
Yet the science--persistent, peer-reviewed, and impervious to the whims of political theater--tells a very different story. Extreme weather events, such as the Texas floods, are consistent with well-documented climate change models.
As global temperatures rise, so too does the atmosphere's capacity to hold moisture, intensifying rainfall. The correlation is not speculative but established: warmer oceans feed energy into storms; destabilized jet streams yield erratic weather. These are the laws of physics, not the plots of dystopian thrillers.
The idea that such events are orchestrated through clandestine weather-control programs is not just implausible--it is scientifically bankrupt. The oft-cited theories revolve around chemtrails, HAARP, or secret satellites allegedly capable of controlling precipitation.
These claims fall apart under even cursory scientific scrutiny.
Cloud seeding, the only existing form of weather modification with any basis in reality, involves dispersing particles into clouds to encourage precipitation under specific conditions - typically in drought-prone areas, by a modest amount (estimated to be around 10%).
_**It's not capable of creating the massive storms that led to the Texas floods.**_
It is a blunt, localized, and marginally effective tool--not the omnipotent weather-wand of conspiracy lore. It cannot summon floods across state lines or alter weather systems at scale, let alone in defiance of meteorological models.
To ascribe complex atmospheric phenomena to human meddling rather than to the cumulative effects of greenhouse gas emissions betrays a fundamental misunderstanding of both climate science and causality. More charitably, it may reflect the sort of willful unknowing that flourishes when political expediency eclipses intellectual integrity.
## [Climate change caused the Texas flooding tragedy](https://substack.com/redirect/beaa3c40-4776-4cb7-b297-ed8b18975118?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Rebekah Jones](https://substack.com/profile/27437341-rebekah-jones)| | *
---|---|---
| Jul 8
[](https://substack.com/redirect/beaa3c40-4776-4cb7-b297-ed8b18975118?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[For my piece on the human disaster in Texas last week, click here.](https://substack.com/redirect/beaa3c40-4776-4cb7-b297-ed8b18975118?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/beaa3c40-4776-4cb7-b297-ed8b18975118?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
That one of Florida's highest-ranking officials would lend credence to such speculation is not just an embarrassment--it is an indictment of the intellectual standards that increasingly govern our public discourse.
A modest education in earth sciences--say, at the eighth-grade level-- should suffice to reveal the preposterousness of these claims.
That such fantasies have escaped their proper confines and entered the legal record is not merely a curiosity of modern politics; it is a cautionary tale about the cost of abandoning reason in favor of spectacle.
This fevered thinking has not remained in the abstract.
NOAA technicians reported an uptick in interference with Doppler radar systems over this period--acts carried out by self-appointed patriots under the impression they are disabling tools of climatic control.
In [Oklahoma City last month](https://substack.com/redirect/3d24c520-6261-492d-9917-a665dcce689e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a weather radar station was vandalized by someone apparently convinced the equipment was being used to manipulate local weather patterns.
The far-right militia group Veterans on Patrol (_founded by Michael Meyer - who is NOT a veteran_) has [repeatedly issued calls ](https://substack.com/redirect/24da60e5-f67e-426c-91e8-a9c38ba9503c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)to "penetration drill" and sabotage NEXRAD Doppler radar installations, labeling them as instruments of government weather manipulation
"We intend to take as many NexRads offline as possible once our attack simulations have prepared us," [Meyer wrote ](https://substack.com/redirect/27d299c2-99f5-4ef5-ace2-4f60841120ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)on Telegram, alluding to a plan of attack starting in August of this year.
The consequences go well beyond vandalism, though.
Emergency response systems, agricultural planning, and climate research--each depends on the integrity of meteorological data.
Undermining these systems in the name of pseudoscience doesn't just endanger scientific understanding; it endangers lives.
Undermining science itself threatens humanity's longevity on this planet.

clean_body: | | | President Trump has made it clear that he’s willing to threaten GOP senators who don’t support his agenda, including his latest push to defund essential public services like PBS and NPR. He posted to his social media platform: “It is very important that all Republicans adhere to my Recissions Bill and, in particular, DEFUND THE CORPORATION FOR PUBLIC BROADCASTING (PBS and NPR), which is worse than CNN & MSDNC put together. Any Republican that votes to allow this monstrosity to continue broadcasting will not have my support or Endorsement. Thank you for your attention to this matter!” His attempt to silence voices that educate and inform us is not just a strategy; it’s a direct assault on the values we hold dear. We’re expanding our ImpeachTrumpNow.com billboard campaign. Every American deserves access to unbiased news and quality educational programming, not 24/7 Trump propaganda! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Let’s stand united for a future where every voice is heard and every institution is protected. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Whether you wear Crocs or Carhartt, we're fighting for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dignity of Work PAC
body:
Take this one action for working families across America.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111502168/557505988/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk41-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGE2ZjM3ZC05NTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-VF92uphDVkl_W3l2pQ2nzZptSAsuPaoZtPpCEvUSPY=)
Friend,

**All work has dignity.**
Whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, whether you earn a salary or work for tips, whether you’re raising kids or caring for an aging parent – _your work has dignity._
Whether you wear Carhartt or Crocs, mix concrete or drinks, fold laundry or menus – _your work has dignity._
Whether you’re 72 or 27, with a GED or a PhD, sitting behind a spreadsheet or a steering wheel – _your work has dignity. _
But for too many folks, hard work just isn’t paying off. CEO salaries are skyrocketing. Companies are reporting record profits. Workers are more productive than ever – but wages are flat and costs keep going up.
**The system is rigged, friend.** That’s why I started the Dignity of Work PAC: to elect pro-labor leaders who will fight for working folks, not corporate interests or billionaire donors.
But I can’t do it alone.

One of the most powerful things you can do for working families in America is stand with us – not just once, but month after month.
Chipping in a few bucks every month will help us win tough races, fight back against Trump’s billionaire megadonors and build a thriving middle class where _no_ worker is left behind.
**[That’s why I’m reaching out, friend: Will you start a monthly gift of $5 or $25 now and help us reach our goal of 350 new donors by midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111502170/557505989/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk41-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGE2ZjM3ZC05NTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-VF92uphDVkl_W3l2pQ2nzZptSAsuPaoZtPpCEvUSPY=)**

clean_body: Take this one action for working families across America. | | | = Friend, All work has dignity. Whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, whether you earn a salary or work for tips, whether you’re raising kids or caring for an aging parent – your work has dignity. Whether you wear Carhartt or Crocs, mix concrete or drinks, fold laundry or menus – your work has dignity. Whether you’re 72 or 27, with a GED or a PhD, sitting behind a spreadsheet or a steering wheel – your work has dignity. But for too many folks, hard work just isn’t paying off. CEO salaries are skyrocketing. Companies are reporting record profits. Workers are more productive than ever – but wages are flat and costs keep going up. The system is rigged, friend. That’s why I started the Dignity of Work PAC: to elect pro-labor leaders who will fight for working folks, not corporate interests or billionaire donors. But I can’t do it alone. One of the most powerful things you can do for working families in America is stand with us – not just once, but month after month. Chipping in a few bucks every month will help us win tough races, fight back against Trump’s billionaire megadonors and build a thriving middle class where no worker is left behind. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your monthly donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for your support. In solidarity, Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 605 N. High Street Ste. 226 Columbus, OH 43215 United States | | Paid for by Dignity of Work PAC

| | Hi Friend, Can you believe we’re already halfway through July? This summer is flying by, and I want to take a moment to thank you for standing with me in this fight. Our campaign has been fueled by the same energy that’s driven my work for over 25 years: a belief that real change starts with ordinary people coming together demanding better. Right now, the stakes could not be higher. Just over a week ago, House Republicans passed their so-called “Big Beautiful Bill.” It is not just harmful. It is ruthless and cruel. The bill guts food assistance, rips apart Medicaid, and dismantles protections that keep our air and water safe. This is a moment of clarity. We will not pause. We will not fold. We press forward with everything we have. [_**That’s why I’m asking: Can I count on you to chip in today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111503121/557508464/1626305413?&refcode=E14134-20250714-MidMonth-SL-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmEyZTNmNzgtOTY2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cC85_itgluWD7ua8UpzTn37RI4WCYRhl3xFcdohL9to=) Every dollar helps us build our movement, fight for equity and justice, and ensure our voices are heard in Washington. subject: Desperate and Cornered, Trump Attacks Adam Schiff to Distract From Epstein Coverup
body:
Trump's attack on Adam Schiff is lazy, even for him.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..ST7XpzTvGk8nijL0pzh0hSs7243KlkWaPQbFVPPoTXo?) for more

# [Desperate and Cornered, Trump Attacks Adam Schiff to Distract From Epstein Coverup](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=168398181&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4Mzk4MTgxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTI1OTYzODQsImV4cCI6MTc1NTE4ODM4NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sI6Fos8_R5mQxavB7_cKiN25_IDBFgjCRKSu0V1zGEU)
### Trump's attack on Adam Schiff is lazy, even for him.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Jul 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=168398181&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4Mzk4MTgxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MjU5NjM4NCwiZXhwIjoxNzU1MTg4Mzg0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HdroxnDf1V5as0ZIbf1Y-9rbdQ3jvvEDLehfyEDNfzc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=168398181&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4Mzk4MTgxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTI1OTYzODQsImV4cCI6MTc1NTE4ODM4NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sI6Fos8_R5mQxavB7_cKiN25_IDBFgjCRKSu0V1zGEU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=168398181&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4Mzk4MTgxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTI1OTYzODQsImV4cCI6MTc1NTE4ODM4NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sI6Fos8_R5mQxavB7_cKiN25_IDBFgjCRKSu0V1zGEU)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvZW5kbGVzc3VyZ2VuY3kvcC9kZXNwZXJhdGUtYW5kLWNvcm5lcmVkLXRydW1wLWF0dGFja3M_.WNyWd9FwsRGfn1ztvXZ0doVHeubUYsE-OHgjFq_4sFU?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/desperate-and-cornered-trump-attacks?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I wrote yesterday that Donald Trump would try to weasel his way out of the Epstein cover-up disaster he's found himself in. That plan has now been revealed. This morning, he went after one of his favorite Democratic punching bags: Senator Adam Schiff of California.
He's concocted yet another nonsense conspiracy theory--this time about Schiff and his mortgage. He's calling for him to be prosecuted, as he's done time and time again. And, as you'd expect from someone like Trump, it's complete and utter bullshit.
Trump is backed into a political corner. He's at his weakest--and when he's weak, he's at his most feral. So I expect we'll keep seeing wild, desperate haymakers.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qb65AIF4oo9y6hXD77UMrdmrkDJULhcmnEkKLqSBCmg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168398181)
But this isn't just about the Epstein scandal threatening the MAGA movement--it's also that the general public is pissed. And now, there's fresh reporting that inflation has accelerated because of Trump's tariffs.
There's no amount of spin they can apply to the Epstein case, the economy, or the corruption in Washington that'll get Trump out of this. All he can do is try to distract the American people.
These attacks on Adam Schiff--however insane and false--are just red meat for the base. Something to keep the QAnon crowd, the MAGA diehards, and the conspiracy nuts fed so they stop asking questions about Epstein.
But I don't think it's going to work this time. Sure, plenty of people will play along. But as I wrote yesterday, Trump's entire political identity is built on the claim that he's fighting a cabal abusing children and destroying America.
The truth is, this Epstein situation is exposing what many of us have long known: _if_ that cabal exists, Donald Trump is part of it.
So here's my advice: keep your head on a swivel. Expect chaos. Expect distractions--that's Trump's playbook. Don't fall for it.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qb65AIF4oo9y6hXD77UMrdmrkDJULhcmnEkKLqSBCmg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168398181)
Yes, defend the people he attacks, whether they're everyday folks or leaders like Adam Schiff, who are just trying to do the people's work. But always remember: Trump's goal is to distract from his real agenda.
And right now, that agenda is covering up what's in the Epstein files and the flight logs--for himself, for allies like Steve Bannon, and for the billionaire donors who fund his movement and populate his cabinet.
Never forget: everything Trump does is about enriching himself. Enriching himself at the expense of the American people.
Everything is more expensive. It's harder to buy food, to afford a home, to start a family, or to retire with dignity than it was when Trump took office.
Meanwhile, Trump has made billions--off merchandise, meme coins, even a private jet he allegedly took as a bribe. Sixty to seventy percent of his net worth has been generated since January of his first term.
He's getting exactly what he wants: money, power, and the ability to go after political opponents--whether they're at Harvard or in the U.S. Senate.
Don't let him distract you. Don't let him get away with it.
Talk to your neighbors. Talk to the Trump voters in your life--the ones who got swept up in this mess and who, I believe, are starting to feel betrayed.
I'm having those conversations now with my own family and friends, and I'm finding that more and more people are waking up.
That doesn't mean they'll become Democrats overnight. But they're seeing the truth.
And the more people we reach, the more power we have to resist what Trump is trying to do--to our democracy, our country, and the people he's hurting.
As Trump's support crumbles, more Republicans--who are terrified of him--_might_ find the courage to stand up.
These are the same Republicans, by the way, who just yesterday (all but one of them on the Rules Committee) voted to keep the Epstein file hidden. Every Democrat voted to reveal it. _So maybe not!_
The weaker Trump becomes, the more his base crumbles. The more they stay home, the better chance we have to win elections or stop the next disaster--like the horrendous budget they just passed.
Keep your chin up. Stay sharp. Speak truth to power.
We're going to get through this--together.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qb65AIF4oo9y6hXD77UMrdmrkDJULhcmnEkKLqSBCmg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168398181)

He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._

subject: Last year, I was with President Trump in the front row in Butler
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
I saw the bullet that almost took our President
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=497db739fec04263be80756bbd8777b7&_e=IfCVMFo_BntdWLfsvx6RjwuBQMxnOuaMfku_mthpJnkdKM52q1_RzrF9dFRwoPRXD2iz7ipzpziugVfR38w_Hv_yeI8UPlKfa7e-TzFc5Xq8OqYF0FojsDqi3nw8JyOxi2SYbmcH4U1jPRqijMt9pJ_9kPeD_vP_WBbFa9WIN8kb8SsxvYDsBuFZkWq6QElJznp0B0I44W3oIpTLlveIHkIcP7F22jOwUF4nUda_Ln07Gut58DvTVM9MAqF6NnwPTPDLagWhn4hCKdL78YGrrqsWLocGSP-EBZWwsWqMzXUjcVOOt_nXBpLYa3EMh4HI8ECucZdMmI2w3BOI6EOol4ifWLAdh21Y5kFX0yrSLVL2ZDBvtLsMOJyrxpqqra4WKV0X69lN2CCPKLK4nFkuFJn2S97gXlcOKxhoQbW91ZXsjGmVFU53oqXPdQmI68sNLvmVxKIxi_8UEZX3b3TtkS5be9Hq_GQdNBnvBr_N5wAMOVn5Q0GgTF9MTUq7Gszc023JM-otRUhoQGTS23fwuioIcElCyJ0zCk6uu6_1daC_dQAwJ_A32mTc24MITQY6R425QN6O8a8-nnWqlkbQ2Fzx6TDIGrS28wJUinfTFOpE58NUqtuC2ppsmo9uA97_o9eWN_bAws1qBm_MhCdFQuIzyhY2HXQaC0WcKpFw2gS4FJsseOtntwizc40V6vzG)

Fellow American,

Last year, I was front row at President Trump's rally in Butler, Pennsylvania. And in a flash, our nation came within inches of losing him to an assassin's bullet. That bullet and the chaos that followed was a stark reminder of how divided our nation has become. It was also a test of leadership, courage, and resilience.

As a combat veteran, I've seen men under fire. And what I saw that day in Butler will stay with me forever. Bloodied but unbowed, President Trump stood tall, raised his fist, and showed a shaken country what true strength looks like.

That moment became an iconic image. But more importantly, it became a symbol of resolve for those of us who love this country and refuse to back down.

**I was proud to stand with President Trump then. And I 'm proud to fight alongside him now as we take on the entrenched forces in Washington and work to deliver real results for the American people.**

What happened that day wasn't just an attack on one man, it was an attack on our movement to restore American strength, freedom, and faith.

Now, with President Trump back in the White House, the mission is clear:
Shake up the system. Defeat the permanent political class. Restore American greatness.

**But we can 't do it without you.**

[I’m asking you to stand with us, just as we stood strong that day in Butler.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=497db739fec04263be80756bbd8777b7&_e=IfCVMFo_BntdWLfsvx6RjwuBQMxnOuaMfku_mthpJnkdKM52q1_RzrF9dFRwoPRXD2iz7ipzpziugVfR38w_Hv_yeI8UPlKfa7e-TzFc5Xq8OqYF0FojsDqi3nw8JyOxi2SYbmcH4U1jPRqijMt9pJ_9kPeD_vP_WBbFa9WIN8kb8SsxvYDsBuFZkWq6QElJznp0B0I44W3oIpTLlveIHkIcP7F22jOwUF4nUda_Ln2wrcHQAtYnO2z-NYKbmx0i8TLBjRHx0nVtBWP69tzvo6q_bun2LLiKr8K8jEdyEeroxAy5FTBFzKzog5FKjy0gcLfpvgO_D2_DmYa4T7dq7LDVUjk8IdibqmUvjfCSVtA06SEWyI8Fx0evYGQAsqlmURgzPwCPS1taE_S3FK_a70ZHgDrAaBcPel84lGmGmatxZI7VG0AB9i0E9fz1Gep0b5jlmlumFLYJx2wuSu2P9itUxj1XsnTsVF8YJVZQGVeUyj05E6Z-c4GWFCuLr5lX94fkjDg-WAhhPQdam9ZutqzDvHlmkUZ1Y7-NqaTirp6Sh38kVbYuTsb5WpI0EELCXfADtFhzSUl5Go7vNnjyV7UtAfTy7xwYq5ZDOejvXBHWWBqWgv9fgnrBgL12uJIFsnIGTpSq0Em29sKx1Wt7IIEt6q1DEiyYXHKFPw0kHxpZfd79mQ932F38yPHmEWuu)

I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, **and last November I defeated an entrenched career politician in the #1 swing state of the 2024 election.**

I've seen firsthand what great leadership looks like. I've seen that even on our worst days, you have to put the needs of others first.

That's why I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I'm working to do that every single day.

Whether it's securing the border, reducing crime in our cities, ending the fentanyl epidemic, or bringing down the cost of living-**I 'm committed to delivering concrete solutions to the biggest issues we face.**

But in order to get the job done, it's going to take all hands on deck. I need every freedom-loving American to help me shake up Washington. I promise I won't let you down.

_Senator Dave McCormick_

clean_body: I saw the bullet that almost took our President Fellow American, Last year, I was front row at President Trump's rally in Butler, Pennsylvania. And in a flash, our nation came within inches of losing him to an assassin's bullet. That bullet and the chaos that followed was a stark reminder of how divided our nation has become. It was also a test of leadership, courage, and resilience. As a combat veteran, I've seen men under fire. And what I saw that day in Butler will stay with me forever. Bloodied but unbowed, President Trump stood tall, raised his fist, and showed a shaken country what true strength looks like. That moment became an iconic image. But more importantly, it became a symbol of resolve for those of us who love this country and refuse to back down. I was proud to stand with President Trump then. And I 'm proud to fight alongside him now as we take on the entrenched forces in Washington and work to deliver real results for the American people. What happened that day wasn't just an attack on one man, it was an attack on our movement to restore American strength, freedom, and faith. Now, with President Trump back in the White House, the mission is clear: Shake up the system. Defeat the permanent political class. Restore American greatness. But we can 't do it without you. Thank you for your support, Dave McCormick I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and last November I defeated an entrenched career politician in the #1 swing state of the 2024 election. I've seen firsthand what great leadership looks like. I've seen that even on our worst days, you have to put the needs of others first. That's why I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I'm working to do that every single day. Whether it's securing the border, reducing crime in our cities, ending the fentanyl epidemic, or bringing down the cost of living-I 'm committed to delivering concrete solutions to the biggest issues we face.** But in order to get the job done, it's going to take all hands on deck. Fellow Conservative,

When I launched this campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota, I didn’t expect an easy path. I’m not a career politician. _**I don’t have a famous last name or deep-pocketed lobbyists behind me.**_ But I believe this country is worth fighting for — and thanks to people like you, we’ve already proven what a grassroots campaign can do.

Thousands of proud American Patriots stepped up to power this mission in just a few short weeks. Together, we laid the foundation — with ads running, volunteers signing up, and a clear message breaking through the noise: We’re not backing down—not now, not ever.

Republicans have been pining over Minnesota for years, and for a long time, winning a Senate seat or even its electoral votes at the presidential level has been out of reach.

_**Not anymore.**_****

Now, we’re entering a critical phase. If we want to expand our reach and show voters across Minnesota that this campaign is real, we need to keep our momentum going. Let me be clear: I’m not in this race to make a point._**I’m in it to win.**_ And I know we can — because the American people are ready.

* They’re tired of weak leaders who won’t stand up for truth.

* They’re tired of the chaos, the double standards, the attacks on common sense.

* They’re tired of being told that loving this country is somehow wrong.

I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11 and became a Navy SEAL. I deployed 13 times to 70 countries, serving in war zones and leading teams in some of the most dangerous places on Earth. I didn’t do that for titles or applause. I did it because I believed in this nation, and I still do.

But now, I’m watching the country I fought for slip away — not because the enemy is stronger, but because too many of our leaders are weak.

**I refuse to sit on the sidelines and watch it happen.**

That’s why I’m running for the United States Senate. And that’s why I need you with me.

This isn’t about politics. It's about protecting the values that make America worth defending. **With your help, we will send a message from Minnesota to Washington: Patriots are rising.**

name: Kathryn Gonzalez
subject: The late night call I dreaded
disclaimer_text: paid for by radical billionaire George Soros – are going after innocent officers at an alarming rate
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e22099766/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvM2hoVzZLQ04zOQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTU/LbmNsUW9MU1dORQ/qP2hpZHM9bmM1cVBTWmJqY3FlOExscw/gaHaAcQ/s3jf5f1df9a)
| |
---
Dear Friend, Planning a wedding is supposed to be an exciting time. But instead of buying a dress and booking our honeymoon, I’ve hired an attorney to fight for my fiancé’s life. Please, let me explain... I am engaged to marry Deputy Jacob Diaz of the Otero County Sheriff’s Department in New Mexico. Jacob is a good man. Kind, loyal, and hard working. He’s the kind of officer you hope shows up in your time of need. But everything changed on June 25, 2024, when Jacob responded to a late-night report of a possibly intoxicated man walking along the median of a busy highway. Upon his arrival, Jacob found a young man with his shirt draped over his left arm, hiding whatever was in his waistband. Following protocol, Jacob ordered the man to stay back and show his hands.
---
_“Stop right there, bro.” “Are you alright?” “Let me see your other hand, bro.”_
---
The young man refused to comply. And in the next few seconds, both their lives changed forever. The man quickly walked toward my fiancé and drew what appeared to be a firearm. Jacob’s training kicked in. He fired his service weapon. The man fell to the ground, but he continued to reach for his weapon– ignoring Jacob’s commands to show his hands and stop reaching for the gun. Jacob fired additional shots, killing the armed man. We later learned that the man’s weapon was an airsoft gun. My heart broke for the young man’s family. But I also thanked God for protecting my fiancé that night. It easily could have been his life lost on that median. The New Mexico State Police launched an in-depth investigation into Jacob’s actions. I knew without a doubt the shooting was justified. After all, the suspect drew a firearm on an officer and would not back down. So, we were relieved – but not surprised – when the State Police cleared Jacob of any wrongdoing and reinstated him on the force in September. That should have been the end of this story... But out of nowhere, an anti-police prosecutor filed First-Degree Murder charges against Jacob. Now my fiancé faces life in prison for doing his job and defending himself in the line of duty. **[And I’m swallowing my pride and reaching out to you, a perfect stranger, for help.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** You see, this has long been one of my biggest fears. Political prosecutions of police officers is at an all-time high right now and New Mexico is not a police-friendly state. But I still can’t believe this is happening to _my_ fiancé. We’re in our 20s. We have our entire lives ahead of us. Now all our hopes and dreams may be destroyed by an anti-cop prosecutor with an ax to grind against law enforcement. So, instead of saving for a wedding and our future together, Jacob and I scraped together enough money to hire an attorney. But fighting First-Degree Murder charges will cost upwards of $200,000. That’s money we just don’t have. Every day I prayed. I asked God to make this nightmare go away... for the prosecutor to drop the charges... or to show us a way to pay for Jacob’s defense. My desperate prayers were answered when we received a phone call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). The LELDF Board of Directors reviewed the facts of the case and they are confident that Jacob is innocent – so they’ve offered to fund his defense. God heard my prayers. For the first time in months, I am hopeful for our future – that Jacob may not spend the rest of his life behind bars after all. Not just because LELDF is making sure Jacob gets the defense he deserves, but because LELDF’s Directors are the leading experts on policing and “use of force” in the nation – folks like Ronald Reagan’s Attorney General Ed Meese and former Assistant Director of the FBI Ron Hosko. With over 30 years of helping wrongly accused officers clear their names, LELDF’s support carries weight. (And the prosecution knows this!) But we still have a lot of work to do. LELDF doesn’t receive taxpayer funding and grants and large gifts are few and far between. Instead, LELDF relies on kind-hearted strangers who respect our men and women in blue and want to help cops like Jacob who are being railroaded by progressive prosecutors. Folks, I hope, like you. This isn’t easy for me so I’m just going to come out and ask... **[Will you help LELDF fight for my fiancé by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or more today?](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) ** No matter how much you’re able to help, your donation will be put to immediate use helping LELDF support wrongly accused officers like Jacob. I don’t think I have to tell you it’s a terrible time to be a cop in America. It’s all over the news. Not only are ambush attacks up, but anti-police prosecutors – often bought and paid for by radical billionaire George Soros – are going after innocent officers at an alarming rate. Even when the facts clearly show the cop did his job by the book and a previous investigation cleared him! Still, officers like Jacob show up every day – put on the badge and put their lives in danger to protect their communities. **[That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me today and help LELDF support my fiancé.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Your generous donation will make a difference when it comes to the bills. And if you’re a God-fearing person like me, will you please pray for Jacob and our family? Just knowing we aren’t alone means the world to us as we face down this nightmare. Thank you from the bottom of my heart.
---
Gratefully,
---
Kathryn Gonzalez
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e22099766/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTU/LbmNsUW9MU1dORQ/qP2hpZHM9bmM1cVBTWmJqY3FlOExscw/gaHaAcQ/s1g77e9b5cf)

name: Wesley Bell
subject: When Missouri workers lose, we all lose.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
BREAKING: Missouri Gov. Kehoe signs bill repealing paid sick leave
**_MISSOURI INDEPENDENT:_ Missouri Gov. Kehoe signs bill repealing paid sick leave**

_"Business groups lobbied heavily to overturn the measure passed by 58% of voters, arguing it would cost jobs. The bill also repeals annual inflation adjustments for the minimum wage, in effect since 2006."_ Peter,

I know it’s the middle of summer, and many of us are taking time to rest and recharge with family and friends, _and that’s important._

But while families focus on their lives, **lawmakers in Jefferson City just repealed paid sick leave — a right nearly 60% of Missouri voters approved last year.**

This isn’t just about one benefit. It’s about whether workers can care for themselves and their kids without losing a paycheck. By stripping away paid sick leave, Republicans just threatened the health and economic security of families across the state and slowed progress for our entire community.

I want to make one thing abundantly clear, Peter: **When Missouri workers succeed, we all succeed.** But on August 28th, hardworking Missourians will lose their paid sick leave, _all because a handful of extremists decided to side with corporate lobbyists over everyday people._ And right now, this campaign is facing mid-summer fundraising slump, a dangerous slowdown when we need strength the most. I’m fighting for workers’ rights and protections in Congress. We need lawmakers who want to strengthen working families, but I can’t fight back alone.

Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis was ordered to turn over
212 pages of records to a state court judge. The court also ordered
Willis to detail how the records were found and the reason for
withholding them from the public. The records were belatedly found in
response to a Judicial Watch lawsuit for communications with Special
Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee.

clean_body: Background on AG Bondi firing prosecutors linked to Special Counsel Jack Smith [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] Attorney General Bondi fired at least 20 officials with ties to Jack Smith investigation: Sources [] Source: ABC News [] Attorney General Pam Bondi has fired at least 20 prosecutors and support staffers who assisted former Special Counsel Jack Smith's investigations into President Donald Trump, sources familiar with the matter told ABC News Saturday. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] March 13, 2025 Fani Willis Ordered to Turn Over Anti-Trump Collusion Records to Court [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis was ordered to turn over 212 pages of records to a state court judge. The court also ordered Willis to detail how the records were found and the reason for withholding them from the public. The records were belatedly found in response to a Judicial Watch lawsuit for communications with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] March 27, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues for Information on Investigations of Misconduct by Special Counsel Smith’s Staff [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a Freedom of Information Act lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for details of any investigations, inquiries, or referrals concerning potential misconduct of any person working for Special Counsel Jack Smith. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] June 26, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues for Collusion Documents of Arizona Attorney General and Jack Smith [] Source: Judicial Watch [] On January 13, 2025 several media outlets reported that Attorney General Mayes had formally requested case documents from U.S. Department of Justice special counsel Jack Smith’s criminal investigation into President Donald Trump regarding the 2020 presidential election. This would lay off 1,000 educators in NC

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9qZWZmamFja3Nvbm5jLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.hjUHCbyRedoBCL5nGpUtZq7NCtK6Ww8suEK4JXRDNsQ?) for more

# [A sudden freeze in education funding](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=168398844&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4Mzk4ODQ0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTI1OTgzMzgsImV4cCI6MTc1NTE5MDMzOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.l1kDEZIFHhvBu9VSdLDSG7Wb4etA3FKZywZEmon50-I)
### This would lay off 1,000 educators in NC
| | [Jeff Jackson](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---
| Jul 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=168398844&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4Mzk4ODQ0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MjU5ODMzOCwiZXhwIjoxNzU1MTkwMzM4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTE0NTAyMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.QuBOzM3t6vDaylrOtJeHb5Qy941Y5eu_Q8GjQc846hA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=168398844&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4Mzk4ODQ0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTI1OTgzMzgsImV4cCI6MTc1NTE5MDMzOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.l1kDEZIFHhvBu9VSdLDSG7Wb4etA3FKZywZEmon50-I&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=168398844&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4Mzk4ODQ0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTI1OTgzMzgsImV4cCI6MTc1NTE5MDMzOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.l1kDEZIFHhvBu9VSdLDSG7Wb4etA3FKZywZEmon50-I)
---
| | [](https://substack..yL0dijISA9uEsb9s5kdcMQor0cusSMyvqDuQTubRdD4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jeffjacksonnc/p/a-sudden-freeze-in-education-funding?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Yesterday, for the first time since becoming Attorney General, I called a press conference at my office.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0a508fc6-0d52-417d-8e7d-2e635a041481?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Here 's why:**
Two weeks ago - out of the blue - North Carolina received a three-sentence email from the U.S. Department of Education.
It said that $165 million in education funding, scheduled to arrive _the next day_ , was being frozen indefinitely.
No clear reason was given. Since then, the department has refused to answer our questions.
It turns out that email went to all 50 states. The total amount frozen nationwide: roughly $7 billion.
In North Carolina, the impact will be severe.
These funds support afterschool and summer programs for over 10,000 students, STEM education, adult literacy classes, mental health support, services for English learners, and smaller class sizes for elementary school kids.
And if the freeze isn't reversed soon, about 1,000 educators in our state could lose their jobs - just weeks before 1.5 million kids return to school.
Every school district in the state will take a hit, but rural communities will suffer most. The top three counties facing the deepest per-student cuts are Ashe, Polk, and Graham.
So, I've joined a group of attorneys general in suing the U.S. Department of Education.
Why?
Because this isn't just harmful - it's illegal. And not in a gray-area kind of way. This is clear-cut.
Congress created these programs. Congress reviewed and approved state plans for them. And then Congress authorized the funding.
The Department of Education does not have the legal authority to override that process. It's not their money to freeze. The law here isn't vague.
If we allow this kind of move to stand, we set a dangerous precedent - one where federal departments can undermine Congress and hold states hostage to their political whims. That's exactly what the law is designed to prevent.
Our lawsuit seeks a preliminary injunction - an immediate court order to end the freeze while the case proceeds. That would protect students and schools from further harm. We hope to get a ruling within a few weeks.
My thanks to Superintendent Mo Green for joining us in this effort. He's been great to work with and has brought compelling details to the consequences facing our students if this isn't fixed.
* * *
**Here 's my take on what may really be going on with this last-minute freeze:**
I don't know whether the people behind this move at the Department of Education truly believe they'll win in court. It was recklessly executed and the administration's track record on similar overreaches is poor.
But my sense is that winning in court may not be the point.
When I was in Congress, I saw how often deliberate failure was used as a media strategy. A fringe member would pick an unwinnable fight, lose, and then claim their real prize: wall-to-wall press coverage.
This feels like the first stage of that cycle. The fight has been picked, the next step is losing in court, then we get the outrage and indignation that ricochets through various echo chambers - and that's the payoff. If your claim to national attention is perpetual outrage, this whole thing starts to look pretty calculated.
That said, I still have to beat them in court, and I plan to.
### **The Lighthouse Fund**
This is timely.
You might remember that, in my last email, I told you about our new Lighthouse Fund.
As you might recall, the idea is to ensure that, once a month, I can afford to send a strong digital message to roughly one million independent voters in NC. That costs about $9,500.
The goal is to maintain a baseline level of awareness so that when campaign season gears up, we aren't starting from scratch with those voters.
Well, this moment is perfect for a digital message like that - and I can even show you the product in advance.
I made a video specifically addressing the education funding freeze and **[here](https://substack.com/redirect/e4a9f700-1743-4470-a88f-6b757189c40d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** it is on YouTube:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/45feea4a-af58-4f65-8d94-24b1a57efdc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I think this is exactly the kind of message that voters need to hear at this moment, and I hope you'll help me reach them.
The best way to support this effort is a small, monthly donation - but of course, we'd also appreciate a one-time contribution. You can do either one **[here](https://substack.com/redirect/00fe5a56-bb57-4d6d-b7a0-21eee16d0172?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** (ActBlue) or **[here](https://substack.com/redirect/c770f505-fc4b-4d78-84dd-a7a5b74918ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** (non-ActBlue).
Thanks, as always, and I'll keep you posted.
\- Jeff Jackson

body:
Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XrGKMtCcbE2djJaqLq6C9g2?unsubscribedata=0d%2BUYeiWECVWgyl4rKN5rm3CSep7fso4xEZXTHXG1%2FwndL7Z5AvcVX4%2F49lVhkUXcbXxeIzTnH%2BPq3Fe2xZewnUMvcBofTPejCdlwz9FtTYAoQflOK%2FAlYMifZCBw4u7k5Cp06g8rYTdzNGBuX0ri3kiuxL8lu5uZ0g7%2FqFsSeOdDr0xNQZHurw5TLHGAgCf%2BeZk7uJfq8XM3yVeKFyLgtncfq49zi99tHvwqhviBZ9X%2FjqdMJK1m6xf7D39jgwthE65pT2cih%2F4lAtDZLS2enBp7A33uMIs%2BIWJlXmAo8psYTtXusuqShotI2sHUhAICsQ2wtnqDMbI8cVuHxFgtffqchn8Az%2BWJRUouHhwKIPsu%2FEoMN2rFspzwY3WFwX70w6Yvi%2FWsYvQqREa5FUgv%2FK72KHXVg2x3yKopfRAXeqLT4zaKAQsFG7atOs3ePjt)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111506176/557516268/2089644103?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_071525_STELSON1_ATO_D1_S1_WIDE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTc3YmU0MS05YTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtXox2LGDT8Jk8edA4t5D_FhqACQloaIeXUhGNKh-DI=) Hi there, Peter. I'm Janelle Stelson, the Democrat running to oust Scott Perry in PA-10 — a major tossup district. In 2024, this was the second closest race in the entire country — _**we lost by just 5,133 votes.**_ We can flip this district from red to blue this time, but it is going to take every single one of us. [**If you would like to help oust extremist Scott Perry and be a part of the movement to flip PA-10 blue, could you split a donation between myself and Austin Davis right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111506177/557516269/2089644103?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_071525_STELSON1_ATO_D1_S1_WIDE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTc3YmU0MS05YTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtXox2LGDT8Jk8edA4t5D_FhqACQloaIeXUhGNKh-DI=) | | **[Flip PA-10 blue →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111506178/557516270/2089644103?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_071525_STELSON1_ATO_D1_S1_WIDE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTc3YmU0MS05YTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtXox2LGDT8Jk8edA4t5D_FhqACQloaIeXUhGNKh-DI=)**
---
If my name and face are familiar, it's not just because I ran for Congress in 2024.
For more than 30 years, I was a TV news anchor, uplifting the stories of Central Pennsylvanians. I flew over New York City with the Pennsylvania National Guard after 9/11, delivered the heartbreaking news that _Roe v. Wade_ had been overturned on live television, and shared the stories of businesses closing, job losses, and families struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.
**I am a dedicated truth teller with decades of experience standing up for our neighbors.**
Now I am working to replace former Freedom Caucus Chair and _**MAGA insurrectionist Scott Perry. **_
❌ He has praised the GOP budget bill that just passed. You know — the one that will kick millions of hard-working Americans off Medicaid, shutter rural hospitals, and give tax cuts to the wealthy 1%.
❌ He has supported a national abortion ban with no exceptions.
❌ He helped plan the January 6th insurrection, where Americans lost their lives.
Scott Perry is too extreme for PA-10, and we deserve better.
**Peter: PA-10 is a make-or-break district to flip the U.S. House.** We have a serious shot at winning this district, but my opponent is backed by mountains of dark money and billionaire donors. The support of grassroots donors like you is crucial to our success.
[**Now is when it counts, Peter. It is important that I raise as much money as possible in these first 48 hours to show Scott Perry and MAGA Republicans that Pennsylvanians want him OUT. Will you stand with me at this critical juncture by splitting a donation between myself and Austin Davis right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111506179/557516271/1932405819?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_071525_STELSON1_ATO_D1_S1_WIDE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTc3YmU0MS05YTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtXox2LGDT8Jk8edA4t5D_FhqACQloaIeXUhGNKh-DI=)
If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi there, Peter. I'm Janelle Stelson, the Democrat running to oust Scott Perry in PA-10 — a major tossup district. In 2024, this was the second closest race in the entire country — we lost by just 5,133 votes. We can flip this district from red to blue this time, but it is going to take every single one of us. = | | = If my name and face are familiar, it's not just because I ran for Congress in 2024. For more than 30 years, I was a TV news anchor, uplifting the stories of Central Pennsylvanians. I flew over New York City with the Pennsylvania National Guard after 9/11, delivered the heartbreaking news that Roe v. Wade had been overturned on live television, and shared the stories of businesses closing, job losses, and families struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads. I am a dedicated truth teller with decades of experience standing up for our neighbors. Now I am working to replace former Freedom Caucus Chair and MAGA insurrectionist Scott Perry. ❌ He has praised the GOP budget bill that just passed. You know — the one that will kick millions of hard-working Americans off Medicaid, shutter rural hospitals, and give tax cuts to the wealthy 1%. ❌ He has supported a national abortion ban with no exceptions. ❌ He helped plan the January 6th insurrection, where Americans lost their lives. Scott Perry is too extreme for PA-10, and we deserve better. Peter: PA-10 is a make-or-break district to flip the U.S. House. We have a serious shot at winning this district, but my opponent is backed by mountains of dark money and billionaire donors. The support of grassroots donors like you is crucial to our success. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Help us launch this campaign with the momentum we need to oust Scott Perry once and for all. With gratitude, Janelle * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. Can you chip in today to help? | = = Paid for by Friends of Austin Davis Friends of Austin Davis PO Box 304 McKeesport, PA 15134 United States If you need to unsubscribe,

| On Wednesday, the Federal Monitor will host a community meeting to hear how community members view the MCSO. The results of the meeting will be relayed back to the judge. In the past, these meetings seemed to have a select group of people who oppose MCSO.

_**This needs to change - the majority needs to be heard.**_

Please attend and send word of this meeting to others on any lists you have: **~ Wednesday, July 16th** **~ 6:30pm-8:30pm** **~ Desert West Community Center, 6501 W Virginia Ave, Phoenix ** **_ITEMS TO SPEAK ON_ :** -This has gone on long enough - it has cost far too much. -These resources should go to hiring more deputies, pay raises, training, and equipment - not in a Federal Monitor’s or the ACLU’s pocket.

[] Health insurance, reproductive freedom, clean energy, affordable housing – these things matter and I’m ready to fight for a future that all Coloradans will thrive in. But first I need to win. Will you donate right now and help us reach our goal before it’s too late? [] [] Thank you, Yadira [] Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@caraveoforcongress.com to your address book. This campaign is powered by grassroots donations. You can click here [] to make a donation to support Yadira Caraveo for CO-08. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you no longer want to receive email updates, unsubscribe: . PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States

**Peter - I wanted to make sure you saw this exciting update. For the first time in Her Bold Move history, 100% of our candidates WON in this year’s primary elections!!!**

We are so proud of these historic wins, and we know it’s a testament to the **_programs we’ve designed with women candidates in mind._** We have been building up to this milestone since our founding in 2021; fine-tuning our offerings for candidates to ensure we’re actually making a difference.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111506612/557517247/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250715doubtD_N_JZ_NO_9_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkMGQ3OTE1LTliNjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W6o32qSDot4xqDwROuRfasUe_Z0tuH53dWz0Dz1SdGI=)
---
[**From fundraising aid, campaign staffing, voter outreach training, and much more, we were built to provide critical support to our candidates to ensure that they have what they need to actually WIN. Help us continue to bring critical support to our endorsed candidates who will be on the ballot this November by donating $20.25 now →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111506613/557517248/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250715doubtD_N_JZ_NO_9_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkMGQ3OTE1LTliNjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W6o32qSDot4xqDwROuRfasUe_Z0tuH53dWz0Dz1SdGI=)

**Here is an example of what your support has enabled us to do:**

When Madison Horn ran for Congress in Oklahoma last year, she noticed that her local news station regularly featured her Republican opponent on their broadcasts while ignoring her requests to be a guest on their shows.

Of course, this was a major problem. This meant that voters in Madison's district were hearing from her Republican opponent, but never from her about the issues affecting their lives.

**She mentioned this issue to our communications team at Her Bold Move, and we were immediately on the case. Within days, we were able to land her a primetime interview slot on her local news station – giving her the chance to finally appear before the most engaged voters in her district.**

We plan to replicate that success as many times as it takes to ensure our candidates are never doubted – and never ignored.

[**Peter, we need your help to keep up this momentum. With so much at stake, Her Bold Move is on a mission to remove as many needless obstacles as possible for women candidates. Of course, that includes supporting their fundraising efforts in a number of critical ways as well as providing other game-changing support. Help us build a formidable war chest for women candidates by sending a donation of $20.25 or more today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111506614/557517270/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250715doubtD_N_JZ_NO_9_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkMGQ3OTE1LTliNjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W6o32qSDot4xqDwROuRfasUe_Z0tuH53dWz0Dz1SdGI=)

Let’s continue this winning streak,

Jordan

President & Founder
Her Bold Move

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Hi Peter,

**For the first time in the history of Her Bold Move – and despite some truly difficult races and formidable opponents – we are proud to report that 100% of our candidates have WON their primaries this year.**

You read that right: ALL of our candidates who were in primary races in 2025 have WON.

This has never happened before since our official founding in 2021. We’ve had plenty of successful election seasons, of course, but the incredible success rate of **_100%_** is a new phenomenon – it’s a trend we intend and expect to continue for many years to come.

****Here’s the thing,_we’re actually not surprised by this at all._** Our team has run more programs for our candidates this cycle than ever before. We’ve refined our approach to supporting candidates to optimize for _**utility**_ , we’ve fine-tuned our programs in ways that actually prove USEFUL to campaigns.**

[**You can be a part of this important work to get pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women candidates elected by rushing $20.25 or more today!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250715doubtD_N_JZ_NO_9_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25)

**Now that we know the programs we’ve designed are WORKING, we’re doubling down on our support – and gearing up for November. Here is a look at a few of our endorsed candidates who won their primaries and will be on the ballot this November:**

✅ **Erica Deuso for Mayor of Downingtown, Pennsylvania.**
After winning a tough primary against a Democratic opponent who proudly called himself a “white nationalist”... Erica will be on the November ballot against Richard Bryant, a far-right extremist and unapologetic Trump supporter. He is known to mock women for their appearance, attack the LGBTQ+ community, and spread harmful lies about climate change and immigrants. Erica is a well-respected scientist, businesswoman, and advocate for marginalized communities. **Her primary victory brings Downingtown one step closer to electing Pennsylvania’s first openly trans Mayor (!!!!), but she needs our continued help to win in November!**

✅ **Senator Ghazala Hashmi for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia.** It was our honor to support Senator Hashmi in her statewide race for this office. **_Our team spoke to voters all over the state of VA on her behalf_** and had some really productive conversations.

Hashmi was the only woman running against _six_ _male_ _opponents_ in this primary. She was also the most experienced legislator in her race. As State Senator, Hashmi helped draft Virginia’s constitutional amendment protecting safe and legal abortion.

This November, Hashmi will face off against a Republican talk-radio host, John Reid. His campaign website features dangerous disinformation like, [“John Reid is pro life and has boldly spoken out on TV, radio, and in his personal testimony against the Democrats new radical unlimited any time-any place, day of birth abortion proposals.”]

✅ **May Nivar for Virginia House of Delegates.** May is running in the most flippable district in Virginia – the same seat Susanna Gibson ran for in 2023 and lost by only _715_ votes after enduring a sexist and horrifying attack from the state’s Republican party.

This November, May is working to unseat her GOP Representative, who was found to be the **least effective legislator** in Virginia. He has said he would like to see abortion become illegal in Virginia and has repeatedly voted against common sense gun safety policies, paid medical leave, bills to raise the minimum wage, lower prescription drug costs, and more... We need to ensure May wins her General election.

[**There are so many more candidates on our roster who we are incredibly proud to see moving on to general elections across the U.S. We are ready to continue our important – and effective – work. Help us keep up our momentum – and keep our programs running by donating $20.25 or more today!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250715doubtD_N_JZ_NO_9_NG_N_L4&amount=20.25)

Together,

Jordan Zaslow
Founder & President
Her Bold Move
---
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states.

Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies.
