## ICYMI: What's still missing after the attempt on President Trump's life?
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3fa81f2b-4aec-42af-b787-fbc425d4f239?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Stories I'm reading...
[A clinic blames its closing on Trump's Medicaid cuts. Patients don't buy it.](https://substack.com/redirect/97e04919-63ff-4631-80fd-44449fb64813?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Washington Post
[ICE Finds 10 Unaccompanied Migrant Children at Marijuana Grow Sites](https://substack.com/redirect/1ae14036-9c81-4ed2-b53f-94b501bb5e82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via The Daily Signal
[Supreme Court allows Trump to proceed with mass firings at Education Department](https://substack.com/redirect/803d5bf1-930b-450f-a7b8-361f3a82c82b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via CNN
[Homeland Security says Democratic congressman 'doxed' ICE employee during violent anti-ICE mob](https://substack.com/redirect/f6e7f381-20b1-48d0-926f-aa65833ac069?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Washington Times
[Sneak peek: Trump, McCormick plan $70 billion in AI, energy announcements for Pennsylvania](https://substack.com/redirect/a1ea7254-dae8-41e2-88c2-c9b7b1bbcd2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Axios
[Pentagon pulls all military speakers from 'globalist' Aspen Security Forum](https://substack.com/redirect/3d275bb2-6de8-4ede-85f0-e0c9548b1f6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Just the News
[Biden Says He Had To Use Autopen Because He Simply Granted Too Many Pardons](https://substack.com/redirect/db05479c-ce12-48bd-9faf-4e089cdb172e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via The Daily Caller
[Secret Service Sat On 'Classified Threat' Over A Week Before Trump Assassination Attempt, Watchdog Finds](https://substack.com/redirect/4ad2dc92-7d43-438d-ba86-9947cd1b04bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via The Daily Caller
[America's Top States for Business 2025: The full rankings](https://substack.com/redirect/f4c853c4-c2fc-4220-a88b-8543c75480c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via CNBC
[Rubio Says Xi-Trump Summit Likely After Meeting China Envoy](https://substack.com/redirect/421d603e-4204-46d3-885b-0e88d6d0097e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Bloomberg
## Start your day in the know
Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/cc8e028d-1e78-4c3d-ac12-3117597cbe09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it!
[Subscribe HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/cc8e028d-1e78-4c3d-ac12-3117597cbe09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
Coming up today, we've got Seth Keshel to talk about elections and 2026. On Wednesday you'll get an inside look in my testimony before the Senate about the cover-up of Biden's decline. Then we've got a great panel Thursday, featuring The Daily Signal's Rob Bluey, author and journalist Alex Swoyer, and Jessica Anderson. Finally Friday, I'm joined by Robert O'Brien, member of Trump's Intelligence Advisory Board.
Turn on notifications so you don't miss it!
## Wellness update...
If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center.
If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me!
## Biden, the autopen, and a congressional investigation...
Remember when Biden issued a slew of pardons during his last few days in office?
Of course when I say he issued them, I don't mean that literally.
At this point, it's pretty clear that Biden was at best, a figurehead for staffers that were really making the decisions.
It's a scandalous cover-up-- so bad that a few weeks ago the Senate Judiciary Committee held a [hearing to get answers](https://substack.com/redirect/6fb4af52-a483-4f70-8002-fa19a2556a95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I was even invited to testify about how a healthy White House should work.
Spoiler alert: the Biden White House was far from healthy.
We could all watch it happen in real time, but now the investigations are finally catching up to common sense.
Which brings me to the newest conversations about the use of the auto pen to sign pardons.
Let's break it down...

body:
I know we can’t win every fight, and that’s exactly why I refuse to give up now.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111507065/557518384/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDc5NjljYS05YjYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pKAjc-kKEZO0kg4BQ9G-cuZx-0SmumUiaeRac-Ua5nY=) Team, when Donald Trump returned to the White House, I told you that no matter how hard we fight, we might not be able to win every battle — _and that’s exactly why I refuse to give up now in the aftermath of Republicans ramming their cruel budget through Congress._ Because the fact of the matter is, elections have consequences, and now our job is to hold Republicans accountable for the disaster they’ve created — **by ending their grip on Congress.** That means we need to expose the pain Republicans just voted to inflict upon the most vulnerable among us by gutting SNAP, kicking millions of Americans off their health care, and hiking our energy bills — _just to give their billionaire friends a massive tax handout._ **And flipping the House blue in 2026 is our best chance to block Republicans from ramming through even more of Trump’s extreme agenda.** That starts with holding critical seats like OR-06 to rebuild our majority, where Republicans came within striking distance _twice_ in recent years. **[Team, if you’re with me in this fight, please, chip into my campaign today and help me hold the line for Democrats in Congress as we work to flip the House and halt the MAGA agenda in its tracks. name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: How we’ll win Virginia this year
body:
---
**_BREAKING: The DNC is investing an initial $1.5 million in Virginia’s 2025 elections._** Derek, With less than four months until Virginia’s 2025 elections, we’re ramping up and mobilizing to win big in Virginia in November. So we just announced an initial seven-figure investment to organize statewide and make sure Democrats up and down the ballot have the resources they need to win their races this year and next. [**If you’d like to support our work to elect Democrats who will fight to make life easier and more affordable for working families, please consider making your first donation of 2025 to the DNC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250715_3965_fr&refcode2=3965_22930333_qCLn9v&akid=3965%2E22930333%2EqCLn9v) Virginia’s Republican gubernatorial candidate has already announced a seven-figure advertising plan to target Virginia voters — and we know that Trump and his far-right allies will stop at nothing to keep the commonwealth in Republican hands. **Republican candidates up and down the ballot in Virginia will be spending big — but so will we.** That’s why, as Election Day 2025 approaches, the Democratic Party will mobilize and organize voters statewide in support of leaders who will check Trump and his allies and fight for working families. **This year’s statewide elections will be a signal of public sentiment since Trump took office in January, and we have to make a strong statement.** [**When you pitch in to support the DNC, your $3 contribution goes toward funding efforts like these. So we’re asking: Can you make a contribution today to help support the DNC’s strategic investments in states like Virginia?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250715_3965_fr&refcode2=3965_22930333_qCLn9v&akid=3965%2E22930333%2EqCLn9v) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250715_3965_fr&refcode2=3965_22930333_qCLn9v&akid=3965%2E22930333%2EqCLn9v)**

clean_body: BREAKING: The DNC is investing an initial $1.5 million in Virginia’s 2025 elections. Derek, With less than four months until Virginia’s 2025 elections, we’re ramping up and mobilizing to win big in Virginia in November. So we just announced an initial seven-figure investment to organize statewide and make sure Democrats up and down the ballot have the resources they need to win their races this year and next. Virginia’s Republican gubernatorial candidate has already announced a seven-figure advertising plan to target Virginia voters — and we know that Trump and his far-right allies will stop at nothing to keep the commonwealth in Republican hands. Republican candidates up and down the ballot in Virginia will be spending big — but so will we. That’s why, as Election Day 2025 approaches, the Democratic Party will mobilize and organize voters statewide in support of leaders who will check Trump and his allies and fight for working families. This year’s statewide elections will be a signal of public sentiment since Trump took office in January, and we have to make a strong statement. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** We appreciate your ongoing support, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

body:
|

---
| | **2025 Autism Health Walk: Every Step For Autism, Every Mile A Miracle!**
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=522e23666b&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| Join us for a day of **movement, music, and miracles** as we come together to support families impacted by autism! Whether you're walking **in person** at Huntington Beach Central Park or **virtually** from your own community, your steps matter. Walk as an individual, create a team, join an existing team, or just simply sponsor a walker. Rally your friends and family to support the cause from anywhere in the world! [Click HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=e412d838aa&e=3a42edfdc4) to Register! **Date:** Saturday, September 6, 2025
**Location:** Huntington Beach Central Park West
18381 Goldenwest St, Huntington Beach, CA 92648
[_(See our website for parking and map)_](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=50b7da2f83&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| [REGISTER NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=5ef4b20192&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER NOW")
---
|
---
| ** Upcoming Autism Health Webinar: “Stem Cells Made Simple” – Saturday, July 26th**
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=2d6e645568&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| Join Autism Health Inc. for an enlightening and accessible webinar:
**“Stem Cells Made Simple”**
**Saturday, July 26, 2025**
**9:00 AM PST / 12:00 PM EST**
**Live on Zoom** In this educational session, we’ll break down the science of stem cells—specifically **Mesenchymal Stem Cells (MSCs)** —in a simple and straightforward way. You'll learn:
* What stem cells are and how they function
* How MSCs are ethically and safely sourced
* Why MSCs are used in the U.S. as a wellness adjunct, not a treatment or cure
* How stem cells may support individuals with autism and other neurological conditions
* What to look for when considering providers or clinics

Whether you’re a parent, practitioner, or simply curious, this webinar is designed to educate and empower you with practical knowledge. ** Registration is FREE but required.**
**[Register HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=b1b36889a5&e=3a42edfdc4) to sign up** All questions will be submitted through the Zoom chat during the session.
---
| [REGISTER HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=e7b43b602f&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER HERE")
---
|
---
|
---
| We’re excited to announce that **tickets are officially on sale** for the **Autism Health Summit 2026** – happening **April 24–25, 2026** at the beautiful **Legacy Resort & Spa in San Diego, CA**! **Early Bird Special – Save 10%**
Register now and receive **10% off** your ticket with promo code **EarlyBird10**. This limited-time offer is valid through **Nov 1st only** , so don’t wait! You can also apply through your California Regional Center for approval. **Event Dates:**
* **Friday & Saturday, April 24–25** – Full conference with expert speakers, panels, and networking
* **Sunday, April 26** – **Optional Vendor Day** : An extra opportunity to connect with exhibitors and explore products, services, and resources that support the autism community

This one-of-a-kind, parent-driven event brings together top doctors, therapists, researchers, and educators to share the latest in integrative health, biomedical treatments, therapies, nutrition, and more. Whether you're a parent, caregiver, or healthcare professional, the Autism Health Summit is designed to inform, inspire, and empower. Don’t miss out on a transformative weekend of learning, connection, and hope. Sponsorships are available [HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=58f752ab92&e=3a42edfdc4). **Reserve your spot today and save 10%** at: [www.ahsconference.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=be6d4e0dda&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| [BUY TICKETS](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=25ade39f4f&e=3a42edfdc4 "BUY TICKETS")
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.

name: Mark Warren
subject: My job is to get to the point.
disclaimer_text: paid for by the
body:
Dear Friends,
The last month has been a bit of a hazy daze, but as I’ve come out of it, I have asked myself: How do we just go back to work and life? I imagine what I think the Speaker Emerita would say. I think we all know she would tell us to take care of ourselves first and then get back to work. Minnesotans' lives will be better if we’re successful in winning back a House majority. I think she would tell us to have fun doing it.
So that’s what I am going to do. I ask for your forgiveness in this hard pivot, and as the Finance Director, my job is to get to the point.
I was just checking our records and noticed that you haven’t used your refund with the House DFL yet! Through Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund program, you can donate $75 (or $150 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state.
Our House DFL team is working hard to make Minnesota a brighter, safer place to build the future you want. If we're going to keep fighting for a Minnesota where everyone can get ahead, not just the rich and powerful, we need your help. Will you make your refundable donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-july25-email?refcode=071425_FR_JulyGoal-PCR_MW_ND]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-july25-email?refcode=071425_FR_JulyGoal-PCR_MW_ND_75&amount=25&express_lane=true]
DONATE $150 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-july25-email?refcode=071425_FR_JulyGoal-PCR_MW_ND_150&amount=34&express_lane=true]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-july25-email?refcode=071425_FR_JulyGoal-PCR_MW_ND&amount=55&express_lane=true]
I can’t thank you enough, Friend.
Mark Warren
Finance Director
Minnesota House DFL

We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session.
Give $75 and Get $75 back from Minnesota! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-july25-email?refcode=071425_FR_JulyGoal-PCR_MW]

name: Heartland Patriots HQ
subject: Do you think elected officials should be held accountable to the same laws as everyone else?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Public service should be a sacred responsibility, not a shield from accountability.
#
We’ve got just one quick question for you today, Peter:
**Do you think elected officials should be accountable to the same laws as everyone else?**
**[YES, THEY SHOULD BE HELD ACCOUNTABLE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/hp-accountability-survey-july25?t=1&akid=9124%2E614464%2E0wEsqG)**
**[NO, THEY SHOULDN’T BE HELD ACCOUNTABLE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/hp-accountability-survey-july25?t=2&akid=9124%2E614464%2E0wEsqG)**
**Public service should be a sacred responsibility, not a shield from accountability.**
But more and more often, we’re witnessing powerful elected officials and elites shamelessly dodge consequences that everyday people would face without question.
It’s a broken system. And it has caused a massive erosion of public trust in the people we have elected to represent our communities. So today, we’re asking to confirm, Peter:
**Do you think elected officials should be accountable to the same laws as everyone else?**
**[YES, THEY SHOULD BE HELD ACCOUNTABLE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/hp-accountability-survey-july25?t=3&akid=9124%2E614464%2E0wEsqG)**
**[NO, THEY SHOULDN’T BE HELD ACCOUNTABLE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/hp-accountability-survey-july25?t=4&akid=9124%2E614464%2E0wEsqG)**
Thanks for sharing your input, Peter.
Heartland Patriots HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hp-email-footer?refcode=em20250715-9124-footer&t=5&refcode2=9124_614464_0wEsqG&akid=9124%2E614464%2E0wEsqG)**

Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_heartland-patriots/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=6&akid=9124%2E614464%2E0wEsqG). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

name: Shinji Oh
subject: 😢Goodbye to “Best for Business”😢
body:
Friends- We have some sad news to share this week; Virginia, formerly #1 in America’s Top States for Business rankings (and a top 3 finisher for the last 5 years), has slipped to fourth place, ceding
| | |
---
| |
---
| 😢Goodbye to "Best for Business"😢
---
| Friends-
We have some sad news to share this week; Virginia, formerly #1 in America's Top States for Business rankings (and a top 3 finisher for the last 5 years), has slipped to fourth place, ceding the title to North Carolina. It also dropped to #14 in overall economy; federal job cuts supported by the Governor are cited as a big reason for this huge loss.
---
| | [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aBnVn_60NB5dchj7Q3LRbMORAMkyNhbyLUtGDfZfC3VvPP3Sm4kXD5xd1an1qgNKCzPv8WPo0Hg25o3vshJTxJ9Ilol7XnH3mZI3YkHj2-blmCelmfD10wflD0yaj__kiyqUgkkRD2ZyQYHPdXfv03ChJ0zXbS0PUzB8CLPIqQ7mso9A32UacDb_TmqNGsH1HyQkAriQCf25P-dx0n0WH-w2tEVyeDbsb7GfHdBgkrDZLr3u3r1tBi8tRiCWIUMGiuZFxC__AElmqcp1fUVQAoPkWbeB8ZQhNlUqqNgra5h-7hNVCB3LaTslR5PZyvc6&c=EQSC8tjuegDB8JAh3hQPH0_AFoDeZkS7L92-1e6G9iSlrYp4xjP8Uw==&ch=HOJpDGopNMuFe3be-292IpumWTl3mVetc3fiAk41E3_DnQgYSTD_GQ==)
---
| | [Read More](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aBnVn_60NB5dchj7Q3LRbMORAMkyNhbyLUtGDfZfC3VvPP3Sm4kXD5xd1an1qgNKCzPv8WPo0Hg25o3vshJTxJ9Ilol7XnH3mZI3YkHj2-blmCelmfD10wflD0yaj__kiyqUgkkRD2ZyQYHPdXfv03ChJ0zXbS0PUzB8CLPIqQ7mso9A32UacDb_TmqNGsH1HyQkAriQCf25P-dx0n0WH-w2tEVyeDbsb7GfHdBgkrDZLr3u3r1tBi8tRiCWIUMGiuZFxC__AElmqcp1fUVQAoPkWbeB8ZQhNlUqqNgra5jEC84DzkuG1szw0_LahwUp&c=EQSC8tjuegDB8JAh3hQPH0_AFoDeZkS7L92-1e6G9iSlrYp4xjP8Uw==&ch=HOJpDGopNMuFe3be-292IpumWTl3mVetc3fiAk41E3_DnQgYSTD_GQ==)
---
| We may not be able to reinstate the loss of federal jobs on our own, but there ARE things we-- and every Virginian- can do to help make Virginia "Best for Business" once again. That's why we're advocating for Paid Family & Medical Leave in Virginia; establishing a Paid Family and Medical Leave program will allow small businesses to compete on a level playing field with big corporations, ensuring they can attract and retain talent. When small businesses thrive, we all thrive. [3.4 million Virginian workers](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aBnVn_60NB5dchj7Q3LRbMORAMkyNhbyLUtGDfZfC3VvPP3Sm4kXD2e0Hd09bVul8okLO0zozguB0zAwcmFxDZy0o_Cv0GTAuzMe5p2rWGnCL4X6tg_8Ep3QZCmMgZ_BSAV5GyIapO_N3Kwq9LSv_eVgf2NXlrKqy9cJvLmKPqXvj3COwWwqQ9N9sASbM_mtsMVqGP_m8AKAiN2VGqlszsFTIt7Tsy25Yw4USATaKBms2j8HQJxmXarqxNvWIZQB1nj_Nc1vHFA=&c=EQSC8tjuegDB8JAh3hQPH0_AFoDeZkS7L92-1e6G9iSlrYp4xjP8Uw==&ch=HOJpDGopNMuFe3be-292IpumWTl3mVetc3fiAk41E3_DnQgYSTD_GQ==) face the impossible choice between caring for themselves or a loved one and maintaining their economic security.
We can become "Best for Business" by protecting our workers and small businesses: the backbone of Virginia's economy.

Shinji Oh Digital Manager

clean_body: Peter, I need to explain where things stand | | Peter, I need to explain where things stand: = This is our first major deadline since extreme MAGA Republicans voted for the largest cut to Medicaid in American history. Whether or not we reach our budget goal will set the stage for the rest of this election. = | = NAME: = ID: = MEMBERSHIP: = = Peter, we have an unprecedented opportunity to make history together, clinch a monumental victory in this election and ensure the MAGA movement completely collapses. I’ll do everything possible to stop Donald Trump and his enablers in Congress. However, I can’t take them on alone, Peter. That’s why I’m asking you to make a critical decision at this moment: We can either let billionaire donors funnel cash into battleground districts across this country, blanket the airwaves with lies about Democrats and sabotage our chance to flip the House... Or we can stand united, launch our own response ASAP and send the right-wing extremists back to the minority. = | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. name: Wes Moore
subject: Take a look at this photo I found
body:
Peter, it’s been a long time, but the important things stay the same.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=312%2E1086043%2EGu7Ma0)
Hey Peter, it’s Wes. Take a look at this throwback pic 👇🏽
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250715-1?refcode=em-20250715-1&refcode2=312_1086043_Gu7Ma0&akid=312%2E1086043%2EGu7Ma0)
---
When I joined the military, I was young, hopeful, and hungry. At the time, **I didn’t think I’d grow up to be Maryland’s first Black governor.**
So much has changed since then, but the important things stayed the same: service, gratitude, and humility continue to be the foundation of everything that I do.
**[If you agree with that type of leadership, can I count on you to chip in $5 or any amount today? Your support will be crucial to the campaign ahead.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250715-1?refcode=em-20250715-1&refcode2=312_1086043_Gu7Ma0&akid=312%2E1086043%2EGu7Ma0)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250715-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250715-1&refcode2=312_1086043_Gu7Ma0&akid=312%2E1086043%2EGu7Ma0)**
**Now, I’m fighting every day for all Marylanders.** Since taking office we've invested in public safety, focused on ensuring accountability, and partnered with elected and community leaders. It can seem like an uphill battle, but I know we can do this together.
To succeed, I need support from folks like you who believe in our mission. That’s why I have to ask:
**[Will you pitch in any amount today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250715-1?refcode=em-20250715-1&refcode2=312_1086043_Gu7Ma0&akid=312%2E1086043%2EGu7Ma0)**
Thank you, Peter!
Wes
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250715-1&t=2&refcode2=312_1086043_Gu7Ma0&akid=312%2E1086043%2EGu7Ma0)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=312%2E1086043%2EGu7Ma0)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=312%2E1086043%2EGu7Ma0)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER
clean_body: Peter, it’s been a long time, but the important things stay the same. Hey Peter, it’s Wes. Take a look at this throwback pic 👇🏽 When I joined the military, I was young, hopeful, and hungry. At the time, I didn’t think I’d grow up to be Maryland’s first Black governor. So much has changed since then, but the important things stayed the same: service, gratitude, and humility continue to be the foundation of everything that I do. Now, I’m fighting every day for all Marylanders. Since taking office we've invested in public safety, focused on ensuring accountability, and partnered with elected and community leaders. It can seem like an uphill battle, but I know we can do this together. To succeed, I need support from folks like you who believe in our mission. That’s why I have to ask: Thank you, Peter! Wes

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Tour Of Oklahoma Starts TONIGHT! I Hope To See You
body:
Tonight, I begin my Tour of Oklahoma in Paul's Valley. I will be speaking for the Garvin County GOP at Christian Life Church at 6:30pm. I will be tra
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23043213.12049.1.4b88501a0a0774e4188cc010762209f7) |
---
Tonight, I begin my **[Tour of Oklahoma](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23043213.12050.1.86aa7f3039e4558e9f8879ebf9863760)** in Paul's Valley. I will be speaking for the **Garvin County GOP** at **Christian Life Church** at 6:30pm. I will be traveling all throughout the State of Oklahoma for the remainder of 2025 and much of 2026. You can view my [upcoming schedule](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23043213.12051.1.07214bdaf926904c80861cc56489fd42) here to see when I am coming to place near you: [https://www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/schedule](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23043213.12052.1.6b8a0f89e189fb596b2ce7d5c7f1d2ca) I have a **presentation** that I will be sharing that I believe you will enjoy at these events plus **LIVE Q &A** afterwards which is always the BEST PART! If you would like for me to come **speak at your event or church** please let me know by visiting: [https://www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/schedule](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23043213.12053.1.eec96b5f5825a345a04a6b4807cf2677) My speaking fee is **$Free.99** and I cover my own travel expenses. **I hope to see you at one of these upcoming events!** Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ View Upcoming Events ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23043213.12054.1.10ca1c6b5655f1643761f2fa03052ba9)
---
---
|
---
I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23043213.12055.1.52fc1fe5751f575b77b6033b59ba2851) is out and has reached **#13 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23043213.12056.1.281a7f50da0abf4dbbb0950e3208dfca)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23043213.12057.1.3af1581914c298e30572f5eeb053a061)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23043213.12058.1.a9d21def17188ee9e2dc34949b8adcea). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23043213.12059.1.4a97f5a84a803597532eeae45c100d5f) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23043213.12060.1.b33f6d69b3ba5246869a9f83c5c17c86) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23043213.12061.1.9823f2133f15afc8efad951ebcb592f7) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

name: JanePAC
subject: the dreaded “summer slump”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Our mid-July fundraising numbers aren’t where they need to be.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111509660/557525356/1328794144?refcode=ea.59b16e9d-9e61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.59b16e9d-9e61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5YjE2ZTlkLTllNjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ju6-I1QVrw7CePyATg1vGQXeAq9PG53u9dVdRzYP9hY=&emci=872af1f1-9c61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=59b16e9d-9e61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
We’ll cut straight to it. We're smack in the middle of what campaigns like to call the “summer slump” — a time of year when fundraising drastically slows down because people are focused on other priorities during the summer months or simply trying to step back from political stress. Trust us, we get it. We don’t expect everyone to read emails like this one and donate every time. **But while we're all trying to enjoy some downtime, Donald Trump and his fossil fuel buddies aren't taking a summer vacation from their attacks on our planet. Their destruction is ramping up just as our July fundraising has slowed — and every day we fall behind gives them more time to cause irreversible damage.** **[That's why we’re reaching out to YOU — someone we know we can count on in tough moments like this. Can you help us get back on track with a donation of any amount before tomorrow's mid-July fundraising deadline?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111509661/557525357/2105508926?refcode=ea.59b16e9d-9e61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.59b16e9d-9e61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5YjE2ZTlkLTllNjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ju6-I1QVrw7CePyATg1vGQXeAq9PG53u9dVdRzYP9hY=)** Just this month alone, Trump's massive spending bill handed billions more in giveaways to oil and gas executives, while his administration gutted NOAA funding right as we enter peak hurricane season. And now, he’s opening up millions of acres of our public lands to coal mining and slashing public health protections for communities on the frontlines of the climate crisis — all to further enrich corporate polluters. That’s what we’re up against: Big Oil’s billions and the anti-climate politicians they prop up who are hellbent on rolling back every bit of progress we’ve made on clean energy, environmental justice, and the future we all deserve. **Every dollar _we raise_** during these slower months goes directly to work to support climate leaders running for City Council to Congress — leaders who are fighting against Trump's fossil fuel agenda in their communities. **Every dollar _we don't raise_** means one less climate leader we can support. One less community protected from fossil fuel pollution. One less chance to stop Trump's destructive agenda from taking root. So while we completely understand if you're taking a step back right now, we're asking you one more time because it’s that important: **[Will you chip in any amount to help us reach our $30,000 mid-month goal before tomorrow at midnight?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111509663/557525359/2105508926?refcode=ea.59b16e9d-9e61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.59b16e9d-9e61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5YjE2ZTlkLTllNjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ju6-I1QVrw7CePyATg1vGQXeAq9PG53u9dVdRzYP9hY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111509665/557525361/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.59b16e9d-9e61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.59b16e9d-9e61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5YjE2ZTlkLTllNjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ju6-I1QVrw7CePyATg1vGQXeAq9PG53u9dVdRzYP9hY=) | [**DONATE $26**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111509667/557525363/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=ea.59b16e9d-9e61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.59b16e9d-9e61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5YjE2ZTlkLTllNjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ju6-I1QVrw7CePyATg1vGQXeAq9PG53u9dVdRzYP9hY=)

clean_body: Our mid-July fundraising numbers aren’t where they need to be. | We’ll cut straight to it. We're smack in the middle of what campaigns like to call the “summer slump” — a time of year when fundraising drastically slows down because people are focused on other priorities during the summer months or simply trying to step back from political stress. Trust us, we get it. We don’t expect everyone to read emails like this one and donate every time. But while we're all trying to enjoy some downtime, Donald Trump and his fossil fuel buddies aren't taking a summer vacation from their attacks on our planet. Their destruction is ramping up just as our July fundraising has slowed — and every day we fall behind gives them more time to cause irreversible damage. = Just this month alone, Trump's massive spending bill handed billions more in giveaways to oil and gas executives, while his administration gutted NOAA funding right as we enter peak hurricane season. And now, he’s opening up millions of acres of our public lands to coal mining and slashing public health protections for communities on the frontlines of the climate crisis — all to further enrich corporate polluters. That’s what we’re up against: Big Oil’s billions and the anti-climate politicians they prop up who are hellbent on rolling back every bit of progress we’ve made on clean energy, environmental justice, and the future we all deserve. Every dollar we raise during these slower months goes directly to work to support climate leaders running for City Council to Congress — leaders who are fighting against Trump's fossil fuel agenda in their communities. Every dollar we don't raise means one less climate leader we can support. One less community protected from fossil fuel pollution. One less chance to stop Trump's destructive agenda from taking root. So while we completely understand if you're taking a step back right now, we're asking you one more time because it’s that important: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We can’t thank you enough! – Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: Sign the petition now to protect Social Security from cuts!! >>

body:
We need your voice now!

| Hi team,

**We wanted to follow up because the GOP's efforts to weaken Social Security are not slowing down, and we can’t afford to stay silent.**

Donald Trump promised not to touch Social Security.

But once in office, he launched one of the most aggressive rollbacks in the program’s history — **slashing staff, closing offices, and making it harder for seniors and people with disabilities to access the benefits they’ve earned.**

This is a direct attack on some of the most vulnerable members of our communities. _That’s why we need your voice now._

**[Will you stand with us and sign the petition to defend Social Security before our deadline at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111510094/557526578/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250715_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzRhMWY5Ny05ZjYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lW7ycfle7lf_n1Pgsn-CgS1iiFZz4wTL-fQGXXYe0Gw=&emci=4439cbaa-8c61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1c4a1f97-9f61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME TO DEFEND SOCIAL SECURITY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111510096/557526581/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250715_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzRhMWY5Ny05ZjYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lW7ycfle7lf_n1Pgsn-CgS1iiFZz4wTL-fQGXXYe0Gw=&emci=4439cbaa-8c61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1c4a1f97-9f61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)

**Since elected, Trump’s administration has:**

\- Cut the Social Security Administration’s staffing by 7,000 jobs – 12% of the workforce
\- Closed regional offices, cutting off access to rural and disabled Seniors
\- Created longer wait times for recipients to receive their benefits

**This is a de facto cut to a program millions of Americans rely on for financial security.**

_We need to fight back now_ – when it’s still possible for us to reverse course and prevent further harm to Social Security and Americans who rely on it for financial security.

clean_body: We need your voice now! | Hi team, We wanted to follow up because the GOP's efforts to weaken Social Security are not slowing down, and we can’t afford to stay silent. Donald Trump promised not to touch Social Security. But once in office, he launched one of the most aggressive rollbacks in the program’s history — slashing staff, closing offices, and making it harder for seniors and people with disabilities to access the benefits they’ve earned. This is a direct attack on some of the most vulnerable members of our communities. That’s why we need your voice now. | Thanks for being part of this fight, – The New Dems Team FWD: \--------------------------------- When Trump was running for office, he vowed to not touch Social Security. Clearly,he lied: Since elected, Trump’s administration has: \- Cut the Social Security Administration’s staffing by 7,000 jobs – 12% of the workforce \- Closed regional offices, cutting off access to rural and disabled Seniors \- Created longer wait times for recipients to receive their benefits This is a de facto cut to a program millions of Americans rely on for financial security. We need to fight back now – when it’s still possible for us to reverse course and prevent further harm to Social Security and Americans who rely on it for financial security. Thank you, New Dems | | Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund www.newdemactionfund.com Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th St NW Suite 1050, Washington, DC 20006 In 2022, NewDems flipped more competitive seats from red-to-blue than any other ideological caucus. subject: I need to respond immediately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Democrats just launched a coordinated smear campaign against me and President Trump across social media, hitting thousands of Montana voters.

Friend,

Democrats just launched a coordinated smear campaign against me and President Trump across social media, hitting thousands of Montana voters.

We're not even in August, and Democrats are ALREADY running their campaign playbook for 2026. I can't let Democrats monopolize social media traffic with their lies.

name: America First Warrior - Byron Donalds
subject: My Turning Point speech almost brought the house down
body:
The Dems are out to get me

| | | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zk9jkru42091jbo047hl1jcij29o8g3fetlb6tf0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdi62p34clh2bs)
---
|
---
The target on my back just increased 10-fold after my **Turning Point Speech**.
I just spoke at one of the most historic Turning Point USA conferences ever, with ONE message:
"_There is no movement, there is no party, that can stop young people active for the right principles—the principles of liberty and freedom for the future of America... because when you are mobile, agile, active—when you never quit, never give up, don’t mind the sweat—when that’s the energy you bring to this movement of ours, we, and I say we, are _unstoppable.__ "

|
---
[ENDORSE MY RACE HERE](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9rf3dh8sg6ocho73qeelp41ab2dek6h2bcsco3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdi62p34clh2bs)
|
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z91npnbgeio9dncht6jspm52prp5h5v80f4bvbeg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdi62p34clh2bs)
|
---
I was greeted with thunderous applause. But the backlash against me from the radical-left has been swift: **> **The Fake News has launched a national effort to DESTROY my good name
**>** They’re attacking my family, friends, and allies.
**>** The Dem Establishment handpicked a RADICAL-LEFTIST to run against me, all in an effort to make me SURRENDER.
Democrats dropped _**[$45 million dollars](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zervdne4j469li1o7kue07ik4tc84nvfniiglij8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdi62p34clh2bs)**_ last time to Flip Florida Blue, and with Trump endorsing my race, they will spend whatever it takes to knock me down.
**But here’s the truth: President Trump chose me because I’m a fighter.** I will NEVER back down, no matter WHAT they throw our way.
So will you please stand with me by chipping in _**[$25, $50, or $100](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdknnuobqp15t1pnc0up6og8d54nio3ap5o28gdo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdi62p34clh2bs)**_ to help me become Florida’s next governor? With your help, we’ll send a clear message to the Radical Left that we won’t be intimidated.

|
---
[CHIP IN HERE](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z38fm3ummb9qb3sbnhdl5n141gvr8ak1dh921g3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdi62p34clh2bs)
|
---
I appreciate your support and strength. This isn’t the first time, and it won’t be the last, but I know with you, _Trump_ , and the _MAGA Movement_ watching my back we’ll emerge victorious.
God bless you,
Byron Donalds

|
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqtvqm6dcgb6n6cu1059gpev490fe52dtcr2rcn0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdi62p34clh2bs)

clean_body: Redwood Matters: News and stories from the League | July 15, 2025 | Hidden hideaway How camping at Redwood National Park’s remote Elam Camp can provide not only a redwoods respite, but also a renewed appreciation for our public lands. Plus, check out our Elam Camp planning tips. We did it—together! It’s official—the League has bought the 1,517-acre Monte Rio Redwoods Expansion property and transferred it to Sonoma County Regional Parks. This is a huge win for redwood lovers, public lands advocates, and wildlife. Celebrating Disability Pride Month July is Disability Pride Month, and we’re all about making the redwoods more accessible. Check out our Disabled Hiker’s Guide created with our friends at Disabled Hikers to help everyone enjoy time among the trees. See you on the trail! ICYMI Steve Mietz is hitting his stride as the new president and CEO of Save the Redwoods League. In this Q&A, we asked what drew him to the League—and why he thinks now is a great time to be in conservation. | | Instagram Post of the Month ---|--- | | ---|--- Help us pick the cover of our 2026 #redwoods calendar. 🌲 Will it be... the swimmin’ salmon🐟, the camera-loving marten 🦡, a wise old owl🦉, or a slug on a mission 🐌? 🎤 Cast your vote for our new calendar cover today! 🔗 Link in bio. 📷 RT Images/Shutterstock THE LEAGUE IN THE NEWS KRON 4 Happy Eco News NorCal Public Radio Support our work Connect with us | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States |

body:
The threat is even worse now.
Patriot,

Just over one year ago, the unthinkable happened in Butler, Pennsylvania: **President Donald J. Trump was shot.**

An attempted ASSASSINATION--just inches from ending his life.

That moment shook the nation to its core. _But it didn 't break him._

President Trump stood back up, bleeding, with a clenched fist raised high -- a symbol of courage, defiance, and love for this country.

_[But now, the threat is worse than ever.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8c74ac9a83814e8590a0f075976401d9&_e=VIMIgHo84DZSHPc-g6QpPQefsItn0kEZS_BXLRR5JhHqYvjhzrGda-oDVDU-hBuqlJB08wMCzlEJMJDhZ7Gs-rmrk89HeLWAI5aJscf37Bm0u1VYUP27h5GLZvx_cpKrCWx8eCuMdZ8VH5yET1fJYQciLsBuhztMJYGxva91mKmNiDQ2x6DA7B9YUUHKOkknsifUNfLgUBvPAoW1zXqkTKyyeVwuj1y02k85wLQ5zuUIaJ8IsVN4qnJHmAl2L9fTP_zxt8gFqZ2h9jDhvKQ0QD1kW6I_ronL4Q-vm-Pi2M3aghdUx8QsZqMEZvSvySMsgxMjMOnnLX1lMxQQnh7blCXjcZne7fio_rDmWVXvGLw7e0w_lIilarLKSn7JTzvoWchdotprSSWhbHkW9vV3oP076WP4PCZlkUrQn-K_Fua7kQXr_55g7qzWAHaJ-Zm2OUZUlepTSiCGKPkfQQvUjtM2x8Hxvl9NF2MuXFuh7rfdK1k6qzdYweC3xOXEUJsovRKq4eByuJ5aIiEfFYnru9VYxOrUmGO3dHKuCOo0Zx_hvQJL0wIV5Y0Qp_Qe1YjxjfcaQehwYcZVioc5XlNHMGhQnOnj1W3I4Mh_tSepkmL_Vz5BrsniNUC_Q8jdJ0HSF4RXuNYaJzLUuM8HKRIGxDe0qYgqXjSCz-XumBYEw1w74o1zzO9ULNp-_NK2FcIU "But now, the threat is worse than ever.")_

**Let that sink in.** The man who survived an assassination attempt--who's been unjustly indicted, censored, and slandered--is now facing _**[the greatest level of danger yet.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8c74ac9a83814e8590a0f075976401d9&_e=VIMIgHo84DZSHPc-g6QpPQefsItn0kEZS_BXLRR5JhHqYvjhzrGda-oDVDU-hBuqlJB08wMCzlEJMJDhZ7Gs-rmrk89HeLWAI5aJscf37Bm0u1VYUP27h5GLZvx_cpKrCWx8eCuMdZ8VH5yET1fJYQciLsBuhztMJYGxva91mKmNiDQ2x6DA7B9YUUHKOkknsifUNfLgUBvPAoW1zXqkTKyyeVwuj1y02k85wLQ5zuUIaJ8IsVN4qnJHmAl2L9fTZ4WTmq0mrrUQNwU0wNnIEEJR8wDrI8pAhu4V5613333-4sATRHoDc4VHL0XvP_k5NqUiLBTA7btaVfr1oIaYXRImDWtP_TZIQTRTkzoGsRKR4qO49sGZeIWGJ58gENHJN_ahzl19xcTCIBj38BM07HHB4hmZXtVFm07CN4LG7b9vSrxjfbIL0R7cm52efxQV2A0wy0F66E1PRjGFyTsCuR7_I3Dwo0Xt1I8dkjd9umJg-ZH9ol9GWgAnIhN0bOdGNmcASmGaM95QL4w_SrDdiQnj2dLoWwXw7wfH8z17qMR-MjnBl6XxAJC_QQuowm39pCkYnyRdYWCymaIrJymOw9DNr5xJA1kUYznKDOsXwWWmAge92WnurbIfK4sMKijxtRUC-gSXbqMNLU9gERrkxR8orGPwAVRKhqFfTojTsbuIuM8gBLQVOc7bHfgo--Np "the greatest level of danger yet.")**_

From violent radicals at home to foreign enemies abroad, some will stop at **NOTHING** to silence him and destroy the movement **YOU** are a part of.

We CANNOT afford to be silent. clean_body: The threat is even worse now. Patriot, Just over one year ago, the unthinkable happened in Butler, Pennsylvania: President Donald J. Trump was shot. An attempted ASSASSINATION--just inches from ending his life. That moment shook the nation to its core. But it didn 't break him. President Trump stood back up, bleeding, with a clenched fist raised high -- a symbol of courage, defiance, and love for this country. "But now, the threat is worse than ever." "The Secret Service just issued a chilling warning about President Trump’s safety:" "“The threat climate has never been higher.”" Let that sink in. The man who survived an assassination attempt--who's been unjustly indicted, censored, and slandered--is now facing "the greatest level of danger yet." From violent radicals at home to foreign enemies abroad, some will stop at NOTHING to silence him and destroy the movement YOU are a part of. We CANNOT afford to be silent. We MUST show President Trump that "the American people have his back" , just like he's had ours. "Please, make an emergency contribution RIGHT NOW to show your support for President Trump during this critical time.>>" -- Whether it's $5, $50, or more -- every single gift is "a show of strength to those trying to tear him down." President Trump didn 't flinch when the bullet came. He won't flinch now. But he needs to know YOU'RE still standing with him. "Let’s send a MASSIVE wave of support that shows the world. We will NEVER back down. We will NEVER stop fighting.>>" Thank you, Patriots for Trump Paid for by Elect Common Sense. 11 Convent Road #25, Convent Station, NJ 07961

name: America First Warrior - Byron Donalds
subject: My Turning Point speech almost brought the house down
body:
The Dems are out to get me

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdojgkqc0mpctcpp0apke18alg9o2oneg4kk1t4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdi6ao31c1h2bs)
---
|
---
The target on my back just increased 10-fold after my **Turning Point Speech**.
I just spoke at one of the most historic Turning Point USA conferences ever, with ONE message:
"_There is no movement, there is no party, that can stop young people active for the right principles—the principles of liberty and freedom for the future of America... because when you are mobile, agile, active—when you never quit, never give up, don’t mind the sweat—when that’s the energy you bring to this movement of ours, we, and I say we, are _unstoppable.__ "

|
---
[ENDORSE MY RACE HERE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvnm127l0563l1duf1ggf2uh9b2uno3aggua3k70_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdi6ao31c1h2bs)
|
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdsdk91fkmfg96ttdfjv7i8klvo9or4fihd7f21g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdi6ao31c1h2bs)
|
---
I was greeted with thunderous applause. But the backlash against me from the radical-left has been swift: **> **The Fake News has launched a national effort to DESTROY my good name
**>** They’re attacking my family, friends, and allies.
**>** The Dem Establishment handpicked a RADICAL-LEFTIST to run against me, all in an effort to make me SURRENDER.
Democrats dropped _**[$45 million dollars](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmmfo63i926ti10gq9p5dbnb122njvp25kd4276g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdi6ao31c1h2bs)**_ last time to Flip Florida Blue, and with Trump endorsing my race, they will spend whatever it takes to knock me down.
**But here’s the truth: President Trump chose me because I’m a fighter.** I will NEVER back down, no matter WHAT they throw our way.
So will you please stand with me by chipping in _**[$25, $50, or $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhus19m4s39oq29h3iglngn1sk7c9h2htjgrnck8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdi6ao31c1h2bs)**_ to help me become Florida’s next governor? With your help, we’ll send a clear message to the Radical Left that we won’t be intimidated.

|
---
[CHIP IN HERE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp33jsd87tc82kuoco1raq5kvaovdq2nn5rfarso_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdi6ao31c1h2bs)
|
---
I appreciate your support and strength. This isn’t the first time, and it won’t be the last, but I know with you, _Trump_ , and the _MAGA Movement_ watching my back we’ll emerge victorious.
God bless you,
Byron Donalds

|

Dear Peter,
---
God has been so good to us—He’s done more in the past five years than anyone could have ever asked or imagined! We’ve witnessed incredible things: people healed of sickness and disease, people set free from addiction, and people delivered from the cold grip of depression. We put together just a few testimonies from the past few years—I hope these stories will encourage and embolden you in your faith. [**WATCH THE TESTIMONIES HERE >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=4909fdf09b7846bda935162c92799fd4&_e=RX3eoeC5Vp10E3yE9Xj1n3OLPCEFlmhdvLnwZwktE325xlIG73pTfSmQZYDYU2VBkCv4bGA5yhGhL4O2J4JvxyOZwfgmBCWOpPxaaQFJ4pNDDEymPkO1N-zfXdfNfMDUHr8xxKr0GrP53KV0H72VLkoZ83PkdokIw86K2dtxrmEryhDOjY5x_lIV2cqFWeY5Ije_gT4VFYBcObctE1SRKOioR0nBBsgC7mXPoomLR7x5z_trQzj6vjr31oTIC7rCXD0GCmnmLjp1Pm-ttfWl9QHDCqHj9kRgFgjYKXCyEOWzuyS8NXxl_Sez_MjCUrwMw1Gqu-URYrKSegR4UYOF0kauHWF3N3CXJVzq0p7kewwKdmrqXv9us5yp2DnnMokk-dNo9ILVZ8JmVTpOpEekNycHoNWniAhz4ct6ZJELS70TYwkl9B3HPfSBJ8lzyGxAvyGX32Pgjxa614RGNah3gQ%3D%3D) Some ministries are funded by ticket sales—**not us!** Every revival we hold is **free of charge**. We want to offer up the sound of worship to heaven, and we don’t charge anyone to join in the celebration. Jesus lived a life of service without charging anything, relying on the faith and generosity of others to fuel His miracles and ministry. We’re committed to following that example. That’s why we ask for donations from Believers like you—so we never have to charge admission at our revivals. [**HELP KEEP LET US WORSHIP FREE >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=4909fdf09b7846bda935162c92799fd4&_e=RX3eoeC5Vp10E3yE9Xj1n3OLPCEFlmhdvLnwZwktE325xlIG73pTfSmQZYDYU2VBkCv4bGA5yhGhL4O2J4JvxyOZwfgmBCWOpPxaaQFJ4pNDDEymPkO1N-zfXdfNfMDUHr8xxKr0GrP53KV0H72VLkoZ83PkdokIw86K2dtxrmECuujMroYPLb_WEmWJ5pVii7ZnzKs9De_yEDKncoq0EKRDyg_qache1qVIljiM_3sWG26SzFxyE9a07G_o-UUP654Yk6ITZFUE1XX-TPzgR8TM3LrM8Fefuu20nmEmvgxIrZeJbX7RpFo3VOhId3NVTFUeBptnKQJ5CCJyxN1DyO-goBHfzz-WUlfJOVIOknQ_7bOLpj0f1wwqwW_jVuXTbcZi5NT6-U1O2vrLQKkXLALYJQq3mc3y2tEmK0vFCRcUf1DOUNC-Wz2nCKS98eIAHBbFmLb0l4JNI06BxUBRuQ%3D%3D) When we set out on this journey, both Believers and non-Believers told us our radical model was unsustainable—that it would fizzle out. But we had faith. We kept going where He sent us. And here we are—**five years in and more passionate than ever!** If you believe in the call to bring revival to America and beyond, please consider contributing. You have no idea how the seeds we’ve sown—and continue to sow—will impact the world! [**HELP FUND 5 MORE YEARS OF LET US WORSHIP >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=4909fdf09b7846bda935162c92799fd4&_e=RX3eoeC5Vp10E3yE9Xj1n3OLPCEFlmhdvLnwZwktE325xlIG73pTfSmQZYDYU2VBkCv4bGA5yhGhL4O2J4JvxyOZwfgmBCWOpPxaaQFJ4pNDDEymPkO1N-zfXdfNfMDUHr8xxKr0GrP53KV0H72VLkoZ83PkdokIw86K2dtxrmH38fJmOpDQreyt90fJEpBp4_fNBtgFzprFDKUTxvoJGtloRasqb6H-vSiDFexWxPKhB11bThYxUhhMsQLlGqAfEd3ci1H4OJAbXsOCXHSJ8n5Y2K5j6onXM_L-AmO4eV3NzmglIKzfvzfQ8rgeBkVD7kGCHP3U-5z6WvXoOibynY3QjTCWmmU8CYnrN9Nwz2hEZuV2P3hDAjh_AObJ2WOHL70wvEDJmNek9QUoDKcPZpEhlJaekPGqZllY7tpgjqYWMWj_nVeFVSmP6huld6lNAfh1ea0PtZlpPW59tZoQSg%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, God has been so good to us—He’s done more in the past five years than anyone could have ever asked or imagined! We’ve witnessed incredible things: people healed of sickness and disease, people set free from addiction, and people delivered from the cold grip of depression. We put together just a few testimonies from the past few years—I hope these stories will encourage and embolden you in your faith. Some ministries are funded by ticket sales—not us! Every revival we hold is free of charge. We want to offer up the sound of worship to heaven, and we don’t charge anyone to join in the celebration. Jesus lived a life of service without charging anything, relying on the faith and generosity of others to fuel His miracles and ministry. We’re committed to following that example. That’s why we ask for donations from Believers like you—so we never have to charge admission at our revivals. When we set out on this journey, both Believers and non-Believers told us our radical model was unsustainable—that it would fizzle out. But we had faith. We kept going where He sent us. And here we are—five years in and more passionate than ever! If you believe in the call to bring revival to America and beyond, please consider contributing. You have no idea how the seeds we’ve sown—and continue to sow—will impact the world! | | Till all hear, Sean | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries 310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship | |

name: Jason Crow
subject: From Arby’s to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Hi,

Unlike most Washington politicians, I didn’t grow up in a politically connected family. I grew up in a working-class household, and like a lot of Americans, I started working minimum wage jobs early on.

I took orders at Arby’s. Worked in construction. It’s how I paid my way through college.

Those experiences shaped how I see public service. Because for too long, too many in Washington have forgotten who they’re really there to serve. They talk a big game, but hardworking families are still getting left behind.

That’s why I ran for Congress in the first place. Not to climb the political ladder, but to walk the walk. To do the work and fight for a government that actually delivers for the people who need it most.

Right now, Republicans are talking the talk while doing everything they can to push an agenda that helps their ultra-wealthy donors — and leaves the rest of America footing the bill. I won’t stand for that. And I’ll never stop fighting for working people.

I need you on my team. Can I count on you to pitch in any amount you can spare to help us hit our mid-month goal and keep up the fight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-july2025?amount=]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-july2025?amount=10&express_lane=true]

ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-july2025]

Thanks for believing in this work.

Onward,

Jason

Greenwood Village, CO 80112

Peter,

I’ll be honest with you: It’s a frustrating time in Congress. The Republican majority just passed a budget that prioritizes wealthy donors and corporations, while putting the burden squarely on the backs of seniors, veterans, women, children, and working families.

Standing up to Donald Trump and his Republican cronies is a team effort. And in Congress, my team needs support. [Will you help defend my colleagues' vulnerable seats in Congress so I can continue fighting back against Trump’s extreme, anti-democratic agenda? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111513868/557532589/1371072993?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_071525_MM04_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2E4NTQwMi1hNTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsxyHgZJLvIePESoWLLjfaZu-s5xZoUeRvl2Mz4roVU=) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111513869/557532590/1371072993?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_071525_MM04_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2E4NTQwMi1hNTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsxyHgZJLvIePESoWLLjfaZu-s5xZoUeRvl2Mz4roVU=)
---
House Speaker Mike Johnson has already said he would go on the offensive to expand his narrow majority in the House. That’s why we must start now to take back our power.

Think of the damage the Trump administration has been able to do with the slight majority Republicans have in Congress. If that expands, they will be able to ignore dissent from the (already small) moderate wing of their party and ram through the most extreme version of their agenda.

That’s why I’m counting on you to chip in and help me support my colleagues in Congress committed to stopping them. [Will you chip in $10 before my campaign’s mid-month deadline at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111513872/557532593/1371072993?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_071525_MM04_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2E4NTQwMi1hNTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsxyHgZJLvIePESoWLLjfaZu-s5xZoUeRvl2Mz4roVU=)

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, I’ll be honest with you: It’s a frustrating time in Congress. The Republican majority just passed a budget that prioritizes wealthy donors and corporations, while putting the burden squarely on the backs of seniors, veterans, women, children, and working families. Standing up to Donald Trump and his Republican cronies is a team effort. And in Congress, my team needs support. = | = House Speaker Mike Johnson has already said he would go on the offensive to expand his narrow majority in the House. That’s why we must start now to take back our power. Think of the damage the Trump administration has been able to do with the slight majority Republicans have in Congress. If that expands, they will be able to ignore dissent from the (already small) moderate wing of their party and ram through the most extreme version of their agenda. That’s why I’m counting on you to chip in and help me support my colleagues in Congress committed to stopping them. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

name: =?utf-8?B?8J+aqEJSRUFLSU5HIE5FV1M=?=
subject: 36 people. One toilet. One cage.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend, as if reports couldn’t be any worse, lawmakers were recently given tours of the stain on our Everglades in Florida, the facility they call Alligator Alcatraz.
I’m Josh Weil, candidate for U.S. Senate, and I say enough is enough.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6445537771543369672F764E6F5476306679424E6476725559322F436547753641722F4E335A332B44394E7A4F594B7454387A47454A55497233504B4B466D68/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-15%20at%2012.46.04%E2%80%AFPM.png]
Dozens of immigrant detainees are being held in cages like this.
36 people packed into one enclosure.
One toilet. One sink.
No privacy. No dignity.
And let’s not forget, they get there through the ICE raids MAGA has plagued our communities with. This is happening under the leadership of people like Ashley Moody .
This isn’t just a moral failure. It’s a policy choice. And if we don’t call it what it is, inhumane and unacceptable , we allow it to continue.
I’m running for U.S. Senate to stop this kind of system at its source, and get back to ensuring Americans are set up for success. If you believe no one should be caged like this, especially not in a nation that claims to value freedom and human rights , I need your help today.

This November, we have a fighting chance to elect a new Democratic trifecta in Virginia if we win back the governorship and maintain the state House majority. Every off-year, the media, donors, activists, and political observers, among others, closely monitor Virginia's elections to gauge the nation's political direction.
That’s just one of the reasons it’s so critical we help elect Democrats in Virginia this November. It would inject much-needed momentum, energy, and hope into our party.
_Here’s the catch:_ Republicans know a resounding defeat would put Trump and the GOP on notice. It would send a clear message that the American people have had it with their chaos and cruelty.
Republicans are already running negative attack ads and aggressive GOTV campaigns in some of Virginia’s most competitive districts. Last quarter, they raised a record $13 million, including contributions from 5,000 new online donors.
[Democrats cannot afford to fall behind in states like Virginia. If you want Democrats to make big gains in the states that would lift up our entire party, can you help out by chipping in $50, $25, or $7 today? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDgicZfgb3kpC3Q-b6VCjsBea0GA2jwxZjsR8NE5WI6ck9_etdPJeSCEnOEc4m90x-ZMk1Gt6vh6wxHhv3Mhd0YOYiyYvyayUBT3qsAXgfDOLImlV8n6Q4g1oV-MIARtff0HNAJcRIUfil9V9ayw7MGChswqX2-Q5uiG0xsiuDR16YTlwt0BIZvjNP2BPA80EuVaD1bqJgjvyEwMbtmPNBfafPzFXzevshzXZBpRMaMGKnhUuRJ1GZMgHugTVP8IIe8VSp8tUAsm3cI6DTliZI8XrVc_VZq1yG1ALpgCbQRaS0HTNqnW9AZOXqEtgSbflSXfbj36G5ULsHNobSInRkQNvDbwPpOutu7nSw981mWDg/4i7/BZiDIjICQjKhU6rZCkFHNA/h7/h001.yaP5vwpUi-sHRrscuWmT_zzCIJbf782f5mNIFx63EUg)

body:
This is a full-blown crisis for public education in America.
#

**BREAKING: U.S. Supreme Court rules that the Trump administration can move forward with their plan to _DISMANTLE the Department of Education!_** _We need all hands on deck right now, Peter._ The Supreme Court just granted Donald Trump + his administration EVEN MORE power by clearing the way for them to completely gut the Department of Education. **[Please join our urgent call to Congress before midnight tonight: End the GOP attacks on educators, students, and public schools! Protect public education from the dangerous MAGA agenda!](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250715?t=1&akid=9123%2E614464%2E82_yOf)** **[CLICK HERE TO ADD YOUR NAME BEFORE MIDNIGHT](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250715?t=2&akid=9123%2E614464%2E82_yOf)** **This is a full-blown crisis for public education in America. Now, Donald Trump + his administration have the power to:** _❌ Axe necessary funding for public schools nationwide_
_❌ Fire thousands of federal workers_
_❌ Continue their dangerous attacks on teachers + students_
_❌ Almost entirely gut the Department of Education_ We can’t let this stand, Peter. **That’s why we’re calling on engaged citizens like YOU to demand that Congress take action to END these attacks on public education — immediately, before it’s too late!** _We need to collect 1,500 signatures before midnight._ **[Will you be one of them, Peter? Add your name by clicking the button below:](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250715?t=3&akid=9123%2E614464%2E82_yOf)** **[CLICK HERE TO ADD YOUR NAME BEFORE MIDNIGHT](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250715?t=4&akid=9123%2E614464%2E82_yOf)**

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111516929/557540383/896231865?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzI3OWQwYS1hODYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVHGfvlCncQSe1Q7wzDgPmErHFmpLfrb8o9-m-m5a-Q=)
I’ll be direct, Peter. I'm asking you to send in a [**donation of $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111516932/557540385/896231865?refcode=em-7.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzI3OWQwYS1hODYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVHGfvlCncQSe1Q7wzDgPmErHFmpLfrb8o9-m-m5a-Q=) in this email. The Republican National Committee has launched a misleading social media campaign against me, and we have to keep focus back on the havoc they’re wreaking on us. Let me give you the rundown on what's going on: The Republican spending bill is _deeply_ unpopular. For good reason: it strips healthcare and food assistance from millions of people to pay for another billionaire tax cut. So they’re looking to create a distraction anywhere they can. In other words, Republicans don’t want you to focus on their cuts, so they’re lying about me. They think the American people will think they are solving real problems when the truth of the matter is they’re actually just making them up, while mixing in infighting for good measure. Here's the truth: Republicans have no record to speak of when it comes to delivering for IL-17 or the country. So their plan is to spread falsehoods and distract from their real, extremist agenda, and silence anyone who speaks out on behalf of working people and the Bill of Rights. Now, I know that you and I can see through their lies, but it takes work to get the record straight and keep focus on the issues that matter. So with that, I have to ask: [**This unexpected smear attack requires an immediate response to get the truth out and the focus back on improving lives for working families. Can you please chip in $3 before midnight to make sure we can defend the record, and the 17th District?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111516935/557540388/896231865?refcode=em-7.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzI3OWQwYS1hODYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVHGfvlCncQSe1Q7wzDgPmErHFmpLfrb8o9-m-m5a-Q=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111516939/557540391/896231865?refcode=em-7.15.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzI3OWQwYS1hODYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVHGfvlCncQSe1Q7wzDgPmErHFmpLfrb8o9-m-m5a-Q=)

name: Team Benson
subject: Can Jocelyn count on you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
This is a small but meaningful way to show your support.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=505%2E181023%2EdRxDD2)
Since Jocelyn launched her campaign for governor, people across Michigan (and across the country) have stepped up to say: _**We’re with you.**_
From union members to state lawmakers, voting rights advocates to local leaders, this campaign is already being powered by a broad and growing coalition. Organizations like EMILYs List, End Citizens United, and Vote Mama PAC are backing Jocelyn. So are flight attendants, grocery workers, and elected leaders from Kalamazoo to Traverse City.
But the endorsement we want the most today is yours.
**[Will you sign on now to become a grassroots endorser of Jocelyn Benson for Governor?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/Endorse_july2025?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250715_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=505%2E181023%2EdRxDD2)**
[ENDORSE JOCELYN](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/Endorse_july2025?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250715_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=505%2E181023%2EdRxDD2)
---
Grassroots endorsements don’t cost a cent, but they send a powerful message about the kind of campaign we’re building together. Jocelyn is running to make government work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. She’s focused on what really matters: protecting our democracy, lowering costs, and delivering results for all 83 counties.
**[She’s ready to bring her principled, effective leadership to the Governor’s Office. Today, she wants to know if she can count on your support. Will you offer your personal endorsement?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/Endorse_july2025?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250715_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=505%2E181023%2EdRxDD2)**

Thanks for stepping up.
— Team Benson

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: We are facing a constitutional crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Our Constitution is crystal clear: it is the job of Congress, not the president, to design and fund our federal agencies.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111517252/557541068/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTEyOTY1ZC1hODYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JpeWBKVJKL3E-7LrgN0XklctJ4rJRMmlX7LN-R5x9Vw=&emci=1ee1151b-a561-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3512965d-a861-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)
---

| | We are facing a constitutional crisis. Donald Trump, with the support of an increasingly complicit right-wing majority on the Supreme Court, is attacking the very foundation of our democracy: the separation of powers. Trump has begun dismantling key federal agencies by impounding funds allocated by Congress — like those for USAID — and mass-firing federal workers in departments like the Department of Education. **These actions are blatantly unconstitutional.** Our Constitution is crystal clear: it is the job of Congress, not the president, to create and fund our federal agencies. When a president willfully ignores this and the Supreme Court rubber-stamps it, we are no longer a nation of laws. Justice Sonia Sotomayor put it powerfully in her recent dissent after the Supreme Court cleared the way for the Trump administration to gut the Department of Education: This is straight out of the playbook for authoritarian regimes: concentrate power in the executive, eliminate independent institutions, and silence dissent. We cannot allow it to happen here. I'm fighting to defend the Constitution and demand accountability, and I need you with me. Keep speaking out, showing up, and calling out the corruption. If the Court won't defend the Constitution, We the People have to. clean_body: Our Constitution is crystal clear: it is the job of Congress, not the president, to design and fund our federal agencies. | | | | We are facing a constitutional crisis. Donald Trump, with the support of an increasingly complicit right-wing majority on the Supreme Court, is attacking the very foundation of our democracy: the separation of powers. Trump has begun dismantling key federal agencies by impounding funds allocated by Congress — like those for USAID — and mass-firing federal workers in departments like the Department of Education. These actions are blatantly unconstitutional. Our Constitution is crystal clear: it is the job of Congress, not the president, to create and fund our federal agencies. When a president willfully ignores this and the Supreme Court rubber-stamps it, we are no longer a nation of laws. Justice Sonia Sotomayor put it powerfully in her recent dissent after the Supreme Court cleared the way for the Trump administration to gut the Department of Education: This is straight out of the playbook for authoritarian regimes: concentrate power in the executive, eliminate independent institutions, and silence dissent. We cannot allow it to happen here. I'm fighting to defend the Constitution and demand accountability, and I need you with me. Keep speaking out, showing up, and calling out the corruption. If the Court won't defend the Constitution, We the People have to.
