name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 7/15/2025
body:
What’s inside the ‘Big Beautiful Bill’—and why it’s a game-changer for families and freedom
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado’s housing crisis is deepening, with the state ranking[ ]()[third in the nation for rent and fifth for home prices](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). A new zoning report blames restrictive land-use codes, outdated parking rules, and limits on multifamily housing for choking supply. Meanwhile in Aurora, a registered sex offender was arrested for allegedly trying to [kidnap a child on school grounds](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—raising serious questions about campus security.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Confidence in federal agencies is plunging. The FBI has launched a [“grand conspiracy” probe](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) into alleged collusion between intel agencies and Democrat operatives, while newly declassified CIA files show [JFK investigators were misled](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) about Oswald’s ties to a CIA-backed group. Meanwhile, Trump is [ending taxpayer-funded tuition for illegal immigrants](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and restricting benefits across 13 federal programs—tightening his “America First” policy.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** The COvid Chronicles reflect on June 2020, when protests were praised and [police were kneecapped](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Heidi Ganahl also [unpacks the “Big Beautiful Bill,”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) a bold conservative package combining tax cuts, work mandates, and defense funding to reshape everything from childcare to national security.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, July 15, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Ganahl: What’s inside the ‘Big Beautiful Bill’—and why it’s a game-changer for families and freedom](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY HEIDI GANAHL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
They’re calling it the “Big Beautiful Bill”—and whether you love it or hate it, it’s the boldest shakeup to our tax and spending system since Trump’s 2017 tax cuts. Officially titled the Tax Relief for American Families and Workers Act, this legislation does a lot: extends the Trump tax cuts, rewrites how safety net programs work, beefs up border and defense spending, and trims down the green energy handouts.
There’s plenty to cheer—and plenty to argue over. Here’s a quick tour of what’s in the final version.
The Big Beautiful Bill locks in the 2017 marginal rate cuts and doubles the standard deduction, giving most families broad-based relief. The Child Tax Credit also gets a temporary $200 bump to $2,200 per child from 2025 to 2028. And to make things easier for mixed-status households, only one parent and the child need a Social Security number for eligibility under joint filing.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[The COvid Chronicles June 16-23, 2020: Social justice got a platform—police got massive reform](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* In June 2020, public health officials continued to justify large-scale social justice protests while maintaining strict lockdown rules for religious gatherings and businesses, revealing glaring inconsistencies in pandemic policy enforcement.
* Colorado Democrats swiftly passed sweeping police reform through SB20-217, curtailing qualified immunity, increasing body camera requirements, and changing use-of-force standards—with little public debate or bipartisan input.
* The piece underscores how the pandemic became a vehicle for radical political change, enabling dramatic reforms and censorship under the guise of emergency powers.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Registered Sex Offender Breaches Colorado School Grounds in Alleged Kidnapping Attempt](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A registered sex offender, Solomon Galligan, was arrested after allegedly attempting to kidnap a child at Black Forest Hills Elementary in Aurora, Colorado.
* Galligan reportedly approached several students during recess and tried to grab one before fleeing; he was later identified and taken into custody.
* Parents are outraged at the school's response, criticizing delayed communication and raising concerns about safety protocols.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Devotional: The compass that always points to truth](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER****| COMMENTARY | JULY 13** _I’ll never forget the sting of the Texas sun at Camp Bullis, just outside of San Antonio. It was the next phase of my training, following Basic Training and the Police Academy at Lackland Air Force Base. This training wasn’t just about learning the ins and outs of the M60 machine gun or polishing our field discipline—it was survival training in its rawest form. Out there in the wild terrain, you either adapted or you got lost. Literally._
__
**[O’Reilly and Minary: What Douglas County’s Home Rule vote revealed—and how we move forward](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY CHUCK O'REILLY & RUSS MINARY | COMMENTARY | JULY 11** _Voters in Douglas County turned down the proposed Home Rule initiative by a wide margin—71% to 29%. But the result wasn’t simply a rejection of the idea itself. It also reflected deeper concerns about how the process unfolded and how residents were—or weren’t—brought into the conversation. It revealed how important transparency, timing and public trust are in shaping major decisions about the future of our county._
__
**[Garbo: Sheriff Darren Weekly is the exception that proves the GOP’s problem](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY C. J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | JULY 11** _In 2022, Darren Weekly wasn’t supposed to win. At least not according to the self-appointed gatekeepers of Republican purity in Douglas County. Branded a “RINO,” derided as “Tony 2.0,” and accused of being soft on Second Amendment rights due to the endorsement of outgoing Sheriff Tony Spurlock, Weekly was the target of aggressive intra-party attacks._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🍊 DID YOU KNOW?** **The first oranges weren’t orange.** The original oranges from Southeast Asia were actually green, not orange. In tropical climates like Vietnam and Thailand, they often stay green even when fully ripe—thanks to the region’s warm temperatures preventing the peel from turning orange.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Power always thinks it has a great soul and vast views beyond the comprehension of the weak; and that it is doing God's service when it is violating all his laws." – John Adams

This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, July 15, 2025. – Team RMV | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY HEIDI GANAHL, They’re calling it the “Big Beautiful Bill”—and whether you love it or hate it, it’s the boldest shakeup to our tax and spending system since Trump’s 2017 tax cuts. Officially titled the Tax Relief for American Families and Workers Act, this legislation does a lot: extends the Trump tax cuts, rewrites how safety net programs work, beefs up border and defense spending, and trims down the green energy handouts. There’s plenty to cheer—and plenty to argue over. Here’s a quick tour of what’s in the final version. The Big Beautiful Bill locks in the 2017 marginal rate cuts and doubles the standard deduction, giving most families broad-based relief. The Child Tax Credit also gets a temporary $200 bump to $2,200 per child from 2025 to 2028. And to make things easier for mixed-status households, only one parent and the child need a Social Security number for eligibility under joint filing. | In June 2020, public health officials continued to justify large-scale social justice protests while maintaining strict lockdown rules for religious gatherings and businesses, revealing glaring inconsistencies in pandemic policy enforcement. Colorado Democrats swiftly passed sweeping police reform through SB20-217, curtailing qualified immunity, increasing body camera requirements, and changing use-of-force standards—with little public debate or bipartisan input. Here’s the deal: Blakeman quietly extended a no-bid contract for former Congressman Peter King – his political ally and campaign supporter – to act as a “confidential adviser” on counterterrorism. **The price tag? $192,000 so far.** No competitive process. No legislative oversight. No justification beyond a vague claim that it’s “sensitive legal work.”

**Let’s call it what it is: a political handout.**

Blakeman is treating Nassau like his own personal ATM – rewarding friends while families are getting crushed by the highest taxes in the country. He’s now handed out over half a million dollars in no-bid contracts, and we’re supposed to believe this is about “security”? Please.

**I’m running to end this nonsense.** To stop the cronyism. To stand up for families who are tired of watching their money wasted on secretive deals and political favors.

But I can’t do it alone. We’re up against the Nassau GOP machine, and they’ll do whatever it takes to protect Blakeman and the insiders cashing in.

**[Will you pitch in now to power our fight? Click here to contribute.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111519472/557544495/-1414184198?contactdata=cJn55AD4hc1HMccxAwg/Vxr7gzmc05c3IDvSOjK/ZnRO9XP1E+NH6xWxPw9ak1bcMJkfqXsT0ovdLkcsZo+b7VdZSzkI6DLjvg20oOyt7aI=&am=50&amtOpts=&recurringAm=50&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&left_to_give=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2VmYTg4NWEtYWI2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C_RqMZlSzsGDG8rnkLUjUMQ9BKQvuPTkshRk42ImqWQ=&emci=0dc3d353-a461-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3efa885a-ab61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17551891)**

Let’s take back Nassau for the people – not the political elite.

Thank you,
Seth Koslow

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111519590/557544842/273633830?refcode=250715_Jasmine_Serve&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDEyN2Y5MC1hYjYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=573JgRO1LTrHEmSrHRO5dW7XnykMYdaS4NHGCKbp2VM=) Folks House Republicans just passed one of the most horrifying pieces of legislation I’ve ever seen — ripping health care and food away from millions of Americans in need. And to my Republican colleagues who helped pass that bill into law, there’s been one question on my mind: _**If you’re not here to serve your constituents — then why are you here?**_ It’s clear they’re working harder for billionaires than for the people who actually sent them here, and that they’ve abandoned their oaths of office in exchange for a quick buck. I ran to protect our democracy, safeguard the rule of law, build a fairer economy, and fight for equality.
But it seems these Republicans ran for office for no reason other than to enrich themselves and their billionaire buddies. **And it’s time for them to go.**
[**Chip in a split donation any amount ASAP if you’re with me, and let’s get to work fixing what the Republicans broke. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111519605/557544863/-31074794?refcode=250715_Jasmine_Serve&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDEyN2Y5MC1hYjYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=573JgRO1LTrHEmSrHRO5dW7XnykMYdaS4NHGCKbp2VM=)

subject: PA - 07 will be in good hands with Carol Obando-Derstine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e2513d5-5736-46eb-8346-b66472f9823c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73295752-77c8-4bbb-8254-42af15084ac8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, it’s Susan Wild. I’m here to talk to you about my trusted friend, Carol Obando-Derstine, who is running for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 7th District. I won’t sugarcoat it: this race is going to be tough, but I know Carol is our best chance at flipping this district from red to blue. Before I tell you more about Carol, [**can I count on your support to help Carol lay the foundation for a winning campaign and defeat Ryan Mackenzie in 2026? Split a donation between ****Blue Amp Action**** and Carol today.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d3a64b7-9d2e-4e27-b4dc-afffcc4fa10d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f17f55f-5177-45f0-97a6-af6617c76dea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I’m lucky to know this community better than most. I’ve lived in the Lehigh Valley for more than three decades: it’s the only place I’ve ever truly called home. I love the Lehigh Valley – and I trust Carol to fight for it in Congress, just like I did. I also know firsthand how tough it is to win here. The NRCC and dark money groups poured millions into electing Ryan Mackenzie last year – a career politician who’s more focused on giving tax cuts to billionaires than helping families at home put food on the table –and they’ll spend even more to keep him there. Carol’s not a career politician: she’s a mother, an engineer, and a community leader who has dedicated her career to helping others. She has spent the last two decades in this district working with people, small businesses, and nonprofits, striving to create a community that works for everyone. Carol understands the issues facing this district, and I know she has what it takes to win. But this is a **_toss-up_** , which means it’s going to be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country. It also means that it’s one of our best chances at taking back the House majority. [**This is our moment to bring real representation back to the district. Will you split a contribution today and join me in supporting Carol as she takes on Ryan Mackenzie in the race for Pennsylvania’s 7th district?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1182f7ed-881c-4543-82a0-49414358ef10/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Dana Criswell
subject: Mississippi's Involuntary Annexation: The Olive Branch Saga and Calls for Reform
body:
In Mississippi, cities can forcibly annex unincorporated areas without the consent of residents. Senator Mike McLendon is fighting to protect your rights against local politicians who want more of your money.

# [Mississippi's Involuntary Annexation: The Olive Branch Saga and Calls for Reform](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=168400206&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NDAwMjA2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTI2MDUzMjMsImV4cCI6MTc1NTE5NzMyMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.l-stwchjzQxkN2ri-Mm3hM5VKi935yCQ7e8bJD3zoAQ)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c74e83d9-8ec2-4910-a8a3-7d61f585c13d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In Mississippi, cities can forcibly annex unincorporated areas without the consent of residents, as outlined in Title 21, Chapter 1 of the state code. The process begins with a municipal ordinance specifying the targeted territory, promised services like police and utilities, and planned improvements. Notice is published in local newspapers for just three weeks, after which the city petitions chancery court.
A hearing permits objections from affected parties, but no resident vote is mandated. Instead, the chancellor assesses "reasonableness" using 12 criterion set by the Mississippi Supreme Court, including the city's growth needs, financial capacity, health hazards, zoning compatibility, and economic impacts.
Critically, the will of those being annexed is not a factor. If approved, the annexation takes effect swiftly, imposing higher city taxes, stricter regulations, and urban oversight.
The 2021 Olive Branch annexation vividly exposes these flaws. The city aimed to absorb 41 square miles of DeSoto County, later reduced amid fierce pushback. Residents and DeSoto County officials rallied against it, with objectors decrying potential tax increases, erosion of rural liberties--such as keeping livestock--and the adequacy of existing county services.
Supervisor Michael Lee cautioned that "there's a lot of freedoms you have in the county... Once Olive Branch takes you in, there's new rules."
Chancellor Percy Lynchard weighted the factors: growth and health supported expansion, but zoning and economics leaned against. On April 5, 2021, he approved 18.5 square miles, effective May 28, while lambasting the law as "grossly inequitable" for compelling residents to wage expensive legal wars against resource-heavy cities without a say. Areas like Center Hill and Lewisburg were engulfed, leaving locals disgruntled over unforeseen costs and alterations.
This system erodes democracy and property rights, subjecting citizens to "taxation without representation." Tax burdens can surge by 50% or more, disrupting lifestyles absent any ballot input.
In Olive Branch, objectors shouldered hefty litigation fees, underscoring a tilted scale favoring municipalities. It invites revenue-hungry expansions that may sideline minorities by weakening their electoral influence and forcing unwanted development.
Lynchard's rebuke highlights a deeper injustice: prioritizing municipal growth over consent in a self-determination era.Reform is imperative. Maryland, for instance, demands at least 25% resident consent.
Mississippi's 2025 bills, like SB2428 authored by Senator Mike McLendon, pushed for mandatory elections in annexed zones but faltered in committee. Bills like Senator McLendon's bill are often opposed by mayors who have a desire to expand their rule and power.
Legislators must stand for the rights of citizens and institute referendums, perhaps with objection thresholds triggering votes, to empower communities and halt abuses, fostering consensual, equitable progress. Without action, disputes like Olive Branch will breed ongoing rifts.
Today, Olive Branch Mayor Ken Adams, Southaven Mayor Darren Musselwhite, and Hernando Mayor Chip Johnson are endorsing candidates who will do whatever the mayors demand and opposing incumbent Mike McLendon, who has championed citizens' rights and freedoms. McClendon was a leader in the fight protecting the rights of county residents who found themselves without a voice against the deep pockets of government.
This signals renewed annexation pushes, as big-government mayors seem insatiable for your dollars. Mississippi must modernize to protect freedoms and rebuild faith, and politicians who care more about their power and money are not the answer.
**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**
[Pledge your support](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFuYWNyaXN3ZWxsLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.4bOMg6VIAbDXk2hpIYyHBhbqcISaeMPNQyYo3eItadY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168400206)

Pete Ricketts. Jon Husted. Markwayne Mullin. Lindsey Graham. Mike Rounds. Bill Hagerty. John Cornyn. Shelley Moore Capito. Cynthia Lummis. These Senators just voted to strip millions of Americans off of their health insurance and have put families who rely on SNAP at risk — all to give the ultra-wealthy a fat tax cut.We need to hold them accountable. If we can hold on to seats currently held by Democrats in states like Georgia and Michigan, and flip just FOUR of these GOP-held Senate seats, we can Flip the Senate and stop Trump’s billionaire-first agenda. But we know Donald Trump and his allies are going to spend BIG to defend these seats and expand their majority. clean_body: | | | The disastrous cuts to Medicaid and Obamacare in Trump's big, ugly bill have triggered an alarming healthcare crisis in small towns across America. More than are at risk of closing. Clinics and hospitals have already begun closing their doors, leaving countless individuals, including people with disabilities, without access to essential medical services. At Able Dems, we recognize the urgent need for transformative change. We work to elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies, who prioritize healthcare access and champion the fundamental rights of all individuals. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. A rural clinic in Southwest Nebraska recently due to anticipated Medicaid cuts, reflecting a broad and troubling trend that endangers the well-being of our communities. A small 25 bed hospital in has already started making cuts. As healthcare resources become increasingly scarce, the lives of those in rural areas are precariously affected. People will be forced to travel hours to get needed care, which is particularly difficult for individuals with disabilities. Together, we can uphold our dignity and safeguard our lives in the face of adversity. **** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. name: Pennsylvania Democratic Party
subject: Shapiro and Beshear won't back down — will you stand with them?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
**Peter, states are the last line of defense for democracy, and Pennsylvania is on the front lines.**

When Trump froze over $1.2 billion in critical federal funding to Pennsylvania, Governor Josh Shapiro fought back with a federal lawsuit. Kentucky's Governor Andy Beshear joined the fight alongside him, proving Democratic governors are standing together against Trump's overreach.

**But we need more than just a great governor.** **We need our courts to fight back too.** This November, three Democratic justices on our state Supreme Court face retention elections. Republicans are targeting them, hoping to shift the court's majority and undermine judicial independence.

**Shapiro and Beshear are proving Democratic leadership works, but they can't do it alone.**

**[Peter, will you split a donation between Pennsylvania Democrats and the Kentucky Democratic Party to support the governors leading the resistance and help us protect our courts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111522306/557551867/446177840?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250715_FR_KentuckySplit_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODg5MDk3Yi1hZjYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vxZpC43mlKCuSTQfawg2-es8dLxsg14vcXujbqcoQkM=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and split between PA Dems and the Kentucky Democratic Party.

name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: President Trump needs your help
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xql6qc10ltquhss03v3kdd111016f2e34ptkt85gdethnjhjl64s7pphpn3q7bhvh4lfgdvlb5o3uvsbcf59hc54pm&__stmp=szgg3p&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor, the National Right to Work Committee.
* * *
|
Dear Fellow Taxpayer,

I am going to share with you Washington DC's dirtiest secret.

Federal union bosses have seized control of the federal workforce and declared President Trump and Elon Musk ENEMY #1 and #2 for fighting to "Drain the Swamp" and save hundreds of billions of tax dollars by downsizing and reforming the bloated DC bureaucracy!

You see, union control of government is a CANCER killing the U.S. taxpayer -- impoverishing America's workers and entrepreneurs with red tape, wasteful spending and soaring inflation.

Using tens of millions of dollars seized from workers' paychecks, Big Labor's federal union bosses are orchestrating virtually every howl of outrage, protest and lawsuit against Donald Trump's and Elon Musk's cutbacks and reforms. . .

. . .paying for the lawyers, the plaintiffs, the lawsuits and the activists you see on TV marching and screaming into bullhorns. That's why I hope you will _STAND UP TODAY FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP'S CRUSADE to slay the Union-Boss DC Dragon guarding "the Swamp" in Washington_.

Please agree to sign your PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT to President Trump, Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency and your U.S. Senators and Congressman. I'll give you a link to your petition in a moment, but I want to be sure you understand how serious this is.

_President Trump is fighting valiantly to tame the out-of-control federal bureaucracy. And he needs to know he has YOUR FULL SUPPORT to stand firm_ when the Swamp Rats in Washington lash out.

And perhaps even more importantly, please _sign your petitions DEMANDING your U.S. Senators and Congressman support President Trump's crusade_ with every vote they cast!

The fact is government union bosses are the real puppet-masters pulling the strings behind the curtain in the "DC Swamp."

That's why you and I must PROVE to President Trump (and my colleagues here in the Senate and House) that _the American people OVERWHELMINGLY support his reforms and will not tolerate any more obstructionism, excuses or gridlock_!

Donald Trump and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (popularly known as DOGE) are exposing the scandals and corruption government union officials have been hiding for decades:
---
$$$ Did you know that _only 6% of federal bureaucrats show up_ in person for a full work week? (And that figure drops to 1% if you take out janitors, security guards, and maintenance personnel!)
$$$ Can you believe that _government union big shots are PAID with YOUR tax dollars to conduct so-called "official union business" -- COSTING TAXPAYERS NEARLY A QUARTER OF A BILLION TAX DOLLARS A YEAR_?
$$$ Were you aware that federal office buildings cost $15.7 BILLION annually just to keep the doors open? And that _only 12% of federal office space is even occupied_?
$$$ Are you outraged to learn federal law effectively bars open shop, non-union contractors from bidding on federal public works projects -- _soaking American taxpayers for an estimated $21.7 billion a year in inflated construction costs_?
$$$ Did you know that if a conscientious public servant does a good job and their supervisor awards them a merit-pay bonus (or tries to fire or discipline an incompetent bureaucrat) without "going through the union" that would be a VIOLATION OF FEDERAL LABOR RULES?!?
$$$ Are you angry that in 2021, JOE BIDEN BESTOWED $130 BILLION UPON TEACHER UNION RADICALS who are brainwashing our kids!
The fact is _government union czars are the single biggest obstacle President Trump must overcome_ to cut out-of-control government spending and flagrant waste, fraud and abuse.

**[That's why I hope you will CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT TODAY](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=tvtytteug6a84pu9qdlzvgf57helhzi93z6nexeyw0jdqh4gekz0eyptwi7fiu7gy9qmoumeutsyybu363vp1n4x5b9ugox0mv7sl55oujv7hokwctwg39qm1md7zy2fpt6z0e29f0anb1hfnaleeruu0gu7m62dl497xhjfmykr96z3km1n83w0488oe193xjf4raxzxs19x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szgg3p&__onlt=h)**!

As soon as their handpicked political cronies lost the elections, GOVERNMENT UNION OFFICIALS IMMEDIATELY VOWED TO BLOCK TRUMP'S REFORMS.

You see, President Trump is not only standing up to the liberal media and the radical Democrats, he's taking on the _unelected czars who secretly rule our government from within_.

Union officials I bet you've never even heard of -- like Everett Kelly.

He's not a Member of Congress. Not a Governor nor a Senator. No voter has ever cast a ballot for him.

And yet he rules Washington DC with an iron fist from his throne atop the largest government union, the American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE).

_The AFGE chieftain rules an empire of nearly a million government workers paid an average of $118,260 per year, costing taxpayers an estimated $97.4 BILLION ANNUALLY_.

Donald Trump and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency are exposing outrage after outrage committed by federal union bosses like AFGE President Everett Kelly:
\--- AFGE Council 220 President Witold Skwierczynski _COLLECTED A PAYCHECK FROM THE SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION FOR 34 YEARS WITHOUT WORKING A SINGLE HOUR_!

He couldn't have gone to work if he'd tried because _he was banned from Social Security offices nationwide after sending A PHOTO OF HIS PENIS_ to a fellow employee at 2 o'clock in the morning! He only quit because Trump's executive order required him and other union officials to (in his words) go "back to our desks to process claims."

Now, he's collecting a full pension "close to equal to my salary."
\--- The Federal Mediation and Conciliation Service played "the heavy" to force workers and employers to knuckle under to union-boss demands. The agency reportedly was "_RIFE WITH CORRUPTION" whose staffers "LIVED LIKE KINGS_." Despite having only 60 employees (many of whose offices had ENSUITE BATHROOMS WITH PRIVATE SHOWERS!), the FMCS occupied a _nine-story office tower_ on DC's posh K Street.
According to the Daily Wire, for years the agency's Director _billed the taxpayer for his meals and living expenses, claiming to be on a "years-long business trip" to DC_.
\--- Corrupt union officials are notorious for treating worker pension funds like their own lavish piggybanks. MANY union pension plans are teetering on the verge of insolvency. So JOE BIDEN BILKED THE TAXPAYER FOR $32 BILLION TO BAIL-OUT A SINGLE TEAMSTER UNION PENSION FUND.

That's bad enough. But instead of placing the pension into receivership under government oversight, _he left the foxes in charge of the henhouse_!
**[CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=tvtytteug6a84pu9qdlzvgf57helhzi93z6nexeyw0jdqh4gekz0eyptwi7fiu7gy9qmoumeutsyybu363vp1n4x5b9ugox0mv7sl55oujv7hokwctwg39qm1md7zy2fpt6z0e29f0anb1hfnaleeruu0gu7m62dl497xhjfmykr96z3km1n83w0488oe193xjf4raxzxs19x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szgg3p&__onlt=h)**.

How did Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats let it come to this? Well, they were well compensated. . .

Organized Labor poured an estimated $25 BILLION into the last elections to defeat Donald Trump and elect Kamala Harris -- and other radical Democrats like her!

You see, federal workers are REQUIRED BY LAW to submit to the so-called "representation" of well-heeled union bigwigs _whether they like it or not_. Federal law gives union officials power over workers WHO AREN'T EVEN UNION MEMBERS!

_Most government bureaucrats figured out long ago that THEY DON'T REALLY WORK FOR THE TAXPAYER, NOR EVEN THE PRESIDENT... THEY WORK FOR THE UNION BOSSES_. Plain and simple.

President Trump knows he can't "Drain the Swamp" until we support his efforts to "Slay the Union-Boss DC Dragon."

The Union-Boss Dragon should be stripped bare:
\--- NO Monopoly Bargaining power over any federal employee.
\--- NO money deducted from any federal worker's or contractor's paycheck.
\--- NO authority to negotiate salaries, wages, job rules, promotion, firing or hiring.
\--- NO privileged status in winning multiple-billion dollar federal contracts.
\--- NO payment for work except for the US taxpayer, not a union.
**[CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=tvtytteug6a84pu9qdlzvgf57helhzi93z6nexeyw0jdqh4gekz0eyptwi7fiu7gy9qmoumeutsyybu363vp1n4x5b9ugox0mv7sl55oujv7hokwctwg39qm1md7zy2fpt6z0e29f0anb1hfnaleeruu0gu7m62dl497xhjfmykr96z3km1n83w0488oe193xjf4raxzxs19x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szgg3p&__onlt=h)**.

But government union chiefs are so powerful and so entrenched, _I will need more than your petitions to slay the union bigwigs' DC Dragon_.

That's why I've joined forces with the National Right to Work Committee. When it comes to fighting AND BEATING corrupt union officials, they are the experts.

And that's why I hope you'll not only sign your petition but also make a generous contribution of $25, $50, $100 or even $1,000 today to help the National Right to Work Committee EXPAND their nationwide campaign to prove to my colleagues in Washington, DC that politicians should fear "We, The People" more than "inside the Beltway" union politicos.

I don't know what you can afford to give today. Maybe for you a contribution of $25 or $50 is a stretch. I know for others $500 or $1000 will not be too much.

After you sign your petition, I ask you to be as generous as you can.

_You see, this Petition Drive is just the first step of a nationwide grassroots lobbying program_ to focus public pressure like a laser-beam on key Senators and Congressmen to END UNION BOSS CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT!

The National Right to Work Committee needs your financial support today to:
1\. GATHER THREE MILLION PETITIONS SUPPORTING DONALD TRUMP AND ELON MUSK'S DOGE and urging lawmakers to END UNION BOSS CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT and end it NOW!
2\. Launch a publicity and media campaign with news conferences, editorial board meetings, and op-eds by respected commentators and opinion leaders.
3\. Mail, text, use social media and email millions of taxpayers to turn up the heat on wavering politicians to get off the fence and do their jobs to curb and corral the out-of-control government workforce.
4\. And funds permitting, air costly hard-hitting TV, radio and Internet ads (especially on Fox News and Fox Radio, and local conservative talk!) to generate MILLIONS of letters, phone calls and texts to Capitol Hill demanding Big Labor's monopoly bargaining powers over the federal workforce be repealed.

But the Swamp Creatures in DC and my colleagues on Capitol Hill will never allow President Trump to slay Big Labor's DC Dragon without your support NOW.

**[CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION AND MAKE A GENEROUS CONTRIBUTION OF $25, $50, $100 OR EVEN $1,000 TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=tvtytteug6a84pu9qdlzvgf57helhzi93z6nexeyw0jdqh4gekz0eyptwi7fiu7gy9qmoumeutsyybu363vp1n4x5b9ugox0mv7sl55oujv7hokwctwg39qm1md7zy2fpt6z0e29f0anb1hfnaleeruu0gu7m62dl497xhjfmykr96z3km1n83w0488oe193xjf4raxzxs19x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szgg3p&__onlt=h)**.

_ALL SO PRIVILEGED UNION BULLIES CAN PAD THEIR WALLETS WITH OUR HARD-EARNED DOLLARS AND PAY OFF THEIR FAR-LEFT POLITICAL PALS_!

In order to "drain the swamp," you and I must unite together TODAY to help President Trump slay the DC Union-Boss Dragon.

FOR LIBERTY,

U.S. Senator Rand Paul

P.S. JOIN WITH ME TODAY IN SUPPORT OF PRESIDENT TRUMP and Elon Musk's crusade to slay Big Labor's DC Swamp Dragon. **[CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=tvtytteug6a84pu9qdlzvgf57helhzi93z6nexeyw0jdqh4gekz0eyptwi7fiu7gy9qmoumeutsyybu363vp1n4x5b9ugox0mv7sl55oujv7hokwctwg39qm1md7zy2fpt6z0e29f0anb1hfnaleeruu0gu7m62dl497xhjfmykr96z3km1n83w0488oe193xjf4raxzxs19x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szgg3p&__onlt=h)**.

clean_body: Please read the message below from our sponsor, the National Right to Work Committee. | Dear Fellow Taxpayer, I am going to share with you Washington DC's dirtiest secret. Federal union bosses have seized control of the federal workforce and declared President Trump and Elon Musk ENEMY #1 and #2 for fighting to "Drain the Swamp" and save hundreds of billions of tax dollars by downsizing and reforming the bloated DC bureaucracy! You see, union control of government is a CANCER killing the U.S. taxpayer -- impoverishing America's workers and entrepreneurs with red tape, wasteful spending and soaring inflation. Using tens of millions of dollars seized from workers' paychecks, Big Labor's federal union bosses are orchestrating virtually every howl of outrage, protest and lawsuit against Donald Trump's and Elon Musk's cutbacks and reforms. . . . . .paying for the lawyers, the plaintiffs, the lawsuits and the activists you see on TV marching and screaming into bullhorns. That's why I hope you will STAND UP TODAY FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP'S CRUSADE to slay the Union-Boss DC Dragon guarding "the Swamp" in Washington. Please agree to sign your PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT to President Trump, Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency and your U.S. Senators and Congressman. I'll give you a link to your petition in a moment, but I want to be sure you understand how serious this is. President Trump is fighting valiantly to tame the out-of-control federal bureaucracy. And he needs to know he has YOUR FULL SUPPORT to stand firm when the Swamp Rats in Washington lash out. And perhaps even more importantly, please sign your petitions DEMANDING your U.S. Senators and Congressman support President Trump's crusade with every vote they cast! The fact is government union bosses are the real puppet-masters pulling the strings behind the curtain in the "DC Swamp." That's why you and I must PROVE to President Trump (and my colleagues here in the Senate and House) that the American people OVERWHELMINGLY support his reforms and will not tolerate any more obstructionism, excuses or gridlock! Donald Trump and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (popularly known as DOGE) are exposing the scandals and corruption government union officials have been hiding for decades: $$$ Did you know that only 6% of federal bureaucrats show up in person for a full work week? (And that figure drops to 1% if you take out janitors, security guards, and maintenance personnel!) $$$ Can you believe that government union big shots are PAID with YOUR tax dollars to conduct so-called "official union business" -- COSTING TAXPAYERS NEARLY A QUARTER OF A BILLION TAX DOLLARS A YEAR? $$$ Were you aware that federal office buildings cost $15.7 BILLION annually just to keep the doors open? And that only 12% of federal office space is even occupied? $$$ Are you outraged to learn federal law effectively bars open shop, non-union contractors from bidding on federal public works projects -- soaking American taxpayers for an estimated $21.7 billion a year in inflated construction costs? $$$ Did you know that if a conscientious public servant does a good job and their supervisor awards them a merit-pay bonus (or tries to fire or discipline an incompetent bureaucrat) without "going through the union" that would be a VIOLATION OF FEDERAL LABOR RULES?!? $$$ Are you angry that in 2021, JOE BIDEN BESTOWED $130 BILLION UPON TEACHER UNION RADICALS who are brainwashing our kids! The fact is government union czars are the single biggest obstacle President Trump must overcome to cut out-of-control government spending and flagrant waste, fraud and abuse. ! As soon as their handpicked political cronies lost the elections, GOVERNMENT UNION OFFICIALS IMMEDIATELY VOWED TO BLOCK TRUMP'S REFORMS. You see, President Trump is not only standing up to the liberal media and the radical Democrats, he's taking on the unelected czars who secretly rule our government from within. Union officials I bet you've never even heard of -- like Everett Kelly. He's not a Member of Congress. Not a Governor nor a Senator. No voter has ever cast a ballot for him. And yet he rules Washington DC with an iron fist from his throne atop the largest government union, the American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE). The AFGE chieftain rules an empire of nearly a million government workers paid an average of $118,260 per year, costing taxpayers an estimated $97.4 BILLION ANNUALLY. Donald Trump and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency are exposing outrage after outrage committed by federal union bosses like AFGE President Everett Kelly: \--- AFGE Council 220 President Witold Skwierczynski COLLECTED A PAYCHECK FROM THE SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION FOR 34 YEARS WITHOUT WORKING A SINGLE HOUR! He couldn't have gone to work if he'd tried because he was banned from Social Security offices nationwide after sending A PHOTO OF HIS PENIS to a fellow employee at 2 o'clock in the morning! He only quit because Trump's executive order required him and other union officials to (in his words) go "back to our desks to process claims." Now, he's collecting a full pension "close to equal to my salary." \--- The Federal Mediation and Conciliation Service played "the heavy" to force workers and employers to knuckle under to union-boss demands. The agency reportedly was "RIFE WITH CORRUPTION" whose staffers "LIVED LIKE KINGS." Despite having only 60 employees (many of whose offices had ENSUITE BATHROOMS WITH PRIVATE SHOWERS!), the FMCS occupied a nine-story office tower on DC's posh K Street. According to the Daily Wire, for years the agency's Director billed the taxpayer for his meals and living expenses, claiming to be on a "years-long business trip" to DC. \--- Corrupt union officials are notorious for treating worker pension funds like their own lavish piggybanks. MANY union pension plans are teetering on the verge of insolvency. So JOE BIDEN BILKED THE TAXPAYER FOR $32 BILLION TO BAIL-OUT A SINGLE TEAMSTER UNION PENSION FUND. That's bad enough. But instead of placing the pension into receivership under government oversight, he left the foxes in charge of the henhouse! . How did Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats let it come to this? Well, they were well compensated. . . Organized Labor poured an estimated $25 BILLION into the last elections to defeat Donald Trump and elect Kamala Harris -- and other radical Democrats like her! You see, federal workers are REQUIRED BY LAW to submit to the so-called "representation" of well-heeled union bigwigs whether they like it or not. Federal law gives union officials power over workers WHO AREN'T EVEN UNION MEMBERS! Most government bureaucrats figured out long ago that THEY DON'T REALLY WORK FOR THE TAXPAYER, NOR EVEN THE PRESIDENT... THEY WORK FOR THE UNION BOSSES. Plain and simple. President Trump knows he can't "Drain the Swamp" until we support his efforts to "Slay the Union-Boss DC Dragon." The Union-Boss Dragon should be stripped bare: \--- NO Monopoly Bargaining power over any federal employee. \--- NO money deducted from any federal worker's or contractor's paycheck. \--- NO authority to negotiate salaries, wages, job rules, promotion, firing or hiring. \--- NO privileged status in winning multiple-billion dollar federal contracts. \--- NO payment for work except for the US taxpayer, not a union. . But government union chiefs are so powerful and so entrenched, I will need more than your petitions to slay the union bigwigs' DC Dragon. That's why I've joined forces with the National Right to Work Committee. When it comes to fighting AND BEATING corrupt union officials, they are the experts. And that's why I hope you'll not only sign your petition but also make a generous contribution of $25, $50, $100 or even $1,000 today to help the National Right to Work Committee EXPAND their nationwide campaign to prove to my colleagues in Washington, DC that politicians should fear "We, The People" more than "inside the Beltway" union politicos. I don't know what you can afford to give today. Maybe for you a contribution of $25 or $50 is a stretch. I know for others $500 or $1000 will not be too much. After you sign your petition, I ask you to be as generous as you can. You see, this Petition Drive is just the first step of a nationwide grassroots lobbying program to focus public pressure like a laser-beam on key Senators and Congressmen to END UNION BOSS CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT! The National Right to Work Committee needs your financial support today to: 1\. GATHER THREE MILLION PETITIONS SUPPORTING DONALD TRUMP AND ELON MUSK'S DOGE and urging lawmakers to END UNION BOSS CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT and end it NOW! 2\. Launch a publicity and media campaign with news conferences, editorial board meetings, and op-eds by respected commentators and opinion leaders. 3\. Mail, text, use social media and email millions of taxpayers to turn up the heat on wavering politicians to get off the fence and do their jobs to curb and corral the out-of-control government workforce. 4\. And funds permitting, air costly hard-hitting TV, radio and Internet ads (especially on Fox News and Fox Radio, and local conservative talk!) to generate MILLIONS of letters, phone calls and texts to Capitol Hill demanding Big Labor's monopoly bargaining powers over the federal workforce be repealed. That's why I am asking you to to let President Trump and Elon Musk's DOGE know they have your FULL SUPPORT AND GRATITUDE for taking on the out-of-control federal bureaucracy and the union-boss puppet masters, and DEMANDING your U.S. Senators and Congressman help the President bring our nation's unelected rulers in Washington to heel. But the Swamp Creatures in DC and my colleagues on Capitol Hill will never allow President Trump to slay Big Labor's DC Dragon without your support NOW. . Federal spending will continue to skyrocket. And so will the CRUSHING $36 TRILLION (and growing!) NATIONAL DEBT our grandchildren will wear like millstones around their necks. ALL SO PRIVILEGED UNION BULLIES CAN PAD THEIR WALLETS WITH OUR HARD-EARNED DOLLARS AND PAY OFF THEIR FAR-LEFT POLITICAL PALS! In order to "drain the swamp," you and I must unite together TODAY to help President Trump slay the DC Union-Boss Dragon. FOR LIBERTY, U.S. Senator Rand Paul P.S. JOIN WITH ME TODAY IN SUPPORT OF PRESIDENT TRUMP and Elon Musk's crusade to slay Big Labor's DC Swamp Dragon. . Federal union bosses are funding virtually every lawsuit, protester and organized opposition to Donald Trump's efforts to Make America Great Again! And they are doing it with YOUR TAXDOLLARS!!! _**THE STATE**_

Virginia is the ONLY state in the nation where Democrats can flip a Governor's seat blue in 2025.

Just four years ago, Republicans were elected to all three statewide offices: Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General. Now, Trump's allies are dumping money into Virginia to keep hold of power.

They know a Democratic win here would send _shockwaves_ across the country heading into 2026.

[_**Will you contribute to help us flip Virginia blue this November and set the tone for Democrats to win in the years ahead**_**?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111522635/557552573/906106360?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjMwYmIxMGItYjA2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GC8GyTEEPMrnxy6yFqAQMLexNglpXwUmP3jPgrdrsF8=)

---
* * *
_**THE CANDIDATES**_

**_Abigail Spanberger (D)_ **is our Democratic nominee for Governor. She's a former CIA officer and three-term Congresswoman who flipped a ruby red seat in 2018 and has fought to lower families' costs, secure our freedoms, and deliver on a common-sense agenda.

_Voters can trust that she'll put Virginians first and stand up to extremism._

subject: the BIGGEST fight of the 2026 election is already underway
body:
Georgia has been the tipping point in some of the biggest political fights of the last decade. Next election WILL be the same.
We've JUST learned that Trump’s allies are plotting a full-scale power grab in the MOST CRUCIAL SWING STATE of Georgia... and it’s ALREADY in motion!!!
A new report just revealed that Gov. Brian Kemp is quietly working to boost Trump’s preferred Senate candidate.
The goal? Flip Georgia red and cement Republican control of the Senate.
We’re doing everything we can to stop it — including launching an emergency fund to help shore up resources in Georgia and other battleground states. But we’re still $13,638 away from hitting our goal - can you help close the gap? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=071525_2]

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Families need our support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Republicans betrayed families in Hawaii and across the country when they passed Donald Trump’s Big Ugly Bill — and let’s not sugarcoat it, people will be hurt. Their bill kicks millions of people off their health care, slashes assistance for food, raises energy costs, rips money away from public schools, and more, just to cut taxes for billionaires. That’s why I’m meeting with state and local officials, coordinating with community partners, and working with service providers to blunt the harm the GOP’s bill will do to the people of Hawaii. But I’m also working to elect more Democrats to the Senate who will stand up to billionaires and deliver real progress for everyday Americans. Republicans have shown time and again that we cannot trust them to look out for working families, so we need to elect people who will. Republicans have billionaires on their side who are willing to dump enormous amounts of money into their campaigns so they can continue cutting their taxes and doing their bidding, which is why we need to continue growing this grassroots movement so we’ll have what it takes to fight back. **There’s a lot on the line, Peter, and what we do now will determine whether we can secure a Democratic majority next year that puts power back in the hands of families like yours. ** **[So I’m personally asking: will you please step up ahead of tonight’s mid-month deadline to help us reach our fundraising goal and flip the Senate next year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111522950/557553307/124025968?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250715_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWVjODBiZi1iMDYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xAUnxrpwRphhRk4bJ2CJU3napkBOZflCRORpDshIjiQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111522952/557553310/1126229899?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250715_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWVjODBiZi1iMDYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xAUnxrpwRphhRk4bJ2CJU3napkBOZflCRORpDshIjiQ=)

clean_body: | Peter, Republicans betrayed families in Hawaii and across the country when they passed Donald Trump’s Big Ugly Bill — and let’s not sugarcoat it, people will be hurt. Their bill kicks millions of people off their health care, slashes assistance for food, raises energy costs, rips money away from public schools, and more, just to cut taxes for billionaires. That’s why I’m meeting with state and local officials, coordinating with community partners, and working with service providers to blunt the harm the GOP’s bill will do to the people of Hawaii. But I’m also working to elect more Democrats to the Senate who will stand up to billionaires and deliver real progress for everyday Americans. Republicans have shown time and again that we cannot trust them to look out for working families, so we need to elect people who will. Republicans have billionaires on their side who are willing to dump enormous amounts of money into their campaigns so they can continue cutting their taxes and doing their bidding, which is why we need to continue growing this grassroots movement so we’ll have what it takes to fight back. There’s a lot on the line, Peter, and what we do now will determine whether we can secure a Democratic majority next year that puts power back in the hands of families like yours. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Folks like you have always been the backbone of this movement, and I wouldn’t have it any other way. Thank you. — Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

| | Dear Fellow American,

Do you approve of President Trump's performance?

President Trump has ignited a conservative revolution! So far, he has:
* Secured our borders, deported criminal illegal aliens, and informed so-called sanctuary cities that their federal funding is at risk if they continue to violate America's immigration laws.
* Exposed billions of dollars of government waste, fraud, and abuse.
* Smacked down the woke agenda...just to name a few!

Now, like wounded animals, the Washington establishment and the mainstream media are lashing out at the President . . . the Left is completely unhinged!

We must support President Trump in the face of these attacks now more than ever. Which is why I invite you to sign The Heritage Foundation's **National Vote of Confidence for President Trump**.

clean_body: The warning bells are ringing loud and clear: Jon Ossoff just announced he raised more than $10 million in the last three months and he’s got $15.5 million in the bank | Fellow Conservative, The warning bells are ringing loud and clear: Jon Ossoff just announced he raised more than $10 million in the last three months and he’s got $15.5 million in the bank to defeat me and push his liberal agenda. 98% of Ossoff’s donations came from small-dollar donors, meaning that liberals across the country are invested in keeping Georgia blue and crippling President Trump’s agenda. As I’ve said before, a tough campaign doesn’t scare me but six more years of Jon Ossoff does. He opposed one border security bill after another, voted against supporting Israel, and voted for letting men play women’s sports. He even wants to impeach President Trump. I’m tied with Ossoff in the polls, but if we can’t keep pace , our message will be drowned out and we’ll fall behind. We need a surge of small-dollar donations to keep our ads running, hire staff, travel the state, and win this campaign. - Jon Ossoff stands with Democrat party bosses and their radical base, not everyday Georgians. We can’t wait to put the pedal down. President Trump needs backup and Georgia needs a new senator. Thank you, Maj. Gen. John King (ret.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. name: Troy Downing HQ
subject: (1) URGENT - NATIONAL PRIORITY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We’re halfway through 2025. How can the GOP improve?

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,
As we begin a new era with the One Big Beautiful Bill passed and a Republican-led Trifecta in Washington, we want to hear directly from you, one of our strongest conservative voices.
Your input is critical to shaping our agenda and ensuring we stay laser-focused on the issues that matter most to patriotic Americans like you.
We're counting on your input to determine the Republican Party's **TOP PRIORITY** for the second half of 2025. Please take a moment to share your thoughts by taking our brief survey.
_**You can choose from the following (9) options:**_
* Immigration & Border Enforcement
* Tax Cuts & Fiscal Policy
* Energy & Environmental Regulation
* National Security & Defense Spending
* Election Integrity
* Parental Rights & Transgender Policy
* Second Amendment Protections
* Free Speech & Censorship
* Other (please explain)

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-DmDmg)Your voice matters, and your response will help guide our leadership to ensure we're fighting for the values and priorities that define the conservative movement.
Take the survey now and tell us your top priority for this term.
Thank you for helping us fight for the principles that matter most.
– Team Downing| |
---
Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense.

Billings, MT 59104

name: Katie Porter for California
subject: We’re $10,000 short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
If we want Katie to win–and make California more affordable while standing up to Trump–we need to put in the work now.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39897%2E3422442%2ETQRgAP)
Peter, **our mid-month fundraising deadline is at midnight** and we’re still $10,000 short of our goal.
Fundraising milestones like this help keep our campaign on track to elect Katie Porter as California’s next governor. **[Can you chip in $5 right now to help us close the gap?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250715_1_ak?refcode=em20250715-39897&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39897_3422442_TQRgAP&akid=39897%2E3422442%2ETQRgAP)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250715_1_ak?refcode=em20250715-39897&refcode2=39897_3422442_TQRgAP&akid=39897%2E3422442%2ETQRgAP)
If we want Katie to win–and make California more affordable while standing up to Trump–we need to put in the work _now_. We can’t wait until 2026.
We have to reach voters across the Golden State and show them why Katie is the best candidate for this job. She’s not afraid to stand up to anyone—whether that’s special interests or Donald Trump—to deliver for Californians. She’ll be laser focused on lowering the cost of housing and making California more affordable. And she’ll lead the fight for our environment, even when Trump and Big Oil don’t make it easy.
We’re working hard to get this message out, but we need to hit these fundraising goals to have the resources to win. Our June 2026 primary may feel far away, but right now is when we build the foundation of this campaign.
**[So Peter, can you donate $5 to help us raise the $10,000 we need to reach our goal and win this race next year?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250715_1_ak?refcode=em20250715-39897&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39897_3422442_TQRgAP&akid=39897%2E3422442%2ETQRgAP)**
We couldn’t do it without Porter Supporters like you.
Thank you for everything,
Katie Porter for California

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250715-39897&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39897_3422442_TQRgAP&akid=39897%2E3422442%2ETQRgAP)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39897&t=5&akid=39897%2E3422442%2ETQRgAP)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Ken Mitchell for Virginia
subject: Trump’s chaos. Cline’s silence. Virginia deserves better.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Mitchell for Virginia**
body:
While Trump plays dictator, Ben Cline plays along.

| | | | | [|
---](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=0e37f3b265&e=0fced71d8c)
| | | | [|
---](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=6d3f195a74&e=0fced71d8c)
| Donald Trump slapped massive new tariffs on our allies, gutted funding for crime victim support programs, and hinted at more chaos to come. And what did our Congressman Ben Cline do?Absolutely nothing — unless you count staying silent while Trump tanks the economy, picks fights with our allies, and slashes vital services.Ben Cline has spent his time in Congress doing Trump’s bidding — not serving the people of Virginia’s 6th District. He voted to overturn the 2020 election results _after_ a violent insurrection. He backed efforts to pull the U.S. out of the World Health Organization during a pandemic. And now, while Trump destabilizes markets and strips away funding from programs helping survivors of violent crime, Cline keeps his head down — and his loyalty to MAGA up.
---
|
---
| But there’s a better choice: **Ken Mitchell.** Ken is a 24-year Army veteran, a small business owner, and an infrastructure expert who’s worked across the public and private sectors to solve real problems. He’s restored historic buildings, expanded broadband in rural communities, and helped build clean water systems in underserved areas. Ken knows what service means — and he’s ready to bring that same spirit to Congress.✅ Expand broadband and health care
✅ Invest in rural schools and infrastructure
✅ Support working families and small businesses
✅ Defend democracy and reject extremism
* * *
But here’s the truth: flipping this seat won’t be easy. Cline has deep-pocketed donors and the MAGA machine behind him.**We need to raise $25,000 show we have the grassroots strength to win. Can you chip in right now?**
* * *
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [➡️ [Donate $10] ➡️ [Donate $25] ➡️ [Donate $50 or more]](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=12db8ffb38&e=0fced71d8c)
---
| This race is about who represents _us_. Not Trump. Not corporate PACs. Not political insiders.Let’s send a leader to Congress who works for Virginia — not for Donald Trump’s ego.**—Team Ken Mitchell**

clean_body: While Trump plays dictator, Ben Cline plays along. | | | | | | | | | | Donald Trump slapped massive new tariffs on our allies, gutted funding for crime victim support programs, and hinted at more chaos to come. And what did our Congressman Ben Cline do?Absolutely nothing — unless you count staying silent while Trump tanks the economy, picks fights with our allies, and slashes vital services.Ben Cline has spent his time in Congress doing Trump’s bidding — not serving the people of Virginia’s 6th District. He voted to overturn the 2020 election results after a violent insurrection. He backed efforts to pull the U.S. out of the World Health Organization during a pandemic. And now, while Trump destabilizes markets and strips away funding from programs helping survivors of violent crime, Cline keeps his head down — and his loyalty to MAGA up. | | But there’s a better choice: Ken Mitchell. Ken is a 24-year Army veteran, a small business owner, and an infrastructure expert who’s worked across the public and private sectors to solve real problems. He’s restored historic buildings, expanded broadband in rural communities, and helped build clean water systems in underserved areas. Ken knows what service means — and he’s ready to bring that same spirit to Congress.✅ Expand broadband and health care ✅ Invest in rural schools and infrastructure ✅ Support working families and small businesses ✅ Defend democracy and reject extremism But here’s the truth: flipping this seat won’t be easy. Cline has deep-pocketed donors and the MAGA machine behind him.We need to raise $25,000 show we have the grassroots strength to win. Can you chip in right now? | | | | | | | | | | | [➡️ [Donate $10] ➡️ [Donate $25] ➡️ [Donate $50 or more]]() | This race is about who represents us. Not Trump. Not corporate PACs. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111525483/557556784/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmZiMmMyZjAtYjQ2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7s-kUrxZoolFl_tI_0kwYenBO8FQQwgJkkrCCqpVoc8=) | For sixty years, the Voting Rights Act has protected Americans from racial discrimination at the ballot box by allowing them to sue to protect their rights. Until now. A federal appeals court just issued a decision so extreme it could reshape the future of voting rights in this country. The court ruled that private citizens cannot bring lawsuits under a key section of the Voting Rights Act. **In other words, the court said that only the Department of Justice can act—even in cases of clear discrimination.** That’s never been the law. And it’s never been the practice. Hundreds of critical voting rights cases have been brought by individuals and communities seeking justice. Now, a group of Native American tribes in North Dakota is asking the Supreme Court to step in. If they take the case, it will be an all-hands-on-deck moment for our democracy. And Minnesota will stand shoulder-to-shoulder with those working to preserve this fundamental right. **[We’re already preparing for the work ahead, but we need your help. Will you chip in $10 or more today to support our work in defending voting rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111525484/557556785/1738122805?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_250715&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmZiMmMyZjAtYjQ2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7s-kUrxZoolFl_tI_0kwYenBO8FQQwgJkkrCCqpVoc8=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now.

My great-grandfather fled a country where that freedom didn’t exist, and his story still fuels my work today.
**[The struggle for voting rights isn’t over. Not even close. Let’s show them we’re not backing down. Help me step up and get our message out. name: Laura Friedman
subject: We must lead with transparency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111525906/557557315/-1623651544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTZiZjBjNWMtYjU2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x6fEHehyfFpCnr_cZA2Ucd_H0Y77b7S8yQYCI5o7qJg=) Friend, Donald Trump and ICE promised to go after dangerous criminals. But the people they’re actually arresting don’t match that promise. **A _Los Angeles Times_ investigation found that nearly 70% of people arrested in the Los Angeles ICE sweeps from June 1 to June 10 had no criminal convictions. In fact, most had never even been charged with a crime. ** Instead, they’re randomly picking up our neighbors in order to hit an inhumane human quota, while denying them the due process and civil rights protections they’re entitled to by law. That’s not law enforcement, it’s intimidation. And they’re doing it without badges, names, or accountability. Here in California, we lead with transparency. And I am helping lead the charge on the **No Masks for ICE Act** to bring transparency back to immigration enforcement, before another innocent victim gets ripped off our streets. [**I recently spoke about this legislation with KNX News. clean_body: | = Friend, Donald Trump and ICE promised to go after dangerous criminals. But the people they’re actually arresting don’t match that promise. A Los Angeles Times investigation found that nearly 70% of people arrested in the Los Angeles ICE sweeps from June 1 to June 10 had no criminal convictions. In fact, most had never even been charged with a crime. Instead, they’re randomly picking up our neighbors in order to hit an inhumane human quota, while denying them the due process and civil rights protections they’re entitled to by law. That’s not law enforcement, it’s intimidation. And they’re doing it without badges, names, or accountability. Here in California, we lead with transparency. And I am helping lead the charge on the No Masks for ICE Act to bring transparency back to immigration enforcement, before another innocent victim gets ripped off our streets. | ** We will get through this stronger, together. Laura ** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! Laura Friedman for Congress PO Box 27296 Los Angeles, CA 90027 United States

name: =?utf-8?B?4oCLSmFtZXMgVXRobWVpZXI=?=
subject: ​I have a message for the radical left
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205fknetj1f94sipwk0nwgu9vyvdxgkqvwxbii9oxi3srkr8cyhhpdy2gyx67lbojnyoyun2wwf1ipau99m&__stmp=szgi9h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szgi9h&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol01ablemuov2xxi57noaon5rtalk45fk3uz708j4itvc32amw9b6fj2b37h9l75mxscrjefuj2wtfbl0qth2fwaxivv582h0ffcrdxnxpgffclej3fppiw6l61dypdxutlvxm59wl1l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szgi9h&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szgi9h&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szgi9h&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szgi9h&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol01ablemuov2xxi57noaon5rtalk45fk3uz708j4itvc32amw9b6fj2b37h9l75mxscrjefuj2wtfbl0qth2fwaxivv582h0ffcrdxnxpgffclej3fppiw6l61dypdxutlvxm59wl1l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szgi9h&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szgi9h&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Peter,

While summer is in full swing, and many folks are taking a well-earned break, there’s something we can’t afford to slow down on: Our fight for this country’s values.

Every year around this time, campaigns across the country see a fundraising "summer slump"—a major dip in the grassroots support campaigns like ours rely on to function. It really does take a toll on our everyday work and influence our plans for next year.

_But you know what doesn’t take a break?_
* **The relentless attacks on our healthcare**

* **The growing threats to our democracy**

* **The ongoing fight for our reproductive freedom**

The GOP and the challenges they're throwing our way don’t pause because it’s July— _and neither can we._

We’re up against powerful special interests and extremist politicians who are counting on us to lose focus. That’s why it’s so important we hit our mid-month fundraising goal and stay on track for July. _It’s a marathon and a steady pace will help us win this race._

clean_body: Peter, While summer is in full swing, and many folks are taking a well-earned break, there’s something we can’t afford to slow down on: Our fight for this country’s values. Every year around this time, campaigns across the country see a fundraising "summer slump"—a major dip in the grassroots support campaigns like ours rely on to function. It really does take a toll on our everyday work and influence our plans for next year. But you know what doesn’t take a break? The relentless attacks on our healthcare The growing threats to our democracy The ongoing fight for our reproductive freedom The GOP and the challenges they're throwing our way don’t pause because it’s July— and neither can we. We’re up against powerful special interests and extremist politicians who are counting on us to lose focus. That’s why it’s so important we hit our mid-month fundraising goal and stay on track for July. It’s a marathon and a steady pace will help us win this race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for your ongoing support, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible.
