name: Thank Pete Buttigieg (protectvoting.org)
subject: “Republicans were lying the whole time. They deserve to lose power.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
YES! 🔥
| **Pete Buttigieg is NOT backing down!!!** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92077?t=6&akid=20604%2E878179%2ECnixcH) [**But now, Trump and his minions are trying to SILENCE Buttigieg — he’s one of their top targets! So we need 2,000 Democrats to sign our letter THANKING Pete Buttigieg, and you’re the first one we’ve selected »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92077?t=7&akid=20604%2E878179%2ECnixcH) | [**THANK PETE BUTTIGIEG: DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92077?t=8&akid=20604%2E878179%2ECnixcH)
---
TO: Pete Buttigieg
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Pete Buttigieg,

**THANK YOU for being a consistently strong voice against Donald Trump’s MAGA regime!**

I know that Trump has put a huge target on your back for speaking up — so it means the world that you aren’t backing down even a little bit.

**You’re absolutely right. Republicans deserve to lose power, so I’m doing everything I can to help flip the House and Senate in 2026!**

If Democrats band together with leaders like you, I know we have what it takes to crush the GOP’s fragile majorities, SAVE Social Security and Medicare, _and get this country back on track!_

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to stand up to Trump! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92077?t=9&akid=20604%2E878179%2ECnixcH) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92077?t=10&akid=20604%2E878179%2ECnixcH)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20604%2E878179%2ECnixcH). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20604%2E878179%2ECnixcH).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20604%2E878179%2ECnixcH) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=20604%2E878179%2ECnixcH). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20604%2E878179%2ECnixcH)
---

name: Keith
subject: I'm taking Trump to court
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

We know all too well now that Donald Trump has no shame when it comes to trampling on the Constitution.

In just the last couple months, his administration has:
- Shared Americans’ private health data with ICE
- Orchestrated cruel ICE raids that jeopardize public safety
- Wrongfully detained countless US citizens
- Conducted unconstitutional stops without legal justification

Nobody is above the law—including those who enforce it. Trump loves to throw the word “illegal” around, but again and again, it’s his own administration that’s behaving illegally. That’s why I’m suing him.

I’ve joined attorneys general across the country in lawsuits to halt Trump’s illegal and unconstitutional orders, including his efforts to weaponize ICE. We’re asking the court to bring an end to the Trump administration’s repeated violations of the Constitution and civil rights.

But I need your support in this fight, Peter. Putting a stop to Trump’s attacks is and always will be a team effort. Our movement has taken a stand when it matters most many times before, so I am confident we will again.

Will you chip in today to help me hold Trump and ICE accountable?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thank you for standing with me,

Keith Ellison

---
Peter,

When I launched this campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota, I didn’t expect an easy path. I’m not a career politician. _**I don’t have a famous last name or deep-pocketed lobbyists behind me.**_ But I believe this country is worth fighting for — and thanks to people like you, we’ve already proven what a grassroots campaign can do.

Thousands of proud American Patriots stepped up to power this mission in just a few short weeks. Together, we laid the foundation — with ads running, volunteers signing up, and a clear message breaking through the noise: We’re not backing down—not now, not ever.

Republicans have been pining over Minnesota for years, and for a long time, winning a Senate seat or even its electoral votes at the presidential level has been out of reach.

_**Not anymore.**_****

Now, we’re entering a critical phase. If we want to expand our reach and show voters across Minnesota that this campaign is real, we need to keep our momentum going. That means bringing in more grassroots fuel — and **[I’m asking for your help again today.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b15651c139514ba7819125cd248b2249&_e=uFOLQKWcMcHzHkJzUFVj1nyZ0KZkTcsZTVMfo66D2vkC53mm7OoQAE4tAsJ3AJhu0Y2216VyS4dHLhltSPs6xlwiSpWbPkj8dnF-n4fGX8wdGoiQ5EJibSOA1w91mKPYe1kn1IWhtq_NjME2NirUpJbP_J3YfKuWU4AVsH_SwwhcNkzcWCoo1zIzIhvxH4_UBMaSVmoyNoSTJ25EIs1MVnifFRdi7Amz4DjjFLmVPy65i2qkpVdyKe7I4jOebkJXhrnr813TC7OIsR4LSg6nW7Npj6dc8nEJsftCZfqgf1klH1LgrvtNxJHrBJVyBO6_zkIDVV1mVGxnYr3b_WAPaRfBBQ8EX8MMaDF6y4xaQ5Bn9Vu9cCukwAHEFtPTdzA6VMmjYfooqos00WFLOwWesOoPehn7SZsbbS67pAOtwNA5jkZ-VAxwrYEbQM96DmnEBmBdzqgKhnEL1zFYwbYJNzFpWqRD6pLTn_KR2dWCBZkS63OyynaW-Bq7e-y0BP5ghfrSBVAWUDwsnG0S2x1e36BQFTH3HJugHI6M9oc4ZcbgjNFxt2MaLtoPHQpcIII45sIlsvzENpKm-ePDoNRraPLECK2sg_KeX95HU1kl0BiJeJdE_8cTouZ_IidVAgH3NcVqddv-a0Gi98nJXylAbYROswCcqDwPqqT69hOO7t14XY4JfsYP-mI6pdQdd_Bif7DKXvOb3UCPptU_DLgIbZLq3YiraJ-_xl3NOx6AfRpn66hyvLsElMHCip7IUX05qd5pz43si90Jv-doH_cTpw%3D%3D) **

name: Adam Schiff
subject: This morning, Trump called for me to be prosecuted

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8769%2E5257348%2EtOSTu4 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

Donald Trump just went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted.

Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I’ve held him
accountable. Because I haven’t stopped. And I never will. This is just
Trump’s latest attempt at political retaliation against his perceived
enemies.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250715_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8769%2E5257348%2EtOSTu4 ]Trump on Truth Social: I have always suspected Shifty Adam Shiff was a
scam artist. And now I learn that Fannie Mae's Financial Crimes Division
have concluded that Adam Schiff has engaged in a sustained pattern of
possible Mortgage Fraud. Adam Schiff said that his primary residence was
in MARYLAND to get a cheaper mortgage and rip off America, when he must
LIVE in CALIFORNIA because he was a Congressman from CALIFORNIA. I always
knew Adam Schiff was a Crook. The FRAUD began with the refinance of his
Maryland property on February 6, 2009, and continued through multiple
transactions until the Maryland property was correctly designated as a
second home on October 13, 2020. Mortgage Fraud is very serious, and
CROOKED Adam Schiff (now a Senator) needs to be brought to justice.

Over the years, Trump has called for me to be jailed for a variety of
reasons, including accusing me of treason. And this latest baseless
attempt at political retribution won’t stop me from holding him
accountable — not by a long shot.

I’m not surprised that Trump is lashing out again. But even by his
standards, this one’s weak. And much as Trump may hope, this latest smear
will not distract from his Epstein files problem.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250715_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8769%2E5257348%2EtOSTu4 ]Nevertheless, I need your help right now to respond: Rush a donation to
help me fight back and keep holding Trump accountable.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q32025_abs_em.yMOq2I&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250715_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8769%2E5257348%2EtOSTu4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

body:
Before you click away...
#

👋 Jon Ossoff is asking all Democrats to read this short 1-minute message before you click away. 🇺🇸
It's Tuesday, July 15 and we are just hours away from our mid-month fundraising deadline.

We're asking you to reflect on the work Jon Ossoff does in the Senate, and the importance of holding this seat if Democrats are going to have any chance at a majority.
It wasn't long ago Democrats had control of the Senate, and it was Georgia voters who elected Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock to put the party over the top. **We can get it back, but Jon can't do it alone.**

If everyone reading this email donated even just $10 to Jon Ossoff for Senate, he'd reach his fundraising goals right away and have the resources we need to run the strongest campaign possible.
Unfortunately, not everyone gives. So Jon Ossoff is counting on people like you who understand the stakes of this moment to step up and give.

[**If you feel like re-electing Jon Ossoff and re-taking control of the Senate is worth $10 to you, then we're asking you to chip in to Jon’s re-election campaign today. There’s no contribution too small. Every donation counts. Thank you.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250715-1-subs&t=1&akid=552%2E5691347%2ESYheqI)

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Trump’s Mob Agenda Just Got Funded. We’re Fighting Back.
body:
This is not how America works

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=3cbd1525ca&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=cd5069b55d&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| **Dear Peter,** The headlines this week are horrific – and our campaign is pushing back **at the block level** to stop **Trump’s mob-boss authoritarianism**.**In Trump’s Big Ugly Bill, he just secured an unprecedented $170 billion** for his immigration crackdown, funneling **$28 billion** to the Department of Homeland Security. That **quadruples ICE’s budget** and makes it the **highest-funded law enforcement agency in America** – more than the **FBI, DEA, and ATF combined**. Incredibly, **ICE's $28 billion budget now surpasses the Marine Corps' $10.6 billion Operations and Maintenance budget**. That’s right, according to the Department of Defense’s **** FY 2025 O&M Programs, the **Marine Corps O &M appropriation** is **$10,562,804,000** (~**$10.56 billion**) in total obligational authority for FY 2025. **ICE enforcement operations now receive more than double the funding that it takes to operate the entire Marine Corps.**
****Mob Boss Trump loves to send his enforcers to**Los Angeles more than any other city** , turning our neighborhoods into a militarized surveillance state. His plan? Hire **10,000 new deportation agents** , undervetted, undertrained, and politically weaponized. More cruelty.**Our communities are bracing for it.** This is authoritarianism. This is not who we are.Private prison corporations are already lining up for contracts. **More masked agents are coming. More raids at job sites, schools, parks, and places of worship.** **Our neighborhoods are on their radar.** This is state sponsored terror. This is fascism.**Every single Republican** in Congress voted for it.**Brad Sherman?****He’s been in Congress for 15 terms.****He’s voted again and again to fund ICE and DHS.****Now, as Trump ramps up his assault on immigrants, Sherman stays silent.****Again. As always.** I’m running for Congress to lead without fear – to call out this cruelty, protect families, and dismantle the authoritarian state Trump is building.👉 [**Donate $27, $54, or whatever you can**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=39b66fe37e&e=5a6ee82cdb)**
****We must organize NOW. Every dollar fuels resistance.** Trump has **$170 billion** to wage a war on our values.
But **we have people power** – and **we know the difference between right and wrong**.Let’s rise together.
Let’s fight like hell.**No Fear. No Silence.
Let’s Go.****Chris Ahuja
Democratic Candidate for Congress, CD-32**

---

Christopher Ahuja for Congress * 21255 Burbank Blvd Ste 120 * Woodland Hills, CA 91367-6669 * USA

Hey, it pains me to say it, but Florida is in the news again – and not in a good way. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111528364/557561501/574751802?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.15_AlligatorAlcatraz_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWYyZTQ2ZS1iODYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x0tQxg8z_dU4yawikjPPaXvaYNzQXWJmHP9RuA34w0g=) I wish I was joking, but this is real. The GOP is selling merch to fundraise off a cruel immigration detention center in the Everglades. Republicans' goal in building this detention center in the Everglades – a place infested with alligators, no access to proper water, and routinely floods – is for nothing more than showmanship and cruelty. This administration is treating detained immigrants like animals, and instead of fixing the conditions, The GOP is mocking them with t-shirts and beer koozies. _It’s disgusting._ And let’s say the quiet part out loud, friend – **this is all one big distraction for the media to feed straight to the American people.** _Millions are still being kicked off their health insurance, FEMA is on the brink of closure, and everyday prices are still too damn high._ The MAGA agenda is cruel – and it’s getting worse. **That’s why I’m doing everything I can to** stand up to extremism. clean_body: This is all one big distraction for the media to feed straight to the American people. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click | = Hey, it pains me to say it, but Florida is in the news again – and not in a good way. = I wish I was joking, but this is real. The GOP is selling merch to fundraise off a cruel immigration detention center in the Everglades. Republicans' goal in building this detention center in the Everglades – a place infested with alligators, no access to proper water, and routinely floods – is for nothing more than showmanship and cruelty. This administration is treating detained immigrants like animals, and instead of fixing the conditions, The GOP is mocking them with t-shirts and beer koozies. It’s disgusting. And let’s say the quiet part out loud, friend – this is all one big distraction for the media to feed straight to the American people. Millions are still being kicked off their health insurance, FEMA is on the brink of closure, and everyday prices are still too damn high. The MAGA agenda is cruel – and it’s getting worse. That’s why I’m doing everything I can to stand up to extremism. But I can't do it alone. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for standing with me, Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. name: Cori Bush
subject: Disability justice.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.politivistaction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com]
Hi Peter,
Happy Disability Pride Month.
This month, and every month, I hope you take some time to honor the leadership, brilliance, and resilience of our disabled community.
The disability rights movement has always been about fighting for access, dignity, healthcare, housing, economic justice, and freedom from violence.
And yet, our systems continue to fail differently abled people—especially Black, brown, queer, and low-income folks with disabilities. Take the recent Republican spending bill: House Republicans voted to slash nearly $1 trillion from Medicaid over the next decade, a move that will cause devastating harm to one of every three disabled people in this country who rely on it...
That’s why we can’t talk about justice without talking about disability justice.
At Politivist Action PAC, we’re building people-powered movements that center the voices and leadership of those too often pushed to the margins. That means uplifting leaders with disabilities, investing in accessible organizing, and fighting for a future that leaves no one behind.
If that vision moves you—if you believe, like I do, that disability justice is a cornerstone of real freedom—I hope you’ll support our work today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250715_disabilitypride_act]
Every dollar helps us amplify the voices of organizers with disabilities, fund justice-driven campaigns, and fuel the kind of movement our communities deserve.
This month, I’m recommitting to the work. I hope you’ll join me. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250715_disabilitypride_act]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250715_disabilitypride_act]
We deserve a world where all of us can thrive.
In solidarity,
Cori Bush
Founder, Politivist Action PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250715_disabilitypride_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250715_disabilitypride_act] Politivist Action PAC is committed to driving social change by electing leaders who stand for peace, justice, and human rights. We build diverse, intergenerational movements to confront extremism, defend democracy, and promote racial, economic, and social justice. By rejecting corporate influence and fighting to eliminate big money in politics, we proudly support grassroots candidates who champion dignity and equality for all.
Want to learn more? Visit our website at PolitivistAction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com] .
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250715_disabilitypride_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250715_disabilitypride_act&recurring=1]

body:
It’s been a bit hectic

| |
---
Hi there, It’s been a hectic few weeks here at Nellie Pou HQ. Nellie has been traveling back and forth to DC, doing what she always does: standing up for New Jersey families. She voted against the terrible House Republican budget bill that slashes Medicaid and gives massive handouts to billionaires. From her very first day in Washington, she has been holding the line against the MAGA agenda. Now, House Republicans' attacks on her are ramping up. A dark-money Super PAC just announced they’re launching even more false ads about the _Big Scam_ in our district. And just last week, another MAGA Republican officially jumped into the race. **[Today is the midpoint of the month, and we're only at 30% of our online fundraising goal for the month. body:
|
#
This is something I am proud to share, Peter.

**My finance team just crunched the numbers, and our average online donation in the second quarter was $21.03.**

This is a testament to our grassroots efforts. It is clear that the thousands of folks who donated to my campaign are fed up with my opponent Young Kim’s loyalty to Trump and the lies and empty promises that come with it.

While Young Kim has millions of dollars in the bank and the backing of GOP super PACs, I am building our campaign to unseat her with the support of people like you – chipping in a few dollars when you can.

I am the only candidate in this race who has gone toe-to-toe with the MAGA agenda. I am unafraid of the attacks already coming my way, but I need your support to keep our momentum.

**[If even half of everyone reading this email matched our average online donation of $21.03, we would send a message to the national GOP that we have the power of the people on our side. name: Rob Bonta
subject: The Senate is on the verge of gutting NPR and PBS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250715&t=1001&akid=1880%2E1088799%2EhPOw_F ]Rob Bonta

In many places, public
broadcasting isn’t just a resource — it’s a lifeline.

In rural, remote, and Tribal communities across California and the
country, NPR and PBS stations are often the only reliable source of local
news, including emergency alerts, wildfire updates, earthquake warnings,
and evacuation orders.

Right now, that lifeline is under threat. The Trump administration has
proposed withholding $500 million in federal funding to NPR and PBS —
effectively gutting them — and this week, the Senate will vote on the
White House’s proposal.

I joined 23 attorneys general in standing up to this attack, filing an
amicus brief in support of public media and the millions of Americans who
depend on it — and now I’m asking you to join me in the fight.

There’s still time to prevent this dangerous loss for the American people.
[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250715-pet/?t=1002&akid=1880%2E1088799%2EhPOw_F ]Sign my petition now demanding the Senate reject Trump’s proposal and
protect funding for public broadcasting.

These massive cuts could decimate local public media stations and leave
millions of people without access to timely — even potentially lifesaving
— information.

Regardless of zip code, income level, or political belief, we all benefit
from public broadcasting — and especially as we witness the rise of
devastating natural disasters, we cannot afford to leave entire
communities in the dark.

We all need to speak out against these cuts, so I’m asking:

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250715-pet/?t=1003&akid=1880%2E1088799%2EhPOw_F ]Before the Senate votes on Trump’s plan, will you sign my petition
urging them to protect PBS and NPR, and preserve access to vital news and
emergency communication for all?

ADD YOUR NAME

In solidarity,
Rob

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1004&akid=1880%2E1088799%2EhPOw_F
Update Your Information: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=1880%2E1088799%2EhPOw_F

Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
info@robbonta.com

[PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]

clean_body: In just 7 days, Democrats spent over $1,000,000 on ads attacking President Trump’s landmark Big Beautiful Bill! | Fellow American, In just 7 days , Democrats spent over $1,000,000 on ads attacking President Trump’s landmark Big Beautiful Bill! Outspending Republicans by almost 2:1 ❗❗ Democrats are livid that Republicans prevented the largest tax hike in U.S. History while turbo-charging the U.S. economy to compete head-on with China. Now they’re spending millions every week to spread lies and disinformation. I’m proud of everything we were able to accomplish in passing President Trump’s legislative agenda, and the voters need to hear the truth. For America, Steve Daines P.S. Support from grassroots Conservatives like you is the main reason we have a Senate Majority capable of passing President Trump’s America First agenda. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Will you close the gap?

body:
|

Hey there — I won’t lie, asking for money is the worst part of this job. I wish that I didn’t have to think about fundraising at all. But if we don’t have the money to communicate with people and to win elections, we can’t keep making progress in our mission for a better Oregon for all of us. I just got off the phone with our finance team, and we’re just $210 away from hitting our mid-July goal. **Click here to make any grassroots contribution:[secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-q3-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111532247/557565731/-773863328?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250715_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDY5YjFlMS1iZDYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h1oMWXithkrp0x78BGRvbSkH9iQ17Pc9uBZrUbT--GM=)** **Click here to close the gap:** **[secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-q3-2025?amount=210](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111532248/557565732/484715085?amount=210&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250715_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDY5YjFlMS1iZDYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h1oMWXithkrp0x78BGRvbSkH9iQ17Pc9uBZrUbT--GM=)** Every contribution matters to me, Peter. body:
CA-13

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111532745/557567257/1219929396?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5MWUzYmI5LWJlNjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V40_kVr8_dGXRAPRIy1TLSgnP-beiTCXg87rn2FoGAM=) | Peter, Adam Gray flipped CA-13 by fewer than **200 votes** last cycle. | | Did you see the big news out of Oregon last week? **My friend and colleague, Senator Jeff Merkley, officially announced his re-election campaign.** I couldn't be prouder to stand with a proven champion for Oregonians' health, opportunities, and freedoms. [**Will you join me and split $3 between myself and Jeff to make sure we send him back to the Senate in 2026?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111532737/557567247/-1281351537?refcode=2025-07-15-merkley&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=64e936b3-be61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGU5MzZiMy1iZTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rNZxVRtF_Ald9ZF53Br_N_Ecy6FJ68PtdgHEpECQmKA=) [Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111532738/557567248/-1281351537?refcode=2025-07-15-merkley&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=64e936b3-be61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGU5MzZiMy1iZTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rNZxVRtF_Ald9ZF53Br_N_Ecy6FJ68PtdgHEpECQmKA=) Jeff is on the frontlines of so many critical fights – from defending our democracy, to holding corporate polluters accountable, to championing workers' rights. He's been an essential partner in delivering results for Oregon. I've worked with him to advocate for fairer taxes, clean energy credits, and protecting our public lands. He's exactly the kind of progressive champion Oregonians deserve representing them in the Senate. **With Donald Trump back in the White House and Republicans obeying his every command, Jeff's voice has never been more critical – and his seat is a**** _must-hold_****if we want to take back the Senate in 2026.** Jeff understands that this moment calls for bold ideas to lift up working people, leaders who aren't afraid to back down, and an unrelenting focus on the dangers that an out-of-control, pro-billionaire administration poses to our country. [**Jeff is ready to meet the moment, but he can't do it without supporters like you. So will you split $3 and be one of the first grassroots donors behind his re-election campaign? Together, we'll secure the future Oregonians – and all Americans – deserve.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111532739/557567249/-1281351537?refcode=2025-07-15-merkley&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=64e936b3-be61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGU5MzZiMy1iZTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rNZxVRtF_Ald9ZF53Br_N_Ecy6FJ68PtdgHEpECQmKA=) Onward, _Ron_ |

clean_body: His voice is sorely needed at this moment. | | | | Did you see the big news out of Oregon last week? My friend and colleague, Senator Jeff Merkley, officially announced his re-election campaign. I couldn't be prouder to stand with a proven champion for Oregonians' health, opportunities, and freedoms. = = Jeff is on the frontlines of so many critical fights – from defending our democracy, to holding corporate polluters accountable, to championing workers' rights. He's been an essential partner in delivering results for Oregon. I've worked with him to advocate for fairer taxes, clean energy credits, and protecting our public lands. He's exactly the kind of progressive champion Oregonians deserve representing them in the Senate. With Donald Trump back in the White House and Republicans obeying his every command, Jeff's voice has never been more critical – and his seat is a must-holdif we want to take back the Senate in 2026. Jeff understands that this moment calls for bold ideas to lift up working people, leaders who aren't afraid to back down, and an unrelenting focus on the dangers that an out-of-control, pro-billionaire administration poses to our country. = Onward, Ron | ---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

name: Deb Haaland (personal)
subject: I might give you a call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I’m going to be calling as many grassroots supporters as I can.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3253%2E400544%2El1pMX4)
Hi, it's Deb.
This weekend, we kicked off our **Lift Up New Mexico** Tour in Shiprock and Cuba, and my heart is full! 💛
Meeting folks face to face is my absolute favorite part of this campaign.
**But here’s the thing:** Running for governor is _expensive_. And while I’m on the road, I’ve got less time to raise the resources we need to win.
That’s why I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us catch up on our fundraising before our mid-July fundraising deadline at midnight.
**Between stops, I’m going to be calling as many grassroots supporters as I can to say thank you. So chip in ANY AMOUNT before midnight using the ActBlue link below, and you might get a call from me.**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250715_1_call](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250715_1_call?refcode=em20250715-3253&refcode2=3253_400544_l1pMX4&akid=3253%2E400544%2El1pMX4)**
Thank you for being on our team,
Deb

name: Dylan
subject: Hi! I’m Dylan - it’s great to connect!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter!
I wanted to reach out and introduce myself. My name is Dylan, I just started as the Volunteer Coordinator for Kelly’s campaign for Congress. It is so great to connect and I’m so excited to get started! 🙂
I have worked on a number of campaigns since getting involved in Democratic politics in 2021. Most recently, I worked in MN-03 during the 2024 cycle with Senator Ann Johnson Stewart’s campaign. It was such a joy to get to know Kelly and the CD3 Dems during my time in the campaign office, and I can’t wait to get back out there with you all at parades and events this summer!
I know we reached out with the big news last week, but Kelly’s campaign will have our own booth at the Minnesota State Fair this August ! I am working hard to recruit volunteers to help us staff all 12 days of the fair, and I could use your help. If you’re interested, please sign up here to volunteer at the fair! [https://forms.gle/MxFnCqsxojdrZDaJ8]
Volunteer at The Fair [https://forms.gle/MxFnCqsxojdrZDaJ8]
Will you not be in town or is the State Fair not your jam? No worries! Our finance team recently launched our fundraising campaign called ‘Fund The Fair 🎡’ to ensure we have the resources to make all 12 days of the fair run smoothly. We need supplies to prepare our booth, literature to pass out, and fair tickets for our dedicated volunteers and team.
They set a goal of raising $5,000 by the end of this week to ensure we can cover these costs on top of our other ambitious organizing goals.
Peter, if you can’t sign up for a state fair shift, would you consider chipping in any amount today to help us prepare for the Great Minnesota Get Together? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fundthefair2025-email]
Fund The Fair [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fundthefair2025-email]
Thank you so much for all that you do, Peter! I hope to see you at the state fair booth this August!
With gratitude,
Dylan
https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress] https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN [https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN] https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress [https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress] kellyforcongress.org [kellyforcongress.org]
A quick note from Kelly:
I've spent most of my career as a doctor, not a politician, and I believe we need leaders who are focused on delivering results for Minnesota families. I'm not taking a cent of corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money , so I'm counting on folks like your giving what they can, when they can.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?refcode2=emailfooter&type=rbtn]
Email is the best way to keep our supporters up to date.
If you only want to receive our most important emails, click here to receive fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hHyPtKcXyUeK_xcY7BEsAQ2]
We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can unsubscribe here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4Dh5T9ni_kaWmPt-auzpZw2?unsubscribedata=dIcXONEyBeuEWW3tTl5do%2BMCy4Fm1SHrx0dGnd8GUnAKh198u%2BIAqaMFBjbUQkjpFzC7ziirPuH50JbcMUxKSU22TPsN51exE3atkwxUCimk%2BmZ0gdUpv7%2BwdkiWOkEZuaGqPoHvrNaoXSxs2ye8mnjT9RSrYnAZWTyGyjC4FSOJSzj3r7jXefUZWqf2qLuJZGj7BCYDhQkVbZF3zS1TpiZUPbY6CjZkhMH4HoNRcLcAc%2BROFjnDUfbqtcnkF5GiY7R3MA0YpXZbr49tv6uKq27w7Ro1F6c11%2FHiechmdE5QKDy%2Fa3xLyyCQXSbtOxeCnEoUZHLHFu82sxf9QLyYQoj8gryZ1Vfug6v9pDShrD4M1%2F2aorzyiHUMVqSjKVq0vv5Knx%2BEBJHIU3rsy8DMDqjSBgn9kXRF6ML6gQDX%2F7CJXW7R2uRRrrfWldwethf%2F] .
Morrison for Congress
PO Box 684
Wayzata, MN 55391
United States

name: Connor Miller
subject: We’re not where we’d like to be
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
We’re halfway through July, and if I’m being honest, we’re not where we’d like to be on our fundraising goal for the month.
#
Hi, it’s Connor, Finance Director for Sarah’s campaign.
**We’re halfway through July, and if I’m being honest, we’re not where we’d like to be on our fundraising goal for the month.**
It’s not unusual for fundraising to slow down in the summer.
But here’s the thing: Sarah is counting on us to power this campaign so she can focus on advocating and legislating for us in Congress at a time when our freedoms and futures are on the line.
**Sarah doesn’t have billionaires on speed dial to fill the gap when our fundraising slows. But she _does_ have a grassroots team that always shows up, and your contribution helps Sarah to:**
* Build a politics that puts people over the profits of the powerful

* Do the urgent work of holding Trump and House Republicans accountable

* Raise the resources needed to keep her fighting for us in Congress _and_ help Democrats flip the House majority in 2026

[**We still need to raise $4,500 before our mid-month deadline to reach our $15,000 goal, which is why I’m asking if you can pitch in $5 to help us get there before midnight tonight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250715-1?refcode=em20250715-2183&amount=5&refcode2=2183_21716_Xd8MyQ&akid=2183%2E21716%2EXd8MyQ)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250715-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250715-2183&refcode2=2183_21716_Xd8MyQ&akid=2183%2E21716%2EXd8MyQ)**
Thank you as always for your support!
Connor Miller
Finance Director
Sarah McBride for Congress
* * *

[We’ve extended the deadline to MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so every Democrat who believes in this fight has a chance to join.»](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111535492/557572695/1158394903?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250715_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4OGJlYWVhLWMyNjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Jq5wb0-x8HbvhuAkoHbYbZKV-DsJc7hgzguUAyhYYXU=) | [SIGN THE LETTER TO STAND WITH NEWSOM → »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111535494/557572697/1158394903?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250715_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4OGJlYWVhLWMyNjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Jq5wb0-x8HbvhuAkoHbYbZKV-DsJc7hgzguUAyhYYXU=)

[1]Powered By People

Our mid-month fundraising deadline is at midnight, and we’re $5,000 short
of our goal.

This movement runs on people-power—and in the final hours ahead of this
deadline, we’re asking if you [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250715.eZ8osN&refcode=ema20250715-240219&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=240219%2E444211%2EKwnZy1 ]can chip in to help close the gap and
fuel the grassroots work that keeps this movement alive?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250715.eZ8osN&refcode=ema20250715-240219&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=240219%2E444211%2EKwnZy1 ]DONATE $3

Here’s what your donation makes possible: Beto is back on the road this
week hosting town halls in Philadelphia, Richmond, and Baltimore.

These events are about having real conversations. We don’t check party
affiliation at the door, or tell people what they have to believe.
Instead, we hear what voters have to say and figure out how to move
forward—together.

But none of this happens without grassroots supporters like
you.

Your donation helps put gas in the truck, rent the spaces that can host
voters fired up to fight for real change, and spread our message far and
wide. It’s how we organize—and how we win.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250715.eZ8osN&refcode=ema20250715-240219&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=240219%2E444211%2EKwnZy1 ]Will you donate $3 now to
keep Beto on the road organizing voters fighting back against Donald
Trump? Every dollar makes a difference.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250715.eZ8osN&refcode=ema20250715-240219&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=240219%2E444211%2EKwnZy1 ]DONATE $3

Thank you,

Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=240219%2E444211%2EKwnZy1

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Emergency Census
body:
We need it now
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e304171/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZ0EyQk12VFpZbg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA3MTU/LbmNsNFpBdU1RZA/qP2hpZHM9bmNna3d1b24xSWpvV1hscw/gaHbLEQ/s0p47718266)
| | | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
Patriot, as it currently stands, illegal immigrants are massively tipping the scales in favor of Democrats through the allocation of congressional districts. That’s before any of them have even cast an illegal ballot!
**If congressional district maps were drawn fairly, without counting illegal immigrants, Republicans would have won at least 15 more seats in the House Of Representatives in the 2024 election.**
Counting illegal immigrants the same as citizens disenfranchises and dilutes the voting power of every American citizen, and it needs to stop now.
**[That is why, working with President Trump directly, I have introduced legislation that calls for an emergency census of ONLY American citizens and subsequent redrawing of all congressional districts.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**
**_[If you’re ready to take action, I’ve just opened up my citizen co-sponsorship initiative and I would love to have you as one of the first Republicans on my team](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)_.**
There’s no question that Democrats were thrilled when Biden opened the borders and gave them a massive electoral advantage by flying them into cities across the country... but now each illegal ICE deports is one less pawn they have to rig the system, and they are furious!
**_No wonder they are all trying to be photographed getting arrested for interfering with ICE deportation operations!_**
Right now is the only time before the 2030 census we have to stop these illegal immigrants from disenfranchising American citizens.
[BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
Democrats know that without tens of millions of illegal immigrants being counted in the census, and being included in congressional redistricting, their chances at winning a majority in 2026 are slim to none.
[Patriot, I need the grassroots with me on this, and I’m counting on you to join me](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**.**
_For America,_
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
**Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

### **_[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e304171/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA3MTU/LbmNsNFpBdU1RZA/qP2hpZHM9bmNna3d1b24xSWpvV1hscw/gaHbLEQ/s0i46c62148)_**

Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Andy Beshear (personal)
subject: I wanted to send you a quick note from the road.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
I'll be brief: Peter, I wanted to send you a quick note from the road.

I’ve been traveling a lot lately, visiting Democrats, candidates, and supporters in red and purple states across the country, sharing what I’ve learned in Kentucky about how to win tough races and lead with integrity.

I’m talking to Democrats, organizers, party officials and more about how to lead with empathy, always stand up for what’s right no matter the politics, and how to communicate to voters by explaining your why.

Now that the GOP has passed Trump’s big, ugly tax bill, we're preparing for a world where millions of Americans lose their healthcare and don’t have a hospital within easy driving distance, where families go hungry in a country that grows enough food for everyone. This is why In This Together PAC exists: To support good people and good leaders across the country who will flip red and purple districts and use that power to help their people, not hurt them.

We’ve got a big mid-month deadline at midnight tonight, and hitting this goal means we can keep supporting good in tough races and holding those in office accountable.

If you’re able, will you chip in right now to help me keep this fight going? >> [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/itt-q3-2025? &refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111536347/557573863/841405539?refcode=em25_250715_mm2_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250715_mm2_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=062df800-c561-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDYyZGY4MDAtYzU2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EllYuLaYcXU5WyAGGX9H9-hgIvknGjIVvOcgksQJwKU=)

Thank you,

Andy

name: Tobias Read
subject: The “Big Beautiful Bill” is a Big Ugly Disaster for Oregon
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250715EM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250715EM]
Hi, it's Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
Congressional Republicans just passed one of the most disastrous pieces of legislation I’ve ever seen.
It eviscerates access to affordable health care for our most vulnerable, reduces access to food benefits for those who need it most, is loaded with giveaways to President Trump’s donors, and slashes taxes for the ultra-wealthy while leaving working families worse off.
Too many Oregon families are struggling with higher grocery bills and surging day-to-day costs. But this is not what authentic leadership looks like. This is what government, on behalf of special interests and GOP mega-donors, looks like — and enough is enough.
But this bill serves as a reminder that election outcomes matter, which is why I’m working every day to protect Oregon’s democracy and safeguard our voting rights, so that when the time comes, Oregonians can vote these leaders out of office.
If you’re proud to stand with me in defense of our democracy, can I count on you to chip in any amount right now? $10, $25, or more would make all the difference. And it’s why I intend to support candidates who are stepping up and serving their constituents, not special interests. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250715em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250715em]
That’s why safeguarding our democracy, our voting rights, and the rule of law is so important. It’s the best way to hold extreme Republicans accountable and fix the mess they just made.
Stand with me in defense of our democracy at this critical moment by chipping in any amount right away. Together, let’s take back our country. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250715em]
Thank you,
Tobias
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

Reba McEntire's Goodbye Shocks The Nation
In an emotional 1-on-1 interview, one of America's most respected icons, Reba McEntire, revealed that she wouldn't be where she is now.

She went on to say that she honestly didn't expect things to get this big and she knew she would receive scrutiny from fans and sponsors for this, but she felt it was a time...Here is what She said: "This was a really, really difficult decision for to tell the truth..."

name: Fair Fight
subject: The voter suppression playbook is expanding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Republicans know they’ll lose their power if every American claims their own. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111536505/557574105/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250715_T1_GATheBeginning_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTU4Mjk0NS1jNTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=421kvn8vK7JGKG7hFYXSzkXW7-Z1QvrXPCTTirC3CT0=&emci=ad582945-c561-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b9582945-c561-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1037277)

| | Hey friend, **Did you know** that states enacted more restrictive voting laws in 2024 than in any year in the last decade except for 2021? **It’s true.** Republicans are coordinating on the state and federal levels to silence communities, undermine democracy, and restrict voting freedom. **The result is Jim Crow 2.0.** Far-right extremists and MAGA Republicans aren’t using literacy tests and poll taxes this time. Instead, they are trying to suppress Black and brown communities from tapping into their voting power because these officials know they’ll lose power once other communities claim their own. [**Republicans are expanding their voter suppression playbook, and we’re fighting back — by educating voters, tracking anti-voter initiatives, and holding far-right elected officials accountable. Fuel our efforts by donating to Fair Fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111536508/557574106/-1427917443?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250715_T1_GATheBeginning_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTU4Mjk0NS1jNTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=421kvn8vK7JGKG7hFYXSzkXW7-Z1QvrXPCTTirC3CT0=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111536510/557574107/-1427917443?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250715_T1_GATheBeginning_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTU4Mjk0NS1jNTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=421kvn8vK7JGKG7hFYXSzkXW7-Z1QvrXPCTTirC3CT0=)
---
Right now, Fair Fight is at the center of one of the most consequential voting rights cases in the country — **and it starts with Georgia.**
To refresh: A far-right, anti-voter group called True the Vote launched an effort to silence people who were disproportionately people of color and first-time voters with mass voter challenges, just weeks after Georgia flipped blue in a presidential election for the first time in 28 years.
Back in May, a federal appeals court heard our appeal in the case, _Fair Fight v. True the Vote_. **While we wait for the court’s decision, we’re continuing to call out extreme anti-voter efforts by Republicans and fight back. **
Our work is dedicated to exposing this coordinated anti-voter machine. There’s a nationwide network of political operatives, dark money, and right-wing organizations trying to make it harder for Americans — especially people of color, military voters, and students — to vote and have their voices heard, and they are not giving up any time soon.
**People should not be forced to jump over hurdles just to cast their vote. As these anti-democratic, anti-voter tactics spread across the country, it’s more critical than ever that we keep up the fight.**
[**Can you make a donation to Fair Fight today to continue powering our pro-voter work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111536513/557574108/-1427917443?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250715_T1_GATheBeginning_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTU4Mjk0NS1jNTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=421kvn8vK7JGKG7hFYXSzkXW7-Z1QvrXPCTTirC3CT0=)

subject: When’s the last time Ashley Moody met with anyone not named Ron?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend, Quick question:
When’s the last time you heard of Ashley Moody showing up for the community?
Not for a press conference.
Not behind a podium.
Not on Fox News.
But face to face. In a church, a union hall, a school, or even a neighborhood where people are actually struggling?
If you can’t remember, you’re not alone. Because the truth is, Ashley Moody doesn’t show up unless it benefits Ashley Moody.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/687433524F4650676B2B62347A30377649343467673331546954685232784F395152704F58622B704467414572645232384B3844386D55364355666372797039/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-15%20at%201.30.17%E2%80%AFPM.png]
While Floridians are organizing for safer communities, lower costs, and real accountability, she’s standing shoulder to shoulder with Donald Trump, defending cruel detention centers and hiding behind political theater instead of facing the people her office is supposed to serve.
Meanwhile, we’ve been in the rooms she avoids . From Broward to Pensacola, we’re building something real, and we’re doing it the old-fashioned way: by showing up. Listening. Learning. Fighting.
Ashley Moody won’t do that, but I will. And I need your help to keep doing it.
It is up to US to regain the trust of those who have been betrayed, left behind, and are suffering at the hands of this administration. Pledge a $10 donation now to change that come 2026! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Trump directs Texas - "Find me 5 more Republican seats!"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Hundreds of Texans just lost their lives in catastrophic flooding. Families are still digging through the wreckage, whole communities are grieving, struggling, and trying to survive.
So, what is Donald Trump focused on?
Redrawing Texas congressional maps to help Republicans win five more seats.
That's not a joke. While funeral homes fill up and families beg for help, Trump and his MAGA allies in Texas are strong-arming the legislature into a special session to gerrymander the state further in their favor.
This isn't governing. It's a power grab built on the backs of people who are still mourning.
Trump thinks Texas is his playground. A place to test voter suppression tactics and redraw lines until the GOP can't lose, but we're going to show him that this state, and this country, are not for sale.
📣 We need 300 grassroots donors to chip in right now to fight back. Every dollar helps us ensure that we're ready to support Democrats in the toughest 2026 fights. Now, there are 5 new Texas Democratic seats that need our help! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07152025&amount=25]

Republican Congressman Randy Fine **[snapped at a disruptive protester](https://substack.com/redirect/1281f2d1-0630-4b01-ace6-218eeff51a10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who shouted out at him**** during today's hearing on antisemitism in academia.
The room went silent...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/230cc3e5-808a-446f-9b7d-d7009eae6f46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Fine was in the middle of questioning Dr. Felix V. Matos Rodriguez, Chancellor at the The City University of New York, for allegedly hiring antisemitic faculty when a protester burst out screaming.
**["Shut up and get out of here you loser!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/1281f2d1-0630-4b01-ace6-218eeff51a10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Fine fired back at the heckler.
Watch the tense moment here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/1281f2d1-0630-4b01-ace6-218eeff51a10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Together with Bonner Private Wines**
### **[The Hidden Gems the Founding Fathers Would Love](https://substack.com/redirect/4eff0638-d6a2-4cf3-8c53-9360557f8312?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4eff0638-d6a2-4cf3-8c53-9360557f8312?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Thomas Jefferson didn't buy his wine at a grocery store.
He sourced it directly from small European vineyards--handwritten letters, wax-sealed crates, the whole deal.
And you know what? He was _right_ to do it.
Today, most wines in the U.S. are mass-produced, stuffed with additives, and sold to the highest bidder.
But a handful of families in places like France, Spain, and Italy are still doing it the old way:
* No chemicals
* No fake oak flavoring
* Just honest, small-batch wine

**[That's what the Bonner Private Wine Partnership is all about.](https://substack.com/redirect/4eff0638-d6a2-4cf3-8c53-9360557f8312?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Every quarter, we ship 6 rare wines direct from small winemakers across Europe and Argentina--bottles you won't find in any store.
You get the kind of wine Jefferson would've fought for.
🍷 Only a few spots open for the next shipment--join now before it fills up:
[Join the Bonner Private Wine Partnership](https://substack.com/redirect/4eff0638-d6a2-4cf3-8c53-9360557f8312?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Mother Jones editor slammed for disgusting comments about JD Vance 's kids at Disneyland**
Clara Jeffrey, editor in chief of the liberal magazine _Mother Jones_ , **[faced intense backlash](https://substack.com/redirect/84e905d9-8fca-48ae-92f3-1a774cee434a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for supporting protestors who booed Vice President JD Vance and his young children during a recent family outing to Disneyland.
* **In a post on Bluesky** , Jeffrey argued the kids "better... know now what their father is about..."
* **" He probably wants the optics of his family being booed," **Jeffrey wrote, prompting swift criticism from across the political spectrum. Many accused her of condoning harassment of children, with GOP strategist Andrew Surabian calling her a "soulless ghoul" and Donald Trump Jr. asking, "WTF is wrong with these people!???"
* **The Vance family -- including children aged 3, 5, and 8 -- was confronted by protesters** during their trip to Disneyland in Anaheim, California. Video footage circulated online showed the group being heckled, with critics claiming it crossed a line into personal and inappropriate territory.
* **California Gov. Gavin Newsom** added fuel to the fire by mocking Vance online, posting: "Hope you enjoy your family time, @JDVance. The families you're tearing apart certainly won't." Vance responded bluntly: "Had a great time, thanks."

* * *
# Cuomo won't quit: Disgraced former NYC governor announces Independent bid
Former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo announced Monday that**[he will still be running for New York City mayor](https://substack.com/redirect/70854e57-bb04-4280-8d25-4bdbc0833636?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as an independent, despite losing the Democratic bid to democratic socialist candidate Zohran Mamdani.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eee26c48-9c4c-426e-b890-6b72866d7225?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Cuomo posted a campaign video** on X titled **["In it to win it,"](https://substack.com/redirect/eee26c48-9c4c-426e-b890-6b72866d7225?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** vowing to fight for "lower rent, safer streets" and better housing under the new "Fight and Deliver" ballot line. He joins a crowded November race alongside Mamdani, GOP nominee Curtis Sliwa, and current Mayor Eric Adams, who is also running as an independent.
* **In the video,** Cuomo criticized Mamdani's platform as "slick slogans but no solutions," and emphasized that only 13% of voters participated in the June primary. The post quickly drew a negative online response, with more replies than likes -- a ratio often seen as a sign of disapproval.
* **Cuomo, who resigned as governor in 2021** following a sexual harassment investigation, also faced scrutiny over his COVID-19 nursing home policies, where he sent those with the illness to nursing homes and then allegedly lied about and hid the resulting death rate. Despite past controversies, he claimed he regretted stepping down as governor, "I'm truly sorry I let you down," and argued his experience makes him the right choice for mayor.

* * *
# Illegal Venezuelan migrant pleads guilty after car collision that killed 11-year-old
An undocumented Venezuelan woman has pleaded guilty to causing a high-speed head-on **[collision that killed 11-year-old](https://substack.com/redirect/63fc9939-d9b1-4777-b6e0-a93bd9d3857c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** just one day before his 12th birthday.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/63fc9939-d9b1-4777-b6e0-a93bd9d3857c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: St. Louis County Police
* **Endrina Bracho, 34** , entered the plea Monday in St. Louis County Circuit Court, after the death of 11-year-old Travis Wolfe in Hazelwood, Missouri.
* **Bracho was driving 75 mph** -- 35 mph over the speed limit -- with her two children in the car on Dec. 20, 2023, when she veered into oncoming traffic and struck the Wolfe family's car. Travis was placed on life support for months before dying of his injuries on March 6, 2024.
* **Bracho pleaded guilty** to first-degree involuntary manslaughter and two counts of second-degree assault. Prosecutors recommended up to 27 years in prison as part of the blind plea, which was made without a prior sentencing agreement. Sentencing is set for Sept. 12.
* **Travis ' death has been cited **by Sen. Josh Hawley (R-Mo.) as a symbol of lax border enforcement. "This is what an open border does. Say his name," Hawley wrote in March, criticizing Biden-era immigration policies. Police said Bracho's undocumented status complicated the initial identification of those involved in the crash.

Illegal Venezuelan migrant pleads guilty after car collision that killed 11-year-old An undocumented Venezuelan woman has pleaded guilty to causing a high-speed head-on just one day before his 12th birthday. | | ---|---|--- Source: St. Louis County Police Endrina Bracho, 34 , entered the plea Monday in St. Louis County Circuit Court, after the death of 11-year-old Travis Wolfe in Hazelwood, Missouri. Bracho was driving 75 mph -- 35 mph over the speed limit -- with her two children in the car on Dec. 20, 2023, when she veered into oncoming traffic and struck the Wolfe family's car. Travis was placed on life support for months before dying of his injuries on March 6, 2024. Bracho pleaded guilty to first-degree involuntary manslaughter and two counts of second-degree assault. Prosecutors recommended up to 27 years in prison as part of the blind plea, which was made without a prior sentencing agreement. Sentencing is set for Sept. 12. Travis ' death has been cited by Sen. Josh Hawley (R-Mo.) as a symbol of lax border enforcement. "This is what an open border does. Say his name," Hawley wrote in March, criticizing Biden-era immigration policies. Police said Bracho's undocumented status complicated the initial identification of those involved in the crash. PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. Peter –
We’ve kicked off a brand-new quarter, but the threats to our rights, our freedoms, and our democracy haven’t gone anywhere.
Donald Trump and MAGA extremists are more dangerous than ever. And now that Trump’s back in power, they’re coming after everything we care about—our climate, health care, and the rule of law itself.
Jena Griswold has never backed down from this fight. As Colorado Secretary of State, she took on Trump’s Big Lie, protected our elections, and defended democracy—even when it meant facing death threats.
Now she’s running for Attorney General to keep fighting for hard-working Coloradans — and to stop Trump’s unconstitutional agenda from hurting the Colorado way of life.

The Senate is voting in the $9 billion rescission package created by DOGE. In the package is the revocation of government funding for NPR and PBS, which some Republicans are actually fighting to keep funding the left wing organizations. President Trump displayed another America First winning strategy in the oval office yesterday. American made patriot missiles and ammunition will be bought by NATO allies and sent to Ukraine in the ongoing war with Russia. Congressman Brandon Gil absolutely grilled NPR CEO Katherine Maher when she testified on Capitol Hill. Exposing the left-wing agenda by simply pulling tweets Maher had posted publicly. He is calling for the Senate to approve the recessions package with no excuses. As part of the House Oversight Committee, the Biden autopen scandal continues to erupt. In a New York Times interview, Biden admitted he had categorically approved pardons, he just didn't know the specifics. With Dr. O'Connor invoking the Fifth Amendment when asking if he lied, this onion has many layers to plee back to fully grasp the depth and breadth of this scandal. Emily Jashinsky is the host of the new show After Party with Emily. Even with the support of President Trump, Pam Bondi has created quite a mess with the Epstein files. Benny Johnson's recent talk with Lara Trump revealed that damage control is needed to be done and more will come to light. Zohran Mamdani won over New Yorkers by focusing on affordability issues in his campaign. Emily unpacks his recent victory and the state of the Democratic party as Bernie and AOC head out on tour.

Hi friend, I'm the Democrat running for Congress in California’s 22nd District -- one of the most competitive races in the country, and a seat that could decide control of the House. Most don’t know this, but while I’m running for Congress, I’m also teaching students at my local community college. These aren’t your typical four-year college students. They’re moms. They’re immigrants. They’re folks holding down night shifts, raising families, but still showing up because they believe in building something better. **That’s the story of the Central Valley. It was my family’s story -- and it’s the story my opponent David Valadao has turned his back on.** He’s voting for the interests of billionaires and the far-right -- not the working people I see every day. Our communities deserve a voice that understands their struggle, and won’t sell them out. That’s why I’m running. **[If you’re ready to help us flip this seat and bring real representation to the Valley, I hope you’ll chip in $10, $35, or whatever you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111537426/557576637/1981932150?refcode=em-7.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNhNWM2MWEtYzc2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cE1aULJf6TjRrljK20qvNKxR7snZFfHfATifydgEI5c=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111537430/557576643/1981932150?refcode=em-7.15.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNhNWM2MWEtYzc2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cE1aULJf6TjRrljK20qvNKxR7snZFfHfATifydgEI5c=)

clean_body: | = Hi friend, I'm the Democrat running for Congress in California’s 22nd District -- one of the most competitive races in the country, and a seat that could decide control of the House. Most don’t know this, but while I’m running for Congress, I’m also teaching students at my local community college. These aren’t your typical four-year college students. They’re moms. They’re immigrants. They’re folks holding down night shifts, raising families, but still showing up because they believe in building something better. That’s the story of the Central Valley. It was my family’s story -- and it’s the story my opponent David Valadao has turned his back on. He’s voting for the interests of billionaires and the far-right -- not the working people I see every day. Our communities deserve a voice that understands their struggle, and won’t sell them out. That’s why I’m running. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being a part of this movement, Professor Randy Villegas | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. **Rebecca Cooke** is running for Congress on the values that make Wisconsin strong. She knows how to deliver for families in rural communities because she grew up in one.
Rebecca comes from a working-class family, and has spent her life building opportunity — not tearing it down.
She'll protect health care, defend reproductive freedom, grow local economies, and make sure every family, no matter their zip code, has a real shot. Flipping this seat is essential to taking back the House, and the best way to help Rebecca win is by donating to our **Mission Majority Fund. **
****[**Every dollar to the Mission Majority Fund goes where it matters most — into the most competitive races, with the highest stakes, at the most strategic moments. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I wanted to personally reach out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
My team tells me we’re about $3,000 short of where we want to be at this point in the month.
Hi Peter,
I wanted to personally reach out to ask if you would pitch in before my campaign’s mid-month deadline at midnight tonight.
My team tells me we’re about $3,000 short of where we want to be at this point in the month, and your support could help us get back to where we need to be.
We’re organizing nationwide to resist Trump’s authoritarianism and build a new kind of politics that puts working people first. But that work takes resources, and since I don’t take money from corporate PACs, it’s grassroots supporters like you who make it all possible.
**Use the link below to chip in anything you can now:**
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250715**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250715-1?refcode=em20250715-5243&refcode2=5243_420207_ahlfak&akid=5243%2E420207%2Eahlfak)
Thank you, thank you, thank you for your support.
— Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250715-5243-footer&t=1&refcode2=5243_420207_ahlfak&akid=5243%2E420207%2Eahlfak)**
---
