name: Kathryn Gonzalez
subject: The late night call I dreaded
disclaimer_text: paid for by radical billionaire George Soros – are going after innocent officers at an alarming rate
body:
| | |
---
Dear Patriot,Planning a wedding is supposed to be an exciting time. But instead of buying a dress and booking our honeymoon, I’ve hired an attorney to fight for my fiancé’s life.Please, let me explain...I am engaged to marry Deputy Jacob Diaz of the Otero County Sheriff’s Department in New Mexico. Jacob is a good man. Kind, loyal, and hard working. He’s the kind of officer you hope shows up in your time of need.But everything changed on June 25, 2024, when Jacob responded to a late-night report of a possibly intoxicated man walking along the median of a busy highway. Upon his arrival, Jacob found a young man with his shirt draped over his left arm, hiding whatever was in his waistband. Following protocol, Jacob ordered the man to stay back and show his hands.
---
_“Stop right there, bro.” “Are you alright?” “Let me see your other hand, bro.”_
---
The young man refused to comply. And in the next few seconds, both their lives changed forever.The man quickly walked toward my fiancé and drew what appeared to be a firearm.Jacob’s training kicked in. He fired his service weapon.The man fell to the ground, but he continued to reach for his weapon– ignoring Jacob’s commands to show his hands and stop reaching for the gun.Jacob fired additional shots, killing the armed man.We later learned that the man’s weapon was an airsoft gun.My heart broke for the young man’s family. But I also thanked God for protecting my fiancé that night. It easily could have been his life lost on that median. The New Mexico State Police launched an in-depth investigation into Jacob’s actions.I knew without a doubt the shooting was justified. After all, the suspect drew a firearm on an officer and would not back down.So, we were relieved – but not surprised – when the State Police cleared Jacob of any wrongdoing and reinstated him on the force in September. That should have been the end of this story...But out of nowhere, an anti-police prosecutor filed First-Degree Murder charges against Jacob.Now my fiancé faces life in prison for doing his job and defending himself in the line of duty. **[And I’m swallowing my pride and reaching out to you, a perfect stranger, for help.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f1ba981ede04c398bc46f77528d84ec&_e=EK0saQZX9AAfCQyjmOYbc1H475BZ20le7kf33K-cKThjOGbagYwVhFcYpl_akMNQbPVJat_IWoK5c8J5qcuuA0HWDe0wMkY-bdI3SV3dXNADJqYVrQp0AnAmXzkeuzD6POz14t79wGhn7FpQxmbGR4TqalzLTR4IWEHx2rXNe3OBTel_oWuWYKZg6p6WZSdutvnEP7K0hjg7FoRM_Rfi8tzGbaPihSlIkXLBjR7RB2ytaPPdB4YTuaixdI8O_TFHHYcEZ7JVDXCDBxrmj1Evh9KAplZpLn6VcrPuiUTjkaYTB0uCHmLEL4vzMS7rwe5qGa-lQizE-Edj9o-mZa_NaDAhWDDq1CDuVylbZ5HjLKUfQa0vdvvymw14SANrgYyFGSmE1FmVcmxyIoE4FaZD40fG6sbvYVfFhtA-_hUFgzAxwRUZeHSIIVeC91IRcNJV_3O37u1bzsCOaQH2zL3IPHaLpUFedhAMGgMvoJlQhnZEjP6fHbrpUsZSrQgp9hWwoiiQzh0ZH9YPqkdhDr6Ex9yP-9_UzAG1ODwxvx36Wmrf-2WEUbRzaCKvgM4zD9Pk-oToUvKxXCpJr5oljW6sW6LzWeJys45r8CDEOoih5CcWq6W8Hbyuk7ljLa2tHzUohrHC28enqLfUBzK3awEjCWlMG8Qjj93N3k1PNFrDB6Q%3D)** You see, this has long been one of my biggest fears. Political prosecutions of police officers is at an all-time high right now and New Mexico is not a police-friendly state.But I still can’t believe this is happening to _my_ fiancé.We’re in our 20s. We have our entire lives ahead of us. Now all our hopes and dreams may be destroyed by an anti-cop prosecutor with an ax to grind against law enforcement.So, instead of saving for a wedding and our future together, Jacob and I scraped together enough money to hire an attorney.But fighting First-Degree Murder charges will cost upwards of $200,000.That’s money we just don’t have.Every day I prayed. I asked God to make this nightmare go away... for the prosecutor to drop the charges... or to show us a way to pay for Jacob’s defense. My desperate prayers were answered when we received a phone call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).The LELDF Board of Directors reviewed the facts of the case and they are confident that Jacob is innocent – so they’ve offered to fund his defense.God heard my prayers. For the first time in months, I am hopeful for our future – that Jacob may not spend the rest of his life behind bars after all.Not just because LELDF is making sure Jacob gets the defense he deserves, but because LELDF’s Directors are the leading experts on policing and “use of force” in the nation – folks like Ronald Reagan’s Attorney General Ed Meese and former Assistant Director of the FBI Ron Hosko. With over 30 years of helping wrongly accused officers clear their names, LELDF’s support carries weight. (And the prosecution knows this!)But we still have a lot of work to do. LELDF doesn’t receive taxpayer funding and grants and large gifts are few and far between. Instead, LELDF relies on kind-hearted strangers who respect our men and women in blue and want to help cops like Jacob who are being railroaded by progressive prosecutors.Folks, I hope, like you.This isn’t easy for me so I’m just going to come out and ask... **[Will you help LELDF fight for my fiancé by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or more today?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f1ba981ede04c398bc46f77528d84ec&_e=EK0saQZX9AAfCQyjmOYbc1H475BZ20le7kf33K-cKThjOGbagYwVhFcYpl_akMNQbPVJat_IWoK5c8J5qcuuA0HWDe0wMkY-bdI3SV3dXNADJqYVrQp0AnAmXzkeuzD6POz14t79wGhn7FpQxmbGR4TqalzLTR4IWEHx2rXNe3OBTel_oWuWYKZg6p6WZSdutvnEP7K0hjg7FoRM_Rfi8tzGbaPihSlIkXLBjR7RB2wX64HARCfO1Top8C30ZiSOKMEEEadyY4c-FkoZEBCaCUvmp3hoUGMQPpIHgqxZzrnV7mc1gyOBpLWz3DiSiss-kcr-bQeHQFyvJTgim2R3nj9FlT1h5GwPkGRTDxroJ6vZWIQVh4iTP35i76Ln0Sdbk16hf6fI7TZjvTdlyVdsQPO296TIBlc83c7q3xezDG5ZHPQiSiB-4ATirMA4SRvW3KdiR0WO4O37-_NWbboedXk5vE-VKiun-Tgx3_ch5NqIHQ6jRUmCqTB1OFIv7_tVfBCPih_pYRJgFgAkQgGsTieAOKSbF1VEoq9j3Mzrf7FmAFcqmloeNqkGskCpRPEej1avtbd3itejtf4HGQ8cXXER45ehGQ8UD3BY3Z9SYK2C0QTB5jtZ0VXiooK1JBAsGWy35d8rdKNrErlUCnu0g1qFA8uV2Dkpd90RfxQOHzM%3D) **No matter how much you’re able to help, your donation will be put to immediate use helping LELDF support wrongly accused officers like Jacob.I don’t think I have to tell you it’s a terrible time to be a cop in America. It’s all over the news.Not only are ambush attacks up, but anti-police prosecutors – often bought and paid for by radical billionaire George Soros – are going after innocent officers at an alarming rate. Even when the facts clearly show the cop did his job by the book and a previous investigation cleared him!Still, officers like Jacob show up every day – put on the badge and put their lives in danger to protect their communities. **[That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me today and help LELDF support my fiancé.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f1ba981ede04c398bc46f77528d84ec&_e=EK0saQZX9AAfCQyjmOYbc1H475BZ20le7kf33K-cKThjOGbagYwVhFcYpl_akMNQbPVJat_IWoK5c8J5qcuuA0HWDe0wMkY-bdI3SV3dXNADJqYVrQp0AnAmXzkeuzD6POz14t79wGhn7FpQxmbGR4TqalzLTR4IWEHx2rXNe3OBTel_oWuWYKZg6p6WZSdutvnEP7K0hjg7FoRM_Rfi8tzGbaPihSlIkXLBjR7RB2zeOxJebwirVR7u8OhDiCsnJLtL_YrNiVzkJ0maFxysCubslRnyc86OxihmMt5IoCPmRLW3as_9YKcuFl9JIyIg30yKa2X3SqG_Zcw9IebbtHNfiY3CMEa91d7ovlf6u5dwrHfYykGgWQ5vy59qrq6EgVM71VaR7-E6Fiuz29zMAEZyXXsot-G7CSGfkV9h5CoHTKvpsncMRR_eISLkv7-JMchDLQVddA415YN8P7gTxh3aNfVwEaBJy4KOotAoitoeem6ly-pUMPJ8ShhZQTD2rUphDBi85jOybSFytUe5ZayJikQ_IJYKHFvsyyTuYt9sVn69Om46xpffeGE2WbNti4_e2_OcUX7L-fqECVZhEpv4mVMpHpCRVl3i0L0FVfmK0nnGMD0fTqTwsT4dLscKRqUBixCU16otji_UW74Dga__MAspDKqmax-yPuT5VhA%3D)** Your generous donation will make a difference when it comes to the bills. And if you’re a God-fearing person like me, will you please pray for Jacob and our family? Just knowing we aren’t alone means the world to us as we face down this nightmare.Thank you from the bottom of my heart.
---
Gratefully,
---
Kathryn Gonzalez

clean_body: | | | Dear Patriot,Planning a wedding is supposed to be an exciting time. But instead of buying a dress and booking our honeymoon, I’ve hired an attorney to fight for my fiancé’s life.Please, let me explain...I am engaged to marry Deputy Jacob Diaz of the Otero County Sheriff’s Department in New Mexico. Jacob is a good man. Kind, loyal, and hard working. He’s the kind of officer you hope shows up in your time of need.But everything changed on June 25, 2024, when Jacob responded to a late-night report of a possibly intoxicated man walking along the median of a busy highway. Upon his arrival, Jacob found a young man with his shirt draped over his left arm, hiding whatever was in his waistband. Following protocol, Jacob ordered the man to stay back and show his hands. “Stop right there, bro.” “Are you alright?” “Let me see your other hand, bro.” The young man refused to comply. And in the next few seconds, both their lives changed forever.The man quickly walked toward my fiancé and drew what appeared to be a firearm.Jacob’s training kicked in. He fired his service weapon.The man fell to the ground, but he continued to reach for his weapon– ignoring Jacob’s commands to show his hands and stop reaching for the gun.Jacob fired additional shots, killing the armed man.We later learned that the man’s weapon was an airsoft gun.My heart broke for the young man’s family. But I also thanked God for protecting my fiancé that night. It easily could have been his life lost on that median. The New Mexico State Police launched an in-depth investigation into Jacob’s actions.I knew without a doubt the shooting was justified. After all, the suspect drew a firearm on an officer and would not back down.So, we were relieved – but not surprised – when the State Police cleared Jacob of any wrongdoing and reinstated him on the force in September. That should have been the end of this story...But out of nowhere, an anti-police prosecutor filed First-Degree Murder charges against Jacob.Now my fiancé faces life in prison for doing his job and defending himself in the line of duty. You see, this has long been one of my biggest fears. Political prosecutions of police officers is at an all-time high right now and New Mexico is not a police-friendly state.But I still can’t believe this is happening to my fiancé.We’re in our 20s. We have our entire lives ahead of us. Now all our hopes and dreams may be destroyed by an anti-cop prosecutor with an ax to grind against law enforcement.So, instead of saving for a wedding and our future together, Jacob and I scraped together enough money to hire an attorney.But fighting First-Degree Murder charges will cost upwards of $200,000.That’s money we just don’t have.Every day I prayed. I asked God to make this nightmare go away... for the prosecutor to drop the charges... or to show us a way to pay for Jacob’s defense. My desperate prayers were answered when we received a phone call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).The LELDF Board of Directors reviewed the facts of the case and they are confident that Jacob is innocent – so they’ve offered to fund his defense.God heard my prayers. For the first time in months, I am hopeful for our future – that Jacob may not spend the rest of his life behind bars after all.Not just because LELDF is making sure Jacob gets the defense he deserves, but because LELDF’s Directors are the leading experts on policing and “use of force” in the nation – folks like Ronald Reagan’s Attorney General Ed Meese and former Assistant Director of the FBI Ron Hosko. With over 30 years of helping wrongly accused officers clear their names, LELDF’s support carries weight. (And the prosecution knows this!)But we still have a lot of work to do. LELDF doesn’t receive taxpayer funding and grants and large gifts are few and far between. Instead, LELDF relies on kind-hearted strangers who respect our men and women in blue and want to help cops like Jacob who are being railroaded by progressive prosecutors.Folks, I hope, like you.This isn’t easy for me so I’m just going to come out and ask... No matter how much you’re able to help, your donation will be put to immediate use helping LELDF support wrongly accused officers like Jacob.I don’t think I have to tell you it’s a terrible time to be a cop in America. It’s all over the news.Not only are ambush attacks up, but anti-police prosecutors – often bought and paid for by radical billionaire George Soros – are going after innocent officers at an alarming rate. Even when the facts clearly show the cop did his job by the book and a previous investigation cleared him!Still, officers like Jacob show up every day – put on the badge and put their lives in danger to protect their communities. Your generous donation will make a difference when it comes to the bills. And if you’re a God-fearing person like me, will you please pray for Jacob and our family? Just knowing we aren’t alone means the world to us as we face down this nightmare.Thank you from the bottom of my heart. Gratefully, Kathryn Gonzalez | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

subject: Times v. Sun l David v. Goliath
body:
The Times has betrayed its readers

| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fdb7793e7f524162b7ab2cc2285a993a&_e=d-q_iHjdRo_wZEp6ZZE9rU-812eQc5-znnhyd29WMyIGU0V9rkDsmmfg4thuBYWOEcMibbr7v3oV_Z-9-0bDp8HrneslVbpdByD724_nFZVkBxpYO_EhxnH7rskTB5MEvBW_5WaWvgoJhhTF1vU5wgnimgWS2UzjMORdJdXuGmpmmhS4VWJWb_G3PCveYSgKeG0_LTboozJPjyu7B7MJoBPpYuWUsaTKolqJwHwRdGZyKcsyfAdkHYlWUlJnGov3w2i1i3ImJYGcuq9cegsP7DtL7_fvVlCibfJ1ql3SsbOlNX1jzIVm52Eul5Q9gy44eaFrgqDUxjPXxViltrstUfShdgdked1ccDcB__N0ej1dLprvzGSjxcY0m9ne8fizB6VzOfSXXrUrP0NR1bVUwWuzCxNvS2FFemZre7GUh-BJUyVZVEC3rp3perpa41u_soezNG2E6ruXck0sL_ktJqyJuqKYYXIQGFgjuujcXgz-rSfys91DTsN1F3DxaPgPuWjPGObTI6a2zC5qOaKuW-PK6vxY4isgUjZkUmPqv7a5TobqTLdLur7pH3y2nQMBTMJUPibJsbUUqadBjFV48GRFs2LY88Fag9qY2HAiIu8%3D)

| | Reader,It wasn't so long ago that The New York Times was upheld as the gold standard in journalism. Today, many Americans feel the paper has betrayed its readers.

Now, enthusiasm is growing over The New York Sun returning to its historic role as a counterweight to the Times. We've heard a lot of frustration over the widening gulf between what the Times claims to be and what it is in reality.
---
| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fdb7793e7f524162b7ab2cc2285a993a&_e=d-q_iHjdRo_wZEp6ZZE9rU-812eQc5-znnhyd29WMyIGU0V9rkDsmmfg4thuBYWOEcMibbr7v3oV_Z-9-0bDp8HrneslVbpdByD724_nFZVkBxpYO_EhxnH7rskTB5MEvBW_5WaWvgoJhhTF1vU5wgnimgWS2UzjMORdJdXuGmpmmhS4VWJWb_G3PCveYSgKKnidZIDzSGZ1YcvX1WuqY9QdkcFGxurbIhunqj6mBoGdlDDivWAr-HRnxiY_vavh_n1pFhfe0WsIpIcE1QZ6u6x92GE7zP6Wm0lufNt-0IhsILDNNxWj8LGrdqqLknXR_R9SeQqsOQ9r2p87veEdAQIiQPg_RPwIhLFdbuq39wDGK7Yu_k8qm0lQSY9Zu-aVa74SjRAO8zs8yHNn88ptO-2-Mk_vP5JuEFFI5vllQ2hp7SwRuZFwn6E-2JanuD90ErEUliqvs8m1wb--9Dt2CVTCw7dUvrF8UDPA33u3THjFelDnwbXlqtammGVo72pNsQUCpuxTJbIfKBo0EyhcN-xLcYNc4wLPxKbo85-fmT-cwbbWk3_lDpDNnYa0EuVE-YtrrQk7EqEWfuYdPo96VHJdRo7B4sNdCocnz2QBONc%3D)
---
| | Like the Times, we're an almost 200 years old, Pulitzer-winning broadsheet with robust coverage of politics and the arts, and now focused on a digital-first strategy. **But we have a very different approach to journalism than the Times.** One that's in higher demand now than ever. It won't be easy. The Times is large and established. It's a modern David vs. Goliath media battle.Ultimately, a membership with the Sun doesn't just give you full access to the finest American journalism, **it also sends a message to the Times and other newsrooms that have lost their way. Will you join us?**
---

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Too many women are suffering in silence.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
It’s time to take action against this widespread problem.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111538579/557579733/-211760203?refcode=EM_F_250715fibroids_N_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTgyZGEzMS1jOTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=suBlh0yd8SwEru8zsNQ9Rwb5o1LxeGeEWhnFJ32PNso=) Peter,

It is estimated that **two-thirds of all women** will experience uterine fibroids during their lifetime. As we speak, millions of women, especially Black women, are suffering constant pain from fibroids, which can cause pain, heavy menstrual bleeding, and fertility issues, and are at an increased risk of uterine cancer. Yet, the federal government is doing very little about it.

We need to take action in order to improve treatments and awareness. So many women have suffered in silence – _I was one of them_ – but the time for silence is over. Now it’s time for action.

**That is why I am proud to announce that I have reintroduced the Uterine Fibroid Intervention and Gynecological Health and Treatment Act (U-FIGHT Act)**. The U-FIGHT Act would create a new federal grant program for the early detection and treatment of uterine fibroids. It supports early detection, education, awareness, and research, thereby enhancing healthcare and improving people’s lives.

Early detection and intervention can reduce the need for invasive surgery and treatment options that may impact fertility. Early detection also prevents tumor progression and worsening symptoms. Currently, there is no authorization to respond to this widespread and significant problem. And I am working to change that.

[**Help support me as I work to improve healthcare outcomes for women across our nation by contributing $5 today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111538580/557579734/-211760203?refcode=EM_F_250715fibroids_N_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTgyZGEzMS1jOTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=suBlh0yd8SwEru8zsNQ9Rwb5o1LxeGeEWhnFJ32PNso=)

If you’ve suffered from fibroids, you know – it can take over your entire life. It’s time for women to be heard. Together, we can push for this comprehensive package addressing a vital women’s health crisis.

In this together,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?
---

name: Michael Bennet
subject: This is an assault on the free press.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/protectpublicmedia [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/protectpublicmedia]
Hi team,
This week, the U.S. Senate will vote on President Trump’s request to slash $1 billion in funding to public broadcasters NPR and PBS.
If you believe, like I do, that a free, fair, and independent press is a fundamental core of our democracy, please add your name to our petition calling on the Senate to PROTECT funding for NPR and PBS. [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/protectpublicmedia]
News outlets like NPR and PBS are highly-regarded public broadcast organizations with rigorous journalistic standards that emphasize accuracy, fairness, and independence. President Trump wants to undermine these bastions of free press to silence the truth, rather than face the facts.
President Trump’s proposed cuts would be catastrophic for local stations, particularly those in rural areas. In Colorado alone, nearly two dozen news stations would be at risk of losing funding, jeopardizing operations for stations like Colorado Public Radio, Rocky Mountains PBS, KOTO in Telluride, KSUT in Ignacio, KHEN in Salida—just to name a few.
As your Senator, I vehemently oppose these cuts, and I could use your help in this fight. Would you add your name to my petition telling the U.S. Senate to protect funding for public broadcasting networks? [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/protectpublicmedia]
PROTECT PUBLIC MEDIA [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/protectpublicmedia]
This fight is personal for me. From 1983 to 1993, my father, Doug Bennet, led NPR as Ronald Reagan, the last Republican president to defund and undermine it, launched his attacks on public broadcasting. My dad was hired to manage the aftermath, and through his steadfast belief in accurate and accessible news, he helped expand NPR’s audience and operations.
And through his work, I learned just how invaluable it is for Americans to have access to essential, trustworthy, and, in some cases, lifesaving information at little to no cost to taxpayers.
These cuts could shut down some of the only local news sources in remote and rural communities in Colorado and across the county. That's not only unacceptable, it's dangerous.
I strongly oppose President Trump's attempts to diminish public media for his own political agenda, and I could use your voice in this fight. Please add your name to my petition today demanding that the U.S. Senate protect funding for public broadcasting networks. [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/protectpublicmedia]
Thank you,
Michael
https://www.facebook.com/michaelbennet [https://www.facebook.com/michaelbennet] https://x.com/MichaelBennet [https://x.com/MichaelBennet] https://www.instagram.com/michaelbennet [https://www.instagram.com/michaelbennet]

clean_body: [] Hi team, This week, the U.S. Senate will vote on President Trump’s request to slash $1 billion in funding to public broadcasters NPR and PBS. If you believe, like I do, that a free, fair, and independent press is a fundamental core of our democracy, please add your name to our petition calling on the Senate to PROTECT funding for NPR and PBS. [] News outlets like NPR and PBS are highly-regarded public broadcast organizations with rigorous journalistic standards that emphasize accuracy, fairness, and independence. President Trump wants to undermine these bastions of free press to silence the truth, rather than face the facts. President Trump’s proposed cuts would be catastrophic for local stations, particularly those in rural areas. In Colorado alone, nearly two dozen news stations would be at risk of losing funding, jeopardizing operations for stations like Colorado Public Radio, Rocky Mountains PBS, KOTO in Telluride, KSUT in Ignacio, KHEN in Salida—just to name a few. As your Senator, I vehemently oppose these cuts, and I could use your help in this fight. Would you add your name to my petition telling the U.S. Senate to protect funding for public broadcasting networks? [] PROTECT PUBLIC MEDIA [] This fight is personal for me. From 1983 to 1993, my father, Doug Bennet, led NPR as Ronald Reagan, the last Republican president to defund and undermine it, launched his attacks on public broadcasting. My dad was hired to manage the aftermath, and through his steadfast belief in accurate and accessible news, he helped expand NPR’s audience and operations. And through his work, I learned just how invaluable it is for Americans to have access to essential, trustworthy, and, in some cases, lifesaving information at little to no cost to taxpayers. These cuts could shut down some of the only local news sources in remote and rural communities in Colorado and across the county. That's not only unacceptable, it's dangerous. I strongly oppose President Trump's attempts to diminish public media for his own political agenda, and I could use your voice in this fight. Please add your name to my petition today demanding that the U.S. Senate protect funding for public broadcasting networks. [] Thank you, Michael [] [] [] Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore. CLICK HERE TO RECEIVE FEWER EMAILS FROM OUR CAMPAIGN [] By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Down Ballot Defenders (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Down Ballot Defenders Summit recap.
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Thousands of grassroots Democrats RSVP’d to our event, where they heard from top Democratic leaders in the states about the importance of strengthening our state legislative majorities in 2025, 2026, and beyond. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Last Wednesday, Team DLCC hosted our first-ever Down Ballot Defenders Summit, featuring DLCC President Heather Williams and four of our incredible state legislators. We noticed you expressed interest in attending, but didn’t RSVP. We hope you’re able to join next time! To help you stay informed, we pulled together some of the highlights for you below: Before you read on, it’s important that you know that electing inspirational state legislators like Leader Brinks in MI, Leader Reives in NC, Speaker McClinton in PA, and Del. Feggans in VA require year-round investments and hard work. ** Your dollars go further at the state ballot level – together, we can make major strides toward building Democratic power. [Will you make your first donation to the DLCC today?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-_BloSDenqRNrVyMVIyKnYO-BQz-baqElE00Ls-9bnr1zm_ZereCBgAsXdK99nWEDJYb1NzzL3i0bph13XDPir_jIgXa21tR4usO5O5twrauARUjBh7DZTm2YhhvbOOlnGyPGZZeqd_SfgFV86IXduBTQrJdr1UGxjuzWVI0SRoFjdkgaC_oYuMZEWr1TewBkeyTATTnaHgJ-Ndl1q-8Dw1f_OZzS8PmykyTATCQnwevKRzbOL8tLBfs6q1RFTIY8/4i7/Obg7kj00Ry6-mDQ8GnwftA/h0/h001.VZhWzNtlgJrbdHzZnVAHKgUz1dpFCumWNBC7kmg_0Sc) **
* * *
**Where our efforts matter most** Unlike the hundreds of millions of dollars spent on federal races, we can make transformational change through the states because your dollars go further at the state ballot level. [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-_BloSDenqRNrVyMVIyKnYO-BQz-baqElE00Ls-9bnr1zm_ZereCBgAsXdK99nWEBymwZG1O-maEyIUQEs1EgAMg8kSkaRY-XO7bHDdYDtrMh2MWggz6fg6cLP_bNLNvfQ6QT-Weykfbz-XOzAn0U7pmkqVoMbEppsfD-j-oWJNvuB-WqjHA1AKBHtmhji40cBLDpDeanUSpSp9Fw1nSQyfpe2onSn0f9bBuuz2e3HE5Iy0u2hyrVwOCCr_XyKN5U/4i7/Obg7kj00Ry6-mDQ8GnwftA/h1/h001.XPlKVyCalFvh85svXbT3AHl7anFSlrtCo25jkUtJXtU) One of the most impactful things you can do today is support your state and local candidates – in places like your community and across the country. **How Democrats are protecting Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security, SNAP, and DEI** In statehouses where Democrats are in the majority, our leaders are preparing and planning for the GOP’s cruel and reckless cuts. In states where Democrats are in the minority, they are _still_ working to call out these brutal decisions. [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-_BloSDenqRNrVyMVIyKnYO-BQz-baqElE00Ls-9bnr1zm_ZereCBgAsXdK99nWEDJYb1NzzL3i0bph13XDPirywxhn-pOIrxDsgP0DCH58X5dvUN_b3rVZCtOpTz3CMDzUTTsWTxTxUkueU4y8MVFa_jc4CJBQRjtBfZl-GiHXDyjBAfSCxNT6tghmIYFts6Y77KBBrlrpJT7kBi17VIG-2TXXgBiNm6fWrxAw7UWLqlEIdpu41f22lQUBHkY0qk/4i7/Obg7kj00Ry6-mDQ8GnwftA/h2/h001.6PM4DS61kwJTXuHYggPO8c9oWeO-e06IZuWP3KOZ0oY) One of the best things we can do as Democrats is increase our power in the states so that Trump’s agenda is challenged on _all fronts._ **State Powers under the Trump Administration** Compared to Trump’s first term, Democrats have substantially more power in the states – we’ve added 10 more legislative chambers and _tripled_ the number of states with unified Democratic control. [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-_BloSDenqRNrVyMVIyKnYO-BQz-baqElE00Ls-9bnr1zm_ZereCBgAsXdK99nWEDJYb1NzzL3i0bph13XDPiruTky_EIcqKDDInotG3-g4z2F-a0mdIyfCjUXnJ-w8WuH_26FFRUQLGuth5uofOTLOM6K1ca37b3LTRJ8XrWdKykCBN_cL9yvKznBlhvb0rW54oBQO3TF4urDH0KNCK0a3RzuB-MLeDWpfW0jrseZVKcRSBI7w-K0fNOBgav11Yg/4i7/Obg7kj00Ry6-mDQ8GnwftA/h3/h001.dXce5cHMTgyIibPzhHyHd99r8Nmn-e-yqG7flrbcuZY) State Dems are using that power to provide the strongest defense against the extremism and chaos descending from Washington. We must work from the ground up – volunteering, donating, and supporting local candidates – to ensure we can build the largest movement possible to kick Republicans out of office up and down the ballot. **Stopping Project 2025** Project 2025 was tested in the states years before it launched on the national stage. State Democrats are on the front lines of combating those policies. Fighting back is more important than ever. [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-_BloSDenqRNrVyMVIyKnYO-BQz-baqElE00Ls-9bnr1zm_ZereCBgAsXdK99nWEDJYb1NzzL3i0bph13XDPirzoPSX-GHiM-BDO1aCUo_fL9bU2XsSdIeBC8U12sqlZg1gC5FBRI4YOfklNzaMI0ExDZkHCtWmYIyU_MPKewmT-oKfwvBNWeH3iYwdr9UxYoLc0064Vp9Plo3fTvKJ5dOOzKq5CnllI46HgghuuORzQshfs-Dd74-s13jSVy477M/4i7/Obg7kj00Ry6-mDQ8GnwftA/h4/h001.tIW5TcksbsCVuIfwuve0PsiIgcwWv_sJMaWwn0r1IcE) Donald Trump will only be able to undermine our democracy and roll back our rights _if we stop showing up._ **The Fight Ahead** Democrats in the states have made incredible progress and gains – expanding health care access, lowering costs for working people, and so much more. Now, we’re fighting hard to keep that momentum going ahead of this year’s elections in Virginia and next year’s midterms. [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-_BloSDenqRNrVyMVIyKnYO-BQz-baqElE00Ls-9bnr1zm_ZereCBgAsXdK99nWEDJYb1NzzL3i0bph13XDPirukmZJjlBAeKvAdHUQ65UXrhYv1MAJhakIgen_oaLpCgzPfFLOqVrM_idkU9QyrvgJJUbiGZBv3tB1L_Fsy4k_vW4eYxMm8AN5_aZaGEyQSuLjKveUj0KRIaFPDpFiUIVEoDS1x5LFSyJwdSPAEiEXUP07GjCDZy0dP_vHjV5dko/4i7/Obg7kj00Ry6-mDQ8GnwftA/h5/h001.azjat3oReAoTItvRNDLBMtSntd3LV5UiYsMPLR-CFKA) Already, in special elections this year, the DLCC has invested hundreds of thousands of dollars to ensure Democrats don’t miss a single opportunity – including flipping competitive districts where Trump won in 2024. **We have a game plan for combating Trump and the MAGA agenda.** That includes investing and winning more special elections, preparing to maintain our Democratic majority in the Virginia House, and laying the groundwork for Democratic victory in next year’s fast-approaching midterm elections. But this requires a movement, and that starts with you. **You can help fuel our work to elect state Democrats today as a Down Ballot Defender.[Will you start a recurring monthly gift to build a long-term and sustainable foundation for state Democrats to move our democracy and country forward?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-_BloSDenqRNrVyMVIyKnYO-BQz-baqElE00Ls-9bnr1zm_ZereCBgAsXdK99nWEBdWaaup6VpK7lYqKNEAKh6WHPEExBI77A9VTp-833_Y9FL_PN6fRaFtQB72rfW1V8I-LVpTpEzMJnHfypr1GsAeOE8kMRsCcqPN8-C6JYbqhjgMVveABhVdRqiYvJfRsxqckasWh87h8E8thKKEFX3dc31Zw_0ZMLVryZEF9di4vDHVCMoWoqpFYahuD0KtZ8yl4TWipUkxPYnZhF87u4F/4i7/Obg7kj00Ry6-mDQ8GnwftA/h6/h001.oYfL_ERD7EWhZeox6mC91bFvzluKmXyrRzio6rZTrJE)** **[Become a Down Ballot Defender name: Forward Party
subject: Forward Is Turning 3 - And You’re Invited!

body:
Celebrate our birthday and the amazing progress we’ve all made!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=1)

Tuesday, July 15, 2025 | Peter -- Three years ago, The Forward Party launched as the first step in a long road towards building a better and more representative democracy that listens to the needs of its people, holds elected officials accountable, and drives the country forward. In that time, we’ve taken some incredible steps together. We’ve gone from just an idea in the heads of Americans who were fed up with the broken politics of today to a movement of hundreds of thousands of voters, chapters in a dozen states, party ballot recognition in nearly half of those, and the momentum to change the country.**We are America’s New Party!!** We couldn’t have done it without you, so we’re throwing a party! Join us at 7 PM Eastern on July 29th for an extra special birthday bash and celebrate with all your favorite Forwardists and more than a few special surprises. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_turns_3?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=2 "Celebrate Our Birthday Together!") [Celebrate Our Birthday Together!](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_turns_3?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=2)
---
**[The Forward Party adds Goodwin, Berube in Senior Positions as Third Party Movement Grows](https://www.forwardparty.com/media/blog/the-forward-party-adds-goodwin-berube-in-senior-positions-as-third-party-movement-grows/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=3)** | **Forwardparty.com** The Forward Party is expanding its team to build a new option for all Americans. John Goodwin joins as communications director and Kayla Berube joins as political director, adding talented, seasoned senior leadership to the team, while expanding the internal infrastructure for long-term growth and success at the ballot box. **[Americans Desperately Need More Political Choice. NJ Could Lead The Way](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=Kj9PWRbfpQdaarq_xT6eWIgcOVCjVocRa0wU6JrBJartNp17C82iX6IXW6ypuAa7Ilfxe5PspjbaOsjbCtJYCNVTohNlPvkzNYX4T7krqfYI1y-a7rAvm5xzAEGVVZQfek3Qi0mXsQJLQQyOJY7pEr9S5D4WJC9P2P0VI9ZY5hlBRshrTpkwRlBiujllGxDt&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=4)** | **Northjersey.com** Former New Jersey Governors Christine Todd Whitman and Jon Corzine weigh in on the state of the legacy parties and why New Jersey needs an option that more voters feel represented by. **[Independents Should Embrace The Moment And Lean Into Their Power](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=dVV2rW1vUlrpxgYY_oyMKhSpjMDDSlO_sUv3Kymh7cf_eIHSmoaDwE12joBKJ7xu8Kh2KYj_wI3UblDOYEGxYod640n4cRDWVgAOGxbjsgfhXyKUf2ujyd5DhxK3YRK4&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=5)** | **The Hill** John Opdycke, who heads up the nonprofit Open Primaries, breaks down just how much power independents have (or could have) on our current system and what it would take for them to wield it effectively.
**July 17 | Forward NJ: July Organizing Call
** Join the Forward Party of New Jersey for our next statewide organizing call as we grow our movement and gear up for the fall! **🗓️** Thursday, July 17th | ⏰ 7:00 PM
📍 Google Meet (link provided in RSVP email) **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/12578/forward_nj_summer_organizing_call?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=6)** **July 17 | Civic Engagement With The Young Forwardists
** Join the Young Forwardists team at 7:00 PM EST/4:00 PM PST for an exclusive Civic Engagement opportunity! As our political divisions continue to grow, it's up to every student at every high school and college to lead the charge toward change, starting with local ordinance and political engagement! This meeting will establish some ways that you can get involved locally, in your state, and nationally. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/civic_engagement_20250717?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=7)** **July 18 | NOVA FWD Social
** Meet up with NOVA Forwardists for food, drinks, & conversation at a fun location in Alexandria. Bring your questions, ambitions, and thirst! Why not grab a few friends to come with you, too? **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/nova_fwd_social_20250718?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=8)** **July 21 | FWD NY Monthly Virtual Town Hall
** Each month, NY Forwardists across the state meet via Google Meet to hear from a partner organization or potential endorsed candidate. Open discussion follows. This month Kyle Athayde, our endorsed candidate for NYC city council in district 4, will discuss his campaign and how we can help. Email Erik to join! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/shanemoynihan/ny_monthly_virtual_town_hall_nhovdnca1jgmnynegs4dva?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=9)** **July 24 | NOVA FWD Monthly Call
** Join Forward NOVA for our regular open meeting! We have the opportunity to make a stand for democracy and civil engagement in the face of the political chaos coming out of DC. We have a lot of work to do and need your help. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/nova_fwd_monthly_20250724?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=10)** **July 26 | Minnesota FWD Merger Convention
** The Minnesota Forward Party is considering a merger with the Minnesota Alliance Party. Join them to hear discussions by both parties involved at the Ramsey County Library in Maplewood at 11 am. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/minn_merger_convention_7_26_25?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=11)** **July 28 | Massachusetts Forward Party Statewide Meeting
** Join the Massachusetts Forward Party for our monthly statewide meeting! We've grown a ton since our convention a couple months ago and we want to tell all our Bay State Forwardists about the progress their party has had and discuss how they can get involved to help it grow even more. It's a public event so bring a friend, bring a neighbor, bring a parent, bring a spouse! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/spencertorchlightstrategiesorg/massachusetts_forward_party_statewide_meeting_july_2025?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=12)**
**[Building a New Political Path: Bob Perls and the Forward Party’s Mission in New Mexico](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=1l4Ft3q0DvtDjfhjK0JR6ueVwHnav9rkZdzfebTEMiycTqT1C8g5Dh2UhgXJfUlebzADmbM75BCLAJnw5fB1r5CSa0gzNQt7xC9p8QupHi45sYZa8byItOp4twrLY8vmbI6RHkGHR6Oxa6P4GKOGMsUG_U4AezauAQEFaSYvB_rcZ7Di-bo8SZpD3vr1bde-&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=13)** | **New Mexico Sun** **[Forward Thinking: Third Parties& The Future of North Carolina Politics](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfbl3duKKHVA2VbGw72dhMK2&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=14)** | **The Hometown Holler**
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=15) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=16) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=17) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=18) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_72&n=19) Copyright © 2025 Forward Party, all rights reserved. name: Team Jones
subject: Urgent: Republicans are dropping six figures to attack Jay’s record!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?]
Hey there, it’s Jay Jones HQ — the team dedicated to electing Democrat Jay Jones as Virginia’s next Attorney General!
We’ll get right to the point: Our first mid-month deadline of the General Election is tomorrow night — and it’s crucial we have a strong showing.
Our current AG, Jason Miyares, is failing to represent Virginians’ best interests. He’s a Trump loyalist who has let MAGA policies threaten Virginians’ jobs, economic security, and hard-earned benefits.
And if that wasn’t enough, he is the only MAGA Republican up for reelection in 2025!
Unlike Miyares, Jay has spent his career fighting for our rights and freedoms — and he’ll keep that fight going as Attorney General.
The Commonwealth needs a leader like Jay who will defend it against Trump’s onslaught of attacks. But outside groups are already spending BIG to help Miyares buy this election, friend, so we need to ensure that Jay has the resources he’ll need to fight back against Miyares’ MAGA money!
Can you please chip in $10 or more today to help us hit our mid-month fundraising goal and help us defeat Jason Miyares in November? Every dollar makes a big difference! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=10]

clean_body: ? [?] Hey there, it’s Jay Jones HQ — the team dedicated to electing Democrat Jay Jones as Virginia’s next Attorney General! We’ll get right to the point: Our first mid-month deadline of the General Election is tomorrow night — and it’s crucial we have a strong showing. Our current AG, Jason Miyares, is failing to represent Virginians’ best interests. He’s a Trump loyalist who has let MAGA policies threaten Virginians’ jobs, economic security, and hard-earned benefits. And if that wasn’t enough, he is the only MAGA Republican up for reelection in 2025! Unlike Miyares, Jay has spent his career fighting for our rights and freedoms — and he’ll keep that fight going as Attorney General. The Commonwealth needs a leader like Jay who will defend it against Trump’s onslaught of attacks. But outside groups are already spending BIG to help Miyares buy this election, friend, so we need to ensure that Jay has the resources he’ll need to fight back against Miyares’ MAGA money! Can you please chip in $10 or more today to help us hit our mid-month fundraising goal and help us defeat Jason Miyares in November? Every dollar makes a big difference! clean_body: The NRCC is already running attack ads against us. | Peter, We’re halfway through the month and we’re still falling short of where we need to be. = | = Here’s the reality: The NRCC is already running attack ads against us. Republicans are targeting NY-04 because they know flipping this seat is critical to holding onto their House majority. It’s only a matter of time before Trump pours some of his $1.4 billion war chest into Republican efforts to flip this seat back red. | | = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = We’ve come too far to let them undo our progress. Thank you for standing with me, Laura * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Disappointed, but not surprised
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Hey Peter — I want to start this note off with gratitude. Americans from all over the country made their voices heard and flooded my office (and, even more importantly, the offices of my colleagues across the aisle) with phone calls, letters, and messages demanding that we put a stop to the GOP’s disastrous budget bill. Because of your support, we were able to stand up with everything we have — our team even led a 16-hour reading of this legislation alongside organizers, advocates, and everyday Arizonans that will be hurt by Republicans’ greed. **While I am furious that the bill passed, I am not surprised at the cowardice of my colleagues.** Now our team is hitting the ground running and keeping the energy — and we need your support to empower our communities. **So please, if you have room in your budget this week, pitch in a grassroots contribution: [secure.actblue.com/donate/ya-em-july25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111539185/557581152/-912468211?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250715_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjBiMGYyNy1jYjYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwUdGeIWQ6km8_7xHT708KT6kAlOdg214XOP87NofIc=)** We can’t give up in the fight for our democracy, Peter — I refuse. I won’t let MAGA authoritarianism continue to disrupt our communities, destroy our infrastructure, and dismantle the safety nets that hardworking people need. I get it, it’s tempting to feel hopeless or to stop engaging, but we need you in this fight. I can’t thank you enough for your continued support, Peter. — Yassamin Ansari

* * *

Phoenix, AZ 85002

name: Hallie Shoffner
subject: A sixth-generation farmer running for US Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
I want you to be among the first to know...

|
---
Hi friend, Ohio House Dems said I could reach out with some exciting news. **I’m Hallie Shoffner – a sixth-generation Arkansas farmer – and I want you to be among the first to know I’m running for U.S. Senate.** | **[BE A FOUNDING DONOR>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111539302/557581866/-1915912113?refcode=hs-launch-em-ohiohousedems&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGE2Y2Q0YS1jYjYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VEL_I5bnkevCvfOIGjtmdMAhuZNRPQUule6_ota7o1A= "https://secure.actblue.com/")**
---
I'm stepping up because too many hardworking people in Arkansas and across the country are being shoved to the back of the line. The farmer. The truck mechanic. The single mom pulling a double shift just to make ends meet. And for the last ten years, our current senator, Tom Cotton, has made their lives harder.
* He voted _against_ the Farm Bill – _twice_ ,
* Handed tax breaks to billionaires while blue-collar families got squeezed,
* And is more interested in chasing headlines than helping the people who actually make this state run.

Earlier this year, I had to make the hardest decision of my life: I shut down my family's farm, not because we didn't work hard, but because Washington's broken policies made it impossible to keep going.
_**So if I can't farm, I'm going to fight. For families. For fairness. For Arkansas.**_
This campaign is about making Arkansas work for the people who call it home. Folks who wake up early, do their jobs, raise their kids, and ask for nothing more than a fair shot. I'm running to ensure that family farmers aren't left behind, that programs like Medicaid and Social Security remain strong, and that we lower the cost of living so families can move forward, not fall behind.
Now here's the truth: **To compete in this race, we need to prove Arkansas is in play, and that starts today.**
[**We've set a 24-hour fundraising goal to show the strength of this campaign from the jump. Will you split a donation between our campaign and Ohio House Dems to help us gain the momentum we need to take on Tom Cotton?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111539305/557581872/-1915912113?refcode=hs-launch-em-ohiohousedems&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGE2Y2Q0YS1jYjYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VEL_I5bnkevCvfOIGjtmdMAhuZNRPQUule6_ota7o1A=)

body:
---

| | | | | |

| |
---
| | | If you’re like me, then you don’t need to put a bullet through a dime at 300 yards very often... BUT when you do, you want an optic that rises to the challenge and threads that needle. [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e39048817/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTU/LbmNsMFpyU3hYWQ/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTEyMCZhZmZfaWQ9MTIzNCZhZmZfc3ViPVdhckZpcnN0JmFmZl9zdWIyPTcxMCZmaWxlX2lkPTM1Ng/gaHbWyg/s3i642387d1) That’s why I’m so f-cking excited about this red dot I’m about to share with you. It’s called the **[Stinger Combat Sight](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e39048817/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTU/LbmNsMFpyU3hYWQ/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTEyMCZhZmZfaWQ9MTIzNCZhZmZfc3ViPVdhckZpcnN0JmFmZl9zdWIyPTcxMCZmaWxlX2lkPTM1Ng/gaHbWyg/s3i642387d1)** and it harnesses technology developed by the US Military to deliver the tightest groups possible even in the worst conditions. The Stinger is not just similar to what SEAL Team 6 used to take out Bin Laden. It’s identical. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20625%2E878179%2EOoY2nn). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20625%2E878179%2EOoY2nn).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20625%2E878179%2EOoY2nn) to request fewer emails. name: Breaking News via RTP
subject: the worst abuses of power we've seen in generations
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061225_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061225_2]
Peter,
We are watching a real-time authoritarian takeover unfold in Los Angeles — and every moment we fail to act is a moment Trump tightens his grip.
Here’s what’s happening:
🔴 Trump ordered 700 U.S. Marines into L.A. — in addition to 4,000 National Guard troops already deployed
🔴 Peaceful protesters were met with curfews, batons, tear gas, and mass arrests
🔴 Neither Governor Newsom nor Mayor Bass approved the escalation
🔴 And now — Trump is calling for Newsom’s ARREST for speaking out
This isn’t leadership.
This is dictatorship.
And if we don’t organize and fund resistance right now, we risk normalizing the worst abuses of power we’ve seen in generations.
We’re building a war chest to support Democrats at the state and local level who are directly confronting this dangerous power grab — but we can’t do it without you. Can you rush a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can to help us fight back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061225_2]

subject: We know you can’t knock on doors every day, but here’s how you can help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
|

Team, every day brings another headline that reminds us just how far Trump and GOP leadership are willing to go to put their extremist agenda ahead of everyday Americans. And GOP leadership is choosing Trump’s out-of-control, extremist agenda over their constituents. That’s why Off the Sidelines exists — to turn frustration into real momentum. We know you're paying attention. You care. And that’s exactly the kind of energy this movement needs right now. While others are playing catch-up, we're organizing early and working to reach voters where it matters most. **Here at OTS, we believe the best way to have a long-term, sustainable impact is to get to work in the “off” year.** _That’s where you come in._ Every month, we brainstorm new ways to help Democratic candidates get elected. **We don’t expect you to be on the ground with us day in and day out, but if you’re ready to get off the sidelines, becoming a monthly OTS supporter is an easy and meaningful way to help us develop a winning political strategy.** **[_If you’re committed to our mission of building up the infrastructure we need to elect Democrats nationwide, become a monthly supporter of Team OTS today._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111540039/557583599/-204835043?amount=5&recurring=yes&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.15_OTS-Recurring_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGU0N2I2MC1jZDYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XrBQjF8DDLFWHXfjeK9-pshNZlyXgWhC_eXDuDoiK2k=)** **[Start a Recurring Donation>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111540040/557583601/-204835043?amount=5&recurring=yes&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.15_OTS-Recurring_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGU0N2I2MC1jZDYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XrBQjF8DDLFWHXfjeK9-pshNZlyXgWhC_eXDuDoiK2k=)** When we build together, we win. — Team Off the Sidelines | © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

body:
A simple message for law enforcement under fire
|

Peter, **there 's a line you just don't cross in America--and attacking law enforcement is it.**

The latest assaults on ICE agents aren't an accident. They're a **DIRECT RESULT** of the Democrats' Radical, extreme, and VIOLENT language. These liberal politicians might not be pulling the trigger themselves, but they're loading the gun with every hateful word they spew.

_In this country, we don 't shoot at cops. _

And let me be crystal clear--**my message to every law enforcement officer out there is simple:** If you're being shot at... shoot back.

I stand with our ICE agents. I stand with our police. **And I stand against the chaos the Left is unleashing across this nation.** **[Will you join me?](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=a1b76c330e044a8b9b699355111cf3fe&_e=dOCI-MDNpweW2cSEyQ020LXSBXqPZzW_TlBegxS6Usyrl17srNgmBNBpF_L6ukmsa2ELEsMLJuicEB_7BJvTkOg0BxQflKzmKhAGwnKxknpQ6-kuadhVO6GXmxrfjJ-oZD5y9H4b2aSYyVtg18t_IJS46jjSoN_VIu1WUCuwKsdAIHZ6zWJE5bjIDNSF2EDps9ehSgYZnb2UY-afpozE4pzl4njgYmJXdGnQnGUU82FYKRv6gWjVmEeaItefevSLzLL6OTHfvR74gQ1wcdXf3oilfpu5E1azumV83lbaM1Y4OfgyzDa32qdCexvv71-tn7e1xFzMUs5bzjSMenVbY99zg3RakyivUY27uKuf7Rj6I_hfZBzjF8-3AyZtzxfpjayD2cgDRBNWmkA6SOjALIlWECYK3x3hGzkVTQLxrOqKkqDDBvH6N2a9uQ_ChTFvFBwyJz5ZtVjQHAwTjZc3HN1zReVdwOoKNe08u-BvJR844BQuiSv7T8DFhDLM9s42fH7DHsZlcVSEEu68Zpk6JKjtghGjZaXQK0YkmGlUviYpDxzLuuOSosdAzxY0ugHm)**

Senator Tommy Tuberville

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=a1b76c330e044a8b9b699355111cf3fe&_e=dOCI-MDNpweW2cSEyQ020LXSBXqPZzW_TlBegxS6Usyrl17srNgmBNBpF_L6ukmsa2ELEsMLJuicEB_7BJvTkOg0BxQflKzmKhAGwnKxknpQ6-kuadhVO6GXmxrfjJ-oZD5y9H4b2aSYyVtg18t_IJS46jjSoN_VIu1WUCuwKsdAIHZ6zWJE5bjIDNSF2EDpqqAAOsw71xgjOAa3pFyqoBGf8cvGreUYUIQQoY-xq-QkCqX831uQ37dfYDOgCfhgednxARxb9M2RrVGuceF67oh70kHlAqzwvRCMcimvYCNMKcay9nmLDM_8Y2hpcGvI2OOmJn7ALIREyUsPD8ERrg1yqCTD4maJt6jUu7fONqZc_nFpGPWq_5n72FiPZtxN4lo58e3sUQeazKtDEybs23b0r5YFU0iel2uyE3-oVIaER1-zv7QerQFjzkdLAlYA8NmRExvxjk7xU3NUALyeSE3hqsAZ1em5w_GJkCfookVnEUAcmnd7AwngA5YvcgCQZwI87PdM8VX658WiZNy2Fs8JbtsyMGALAU1-q90OYmApn2xD2MOPE8NlrLSfW4yk)

* * *
This is shocking, friend: The Department of Justice, under Trump’s directive, has begun investigating state and local election officials for potential criminal wrongdoing, **simply for doing their jobs. ** They’ve sent letters to officials in states like Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Minnesota, Arizona, and Colorado trying to force compliance, **and now they’re talking about laying criminal charges.** Make no mistake: this is an intimidation campaign wrapped in false claims. Election administrators have faced threats and harassment for years — and this is a shocking new level of escalation. Legal experts warn this will supercharge the political attacks already targeting leaders at the precinct, county, and state level. Many are already leaving the field because of threats, burnout, and unsafe work environments. | Peter,

It’s Carol Obando-Derstine, and I’m reaching out because we’re halfway through the month, and I need your help to stay on track with our fundraising target.

As a mom, engineer, and public servant, I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for what matters most to our community. I’ve been here in PA-07 for over two decades, listening to your concerns about healthcare, jobs, and the rising costs of living. Now, I’m ready to stand up for our district in Congress.

**But here’s the problem: we’re up against big money. Ryan Mackenzie is going to get millions from national Republicans to keep him in Congress. We need to be able to compete with their deep-pocketed donors, and we can’t afford to fall behind.**

That’s where you come in. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to help us stay competitive. A contribution of just $5 or $10 will make a huge difference in keeping this campaign strong.

[_**Can I count on your support to keep the momentum going? Every dollar helps us get ready to win next November and kick Ryan Mackenzie out of office**_**.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111542523/557586810/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-07-15_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2I5MTkyMTItZDA2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j7a2UzF2wov94lpr4M5TuIQOVBL-HD_UTqChL0emT3E=)

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: Final push before midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=2qQBUhotmSd%2B6crWXwYqtmADXNhlWPNXCPKb7wYpV5bTJtSrL9krqbBC4SvpoyGbJFH831Fu4pnwD9P4BM8t8U4owvzYDM2pmVR5gvE8KIwvpHspkxNY8g5Ba5NDexP4Ysc4M3cYWDhZJYhsR3usEybLVZhR5ezONftiLBEDZRqWYmrGk8XEOOaBaRwWXY4ZIfw6GupNzSJ1v0hm884C0wP7AGljED8v8Z4NCp2ELmp90mTi%2B0Fydp4%2B%2F3nlHoaZJ%2B3ANcgwtcaD1nqe%2BsBYO%2BSRDEBiaPTSRzdinXk4EAyWVanyTBEmm%2BMULpFg4bY1y7TOpwP3KHsV6qPtarGB2jpAndxTg73u6NQZgLwMTPlIext2A%2FytwjwpRlKC%2BrUCEEJDhHEoji7jGqz68PlwNgQUq2YggV9NEgF5SYayAKqgnve6wP%2BQtGlOzuEBeFQg]

# [#]
It's Raul. We’ve got a critical mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and I’m just going to say it: We cannot afford to fall short.

Our opponents are already raising some serious money — and if we let them take CA-25, Republicans in Washington will keep their grip on power, and they’ll keep the chaos going.

This means more cuts. More chaos. More cruelty. That’s why flipping the House in 2026 is so urgent — and why CA-25 is one of the most important battlegrounds in the country.

But, we can’t get there if we fall behind now.

We’ve got a critical mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and we still need to raise $5,000 to stay on track. Can you chip in $10 before midnight to show we’re ready to fight back? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-july25?amount=10&refcode= SBD_RR_EM_FR_071525_MM3_30DO30DNTL_D3_S1

We’ve taken on tough fights before and won. Let’s do it again.

— Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Why I’m focused on working together.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
We can’t let the same political games come to Michigan |
#
---
Folks, My girls are all grown up now, but I’ll never forget the early days of juggling a newborn, caring for a mom with cancer, and having a full-time job. It was a lot — but it wasn’t unique. I know so many Michigan families have gone through the same tough challenges. It led me to serve, and it still drives me to keep fighting for them in Lansing. That’s why I’m _so_ frustrated watching Republicans in Congress ram through their massive new spending bill — making life harder for Michigan families by cutting health care, raising costs, and handing tax breaks to billionaires. **This is what happens when leaders refuse to work together or even try to solve problems.** I’ve always believed that public service isn’t about scoring political points. It’s about having a plan, listening to people — _even those who disagree_ — and delivering real results. That’s how we expanded Medicaid, created good-paying jobs, won things like free pre-K for Michigan kids, and defended our freedoms. And you know what? _**It’s also how you win elections.**_ You show people you’re serious about making their lives better. I’m determined to keep building on our progress. But the same people funding Republicans in Congress want to flip Michigan and put their allies in charge. With your help, we’ll show them we’re stronger. **[Tonight’s our mid-month deadline, and we’re still behind. If you can, I’m asking you to help us catch up before the deadline passes and help us prepare for the long fight ahead:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111544284/557589336/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250715_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRlOTBlZDYtZDI2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iK1YifI1OOcO-MMS7ZYJ74YPgYKerSACuhgOjEXO4pA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111544285/557589337/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250715_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRlOTBlZDYtZDI2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iK1YifI1OOcO-MMS7ZYJ74YPgYKerSACuhgOjEXO4pA=)

## **Tell Senators : Say NO to Emil Bove**
The Senate is preparing to vote on a lifetime appointment for Emil Bove on the Third Circuit Court of Appeals. He is a dangerous threat to the rule of law. [**_Tell your senator to vote NO on the nomination of Emil Bove._**](https://links.messages.lcv.)

---
| | The Senate is deciding whether to give Emil Bove, a dangerous Trump henchman, a lifetime position on the powerful Third Circuit Court of Appeals. Bove, a Justice Department official and former Trump attorney, has been accused of scheming to [_defy court orders_](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrM8jg4ES9/N0phaFNBZVdYZVNsRWsyK0pheEErSVJKZFQ3bFVINXZwdkR4UDJLRkZOWDNyc2p6VnFoK2lFTW1LemdXVVZrdGxqNHViQTc5S25FdmFPSSs2dVljWEd4QWx3UjRTMFRYUVNJaTRob3dDREE9S0/), [_leading a purge_](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/6Lg6BP2d-vML/N0phaFNBZVdYZVNsRWsyK0pheEErSVJKZFQ3bFVINXZwdkR4UDJLRkZOWDNyc2p6VnFoK2lFTW1LemdXVVZrdGxqNHViQTc5S25FdmFPSSs2dVljWEd4QWx3UjRTMFRYUVNJaTRob3dDREE9S0/) of January 6 investigators, and [_extorting New York's mayor_](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_sLDvG0Hm/N0phaFNBZVdYZVNsRWsyK0pheEErSVJKZFQ3bFVINXZwdkR4UDJLRkZOWDNyc2p6VnFoK2lFTW1LemdXVVZrdGxqNHViQTc5S25FdmFPSSs2dVljWEd4QWx3UjRTMFRYUVNJaTRob3dDREE9S0/) into aiding Trump’s mass deportation agenda.
---
| | These unprecedented abuses of power cannot be rewarded with a lifetime seat on a powerful federal court.
[**_Sign your name and tell your senator to vote NO on the nomination of Emil Bove to the United States Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit._**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~)
---
| | If confirmed, Bove would decide cases that protect or endanger our air, water, land, and voting rights. But he’s already proven he has no interest in respecting our Constitution or our freedoms. Our rights and protections depend on judges who can be trusted to honor the Constitution. Bove falls FAR short of that standard.
---
| | In his brief tenure at the Deputy Attorney General’s office over the past five months, Bove has allegedly engaged in multiple unprecedented [_abuses of power_](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/YYbZBxW6vdJ-/N0phaFNBZVdYZVNsRWsyK0pheEErSVJKZFQ3bFVINXZwdkR4UDJLRkZOWDNyc2p6VnFoK2lFTW1LemdXVVZrdGxqNHViQTc5S25FdmFPSSs2dVljWEd4QWx3UjRTMFRYUVNJaTRob3dDREE9S0/). And just LAST WEEK, a Justice Department whistleblower said that Bove [plotted](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_RcA83wdf-/N0phaFNBZVdYZVNsRWsyK0pheEErSVJKZFQ3bFVINXZwdkR4UDJLRkZOWDNyc2p6VnFoK2lFTW1LemdXVVZrdGxqNHViQTc5S25FdmFPSSs2dVljWEd4QWx3UjRTMFRYUVNJaTRob3dDREE9S0/) to defy, circumvent, and lie to federal courts regarding illegal deportations.
---
| | We cannot have someone this dangerous sitting on one of the most powerful courts in the country, Peter. [**_Sign the petition and tell your senator to vote against the nomination of Emil Bove. Our rights, our communities, and our environment depend on it._**](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
| | Thank you for all you do.
---
| | Doug Lindner
Senior Director of Judiciary & Democracy
League of Conservation Voters
---

clean_body: | | | Friend, it’s our favorite time of the year ... yard sign time. Democrats control the Virginia House of Delegates 51-49 ... a one seat margin. Mom, social worker, and proud Latina immigrant Elizabeth Guzman is running to flip VA-HD22 against a MAGA Republican, in a district Trump lost. Grassroots donors like you helped us expand our budget for big 4’ x 8’ road signs. Can we count on your help to buy yard signs to be placed across Prince William County? **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. **** Thanks for your support, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . Especially when the news is filled with terrifying headlines about Trump and his extremist allies’ latest threats to our democracy. But I’ve seen the power of grassroots movements. When thousands of Democrats step up together, even with just a few bucks, we can’t be ignored. Your $3 helps Speak Up PAC support candidates who are committed to fighting for democracy, like the Democratic Party of Georgia. Your $3 helps fund groups putting out hard-hitting ads, organizing in battleground states, and turning out the voters who decide elections, like the Democratic Party of Georgia. Your $3 helps us take on Trump’s lies, expose his allies, and flip the seats that will decide control of Congress. If just 7,500 supporters chipped in $3 before midnight, we’ll hit our $60,000 goal – and keep this important fight going strong. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: A war criminal in Washington, D.C.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

While the Israeli military continues to block life-saving aid and kill
Palestinian civilians in Gaza, leaders in both the Republican and
Democratic Parties welcomed Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to D.C. with
open arms last week.

It was his third visit to the U.S. this year alone.

As Netanyahu cozied up to AIPAC-backed members of Congress, Israeli forces
shot more Palestinians seeking aid, and dropped bombs on entire families,
while Israeli settlers in the West Bank killed a young Palestinian
American from Florida — the 7th U.S. citizen to be murdered in the West
Bank since October 7th, 2023.

Democrats and Republicans came together to celebrate a war criminal
committing horrific atrocities against children and the Palestinian
people, all while remaining silent on Israeli military and settler
violence taking American lives.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250715-signup-israel-arms-embargo/?source=em20250715-36846&akid=36846%2E1203867%2EPZ2Kez ]Tweet from Prem Thakker: If you’re American, consider these series of
events — Wednesday: We ask Republicans if they knew how many Americans
have been killed in Palestine and Lebanon. None did. Thursday: Republicans
and Democrats smile alongside Netanyahu. Friday: Israeli settlers kill
another American.

Justice Democrats’ members like Rashida Tlaib, Delia Ramirez, Ilhan Omar,
and Summer Lee are leading the call for an arms embargo against Israel,
but we need to demand that every Democrat stand up and do what’s right.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250715-signup-israel-arms-embargo/?source=em20250715-36846&akid=36846%2E1203867%2EPZ2Kez ]Call on Congress to freeze all weapons transfers and military aid to
Israel until Netanyahu ends the aid blockade and violent attacks on
Palestinians!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250715-signup-israel-arms-embargo/?source=em20250715-36846&akid=36846%2E1203867%2EPZ2Kez ]Add Your Name

We can’t give up — let’s keep up the pressure to stop this genocide and
ethnic cleansing as soon as possible.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250715-36846-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36846_1203867_PZ2Kez&akid=36846%2E1203867%2EPZ2Kez

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36846%2E1203867%2EPZ2Kez

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: | | | Friend, In the past week or so, Donald Trump, Lauren Boebert, and Republicans in DC have passed a bill ripping healthcare from millions of Americans for a billionaire tax break; Trump has covered up the Epstein files; he has threatened to strip citizenship from an American because he doesn’t like them; and ICE has continued to carry out military-backed operations against American communities. What have establishment Democrats like Chuck Schumer been doing to fight back? Tweeting about Love Island. What else would the Senate Minority Leader be doing during a national crisis? This is not the sign of someone who is up to the task to fight for the people and defend our country from the likes of Lauren Boebert, who want to rip our country apart and loot our government for all its worth. I’m offering a different vision. Not one of hate, but one of dedication to fighting for the people I represent. Being an elected official shouldn’t be about getting rich the way it is for Boebert, and it sure as hell shouldn’t be about sending strongly worded letters and stupid pop-culture tweets. It should be about governing. About solving the actual problems facing our country. And about looking at a status quo that isn’t working and dedicating yourself to changing things for the better. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you so much, friend. —John Padora John Padora is a manufacturing engineer and candidate for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District. He’s running to bring commonsense leadership to Eastern Colorado—fighting for farmers, working families, and real solutions, not political theater. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111545154/557591515/1833512440?refcode=250715_MFC_SpeakUP_HumblyAsking&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzM2NTIzMy1kNTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sm3NbtTtjbi0fZ6rnFgNbHUkdaInnYQjWFWm07_ctjI=) Folks, I’ll make this quick: [**I’m humbly asking you to chip in $3 to my Speak Up PAC and Seth Moulton.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111545155/557591516/1833512440?refcode=250715_MFC_SpeakUP_HumblyAsking&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzM2NTIzMy1kNTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sm3NbtTtjbi0fZ6rnFgNbHUkdaInnYQjWFWm07_ctjI=) I know – $3 might not sound like much. Especially when the news is filled with terrifying headlines about Trump and his extremist allies’ latest threats to our democracy. But I’ve seen the power of grassroots movements. When thousands of Democrats step up together, even with just a few bucks, we can’t be ignored. Your $3 helps Speak Up PAC support candidates who are committed to fighting for democracy, like Seth Moulton. Your $3 helps fund groups putting out hard-hitting ads, organizing in battleground states, and turning out the voters who decide elections, like Seth Moulton. Your $3 helps us take on Trump’s lies, expose his allies, and flip the seats that will decide control of Congress. If just 7,500 supporters chipped in $3 before midnight, we’ll hit our $60,000 goal – and keep this important fight going strong. [**So please folks, will you please split a $3 donation to power Speak Up PAC and Seth Moulton's grassroots efforts?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111545156/557591517/1833512440?refcode=250715_MFC_SpeakUP_HumblyAsking&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzM2NTIzMy1kNTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sm3NbtTtjbi0fZ6rnFgNbHUkdaInnYQjWFWm07_ctjI=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111545157/557591518/-1446296926?refcode=250715_MFC_SpeakUP_HumblyAsking&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzM2NTIzMy1kNTYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sm3NbtTtjbi0fZ6rnFgNbHUkdaInnYQjWFWm07_ctjI=) Sincere thanks, Stacey

When thousands of Democrats step up together, even with just a few bucks, we can’t be ignored. Your $3 helps Speak Up PAC support candidates who are committed to fighting for democracy, like Seth Moulton. Your $3 helps fund groups putting out hard-hitting ads, organizing in battleground states, and turning out the voters who decide elections, like Seth Moulton. Your $3 helps us take on Trump’s lies, expose his allies, and flip the seats that will decide control of Congress. If just 7,500 supporters chipped in $3 before midnight, we’ll hit our $60,000 goal – and keep this important fight going strong. = = Sincere thanks, Stacey [content goes here] Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

name: John's iPhone
subject: just heard from my team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’re still short of our mid-month goal
| | |
---
Hey Derek, John Fetterman here.
Just stepped out of a meeting and heard from my team. **We’re still short of our $30,000 mid-month goal** , and the deadline’s _tonight at midnight_.
This is our first big deadline since the GOP jammed their Big, Ugly Bill through Congress. The one that guts Medicaid and gives _another_ handout to the rich.

Now we’re taking this fight to the ballot box, and we need a war chest to come out swinging. Here's what that means:
✅ Protect the Democrats who had the guts to vote NO
🚫 Make damn sure the Republicans who sold us out never step foot in Congress again
**[We’re so close to closing the gap. Can you pitch in $10, $25 – whatever you can swing – to help us hit our goal and show the GOP we’re DONE being pushed around?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50993?refcode=jtk174-fr-fl&t=1&akid=10203%2E434096%2EBqJOsc)**
Appreciate you,
John ❤️

Sent from my iPhone
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk174-fr-fl-footer&t=2&refcode2=10203_434096_BqJOsc&akid=10203%2E434096%2EBqJOsc)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
